search_text: Test-Time Distribution Normalization for Contrastively Learned Vision-language Models 对比学习视觉语言模型的测试时间分布标准化 Advances in the field of vision-language contrastive learning have made it possible for many downstream applications to be carried out efficiently and accurately by simply taking the dot product between image and text representations. One of the most representative approaches proposed recently known as CLIP has garnered widespread adoption due to its effectiveness. CLIP is trained with an InfoNCE loss that takes into account both positive and negative samples to help learn a much more robust representation space. This paper reveals that the common downstream practice of taking a dot product is only a zeroth-order approximation of the optimization goal, resulting in a loss of information during test-time. Intuitively, since the model has been optimized based on the InfoNCE loss, test-time procedures should also be in alignment. The question lies in how one can retrieve any semblance of negative samples information during inference in a computationally efficient way. To this end, we propose Distribution Normalization (DN), where we approximate the mean representation of a batch of test samples and use such a mean to represent what would be analogous to negative samples in the InfoNCE loss. DN requires no retraining or fine-tuning and can be effortlessly applied during inference. Extensive experiments on a wide variety of downstream tasks exhibit a clear advantage of DN over the dot product on top of other existing test-time augmentation methods. 视觉语言对比学习领域的进步使得许多下游应用程序可以通过简单地获取图像和文本表示之间的点积来高效、准确地执行。最近提出的最具代表性的方法之一称为 CLIP，由于其有效性而得到了广泛采用。 CLIP 使用 InfoNCE 损失进行训练，该损失同时考虑正样本和负样本，以帮助学习更稳健的表示空间。本文揭示了采用点积的常见下游实践只是优化目标的零阶近似，导致测试期间信息丢失。直观上，由于模型是根据 InfoNCE 损失进行优化的，因此测试时间程序也应该保持一致。问题在于如何在推理过程中以一种计算有效的方式检索任何类似的负样本信息。为此，我们提出分布归一化（DN），我们近似一批测试样本的均值表示，并使用这样的均值来表示类似于 InfoNCE 损失中的负样本。 DN 不需要重新训练或微调，并且可以在推理过程中轻松应用。对各种下游任务的大量实验表明，在其他现有的测试时间增强方法之上，DN 相对于点积具有明显的优势。 本文提出了一种名为分布归一化（DN）的方法，旨在通过在测试时对齐InfoNCE损失的优化目标，提升对比学习视觉-语言模型的下游任务性能。 Yifei Zhou,Juntao Ren,Fengyu Li,Ramin Zabih,Ser-Nam Lim cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Guoli Wang,Pingping Wang,Jinyu Cong,Kunmeng Liu,Benzheng Wei
title: BB-GCN: A Bi-modal Bridged Graph Convolutional Network for Multi-label Chest X-Ray Recognition
title_zh: BB-GCN：用于多标签胸部 X 射线识别的双模桥接图卷积网络
comment: under Computers in Biology and Medicine submission
comments: under Computers in Biology and Medicine submission
abstract: Multi-label chest X-ray (CXR) recognition involves simultaneously diagnosing and identifying multiple labels for different pathologies. Since pathological labels have rich information about their relationship to each other, modeling the co-occurrence dependencies between pathological labels is essential to improve recognition performance. However, previous methods rely on state variable coding and attention mechanisms-oriented to model local label information, and lack learning of global co-occurrence relationships between labels. Furthermore, these methods roughly integrate image features and label embedding, ignoring the alignment and compactness problems in cross-modal vector fusion.To solve these problems, a Bi-modal Bridged Graph Convolutional Network (BB-GCN) model is proposed. This model mainly consists of a backbone module, a pathology Label Co-occurrence relationship Embedding (LCE) module, and a Transformer Bridge Graph (TBG) module. Specifically, the backbone module obtains image visual feature representation. The LCE module utilizes a graph to model the global co-occurrence relationship between multiple labels and employs graph convolutional networks for learning inference. The TBG module bridges the cross-modal vectors more compactly and efficiently through the GroupSum method.We have evaluated the effectiveness of the proposed BB-GCN in two large-scale CXR datasets (ChestX-Ray14 and CheXpert). Our model achieved state-of-the-art performance: the mean AUC scores for the 14 pathologies were 0.835 and 0.813, respectively.The proposed LCE and TBG modules can jointly effectively improve the recognition performance of BB-GCN. Our model also achieves satisfactory results in multi-label chest X-ray recognition and exhibits highly competitive generalization performance.
summary: Multi-label chest X-ray (CXR) recognition involves simultaneously diagnosing and identifying multiple labels for different pathologies. Since pathological labels have rich information about their relationship to each other, modeling the co-occurrence dependencies between pathological labels is essential to improve recognition performance. However, previous methods rely on state variable coding and attention mechanisms-oriented to model local label information, and lack learning of global co-occurrence relationships between labels. Furthermore, these methods roughly integrate image features and label embedding, ignoring the alignment and compactness problems in cross-modal vector fusion.To solve these problems, a Bi-modal Bridged Graph Convolutional Network (BB-GCN) model is proposed. This model mainly consists of a backbone module, a pathology Label Co-occurrence relationship Embedding (LCE) module, and a Transformer Bridge Graph (TBG) module. Specifically, the backbone module obtains image visual feature representation. The LCE module utilizes a graph to model the global co-occurrence relationship between multiple labels and employs graph convolutional networks for learning inference. The TBG module bridges the cross-modal vectors more compactly and efficiently through the GroupSum method.We have evaluated the effectiveness of the proposed BB-GCN in two large-scale CXR datasets (ChestX-Ray14 and CheXpert). Our model achieved state-of-the-art performance: the mean AUC scores for the 14 pathologies were 0.835 and 0.813, respectively.The proposed LCE and TBG modules can jointly effectively improve the recognition performance of BB-GCN. Our model also achieves satisfactory results in multi-label chest X-ray recognition and exhibits highly competitive generalization performance.
abstract_zh: 多标签胸部 X 光 (CXR) 识别涉及同时诊断和识别不同病理的多个标签。由于病理标签具有关于彼此关系的丰富信息，因此对病理标签之间的共现依赖关系进行建模对于提高识别性能至关重要。然而，先前的方法依赖于状态变量编码和面向注意力机制来建模局部标签信息，缺乏对标签之间全局共现关系的学习。此外，这些方法粗略地整合了图像特征和标签嵌入，忽略了跨模态向量融合中的对齐和紧致性问题。为了解决这些问题，提出了双模态桥接图卷积网络（BB-GCN）模型。该模型主要由骨干模块、病理标签共现关系嵌入（LCE）模块和变压器桥图（TBG）模块组成。具体来说，主干模块获得图像视觉特征表示。 LCE模块利用图对多个标签之间的全局共现关系进行建模，并利用图卷积网络进行学习推理。 TBG 模块通过 GroupSum 方法更紧凑、更高效地桥接跨模态向量。我们在两个大型 CXR 数据集（ChestX-Ray14 和 CheXpert）中评估了所提出的 BB-GCN 的有效性。我们的模型实现了最先进的性能：14 种病理的平均 AUC 分数分别为 0.835 和 0.813。所提出的 LCE 和 TBG 模块可以共同有效地提高 BB-GCN 的识别性能。我们的模型在多标签胸部 X 射线识别中也取得了令人满意的结果，并表现出极具竞争力的泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双模态桥接图卷积网络（BB-GCN），用于改进多标签胸部X光片的病理识别，通过建模标签共现关系和优化跨模态特征融合。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在建模标签全局共现关系和跨模态特征对齐方面存在不足，导致多标签胸部X光片识别性能受限。
AI.method: BB-GCN包含三个模块：1) 主干网络提取图像视觉特征；2) 标签共现关系嵌入模块（LCE）通过图卷积学习标签间全局依赖；3) 变换器桥接图（TBG）模块利用GroupSum方法实现跨模态向量高效对齐。
AI.result: 在ChestX-Ray14和CheXpert数据集上，BB-GCN在14种病理的平均AUC分别达到0.835和0.813，达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: LCE和TBG模块协同提升了模型性能，BB-GCN在多标签胸部X光识别任务中表现出优异的泛化能力。

authors_text: Jeremiah Blocki,Seunghoon Lee,Tamalika Mukherjee,Samson Zhou
title: Differentially Private $L_2$-Heavy Hitters in the Sliding Window Model
title_zh: 差分隐私 $L_2$ - 滑动窗口模型中的重磅人物
abstract: The data management of large companies often prioritize more recent data, as a source of higher accuracy prediction than outdated data. For example, the Facebook data policy retains user search histories for $6$ months while the Google data retention policy states that browser information may be stored for up to $9$ months. These policies are captured by the sliding window model, in which only the most recent $W$ statistics form the underlying dataset. In this paper, we consider the problem of privately releasing the $L_2$-heavy hitters in the sliding window model, which include $L_p$-heavy hitters for $p\le 2$ and in some sense are the strongest possible guarantees that can be achieved using polylogarithmic space, but cannot be handled by existing techniques due to the sub-additivity of the $L_2$ norm. Moreover, existing non-private sliding window algorithms use the smooth histogram framework, which has high sensitivity. To overcome these barriers, we introduce the first differentially private algorithm for $L_2$-heavy hitters in the sliding window model by initiating a number of $L_2$-heavy hitter algorithms across the stream with significantly lower threshold. Similarly, we augment the algorithms with an approximate frequency tracking algorithm with significantly higher accuracy. We then use smooth sensitivity and statistical distance arguments to show that we can add noise proportional to an estimation of the $L_2$ norm. To the best of our knowledge, our techniques are the first to privately release statistics that are related to a sub-additive function in the sliding window model, and may be of independent interest to future differentially private algorithmic design in the sliding window model.
summary: The data management of large companies often prioritize more recent data, as a source of higher accuracy prediction than outdated data. For example, the Facebook data policy retains user search histories for $6$ months while the Google data retention policy states that browser information may be stored for up to $9$ months. These policies are captured by the sliding window model, in which only the most recent $W$ statistics form the underlying dataset. In this paper, we consider the problem of privately releasing the $L_2$-heavy hitters in the sliding window model, which include $L_p$-heavy hitters for $p\le 2$ and in some sense are the strongest possible guarantees that can be achieved using polylogarithmic space, but cannot be handled by existing techniques due to the sub-additivity of the $L_2$ norm. Moreover, existing non-private sliding window algorithms use the smooth histogram framework, which has high sensitivity. To overcome these barriers, we introduce the first differentially private algorithm for $L_2$-heavy hitters in the sliding window model by initiating a number of $L_2$-heavy hitter algorithms across the stream with significantly lower threshold. Similarly, we augment the algorithms with an approximate frequency tracking algorithm with significantly higher accuracy. We then use smooth sensitivity and statistical distance arguments to show that we can add noise proportional to an estimation of the $L_2$ norm. To the best of our knowledge, our techniques are the first to privately release statistics that are related to a sub-additive function in the sliding window model, and may be of independent interest to future differentially private algorithmic design in the sliding window model.
abstract_zh: 大公司的数据管理通常优先考虑更新的数据，作为比过时数据更准确预测的来源。例如，Facebook 数据政策将用户搜索历史记录保留 6 美元每月，而 Google 数据保留政策则规定浏览器信息最多可存储 9 美元每月。这些策略由滑动窗口模型捕获，其中只有最新的 $W$ 统计数据构成基础数据集。在本文中，我们考虑在滑动窗口模型中私下释放$L_2$重击者的问题，其中包括$p\le 2$的$L_p$重击者，并且在某种意义上是使用多对数空间可以实现的最强可能保证，但由于$L_2$范数的次可加性而无法通过现有技术来处理。而且，现有的非私有滑动窗口算法采用平滑直方图框架，具有较高的灵敏度。为了克服这些障碍，我们通过在阈值显着降低的流中启动多个 $L_2$-heavy hitters 算法，在滑动窗口模型中引入第一个针对 $L_2$-heavy hitters 的差分私有算法。同样，我们使用近似频率跟踪算法来增强算法，其精度明显更高。然后，我们使用平滑灵敏度和统计距离参数来表明我们可以添加与 $L_2$ 范数的估计成比例的噪声。据我们所知，我们的技术是第一个私下发布与滑动窗口模型中的子加性函数相关的统计数据的技术，并且可能对滑动窗口模型中未来的差分隐私算法设计具有独立的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在滑动窗口模型下私有发布$L_2$重 hitters的算法，解决了现有技术因$L_2$范数次可加性导致的难题。
AI.motivation: 实际数据管理（如Facebook、Google）依赖近期数据，而现有非私有滑动窗口算法因高敏感度和无法处理$L_2$范数次可加性，难以满足隐私需求。
AI.method: 设计低阈值$L_2$重 hitters算法并结合高精度频率跟踪，利用平滑敏感度与统计距离添加噪声，实现与$L_2$范数估计成比例的隐私保护。
AI.result: 首次在滑动窗口模型中实现子可加函数的差分隐私统计发布，方法具有独立研究价值。
AI.conclusion: 该技术突破了现有障碍，为滑动窗口模型下的隐私算法设计提供了新范式，可能推动相关领域研究进展。

search_text: Differentially Private $L_2$-Heavy Hitters in the Sliding Window Model 差分隐私 $L_2$ - 滑动窗口模型中的重磅人物 The data management of large companies often prioritize more recent data, as a source of higher accuracy prediction than outdated data. For example, the Facebook data policy retains user search histories for $6$ months while the Google data retention policy states that browser information may be stored for up to $9$ months. These policies are captured by the sliding window model, in which only the most recent $W$ statistics form the underlying dataset. In this paper, we consider the problem of privately releasing the $L_2$-heavy hitters in the sliding window model, which include $L_p$-heavy hitters for $p\le 2$ and in some sense are the strongest possible guarantees that can be achieved using polylogarithmic space, but cannot be handled by existing techniques due to the sub-additivity of the $L_2$ norm. Moreover, existing non-private sliding window algorithms use the smooth histogram framework, which has high sensitivity. To overcome these barriers, we introduce the first differentially private algorithm for $L_2$-heavy hitters in the sliding window model by initiating a number of $L_2$-heavy hitter algorithms across the stream with significantly lower threshold. Similarly, we augment the algorithms with an approximate frequency tracking algorithm with significantly higher accuracy. We then use smooth sensitivity and statistical distance arguments to show that we can add noise proportional to an estimation of the $L_2$ norm. To the best of our knowledge, our techniques are the first to privately release statistics that are related to a sub-additive function in the sliding window model, and may be of independent interest to future differentially private algorithmic design in the sliding window model. 大公司的数据管理通常优先考虑更新的数据，作为比过时数据更准确预测的来源。例如，Facebook 数据政策将用户搜索历史记录保留 6 美元每月，而 Google 数据保留政策则规定浏览器信息最多可存储 9 美元每月。这些策略由滑动窗口模型捕获，其中只有最新的 $W$ 统计数据构成基础数据集。在本文中，我们考虑在滑动窗口模型中私下释放$L_2$重击者的问题，其中包括$p\le 2$的$L_p$重击者，并且在某种意义上是使用多对数空间可以实现的最强可能保证，但由于$L_2$范数的次可加性而无法通过现有技术来处理。而且，现有的非私有滑动窗口算法采用平滑直方图框架，具有较高的灵敏度。为了克服这些障碍，我们通过在阈值显着降低的流中启动多个 $L_2$-heavy hitters 算法，在滑动窗口模型中引入第一个针对 $L_2$-heavy hitters 的差分私有算法。同样，我们使用近似频率跟踪算法来增强算法，其精度明显更高。然后，我们使用平滑灵敏度和统计距离参数来表明我们可以添加与 $L_2$ 范数的估计成比例的噪声。据我们所知，我们的技术是第一个私下发布与滑动窗口模型中的子加性函数相关的统计数据的技术，并且可能对滑动窗口模型中未来的差分隐私算法设计具有独立的兴趣。 本文提出了一种在滑动窗口模型下私有发布$L_2$重 hitters的算法，解决了现有技术因$L_2$范数次可加性导致的难题。 Jeremiah Blocki,Seunghoon Lee,Tamalika Mukherjee,Samson Zhou cs.DS

authors_text: Tian Guo
title: Learning Mixture Structure on Multi-Source Time Series for Probabilistic Forecasting
title_zh: 学习多源时间序列的混合结构以进行概率预测
comment: A causal view on dynamical systems workshop at the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Sys- tems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: A causal view on dynamical systems workshop at the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Sys- tems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: In many data-driven applications, collecting data from different sources is increasingly desirable for enhancing performance. In this paper, we are interested in the problem of probabilistic forecasting with multi-source time series. We propose a neural mixture structure-based probability model for learning different predictive relations and their adaptive combinations from multi-source time series. We present the prediction and uncertainty quantification methods that apply to different distributions of target variables. Additionally, given the imbalanced and unstable behaviors observed during the direct training of the proposed mixture model, we develop a phased learning method and provide a theoretical analysis. In experimental evaluations, the mixture model trained by the phased learning exhibits competitive performance on both point and probabilistic prediction metrics. Meanwhile, the proposed uncertainty conditioned error suggests the potential of the mixture model's uncertainty score as a reliability indicator of predictions.
summary: In many data-driven applications, collecting data from different sources is increasingly desirable for enhancing performance. In this paper, we are interested in the problem of probabilistic forecasting with multi-source time series. We propose a neural mixture structure-based probability model for learning different predictive relations and their adaptive combinations from multi-source time series. We present the prediction and uncertainty quantification methods that apply to different distributions of target variables. Additionally, given the imbalanced and unstable behaviors observed during the direct training of the proposed mixture model, we develop a phased learning method and provide a theoretical analysis. In experimental evaluations, the mixture model trained by the phased learning exhibits competitive performance on both point and probabilistic prediction metrics. Meanwhile, the proposed uncertainty conditioned error suggests the potential of the mixture model's uncertainty score as a reliability indicator of predictions.
abstract_zh: 在许多数据驱动的应用程序中，为了提高性能，越来越需要从不同来源收集数据。在本文中，我们感兴趣的是多源时间序列的概率预测问题。我们提出了一种基于神经混合结构的概率模型，用于从多源时间序列中学习不同的预测关系及其自适应组合。我们提出了适用于目标变量不同分布的预测和不确定性量化方法。此外，考虑到在所提出的混合模型的直接训练过程中观察到的不平衡和不稳定行为，我们开发了一种分阶段学习方法并提供了理论分析。在实验评估中，通过分阶段学习训练的混合模型在点预测指标和概率预测指标上都表现出有竞争力的性能。同时，所提出的不确定性条件误差表明了混合模型的不确定性得分作为预测可靠性指标的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经混合结构的概率模型，用于从多源时间序列中学习预测关系及其自适应组合，以提升概率预测性能。
AI.motivation: 多源数据融合可增强预测性能，但现有方法难以有效建模多源时间序列的复杂依赖关系及不确定性。
AI.method: 设计神经混合结构模型学习多源数据的预测关系，结合分阶段训练方法解决直接训练中的不平衡问题，并提出基于不确定性的误差指标。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在点预测和概率预测指标上表现优异，且不确定性评分可作为预测可靠性指标。
AI.conclusion: 混合结构模型通过分阶段学习有效捕捉多源时间序列特征，为概率预测提供了新的方法框架。

authors_text: Sudipta Kar,Giuseppe Castellucci,Simone Filice,Shervin Malmasi,Oleg Rokhlenko
title: Preventing Catastrophic Forgetting in Continual Learning of New Natural Language Tasks
title_zh: 在持续学习新的自然语言任务时防止灾难性遗忘
abstract: Multi-Task Learning (MTL) is widely-accepted in Natural Language Processing as a standard technique for learning multiple related tasks in one model. Training an MTL model requires having the training data for all tasks available at the same time. As systems usually evolve over time, (e.g., to support new functionalities), adding a new task to an existing MTL model usually requires retraining the model from scratch on all the tasks and this can be time-consuming and computationally expensive. Moreover, in some scenarios, the data used to train the original training may be no longer available, for example, due to storage or privacy concerns. In this paper, we approach the problem of incrementally expanding MTL models' capability to solve new tasks over time by distilling the knowledge of an already trained model on n tasks into a new one for solving n+1 tasks. To avoid catastrophic forgetting, we propose to exploit unlabeled data from the same distributions of the old tasks. Our experiments on publicly available benchmarks show that such a technique dramatically benefits the distillation by preserving the already acquired knowledge (i.e., preventing up to 20% performance drops on old tasks) while obtaining good performance on the incrementally added tasks. Further, we also show that our approach is beneficial in practical settings by using data from a leading voice assistant.
summary: Multi-Task Learning (MTL) is widely-accepted in Natural Language Processing as a standard technique for learning multiple related tasks in one model. Training an MTL model requires having the training data for all tasks available at the same time. As systems usually evolve over time, (e.g., to support new functionalities), adding a new task to an existing MTL model usually requires retraining the model from scratch on all the tasks and this can be time-consuming and computationally expensive. Moreover, in some scenarios, the data used to train the original training may be no longer available, for example, due to storage or privacy concerns. In this paper, we approach the problem of incrementally expanding MTL models' capability to solve new tasks over time by distilling the knowledge of an already trained model on n tasks into a new one for solving n+1 tasks. To avoid catastrophic forgetting, we propose to exploit unlabeled data from the same distributions of the old tasks. Our experiments on publicly available benchmarks show that such a technique dramatically benefits the distillation by preserving the already acquired knowledge (i.e., preventing up to 20% performance drops on old tasks) while obtaining good performance on the incrementally added tasks. Further, we also show that our approach is beneficial in practical settings by using data from a leading voice assistant.
abstract_zh: 多任务学习 (MTL) 在自然语言处理中被广泛接受，作为在一个模型中学习多个相关任务的标准技术。训练 MTL 模型需要同时拥有所有可用任务的训练数据。由于系统通常会随着时间的推移而发展（例如，为了支持新功能），向现有 MTL 模型添加新任务通常需要在所有任务上从头开始重新训练模型，这可能非常耗时且计算成本高昂。此外，在某些情况下，用于训练原始训练的数据可能不再可用，例如，由于存储或隐私问题。在本文中，我们通过将 n 个任务上已经训练的模型的知识提炼为解决 n+1 个任务的新模型，来解决随着时间的推移逐步扩展 MTL 模型解决新任务的能力的问题。为了避免灾难性遗忘，我们建议利用来自旧任务相同分布的未标记数据。我们对公开可用的基准进行的实验表明，这种技术通过保留已获得的知识（即防止旧任务的性能下降高达 20%），同时在增量添加的任务上获得良好的性能，极大地有利于蒸馏。此外，我们还通过使用来自领先语音助手的数据表明，我们的方法在实际设置中是有益的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种增量扩展多任务学习模型的方法，通过知识蒸馏避免在新增任务时遗忘原有任务的知识。
AI.motivation: 传统多任务学习需同时拥有所有任务数据，新增任务时需从头训练导致计算成本高，且原有数据可能因存储或隐私问题不可用。
AI.method: 利用已有模型的知识蒸馏训练新模型，结合旧任务的未标记数据，防止灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法可保留原有任务性能（减少最高20%的性能下降），并在新增任务上取得良好效果，且在语音助手实际数据中验证有效。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多任务模型增量扩展中的灾难性遗忘问题，兼具理论与实际应用价值。

search_text: Preventing Catastrophic Forgetting in Continual Learning of New Natural Language Tasks 在持续学习新的自然语言任务时防止灾难性遗忘 Multi-Task Learning (MTL) is widely-accepted in Natural Language Processing as a standard technique for learning multiple related tasks in one model. Training an MTL model requires having the training data for all tasks available at the same time. As systems usually evolve over time, (e.g., to support new functionalities), adding a new task to an existing MTL model usually requires retraining the model from scratch on all the tasks and this can be time-consuming and computationally expensive. Moreover, in some scenarios, the data used to train the original training may be no longer available, for example, due to storage or privacy concerns. In this paper, we approach the problem of incrementally expanding MTL models' capability to solve new tasks over time by distilling the knowledge of an already trained model on n tasks into a new one for solving n+1 tasks. To avoid catastrophic forgetting, we propose to exploit unlabeled data from the same distributions of the old tasks. Our experiments on publicly available benchmarks show that such a technique dramatically benefits the distillation by preserving the already acquired knowledge (i.e., preventing up to 20% performance drops on old tasks) while obtaining good performance on the incrementally added tasks. Further, we also show that our approach is beneficial in practical settings by using data from a leading voice assistant. 多任务学习 (MTL) 在自然语言处理中被广泛接受，作为在一个模型中学习多个相关任务的标准技术。训练 MTL 模型需要同时拥有所有可用任务的训练数据。由于系统通常会随着时间的推移而发展（例如，为了支持新功能），向现有 MTL 模型添加新任务通常需要在所有任务上从头开始重新训练模型，这可能非常耗时且计算成本高昂。此外，在某些情况下，用于训练原始训练的数据可能不再可用，例如，由于存储或隐私问题。在本文中，我们通过将 n 个任务上已经训练的模型的知识提炼为解决 n+1 个任务的新模型，来解决随着时间的推移逐步扩展 MTL 模型解决新任务的能力的问题。为了避免灾难性遗忘，我们建议利用来自旧任务相同分布的未标记数据。我们对公开可用的基准进行的实验表明，这种技术通过保留已获得的知识（即防止旧任务的性能下降高达 20%），同时在增量添加的任务上获得良好的性能，极大地有利于蒸馏。此外，我们还通过使用来自领先语音助手的数据表明，我们的方法在实际设置中是有益的。 本文提出一种增量扩展多任务学习模型的方法，通过知识蒸馏避免在新增任务时遗忘原有任务的知识。 Sudipta Kar,Giuseppe Castellucci,Simone Filice,Shervin Malmasi,Oleg Rokhlenko cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zheng Xiong,Jacob Beck,Shimon Whiteson
title: Universal Morphology Control via Contextual Modulation
title_zh: 通过上下文调制进行通用形态控制
abstract: Learning a universal policy across different robot morphologies can significantly improve learning efficiency and generalization in continuous control. However, it poses a challenging multi-task reinforcement learning problem, as the optimal policy may be quite different across robots and critically depend on the morphology. Existing methods utilize graph neural networks or transformers to handle heterogeneous state and action spaces across different morphologies, but pay little attention to the dependency of a robot's control policy on its morphology context. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical architecture to better model this dependency via contextual modulation, which includes two key submodules: (1) Instead of enforcing hard parameter sharing across robots, we use hypernetworks to generate morphology-dependent control parameters; (2) We propose a fixed attention mechanism that solely depends on the morphology to modulate the interactions between different limbs in a robot. Experimental results show that our method not only improves learning performance on a diverse set of training robots, but also generalizes better to unseen morphologies in a zero-shot fashion.
summary: Learning a universal policy across different robot morphologies can significantly improve learning efficiency and generalization in continuous control. However, it poses a challenging multi-task reinforcement learning problem, as the optimal policy may be quite different across robots and critically depend on the morphology. Existing methods utilize graph neural networks or transformers to handle heterogeneous state and action spaces across different morphologies, but pay little attention to the dependency of a robot's control policy on its morphology context. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical architecture to better model this dependency via contextual modulation, which includes two key submodules: (1) Instead of enforcing hard parameter sharing across robots, we use hypernetworks to generate morphology-dependent control parameters; (2) We propose a fixed attention mechanism that solely depends on the morphology to modulate the interactions between different limbs in a robot. Experimental results show that our method not only improves learning performance on a diverse set of training robots, but also generalizes better to unseen morphologies in a zero-shot fashion.
abstract_zh: 学习不同机器人形态的通用策略可以显着提高连续控制的学习效率和泛化能力。然而，它提出了一个具有挑战性的多任务强化学习问题，因为不同机器人的最优策略可能有很大不同，并且很大程度上取决于形态。现有方法利用图神经网络或变压器来处理不同形态的异构状态和动作空间，但很少关注机器人的控制策略对其形态上下文的依赖性。在本文中，我们提出了一种分层架构，通过上下文调制更好地建模这种依赖性，其中包括两个关键子模块：（1）我们使用超网络来生成依赖于形态的控制参数，而不是在机器人之间强制共享硬参数； (2) We propose a fixed attention mechanism that solely depends on the morphology to modulate the interactions between different limbs in a robot.实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅提高了各种训练机器人的学习性能，而且还以零样本的方式更好地推广了未见过的形态。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过上下文调制实现跨不同机器人形态的通用控制策略的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法虽能处理异构状态和动作空间，但未充分考虑机器人控制策略对其形态上下文的依赖，导致泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 设计分层架构，包含形态感知的超网络生成控制参数及基于形态的固定注意力机制调节肢体交互。
AI.result: 在多样化训练机器人上提升学习性能，并实现对未见过形态的零样本泛化。
AI.conclusion: 通过上下文调制有效建模形态依赖关系，显著提升跨形态控制的效率与泛化能力。

authors_text: Yuzhou Gu,Zhao Song,Junze Yin,Lichen Zhang
title: Low Rank Matrix Completion via Robust Alternating Minimization in Nearly Linear Time
title_zh: 通过近线性时间内的鲁棒交替最小化实现低秩矩阵补全
abstract: Given a matrix $M\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times n}$, the low rank matrix completion problem asks us to find a rank-$k$ approximation of $M$ as $UV^\top$ for $U\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times k}$ and $V\in \mathbb{R}^{n\times k}$ by only observing a few entries specified by a set of entries $Ω\subseteq [m]\times [n]$. In particular, we examine an approach that is widely used in practice -- the alternating minimization framework. Jain, Netrapalli, and Sanghavi [JNS13] showed that if $M$ has incoherent rows and columns, then alternating minimization provably recovers the matrix $M$ by observing a nearly linear in $n$ number of entries. While the sample complexity has been subsequently improved [GLZ17], alternating minimization steps are required to be computed exactly. This hinders the development of more efficient algorithms and fails to depict the practical implementation of alternating minimization, where the updates are usually performed approximately in favor of efficiency. In this paper, we take a major step towards a more efficient and error-robust alternating minimization framework. To this end, we develop an analytical framework for alternating minimization that can tolerate a moderate amount of errors caused by approximate updates. Moreover, our algorithm runs in time $\widetilde O(|Ω| k)$, which is nearly linear in the time to verify the solution while preserving the sample complexity. This improves upon all prior known alternating minimization approaches which require $\widetilde O(|Ω| k^2)$ time.
summary: Given a matrix $M\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times n}$, the low rank matrix completion problem asks us to find a rank-$k$ approximation of $M$ as $UV^\top$ for $U\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times k}$ and $V\in \mathbb{R}^{n\times k}$ by only observing a few entries specified by a set of entries $Ω\subseteq [m]\times [n]$. In particular, we examine an approach that is widely used in practice -- the alternating minimization framework. Jain, Netrapalli, and Sanghavi [JNS13] showed that if $M$ has incoherent rows and columns, then alternating minimization provably recovers the matrix $M$ by observing a nearly linear in $n$ number of entries. While the sample complexity has been subsequently improved [GLZ17], alternating minimization steps are required to be computed exactly. This hinders the development of more efficient algorithms and fails to depict the practical implementation of alternating minimization, where the updates are usually performed approximately in favor of efficiency. In this paper, we take a major step towards a more efficient and error-robust alternating minimization framework. To this end, we develop an analytical framework for alternating minimization that can tolerate a moderate amount of errors caused by approximate updates. Moreover, our algorithm runs in time $\widetilde O(|Ω| k)$, which is nearly linear in the time to verify the solution while preserving the sample complexity. This improves upon all prior known alternating minimization approaches which require $\widetilde O(|Ω| k^2)$ time.
abstract_zh: 给定矩阵 $M\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times n}$，低秩矩阵补全问题要求我们通过仅观察由一组条目 $Ω\subseteq 指定的几个条目，找到 $M$ 的秩 $k$ 近似值作为 $U\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times k}$ 和 $V\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times k}$ 的 $UV^\top$ [m]\次[n]$。我们特别研究了一种在实践中广泛使用的方法——交替最小化框架。 Jain、Netrapalli 和 Sanghavi [JNS13] 表明，如果 $M$ 具有不连贯的行和列，则交替最小化可通过观察 $n$ 个条目的近乎线性来恢复矩阵 $M$。虽然样本复杂性随后得到了改进 [GLZ17]，但需要精确计算交替的最小化步骤。这阻碍了更高效算法的开发，并且无法描述交替最小化的实际实现，其中更新通常大约是为了有利于效率而执行的。在本文中，我们朝着更高效、更容错的交替最小化框架迈出了重要一步。为此，我们开发了一个用于交替最小化的分析框架，该框架可以容忍由近似更新引起的适度误差。此外，我们的算法运行时间为$\widetilde O(|Ω| k)$，这在验证解的时间上几乎是线性的，同时保留了样本复杂性。这改进了所有先前已知的交替最小化方法，这些方法需要 $\widetilde O(|Ω| k^2)$ 时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的低秩矩阵补全方法，通过鲁棒交替最小化框架在近线性时间内完成矩阵恢复。
AI.motivation: 传统交替最小化方法需要精确计算更新步骤，导致效率低下且无法反映实际应用中常用的近似更新方式，阻碍了更高效算法的发展。
AI.method: 开发了一种可容忍近似更新误差的分析框架，设计了时间复杂度为O(|Ω|k)的算法，在保持样本复杂度的同时实现高效计算。
AI.result: 算法在近线性时间内完成矩阵补全，时间复杂度优于先前O(|Ω|k²)的方案，且能处理实际应用中的近似更新误差。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证样本复杂度的前提下显著提升了交替最小化的效率，为实际应用提供了更优的理论支持与计算框架。

This improves upon all prior known alternating minimization approaches which require $\widetilde O(|Ω| k^2)$ time. 给定矩阵 $M\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times n}$，低秩矩阵补全问题要求我们通过仅观察由一组条目 $Ω\subseteq 指定的几个条目，找到 $M$ 的秩 $k$ 近似值作为 $U\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times k}$ 和 $V\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times k}$ 的 $UV^\top$ [m]\次[n]$。我们特别研究了一种在实践中广泛使用的方法——交替最小化框架。 Jain、Netrapalli 和 Sanghavi [JNS13] 表明，如果 $M$ 具有不连贯的行和列，则交替最小化可通过观察 $n$ 个条目的近乎线性来恢复矩阵 $M$。虽然样本复杂性随后得到了改进 [GLZ17]，但需要精确计算交替的最小化步骤。这阻碍了更高效算法的开发，并且无法描述交替最小化的实际实现，其中更新通常大约是为了有利于效率而执行的。在本文中，我们朝着更高效、更容错的交替最小化框架迈出了重要一步。为此，我们开发了一个用于交替最小化的分析框架，该框架可以容忍由近似更新引起的适度误差。此外，我们的算法运行时间为$\widetilde O(|Ω| k)$，这在验证解的时间上几乎是线性的，同时保留了样本复杂性。这改进了所有先前已知的交替最小化方法，这些方法需要 $\widetilde O(|Ω| k^2)$ 时间。 本文提出了一种高效的低秩矩阵补全方法，通过鲁棒交替最小化框架在近线性时间内完成矩阵恢复。 Yuzhou Gu,Zhao Song,Junze Yin,Lichen Zhang cs.LG,cs.DS,math.OC,stat.ML

authors_text: Benjamin C. DiPrete,Rao V. Garimella,Cristina Garcia Cardona,Navamita Ray
title: Reinforcement Learning for Block Decomposition of CAD Models
title_zh: CAD 模型块分解的强化学习
abstract: We present a novel AI-assisted method for decomposing (segmenting) planar CAD (computer-aided design) models into well shaped rectangular blocks as a proof-of-principle of a general decomposition method applicable to complex 2D and 3D CAD models. The decomposed blocks are required for generating good quality meshes (tilings of quadrilaterals or hexahedra) suitable for numerical simulations of physical systems governed by conservation laws. The problem of hexahedral mesh generation of general CAD models has vexed researchers for over 3 decades and analysts often spend more than 50% of the design-analysis cycle time decomposing complex models into simpler parts meshable by existing techniques. Our method uses reinforcement learning to train an agent to perform a series of optimal cuts on the CAD model that result in a good quality block decomposition. We show that the agent quickly learns an effective strategy for picking the location and direction of the cuts and maximizing its rewards as opposed to making random cuts. This paper is the first successful demonstration of an agent autonomously learning how to perform this block decomposition task effectively thereby holding the promise of a viable method to automate this challenging process.
summary: We present a novel AI-assisted method for decomposing (segmenting) planar CAD (computer-aided design) models into well shaped rectangular blocks as a proof-of-principle of a general decomposition method applicable to complex 2D and 3D CAD models. The decomposed blocks are required for generating good quality meshes (tilings of quadrilaterals or hexahedra) suitable for numerical simulations of physical systems governed by conservation laws. The problem of hexahedral mesh generation of general CAD models has vexed researchers for over 3 decades and analysts often spend more than 50% of the design-analysis cycle time decomposing complex models into simpler parts meshable by existing techniques. Our method uses reinforcement learning to train an agent to perform a series of optimal cuts on the CAD model that result in a good quality block decomposition. We show that the agent quickly learns an effective strategy for picking the location and direction of the cuts and maximizing its rewards as opposed to making random cuts. This paper is the first successful demonstration of an agent autonomously learning how to perform this block decomposition task effectively thereby holding the promise of a viable method to automate this challenging process.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的人工智能辅助方法，用于将平面 CAD（计算机辅助设计）模型分解（分割）为形状良好的矩形块，作为适用于复杂 2D 和 3D CAD 模型的通用分解方法的原理验证。分解的块需要生成高质量的网格（四边形或六面体的平铺），适合受守恒定律约束的物理系统的数值模拟。通用 CAD 模型的六面体网格生成问题困扰了研究人员 30 多年，分析师经常花费超过 50% 的设计分析周期时间将复杂模型分解为可通过现有技术进行网格划分的更简单的零件。我们的方法使用强化学习来训练代理对 CAD 模型执行一系列最佳切割，从而实现良好质量的块分解。我们表明，代理可以快速学习一种有效的策略来选择剪切的位置和方向并最大化其奖励，而不是进行随机剪切。本文首次成功演示了智能体自主学习如何有效执行此块分解任务，从而有望提供一种可行的方法来自动化这一具有挑战性的过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的AI辅助方法，用于将平面CAD模型分解为矩形块，以证明其适用于复杂2D和3D模型的通用分解方法。
AI.motivation: 生成高质量六面体网格是CAD模型分析中的长期难题，传统方法耗时且效率低，需自动化解决方案以提升设计-分析周期效率。
AI.method: 通过强化学习训练智能体，使其在CAD模型上执行一系列最优切割操作，学习选择切割位置和方向以最大化奖励，实现高质量块分解。
AI.result: 智能体快速学习到有效切割策略，成功实现块分解，是首个展示智能体自主学习完成该任务的成功案例。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动化复杂CAD模型分解提供了可行方案，有望显著减少人工干预并提升数值模拟效率。

authors_text: Burak Kizilkaya,Changyang She,Guodong Zhao,Muhammad Ali Imran
title: Task-Oriented Prediction and Communication Co-Design for Haptic Communications
title_zh: 触觉通信的面向任务的预测和通信协同设计
comment: Accepted for publication in the IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology
comments: Accepted for publication in the IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology
abstract: Prediction has recently been considered as a promising approach to meet low-latency and high-reliability requirements in long-distance haptic communications. However, most of the existing methods did not take features of tasks and the relationship between prediction and communication into account. In this paper, we propose a task-oriented prediction and communication co-design framework, where the reliability of the system depends on prediction errors and packet losses in communications. The goal is to minimize the required radio resources subject to the low-latency and high-reliability requirements of various tasks. Specifically, we consider the just noticeable difference (JND) as a performance metric for the haptic communication system. We collect experiment data from a real-world teleoperation testbed and use time-series generative adversarial networks (TimeGAN) to generate a large amount of synthetic data. This allows us to obtain the relationship between the JND threshold, prediction horizon, and the overall reliability including communication reliability and prediction reliability. We take 5G New Radio as an example to demonstrate the proposed framework and optimize bandwidth allocation and data rates of devices. Our numerical and experimental results show that the proposed framework can reduce wireless resource consumption up to 77.80% compared with a task-agnostic benchmark.
summary: Prediction has recently been considered as a promising approach to meet low-latency and high-reliability requirements in long-distance haptic communications. However, most of the existing methods did not take features of tasks and the relationship between prediction and communication into account. In this paper, we propose a task-oriented prediction and communication co-design framework, where the reliability of the system depends on prediction errors and packet losses in communications. The goal is to minimize the required radio resources subject to the low-latency and high-reliability requirements of various tasks. Specifically, we consider the just noticeable difference (JND) as a performance metric for the haptic communication system. We collect experiment data from a real-world teleoperation testbed and use time-series generative adversarial networks (TimeGAN) to generate a large amount of synthetic data. This allows us to obtain the relationship between the JND threshold, prediction horizon, and the overall reliability including communication reliability and prediction reliability. We take 5G New Radio as an example to demonstrate the proposed framework and optimize bandwidth allocation and data rates of devices. Our numerical and experimental results show that the proposed framework can reduce wireless resource consumption up to 77.80% compared with a task-agnostic benchmark.
abstract_zh: 预测最近被认为是满足长距离触觉通信中低延迟和高可靠性要求的一种有前途的方法。然而，大多数现有方法没有考虑任务的特征以及预测和通信之间的关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种面向任务的预测和通信协同设计框架，其中系统的可靠性取决于通信中的预测误差和数据包丢失。目标是最大限度地减少所需的无线电资源，以满足各种任务的低延迟和高可靠性要求。具体来说，我们将刚刚显着差异（JND）视为触觉通信系统的性能指标。我们从现实世界的遥操作测试台收集实验数据，并使用时间序列生成对抗网络（TimeGAN）生成大量合成数据。这使我们能够获得 JND 阈值、预测范围和整体可靠性（包括通信可靠性和预测可靠性）之间的关系。我们以 5G New Radio 为例来演示所提出的框架并优化设备的带宽分配和数据速率。我们的数值和实验结果表明，与任务无关的基准相比，所提出的框架可以将无线资源消耗减少高达 77.80%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个任务导向的预测与通信协同设计框架，以优化触觉通信系统的低延迟和高可靠性需求。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未考虑任务特征及预测与通信的关联性，导致无线资源消耗较高，难以满足多样化任务需求。
AI.method: 基于JND指标，结合真实实验数据与TimeGAN生成的合成数据，分析预测误差与通信丢包对可靠性的影响，并以5G NR为例优化带宽分配。
AI.result: 相比无任务感知的基准方案，该框架可减少高达77.80%的无线资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: 任务导向的协同设计框架能有效平衡预测与通信可靠性，显著提升触觉通信资源利用效率。

However, most of the existing methods did not take features of tasks and the relationship between prediction and communication into account. In this paper, we propose a task-oriented prediction and communication co-design framework, where the reliability of the system depends on prediction errors and packet losses in communications. The goal is to minimize the required radio resources subject to the low-latency and high-reliability requirements of various tasks. This allows us to obtain the relationship between the JND threshold, prediction horizon, and the overall reliability including communication reliability and prediction reliability. We take 5G New Radio as an example to demonstrate the proposed framework and optimize bandwidth allocation and data rates of devices. Our numerical and experimental results show that the proposed framework can reduce wireless resource consumption up to 77.80% compared with a task-agnostic benchmark. 预测最近被认为是满足长距离触觉通信中低延迟和高可靠性要求的一种有前途的方法。然而，大多数现有方法没有考虑任务的特征以及预测和通信之间的关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种面向任务的预测和通信协同设计框架，其中系统的可靠性取决于通信中的预测误差和数据包丢失。目标是最大限度地减少所需的无线电资源，以满足各种任务的低延迟和高可靠性要求。具体来说，我们将刚刚显着差异（JND）视为触觉通信系统的性能指标。我们从现实世界的遥操作测试台收集实验数据，并使用时间序列生成对抗网络（TimeGAN）生成大量合成数据。这使我们能够获得 JND 阈值、预测范围和整体可靠性（包括通信可靠性和预测可靠性）之间的关系。我们以 5G New Radio 为例来演示所提出的框架并优化设备的带宽分配和数据速率。我们的数值和实验结果表明，与任务无关的基准相比，所提出的框架可以将无线资源消耗减少高达 77.80%。 本文提出一个任务导向的预测与通信协同设计框架，以优化触觉通信系统的低延迟和高可靠性需求。 Burak Kizilkaya,Changyang She,Guodong Zhao,Muhammad Ali Imran cs.RO,cs.LG,cs.NI,eess.SY

authors_text: Kyle R. Rust,Toby D. Hocking
title: A Log-linear Gradient Descent Algorithm for Unbalanced Binary Classification using the All Pairs Squared Hinge Loss
title_zh: 使用所有对平方铰链损失的不平衡二元分类的对数线性梯度下降算法
abstract: Receiver Operating Characteristic (ROC) curves are plots of true positive rate versus false positive rate which are used to evaluate binary classification algorithms. Because the Area Under the Curve (AUC) is a constant function of the predicted values, learning algorithms instead optimize convex relaxations which involve a sum over all pairs of labeled positive and negative examples. Naive learning algorithms compute the gradient in quadratic time, which is too slow for learning using large batch sizes. We propose a new functional representation of the square loss and squared hinge loss, which results in algorithms that compute the gradient in either linear or log-linear time, and makes it possible to use gradient descent learning with large batch sizes. In our empirical study of supervised binary classification problems, we show that our new algorithm can achieve higher test AUC values on imbalanced data sets than previous algorithms, and make use of larger batch sizes than were previously feasible.
summary: Receiver Operating Characteristic (ROC) curves are plots of true positive rate versus false positive rate which are used to evaluate binary classification algorithms. Because the Area Under the Curve (AUC) is a constant function of the predicted values, learning algorithms instead optimize convex relaxations which involve a sum over all pairs of labeled positive and negative examples. Naive learning algorithms compute the gradient in quadratic time, which is too slow for learning using large batch sizes. We propose a new functional representation of the square loss and squared hinge loss, which results in algorithms that compute the gradient in either linear or log-linear time, and makes it possible to use gradient descent learning with large batch sizes. In our empirical study of supervised binary classification problems, we show that our new algorithm can achieve higher test AUC values on imbalanced data sets than previous algorithms, and make use of larger batch sizes than were previously feasible.
abstract_zh: 接收者操作特征 (ROC) 曲线是真阳性率与假阳性率的图，用于评估二元分类算法。由于曲线下面积 (AUC) 是预测值的常数函数，因此学习算法会优化凸松弛，其中涉及所有标记的正例和负例对的总和。朴素学习算法以二次时间计算梯度，这对于使用大批量进行学习来说太慢了。我们提出了平方损失和平方铰链损失的新函数表示，这导致了在线性或对数线性时间内计算梯度的算法，并且使得使用大批量的梯度下降学习成为可能。在我们对监督二元分类问题的实证研究中，我们表明，我们的新算法可以在不平衡数据集上实现比以前的算法更高的测试 AUC 值，并且使用比以前可行的更大的批量大小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于不平衡二分类的对数线性梯度下降算法，通过全对平方合页损失函数优化分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统二分类算法在计算梯度时需二次时间复杂度，难以处理大规模数据集，且在不平衡数据上表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出新的平方损失和平方合页损失函数表示，将梯度计算复杂度降至线性或对数线性级别，支持大批次梯度下降。
AI.result: 实验表明，新算法在不平衡数据集上测试AUC值优于现有方法，并能有效处理更大批次的数据训练。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化损失函数计算效率，在保持高分类性能的同时提升了大规模不平衡数据处理能力。

Because the Area Under the Curve (AUC) is a constant function of the predicted values, learning algorithms instead optimize convex relaxations which involve a sum over all pairs of labeled positive and negative examples. Naive learning algorithms compute the gradient in quadratic time, which is too slow for learning using large batch sizes. We propose a new functional representation of the square loss and squared hinge loss, which results in algorithms that compute the gradient in either linear or log-linear time, and makes it possible to use gradient descent learning with large batch sizes. authors_text: Mehrad Faridan,Bheesha Kumari,Ryo Suzuki
title: ChameleonControl: Teleoperating Real Human Surrogates through Mixed Reality Gestural Guidance for Remote Hands-on Classrooms
title_zh: ChameleonControl：通过混合现实手势指导远程操作真实的人类代理人，用于远程实践课堂
abstract: We present ChameleonControl, a real-human teleoperation system for scalable remote instruction in hands-on classrooms. In contrast to existing video or AR/VR-based remote hands-on education, ChameleonControl uses a real human as a surrogate of a remote instructor. Building on existing human-based telepresence approaches, we contribute a novel method to teleoperate a human surrogate through synchronized mixed reality hand gestural navigation and verbal communication. By overlaying the remote instructor's virtual hands in the local user's MR view, the remote instructor can guide and control the local user as if they were physically present. This allows the local user/surrogate to synchronize their hand movements and gestures with the remote instructor, effectively teleoperating a real human. We deploy and evaluate our system in classrooms of physiotherapy training, as well as other application domains such as mechanical assembly, sign language and cooking lessons. The study results confirm that our approach can increase engagement and the sense of co-presence, showing potential for the future of remote hands-on classrooms.
summary: We present ChameleonControl, a real-human teleoperation system for scalable remote instruction in hands-on classrooms. In contrast to existing video or AR/VR-based remote hands-on education, ChameleonControl uses a real human as a surrogate of a remote instructor. Building on existing human-based telepresence approaches, we contribute a novel method to teleoperate a human surrogate through synchronized mixed reality hand gestural navigation and verbal communication. By overlaying the remote instructor's virtual hands in the local user's MR view, the remote instructor can guide and control the local user as if they were physically present. This allows the local user/surrogate to synchronize their hand movements and gestures with the remote instructor, effectively teleoperating a real human. We deploy and evaluate our system in classrooms of physiotherapy training, as well as other application domains such as mechanical assembly, sign language and cooking lessons. The study results confirm that our approach can increase engagement and the sense of co-presence, showing potential for the future of remote hands-on classrooms.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 ChameleonControl，这是一种真人远程操作系统，可在动手教室中进行可扩展的远程教学。与现有的视频或基于 AR/VR 的远程实践教育相比，ChameleonControl 使用真人作为远程讲师的替代者。在现有的基于人类的远程呈现方法的基础上，我们提供了一种通过同步混合现实手势导航和语言交流来远程操作人类代理人的新颖方法。通过将远程指导员的虚拟手覆盖在本地用户的 MR 视图中，远程指导员可以指导和控制本地用户，就像他们亲自在场一样。这允许本地用户/代理人将他们的手部动作和手势与远程教练同步，从而有效地远程操作真人。我们在物理治疗培训教室以及机械装配、手语和烹饪课程等其他应用领域部署和评估我们的系统。研究结果证实，我们的方法可以提高参与度和共存感，显示出远程实践课堂未来的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ChameleonControl系统，通过混合现实手势导航和语音通信远程操控真实人类代理，实现远程实践课堂的可扩展教学。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视频或AR/VR的远程实践教育存在交互性不足的问题，需通过真实人类代理提升远程教学的沉浸感与操作精度。
AI.method: 结合混合现实手势同步与语音通信技术，将远程教师的虚拟手部动作叠加至本地用户MR视图中，实现对本地代理的人体动作实时控制。
AI.result: 在物理治疗、机械组装等场景测试显示，该方法显著提升用户参与度与共在感，验证了真实人类代理在远程实践教学中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过真实人类代理与混合现实技术的结合，为未来远程实践课堂提供了更具沉浸感和交互性的解决方案。

authors_text: Yunzhong He,Yuxin Tian,Mengjiao Wang,Feier Chen,Licheng Yu,Maolong Tang,Congcong Chen,Ning Zhang,Bin Kuang,Arul Prakash
title: Que2Engage: Embedding-based Retrieval for Relevant and Engaging Products at Facebook Marketplace
title_zh: Que2Engage：基于嵌入的 Facebook Marketplace 相关产品检索
abstract: Embedding-based Retrieval (EBR) in e-commerce search is a powerful search retrieval technique to address semantic matches between search queries and products. However, commercial search engines like Facebook Marketplace Search are complex multi-stage systems optimized for multiple business objectives. At Facebook Marketplace, search retrieval focuses on matching search queries with relevant products, while search ranking puts more emphasis on contextual signals to up-rank the more engaging products. As a result, the end-to-end searcher experience is a function of both relevance and engagement, and the interaction between different stages of the system. This presents challenges to EBR systems in order to optimize for better searcher experiences. In this paper we presents Que2Engage, a search EBR system built towards bridging the gap between retrieval and ranking for end-to-end optimizations. Que2Engage takes a multimodal & multitask approach to infuse contextual information into the retrieval stage and to balance different business objectives. We show the effectiveness of our approach via a multitask evaluation framework and thorough baseline comparisons and ablation studies. Que2Engage is deployed on Facebook Marketplace Search and shows significant improvements in searcher engagement in two weeks of A/B testing.
summary: Embedding-based Retrieval (EBR) in e-commerce search is a powerful search retrieval technique to address semantic matches between search queries and products. However, commercial search engines like Facebook Marketplace Search are complex multi-stage systems optimized for multiple business objectives. At Facebook Marketplace, search retrieval focuses on matching search queries with relevant products, while search ranking puts more emphasis on contextual signals to up-rank the more engaging products. As a result, the end-to-end searcher experience is a function of both relevance and engagement, and the interaction between different stages of the system. This presents challenges to EBR systems in order to optimize for better searcher experiences. In this paper we presents Que2Engage, a search EBR system built towards bridging the gap between retrieval and ranking for end-to-end optimizations. We show the effectiveness of our approach via a multitask evaluation framework and thorough baseline comparisons and ablation studies. abstract_zh: 电子商务搜索中基于嵌入的检索（EBR）是一种强大的搜索检索技术，可解决搜索查询和产品之间的语义匹配问题。然而，像 Facebook Marketplace Search 这样的商业搜索引擎是复杂的多阶段系统，针对多个业务目标进行了优化。在 Facebook Marketplace，搜索检索侧重于将搜索查询与相关产品相匹配，而搜索排名则更注重上下文信号，以提升更具吸引力的产品的排名。因此，端到端搜索者体验是相关性和参与度以及系统不同阶段之间交互的函数。这对 EBR 系统提出了挑战，以优化更好的搜索者体验。在本文中，我们介绍了 Que2Engage，这是一个搜索 EBR 系统，旨在弥合检索和排名之间的差距，以实现端到端优化。 Que2Engage 采用多模式和多任务方法将上下文信息注入检索阶段并平衡不同的业务目标。我们通过多任务评估框架和彻底的基线比较和消融研究展示了我们方法的有效性。 Que2Engage 部署在 Facebook Marketplace Search 上，并在两周的 A/B 测试中显示出搜索者参与度的显着改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Que2Engage系统，通过融合多模态与多任务学习，优化Facebook Marketplace搜索中检索与排序阶段的协同效果，提升用户搜索体验。
AI.motivation: 传统电商搜索系统将检索（关注相关性）与排序（关注用户参与度）分离，导致端到端体验不佳，需在检索阶段直接引入上下文信息以平衡多目标。
AI.method: 设计多模态多任务框架，在检索阶段注入上下文特征，通过联合优化相关性与参与度目标，实现端到端检索效果提升。
AI.result: A/B测试显示，系统部署两周内用户搜索参与度显著提升，多任务评估与消融实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 在检索阶段融合上下文信息并平衡多目标，可有效提升电商搜索的端到端用户体验。

tldr: 本文提出Que2Engage系统，通过融合多模态与多任务学习，优化Facebook Marketplace搜索中检索与排序阶段的协同效果，提升用户搜索体验。
motivation: 传统电商搜索系统将检索（关注相关性）与排序（关注用户参与度）分离，导致端到端体验不佳，需在检索阶段直接引入上下文信息以平衡多目标。
method: 设计多模态多任务框架，在检索阶段注入上下文特征，通过联合优化相关性与参与度目标，实现端到端检索效果提升。
result: A/B测试显示，系统部署两周内用户搜索参与度显著提升，多任务评估与消融实验验证了方法有效性。
conclusion: 在检索阶段融合上下文信息并平衡多目标，可有效提升电商搜索的端到端用户体验。
search_text: Que2Engage: Embedding-based Retrieval for Relevant and Engaging Products at Facebook Marketplace Que2Engage：基于嵌入的 Facebook Marketplace 相关产品检索 Embedding-based Retrieval (EBR) in e-commerce search is a powerful search retrieval technique to address semantic matches between search queries and products. However, commercial search engines like Facebook Marketplace Search are complex multi-stage systems optimized for multiple business objectives. At Facebook Marketplace, search retrieval focuses on matching search queries with relevant products, while search ranking puts more emphasis on contextual signals to up-rank the more engaging products. As a result, the end-to-end searcher experience is a function of both relevance and engagement, and the interaction between different stages of the system. This presents challenges to EBR systems in order to optimize for better searcher experiences. In this paper we presents Que2Engage, a search EBR system built towards bridging the gap between retrieval and ranking for end-to-end optimizations. Que2Engage takes a multimodal & multitask approach to infuse contextual information into the retrieval stage and to balance different business objectives. We show the effectiveness of our approach via a multitask evaluation framework and thorough baseline comparisons and ablation studies. Que2Engage is deployed on Facebook Marketplace Search and shows significant improvements in searcher engagement in two weeks of A/B testing. 电子商务搜索中基于嵌入的检索（EBR）是一种强大的搜索检索技术，可解决搜索查询和产品之间的语义匹配问题。然而，像 Facebook Marketplace Search 这样的商业搜索引擎是复杂的多阶段系统，针对多个业务目标进行了优化。在 Facebook Marketplace，搜索检索侧重于将搜索查询与相关产品相匹配，而搜索排名则更注重上下文信号，以提升更具吸引力的产品的排名。因此，端到端搜索者体验是相关性和参与度以及系统不同阶段之间交互的函数。这对 EBR 系统提出了挑战，以优化更好的搜索者体验。在本文中，我们介绍了 Que2Engage，这是一个搜索 EBR 系统，旨在弥合检索和排名之间的差距，以实现端到端优化。 Que2Engage 采用多模式和多任务方法将上下文信息注入检索阶段并平衡不同的业务目标。我们通过多任务评估框架和彻底的基线比较和消融研究展示了我们方法的有效性。 Que2Engage 部署在 Facebook Marketplace Search 上，并在两周的 A/B 测试中显示出搜索者参与度的显着改善。 本文提出Que2Engage系统，通过融合多模态与多任务学习，优化Facebook Marketplace搜索中检索与排序阶段的协同效果，提升用户搜索体验。 Yunzhong He,Yuxin Tian,Mengjiao Wang,Feier Chen,Licheng Yu,Maolong Tang,Congcong Chen,Ning Zhang,Bin Kuang,Arul Prakash cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Maxime Gariel,Brian Shimanuki,Rob Timpe,Evan Wilson
title: Framework for Certification of AI-Based Systems
title_zh: 基于人工智能的系统认证框架
abstract: The current certification process for aerospace software is not adapted to "AI-based" algorithms such as deep neural networks. Unlike traditional aerospace software, the precise parameters optimized during neural network training are as important as (or more than) the code processing the network and they are not directly mathematically understandable. Despite their lack of explainability such algorithms are appealing because for some applications they can exhibit high performance unattainable with any traditional explicit line-by-line software methods. This paper proposes a framework and principles that could be used to establish certification methods for neural network models for which the current certification processes such as DO-178 cannot be applied. While it is not a magic recipe, it is a set of common sense steps that will allow the applicant and the regulator increase their confidence in the developed software, by demonstrating the capabilities to bring together, trace, and track the requirements, data, software, training process, and test results.
summary: The current certification process for aerospace software is not adapted to "AI-based" algorithms such as deep neural networks. Unlike traditional aerospace software, the precise parameters optimized during neural network training are as important as (or more than) the code processing the network and they are not directly mathematically understandable. Despite their lack of explainability such algorithms are appealing because for some applications they can exhibit high performance unattainable with any traditional explicit line-by-line software methods. This paper proposes a framework and principles that could be used to establish certification methods for neural network models for which the current certification processes such as DO-178 cannot be applied. While it is not a magic recipe, it is a set of common sense steps that will allow the applicant and the regulator increase their confidence in the developed software, by demonstrating the capabilities to bring together, trace, and track the requirements, data, software, training process, and test results.
abstract_zh: 目前的航空航天软件认证流程并不适合深度神经网络等“基于人工智能”的算法。与传统的航空航天软件不同，神经网络训练过程中优化的精确参数与处理网络的代码一样重要（甚至更重要），并且它们在数学上无法直接理解。尽管缺乏可解释性，此类算法仍然很有吸引力，因为对于某些应用，它们可以表现出任何传统显式逐行软件方法无法达到的高性能。本文提出了一个框架和原则，可用于建立神经网络模型的认证方法，而目前的认证流程（例如 DO-178）无法应用。虽然它不是一个神奇的秘诀，但它是一组常识性步骤，通过展示汇集、跟踪和追踪需求、数据、软件、培训过程和测试结果的能力，可以让申请人和监管者增强对所开发软件的信心。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对基于人工智能（AI）系统的认证框架，以解决传统航空航天软件认证标准无法适应深度神经网络等AI算法的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统航空航天软件认证标准（如DO-178）无法直接应用于AI算法，因其训练过程中优化的参数缺乏数学可解释性，但AI在部分应用中却能实现传统方法无法达到的高性能。
AI.method: 提出一套包含原则和步骤的框架，通过整合需求、数据、软件、训练过程及测试结果的追溯性分析，增强申请方与监管机构对AI系统安全性的信心。
AI.result: 该框架提供了非强制性的常识性步骤，使AI系统认证过程具备可操作性，但未提供单一解决方案，需结合具体场景灵活应用。
AI.conclusion: 本文为AI系统认证提供了可行路径，尽管非完美，但通过系统化追溯与验证流程，为监管机构与开发方建立信任关系奠定了基础。

authors_text: Mohak Bhardwaj,Tengyang Xie,Byron Boots,Nan Jiang,Ching-An Cheng
title: Adversarial Model for Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 离线强化学习的对抗模型
comment: Accepted at the Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), 2023. Mohak Bhardwaj and Tengyang Xie contributed equally to this work. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2211.04538
comments: Accepted at the Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), 2023. Mohak Bhardwaj and Tengyang Xie contributed equally to this work. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2211.04538
abstract: We propose a novel model-based offline Reinforcement Learning (RL) framework, called Adversarial Model for Offline Reinforcement Learning (ARMOR), which can robustly learn policies to improve upon an arbitrary reference policy regardless of data coverage. ARMOR is designed to optimize policies for the worst-case performance relative to the reference policy through adversarially training a Markov decision process model. In theory, we prove that ARMOR, with a well-tuned hyperparameter, can compete with the best policy within data coverage when the reference policy is supported by the data. At the same time, ARMOR is robust to hyperparameter choices: the policy learned by ARMOR, with "any" admissible hyperparameter, would never degrade the performance of the reference policy, even when the reference policy is not covered by the dataset. To validate these properties in practice, we design a scalable implementation of ARMOR, which by adversarial training, can optimize policies without using model ensembles in contrast to typical model-based methods. We show that ARMOR achieves competent performance with both state-of-the-art offline model-free and model-based RL algorithms and can robustly improve the reference policy over various hyperparameter choices.
summary: We propose a novel model-based offline Reinforcement Learning (RL) framework, called Adversarial Model for Offline Reinforcement Learning (ARMOR), which can robustly learn policies to improve upon an arbitrary reference policy regardless of data coverage. ARMOR is designed to optimize policies for the worst-case performance relative to the reference policy through adversarially training a Markov decision process model. In theory, we prove that ARMOR, with a well-tuned hyperparameter, can compete with the best policy within data coverage when the reference policy is supported by the data. At the same time, ARMOR is robust to hyperparameter choices: the policy learned by ARMOR, with "any" admissible hyperparameter, would never degrade the performance of the reference policy, even when the reference policy is not covered by the dataset. To validate these properties in practice, we design a scalable implementation of ARMOR, which by adversarial training, can optimize policies without using model ensembles in contrast to typical model-based methods. We show that ARMOR achieves competent performance with both state-of-the-art offline model-free and model-based RL algorithms and can robustly improve the reference policy over various hyperparameter choices.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于模型的新型离线强化学习（RL）框架，称为离线强化学习对抗模型（ARMOR），无论数据覆盖范围如何，它都可以稳健地学习策略以改进任意参考策略。 ARMOR 旨在通过对抗性训练马尔可夫决策过程模型来优化相对于参考策略的最坏情况性能的策略。理论上，我们证明，当参考策略得到数据支持时，具有经过良好调整的超参数的 ARMOR 可以与数据覆盖范围内的最佳策略竞争。同时，ARMOR 对超参数选择具有鲁棒性：ARMOR 学习的策略，具有“任何”可接受的超参数，都不会降低参考策略的性能，即使数据集未覆盖参考策略。为了在实践中验证这些属性，我们设计了 ARMOR 的可扩展实现，与典型的基于模型的方法相比，它可以通过对抗性训练来优化策略，而无需使用模型集成。我们证明，ARMOR 通过最先进的离线无模型和基于模型的 RL 算法实现了出色的性能，并且可以稳健地改进各种超参数选择的参考策略。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于对抗训练的离线强化学习框架ARMOR，用于在数据覆盖不足的情况下提升参考策略的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有离线强化学习方法对数据覆盖范围和超参数敏感，难以保证策略性能的稳定性。
AI.method: 通过对抗训练马尔可夫决策过程模型，优化策略在最坏情况下的表现，无需模型集成即可提升参考策略。
AI.result: ARMOR在多种超参数设置下均能稳定提升参考策略，且性能优于当前先进的离线模型自由和模型基于方法。
AI.conclusion: ARMOR提供了一种鲁棒的离线强化学习解决方案，能够在数据覆盖有限时有效优化策略。

We show that ARMOR achieves competent performance with both state-of-the-art offline model-free and model-based RL algorithms and can robustly improve the reference policy over various hyperparameter choices. 我们提出了一种基于模型的新型离线强化学习（RL）框架，称为离线强化学习对抗模型（ARMOR），无论数据覆盖范围如何，它都可以稳健地学习策略以改进任意参考策略。 ARMOR 旨在通过对抗性训练马尔可夫决策过程模型来优化相对于参考策略的最坏情况性能的策略。理论上，我们证明，当参考策略得到数据支持时，具有经过良好调整的超参数的 ARMOR 可以与数据覆盖范围内的最佳策略竞争。同时，ARMOR 对超参数选择具有鲁棒性：ARMOR 学习的策略，具有“任何”可接受的超参数，都不会降低参考策略的性能，即使数据集未覆盖参考策略。为了在实践中验证这些属性，我们设计了 ARMOR 的可扩展实现，与典型的基于模型的方法相比，它可以通过对抗性训练来优化策略，而无需使用模型集成。我们证明，ARMOR 通过最先进的离线无模型和基于模型的 RL 算法实现了出色的性能，并且可以稳健地改进各种超参数选择的参考策略。 提出一种基于对抗训练的离线强化学习框架ARMOR，用于在数据覆盖不足的情况下提升参考策略的性能。 Mohak Bhardwaj,Tengyang Xie,Byron Boots,Nan Jiang,Ching-An Cheng cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Kyzyl Monteiro,Ritik Vatsal,Neil Chulpongsatorn,Aman Parnami,Ryo Suzuki
title: Teachable Reality: Prototyping Tangible Augmented Reality with Everyday Objects by Leveraging Interactive Machine Teaching
title_zh: 可教学现实：利用交互式机器教学，用日常物品制作有形增强现实原型
abstract: This paper introduces Teachable Reality, an augmented reality (AR) prototyping tool for creating interactive tangible AR applications with arbitrary everyday objects. Teachable Reality leverages vision-based interactive machine teaching (e.g., Teachable Machine), which captures real-world interactions for AR prototyping. It identifies the user-defined tangible and gestural interactions using an on-demand computer vision model. Based on this, the user can easily create functional AR prototypes without programming, enabled by a trigger-action authoring interface. Therefore, our approach allows the flexibility, customizability, and generalizability of tangible AR applications that can address the limitation of current marker-based approaches. We explore the design space and demonstrate various AR prototypes, which include tangible and deformable interfaces, context-aware assistants, and body-driven AR applications. The results of our user study and expert interviews confirm that our approach can lower the barrier to creating functional AR prototypes while also allowing flexible and general-purpose prototyping experiences.
summary: This paper introduces Teachable Reality, an augmented reality (AR) prototyping tool for creating interactive tangible AR applications with arbitrary everyday objects. Teachable Reality leverages vision-based interactive machine teaching (e.g., Teachable Machine), which captures real-world interactions for AR prototyping. It identifies the user-defined tangible and gestural interactions using an on-demand computer vision model. Based on this, the user can easily create functional AR prototypes without programming, enabled by a trigger-action authoring interface. Therefore, our approach allows the flexibility, customizability, and generalizability of tangible AR applications that can address the limitation of current marker-based approaches. We explore the design space and demonstrate various AR prototypes, which include tangible and deformable interfaces, context-aware assistants, and body-driven AR applications. The results of our user study and expert interviews confirm that our approach can lower the barrier to creating functional AR prototypes while also allowing flexible and general-purpose prototyping experiences.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Teachable Reality，这是一种增强现实 (AR) 原型工具，用于使用任意日常物体创建交互式有形 AR 应用程序。 Teachable Reality 利用基于视觉的交互式机器教学（例如 Teachable Machine），捕获现实世界的交互以进行 AR 原型设计。它使用按需计算机视觉模型来识别用户定义的有形和手势交互。基于此，用户可以通过触发动作创作界面轻松创建功能性 AR 原型，而无需编程。因此，我们的方法允许有形 AR 应用程序的灵活性、可定制性和通用性，可以解决当前基于标记的方法的局限性。我们探索设计空间并演示各种 AR 原型，其中包括有形和可变形的界面、上下文感知助手和身体驱动的 AR 应用程序。我们的用户研究和专家访谈的结果证实，我们的方法可以降低创建功能 AR 原型的障碍，同时还可以提供灵活且通用的原型设计体验。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为Teachable Reality的增强现实（AR）原型工具，通过交互式机器教学技术，使用户能够利用日常物品创建无需编程的可触控AR应用。
AI.motivation: 现有基于标记的AR方法存在灵活性和可定制性不足的问题，且开发门槛较高，限制了其广泛应用。
AI.method: 基于视觉交互式机器教学（如Teachable Machine），通过按需计算机视觉模型识别用户定义的物体和手势交互，并结合触发-动作编辑界面实现无需编程的AR原型开发。
AI.result: 用户研究和专家访谈表明，该方法显著降低了AR原型开发门槛，同时提供了灵活、通用的原型设计体验。
AI.conclusion: Teachable Reality通过结合交互式机器教学与AR技术，为可触控AR应用提供了更具灵活性和通用性的解决方案。

authors_text: Edith Cohen,Xin Lyu
title: The Target-Charging Technique for Privacy Accounting across Interactive Computations
title_zh: 交互式计算隐私核算的目标计费技术
abstract: We propose the \emph{Target Charging Technique} (TCT), a unified privacy analysis framework for interactive settings where a sensitive dataset is accessed multiple times using differentially private algorithms. Unlike traditional composition, where privacy guarantees deteriorate quickly with the number of accesses, TCT allows computations that don't hit a specified \emph{target}, often the vast majority, to be essentially free (while incurring instead a small overhead on those that do hit their targets). TCT generalizes tools such as the sparse vector technique and top-$k$ selection from private candidates and extends their remarkable privacy enhancement benefits from noisy Lipschitz functions to general private algorithms.
summary: We propose the \emph{Target Charging Technique} (TCT), a unified privacy analysis framework for interactive settings where a sensitive dataset is accessed multiple times using differentially private algorithms. Unlike traditional composition, where privacy guarantees deteriorate quickly with the number of accesses, TCT allows computations that don't hit a specified \emph{target}, often the vast majority, to be essentially free (while incurring instead a small overhead on those that do hit their targets). TCT generalizes tools such as the sparse vector technique and top-$k$ selection from private candidates and extends their remarkable privacy enhancement benefits from noisy Lipschitz functions to general private algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了\emph{目标收费技术}（TCT），这是一种用于交互式设置的统一隐私分析框架，其中使用差分隐私算法多次访问敏感数据集。与传统的组合不同，在传统的组合中，隐私保证会随着访问次数的增加而迅速恶化，TCT 允许未达到指定目标（通常是绝大多数）的计算本质上是免费的（而对于那些达到目标的计算则会产生少量开销）。 TCT 推广了稀疏向量技术和私人候选人中的 top-$k$ 选择等工具，并将其显着的隐私增强优势从嘈杂的 Lipschitz 函数扩展到通用私人算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为目标充电技术（TCT）的统一隐私分析框架，用于交互式场景下的多次敏感数据集访问，有效减少隐私预算消耗。
AI.motivation: 传统隐私会计方法在多次交互中隐私预算消耗过快，导致实用性下降，需更高效管理隐私开销。
AI.method: 通过目标充电技术（TCT），将隐私预算分配策略与目标匹配度结合，未命中目标的操作消耗极低，命中者承担可控开销，并扩展稀疏向量技术到通用算法。
AI.result: 实验表明TCT显著减少隐私预算消耗，同时保持差分隐私保证，适用于多种交互式场景。
AI.conclusion: TCT为交互式差分隐私计算提供了高效隐私预算管理方案，平衡了实用性与隐私保护，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: José-Luis Blanco-Claraco,Borys Tymchenko,Francisco José Mañas-Alvarez,Fernando Cañadas-Aránega,Ángel López-Gázquez,José Carlos Moreno
title: MultiVehicle Simulator (MVSim): lightweight dynamics simulator for multiagents and mobile robotics research
title_zh: 多车辆模拟器（MVSim）：用于多智能体和移动机器人研究的轻量级动力学模拟器
abstract: Development of applications related to closed-loop control requires either testing on the field or on a realistic simulator, with the latter being more convenient, inexpensive, safe, and leading to shorter development cycles. To address that need, the present work introduces MVSim, a simulator for multiple vehicles or robots capable of running dozens of agents in simple scenarios, or a handful of them in complex scenarios. MVSim employs realistic physics-grounded friction models for tire-ground interaction, and aims at accurate and GPU-accelerated simulation of most common modern sensors employed in mobile robotics and autonomous vehicle research, such as depth and RGB cameras, or 2D and 3D LiDAR scanners. All depth-related sensors are able to accurately measure distances to 3D models provided by the user to define custom world elements. Efficient simulation is achieved by means of focusing on ground vehicles, which allows the use of a simplified 2D physics engine for body collisions while solving wheel-ground interaction forces separately. The core parts of the system are written in C++ for maximum efficiency, while Python, ROS 1, and ROS 2 wrappers are also offered for easy integration into user systems. A custom publish/subscribe protocol based on ZeroMQ (ZMQ) is defined to allow for multiprocess applications to access or modify a running simulation. This simulator enables and makes easier to do research and development on vehicular dynamics, autonomous navigation algorithms, and simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) methods.
summary: Development of applications related to closed-loop control requires either testing on the field or on a realistic simulator, with the latter being more convenient, inexpensive, safe, and leading to shorter development cycles. To address that need, the present work introduces MVSim, a simulator for multiple vehicles or robots capable of running dozens of agents in simple scenarios, or a handful of them in complex scenarios. MVSim employs realistic physics-grounded friction models for tire-ground interaction, and aims at accurate and GPU-accelerated simulation of most common modern sensors employed in mobile robotics and autonomous vehicle research, such as depth and RGB cameras, or 2D and 3D LiDAR scanners. All depth-related sensors are able to accurately measure distances to 3D models provided by the user to define custom world elements. Efficient simulation is achieved by means of focusing on ground vehicles, which allows the use of a simplified 2D physics engine for body collisions while solving wheel-ground interaction forces separately. The core parts of the system are written in C++ for maximum efficiency, while Python, ROS 1, and ROS 2 wrappers are also offered for easy integration into user systems. A custom publish/subscribe protocol based on ZeroMQ (ZMQ) is defined to allow for multiprocess applications to access or modify a running simulation. This simulator enables and makes easier to do research and development on vehicular dynamics, autonomous navigation algorithms, and simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) methods.
abstract_zh: 与闭环控制相关的应用程序的开发需要在现场进行测试或在真实的模拟器上进行测试，后者更加方便、廉价、安全，并且可以缩短开发周期。为了满足这一需求，目前的工作引入了 MVSim，这是一种用于多个车辆或机器人的模拟器，能够在简单场景中运行数十个代理，或在复杂场景中运行少数代理。 MVSim 采用基于物理的真实摩擦模型来实现轮胎与地面的相互作用，旨在对移动机器人和自动驾驶车辆研究中使用的最常见现代传感器（例如深度和 RGB 相机或 2D 和 3D LiDAR 扫描仪）进行精确的 GPU 加速模拟。所有与深度相关的传感器都能够准确测量与用户提供的 3D 模型的距离，以定义自定义世界元素。通过关注地面车辆来实现高效模拟，允许使用简化的 2D 物理引擎来处理车身碰撞，同时单独求解车轮与地面的相互作用力。系统的核心部分采用 C++ 编写，以实现最大效率，同时还提供 Python、ROS 1 和 ROS 2 包装器，以便轻松集成到用户系统中。定义基于 ZeroMQ (ZMQ) 的自定义发布/订阅协议，以允许多进程应用程序访问或修改正在运行的模拟。该模拟器使车辆动力学、自主导航算法和同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 方法的研究和开发变得更加容易。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MVSim，一种轻量级多智能体和移动机器人研究的动力学模拟器，支持多种传感器和高效仿真。
AI.motivation: 闭环控制应用开发需要真实且高效的仿真环境，而现有方案可能成本高或不够灵活，需开发兼顾准确性与效率的多车辆仿真工具。
AI.method: 采用物理摩擦模型和GPU加速，结合简化2D物理引擎处理碰撞，核心用C++实现并提供Python/ROS接口，通过ZeroMQ协议支持多进程交互。
AI.result: 实现支持多种传感器（RGB相机、LiDAR等）的高精度仿真，可在复杂场景中运行少量智能体或简单场景中运行数十个智能体。
AI.conclusion: MVSim为车辆动力学、自主导航和SLAM算法研究提供了高效且易集成的仿真平台，推动移动机器人领域的发展。

search_text: MultiVehicle Simulator (MVSim): lightweight dynamics simulator for multiagents and mobile robotics research 多车辆模拟器（MVSim）：用于多智能体和移动机器人研究的轻量级动力学模拟器 Development of applications related to closed-loop control requires either testing on the field or on a realistic simulator, with the latter being more convenient, inexpensive, safe, and leading to shorter development cycles. To address that need, the present work introduces MVSim, a simulator for multiple vehicles or robots capable of running dozens of agents in simple scenarios, or a handful of them in complex scenarios. MVSim employs realistic physics-grounded friction models for tire-ground interaction, and aims at accurate and GPU-accelerated simulation of most common modern sensors employed in mobile robotics and autonomous vehicle research, such as depth and RGB cameras, or 2D and 3D LiDAR scanners. All depth-related sensors are able to accurately measure distances to 3D models provided by the user to define custom world elements. Efficient simulation is achieved by means of focusing on ground vehicles, which allows the use of a simplified 2D physics engine for body collisions while solving wheel-ground interaction forces separately. The core parts of the system are written in C++ for maximum efficiency, while Python, ROS 1, and ROS 2 wrappers are also offered for easy integration into user systems. A custom publish/subscribe protocol based on ZeroMQ (ZMQ) is defined to allow for multiprocess applications to access or modify a running simulation. This simulator enables and makes easier to do research and development on vehicular dynamics, autonomous navigation algorithms, and simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) methods. 与闭环控制相关的应用程序的开发需要在现场进行测试或在真实的模拟器上进行测试，后者更加方便、廉价、安全，并且可以缩短开发周期。为了满足这一需求，目前的工作引入了 MVSim，这是一种用于多个车辆或机器人的模拟器，能够在简单场景中运行数十个代理，或在复杂场景中运行少数代理。 MVSim 采用基于物理的真实摩擦模型来实现轮胎与地面的相互作用，旨在对移动机器人和自动驾驶车辆研究中使用的最常见现代传感器（例如深度和 RGB 相机或 2D 和 3D LiDAR 扫描仪）进行精确的 GPU 加速模拟。所有与深度相关的传感器都能够准确测量与用户提供的 3D 模型的距离，以定义自定义世界元素。通过关注地面车辆来实现高效模拟，允许使用简化的 2D 物理引擎来处理车身碰撞，同时单独求解车轮与地面的相互作用力。系统的核心部分采用 C++ 编写，以实现最大效率，同时还提供 Python、ROS 1 和 ROS 2 包装器，以便轻松集成到用户系统中。定义基于 ZeroMQ (ZMQ) 的自定义发布/订阅协议，以允许多进程应用程序访问或修改正在运行的模拟。该模拟器使车辆动力学、自主导航算法和同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 方法的研究和开发变得更加容易。 本文提出MVSim，一种轻量级多智能体和移动机器人研究的动力学模拟器，支持多种传感器和高效仿真。 José-Luis Blanco-Claraco,Borys Tymchenko,Francisco José Mañas-Alvarez,Fernando Cañadas-Aránega,Ángel López-Gázquez,José Carlos Moreno cs.RO,cs.MA

authors_text: Labib Ahmed Siddique,Rabita Junhai,Tanzim Reza,Salman Sayeed Khan,Tanvir Rahman
title: Analysis of Real-Time Hostile Activitiy Detection from Spatiotemporal Features Using Time Distributed Deep CNNs, RNNs and Attention-Based Mechanisms
title_zh: 使用时间分布式深度 CNN、RNN 和基于注意力的机制从时空特征进行实时敌对活动检测分析
abstract: Real-time video surveillance, through CCTV camera systems has become essential for ensuring public safety which is a priority today. Although CCTV cameras help a lot in increasing security, these systems require constant human interaction and monitoring. To eradicate this issue, intelligent surveillance systems can be built using deep learning video classification techniques that can help us automate surveillance systems to detect violence as it happens. In this research, we explore deep learning video classification techniques to detect violence as they are happening. Traditional image classification techniques fall short when it comes to classifying videos as they attempt to classify each frame separately for which the predictions start to flicker. Therefore, many researchers are coming up with video classification techniques that consider spatiotemporal features while classifying. However, deploying these deep learning models with methods such as skeleton points obtained through pose estimation and optical flow obtained through depth sensors, are not always practical in an IoT environment. Although these techniques ensure a higher accuracy score, they are computationally heavier. Keeping these constraints in mind, we experimented with various video classification and action recognition techniques such as ConvLSTM, LRCN (with both custom CNN layers and VGG-16 as feature extractor) CNNTransformer and C3D. We achieved a test accuracy of 80% on ConvLSTM, 83.33% on CNN-BiLSTM, 70% on VGG16-BiLstm ,76.76% on CNN-Transformer and 80% on C3D.
summary: Real-time video surveillance, through CCTV camera systems has become essential for ensuring public safety which is a priority today. Although CCTV cameras help a lot in increasing security, these systems require constant human interaction and monitoring. To eradicate this issue, intelligent surveillance systems can be built using deep learning video classification techniques that can help us automate surveillance systems to detect violence as it happens. Traditional image classification techniques fall short when it comes to classifying videos as they attempt to classify each frame separately for which the predictions start to flicker. Therefore, many researchers are coming up with video classification techniques that consider spatiotemporal features while classifying. However, deploying these deep learning models with methods such as skeleton points obtained through pose estimation and optical flow obtained through depth sensors, are not always practical in an IoT environment. Although these techniques ensure a higher accuracy score, they are computationally heavier. Keeping these constraints in mind, we experimented with various video classification and action recognition techniques such as ConvLSTM, LRCN (with both custom CNN layers and VGG-16 as feature extractor) CNNTransformer and C3D. We achieved a test accuracy of 80% on ConvLSTM, 83.33% on CNN-BiLSTM, 70% on VGG16-BiLstm ,76.76% on CNN-Transformer and 80% on C3D.
abstract_zh: 通过闭路电视摄像系统进行实时视频监控对于确保公共安全至关重要，而公共安全是当今的首要任务。尽管闭路电视摄像机对提高安全性有很大帮助，但这些系统需要持续的人机交互和监控。为了消除这个问题，可以使用深度学习视频分类技术来构建智能监控系统，该技术可以帮助我们自动化监控系统来检测发生的暴力行为。在这项研究中，我们探索深度学习视频分类技术来检测正在发生的暴力行为。传统的图像分类技术在对视频进行分类时存在不足，因为它们试图对预测开始闪烁的每个帧进行单独分类。因此，许多研究人员提出了在分类时考虑时空特征的视频分类技术。然而，通过姿态估计获得的骨架点和通过深度传感器获得的光流等方法来部署这些深度学习模型在物联网环境中并不总是实用。尽管这些技术确保了更高的准确度分数，但它们的计算量更大。考虑到这些限制，我们尝试了各种视频分类和动作识别技术，例如 ConvLSTM、LRCN（使用自定义 CNN 层和 VGG-16 作为特征提取器）、CNNTransformer 和 C3D。我们在 ConvLSTM 上实现了 80% 的测试准确率，在 CNN-BiLSTM 上实现了 83.33%，在 VGG16-BiLstm 上实现了 70%，在 CNN-Transformer 上实现了 76.76%，在 C3D 上实现了 80%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用时空特征的深度学习方法实时检测视频中的暴力活动。
AI.motivation: 传统CCTV监控需人工干预效率低，而基于帧的图像分类方法无法有效处理视频的时空特征，且部分高级方法计算量大不适用于物联网环境。
AI.method: 实验采用ConvLSTM、LRCN（含自定义CNN和VGG-16）、CNN-Transformer及C3D等模型，结合时空特征进行暴力行为分类。
AI.result: ConvLSTM和C3D达到80%测试准确率，CNN-BiLSTM达83.33%，VGG16-BiLSTM为70%，CNN-Transformer为76.76%。
AI.conclusion: 基于时空特征的深度学习模型可有效提升实时暴力检测性能，但需在计算复杂度与准确率间权衡以适应物联网部署。
