tldr: 本文提出了一种基于特征值信息的神经常微分方程（NeuralODE）方法，以解决其稳定性与收敛性问题。
motivation: 传统NeuralODE在建模复杂系统时易受稳定性与收敛性影响，数值求解器选择困难且易陷入局部最优解。
method: 通过将ODE的特征值属性（如稳定性、振荡性、阻尼等）融入训练目标函数，引导模型满足特定求解器或应用需求。
result: 该方法在稀疏数据和动态系统中表现出更强的鲁棒性，有效提升了训练收敛速度与模型性能。
conclusion: 基于特征值的NeuralODE训练策略能有效缓解稳定性与收敛性问题，为复杂系统建模提供新思路。
search_text: Eigen-informed NeuralODEs: Dealing with stability and convergence issues of NeuralODEs 基于特征的 NeuralODE：处理 NeuralODE 的稳定性和收敛问题 Using vanilla NeuralODEs to model large and/or complex systems often fails due two reasons: Stability and convergence. NeuralODEs are capable of describing stable as well as instable dynamic systems. Selecting an appropriate numerical solver is not trivial, because NeuralODE properties change during training. If the NeuralODE becomes more stiff, a suboptimal solver may need to perform very small solver steps, which significantly slows down the training process. If the NeuralODE becomes to instable, the numerical solver might not be able to solve it at all, which causes the training process to terminate. Often, this is tackled by choosing a computational expensive solver that is robust to instable and stiff ODEs, but at the cost of a significantly decreased training performance. Our method on the other hand, allows to enforce ODE properties that fit a specific solver or application-related boundary conditions. Concerning the convergence behavior, NeuralODEs often tend to run into local minima, especially if the system to be learned is highly dynamic and/or oscillating over multiple periods. Because of the vanishing gradient at a local minimum, the NeuralODE is often not capable of leaving it and converge to the right solution. We present a technique to add knowledge of ODE properties based on eigenvalues - like (partly) stability, oscillation capability, frequency, damping and/or stiffness - to the training objective of a NeuralODE. We exemplify our method at a linear as well as a nonlinear system model and show, that the presented training process is far more robust against local minima, instabilities and sparse data samples and improves training convergence and performance. 使用普通 NeuralODE 对大型和/或复杂系统进行建模通常会失败，原因有两个：稳定性和收敛性。 NeuralODE 能够描述稳定和不稳定的动态系统。选择合适的数值求解器并非易事，因为 NeuralODE 属性在训练期间会发生变化。如果 NeuralODE 变得更加僵硬，次优求解器可能需要执行非常小的求解器步骤，这会显着减慢训练过程。如果 NeuralODE 变得不稳定，数值求解器可能根本无法求解，从而导致训练过程终止。通常，可以通过选择计算量大的求解器来解决这个问题，该求解器对于不稳定和刚性的 ODE 具有鲁棒性，但代价是训练性能显着下降。另一方面，我们的方法允许强制执行适合特定求解器或应用程序相关边界条件的 ODE 属性。关于收敛行为，NeuralODE 通常会遇到局部最小值，特别是当要学习的系统高度动态和/或在多个周期内振荡时。由于局部极小值处的梯度消失，NeuralODE 通常无法离开它并收敛到正确的解决方案。我们提出了一种技术，将基于特征值（例如（部分）稳定性、振荡能力、频率、阻尼和/或刚度）的 ODE 属性知识添加到 NeuralODE 的训练目标中。我们在线性和非线性系统模型中举例说明了我们的方法，并表明，所提出的训练过程对于局部极小值、不稳定性和稀疏数据样本更加稳健，并提高了训练收敛性和性能。 本文提出了一种基于特征值信息的神经常微分方程（NeuralODE）方法，以解决其稳定性与收敛性问题。 Tobias Thummerer,Lars Mikelsons cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Matthieu Nastorg,Michele Alessandro Bucci,Thibault Faney,Jean-Marc Gratien,Guillaume Charpiat,Marc Schoenauer
title: An Implicit GNN Solver for Poisson-like problems
title_zh: 类泊松问题的隐式 GNN 求解器
abstract: This paper presents $Ψ$-GNN, a novel Graph Neural Network (GNN) approach for solving the ubiquitous Poisson PDE problems with mixed boundary conditions. By leveraging the Implicit Layer Theory, $Ψ$-GNN models an "infinitely" deep network, thus avoiding the empirical tuning of the number of required Message Passing layers to attain the solution. Its original architecture explicitly takes into account the boundary conditions, a critical prerequisite for physical applications, and is able to adapt to any initially provided solution. $Ψ$-GNN is trained using a "physics-informed" loss, and the training process is stable by design, and insensitive to its initialization. Furthermore, the consistency of the approach is theoretically proven, and its flexibility and generalization efficiency are experimentally demonstrated: the same learned model can accurately handle unstructured meshes of various sizes, as well as different boundary conditions. To the best of our knowledge, $Ψ$-GNN is the first physics-informed GNN-based method that can handle various unstructured domains, boundary conditions and initial solutions while also providing convergence guarantees.
summary: This paper presents $Ψ$-GNN, a novel Graph Neural Network (GNN) approach for solving the ubiquitous Poisson PDE problems with mixed boundary conditions. By leveraging the Implicit Layer Theory, $Ψ$-GNN models an "infinitely" deep network, thus avoiding the empirical tuning of the number of required Message Passing layers to attain the solution. Its original architecture explicitly takes into account the boundary conditions, a critical prerequisite for physical applications, and is able to adapt to any initially provided solution. $Ψ$-GNN is trained using a "physics-informed" loss, and the training process is stable by design, and insensitive to its initialization. Furthermore, the consistency of the approach is theoretically proven, and its flexibility and generalization efficiency are experimentally demonstrated: the same learned model can accurately handle unstructured meshes of various sizes, as well as different boundary conditions. To the best of our knowledge, $Ψ$-GNN is the first physics-informed GNN-based method that can handle various unstructured domains, boundary conditions and initial solutions while also providing convergence guarantees.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 $Ψ$-GNN，这是一种新颖的图神经网络 (GNN) 方法，用于解决普遍存在的具有混合边界条件的泊松偏微分方程问题。通过利用隐式层理论，$Ψ$-GNN 建模了一个“无限”深度网络，从而避免了根据经验调整所需消息传递层的数量来获得解决方案。其原始架构明确考虑了边界条件，这是物理应用的关键先决条件，并且能够适应任何最初提供的解决方案。 $Ψ$-GNN 使用“物理信息”损失进行训练，并且训练过程在设计上是稳定的，并且对其初始化不敏感。此外，该方法的一致性在理论上得到了证明，其灵活性和泛化效率也得到了实验证明：相同的学习模型可以准确地处理各种尺寸的非结构化网格以及不同的边界条件。据我们所知，$Ψ$-GNN 是第一个基于物理知识的 GNN 方法，可以处理各种非结构化领域、边界条件和初始解，同时还提供收敛保证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于隐式图神经网络（Ψ-GNN）的新方法，用于求解具有混合边界条件的泊松型偏微分方程（PDE）问题。
AI.motivation: 传统图神经网络（GNN）求解PDE问题时需依赖经验调整消息传递层数，且难以有效处理复杂边界条件和非结构化网格。
AI.method: 通过隐式层理论构建无限深网络架构，显式整合边界条件，并采用物理信息损失函数进行训练，确保稳定性与初始化无关。
AI.result: 理论证明了方法的一致性，实验表明模型可泛化至不同规模的非结构化网格及多种边界条件，且提供收敛性保证。
AI.conclusion: Ψ-GNN是首个兼顾多类型非结构化域、边界条件及初始解处理能力的物理信息GNN方法，具有理论收敛性与实用灵活性。

search_text: An Implicit GNN Solver for Poisson-like problems 类泊松问题的隐式 GNN 求解器 This paper presents $Ψ$-GNN, a novel Graph Neural Network (GNN) approach for solving the ubiquitous Poisson PDE problems with mixed boundary conditions. By leveraging the Implicit Layer Theory, $Ψ$-GNN models an "infinitely" deep network, thus avoiding the empirical tuning of the number of required Message Passing layers to attain the solution. Its original architecture explicitly takes into account the boundary conditions, a critical prerequisite for physical applications, and is able to adapt to any initially provided solution. $Ψ$-GNN is trained using a "physics-informed" loss, and the training process is stable by design, and insensitive to its initialization. Furthermore, the consistency of the approach is theoretically proven, and its flexibility and generalization efficiency are experimentally demonstrated: the same learned model can accurately handle unstructured meshes of various sizes, as well as different boundary conditions. To the best of our knowledge, $Ψ$-GNN is the first physics-informed GNN-based method that can handle various unstructured domains, boundary conditions and initial solutions while also providing convergence guarantees. 本文提出了 $Ψ$-GNN，这是一种新颖的图神经网络 (GNN) 方法，用于解决普遍存在的具有混合边界条件的泊松偏微分方程问题。通过利用隐式层理论，$Ψ$-GNN 建模了一个“无限”深度网络，从而避免了根据经验调整所需消息传递层的数量来获得解决方案。其原始架构明确考虑了边界条件，这是物理应用的关键先决条件，并且能够适应任何最初提供的解决方案。 $Ψ$-GNN 使用“物理信息”损失进行训练，并且训练过程在设计上是稳定的，并且对其初始化不敏感。此外，该方法的一致性在理论上得到了证明，其灵活性和泛化效率也得到了实验证明：相同的学习模型可以准确地处理各种尺寸的非结构化网格以及不同的边界条件。据我们所知，$Ψ$-GNN 是第一个基于物理知识的 GNN 方法，可以处理各种非结构化领域、边界条件和初始解，同时还提供收敛保证。 本文提出了一种基于隐式图神经网络（Ψ-GNN）的新方法，用于求解具有混合边界条件的泊松型偏微分方程（PDE）问题。 Matthieu Nastorg,Michele Alessandro Bucci,Thibault Faney,Jean-Marc Gratien,Guillaume Charpiat,Marc Schoenauer cs.LG,cs.AI,math.AP

authors_text: Xuanjie Liu,Daniel Chin,Yichen Huang,Gus Xia
title: Learning Interpretable Low-dimensional Representation via Physical Symmetry
title_zh: 通过物理对称性学习可解释的低维表示
abstract: We have recently seen great progress in learning interpretable music representations, ranging from basic factors, such as pitch and timbre, to high-level concepts, such as chord and texture. However, most methods rely heavily on music domain knowledge. It remains an open question what general computational principles give rise to interpretable representations, especially low-dim factors that agree with human perception. In this study, we take inspiration from modern physics and use physical symmetry as a self consistency constraint for the latent space of time-series data. Specifically, it requires the prior model that characterises the dynamics of the latent states to be equivariant with respect to certain group transformations. We show that physical symmetry leads the model to learn a linear pitch factor from unlabelled monophonic music audio in a self-supervised fashion. In addition, the same methodology can be applied to computer vision, learning a 3D Cartesian space from videos of a simple moving object without labels. Furthermore, physical symmetry naturally leads to counterfactual representation augmentation, a new technique which improves sample efficiency.
summary: We have recently seen great progress in learning interpretable music representations, ranging from basic factors, such as pitch and timbre, to high-level concepts, such as chord and texture. However, most methods rely heavily on music domain knowledge. It remains an open question what general computational principles give rise to interpretable representations, especially low-dim factors that agree with human perception. In this study, we take inspiration from modern physics and use physical symmetry as a self consistency constraint for the latent space of time-series data. Specifically, it requires the prior model that characterises the dynamics of the latent states to be equivariant with respect to certain group transformations. We show that physical symmetry leads the model to learn a linear pitch factor from unlabelled monophonic music audio in a self-supervised fashion. In addition, the same methodology can be applied to computer vision, learning a 3D Cartesian space from videos of a simple moving object without labels. Furthermore, physical symmetry naturally leads to counterfactual representation augmentation, a new technique which improves sample efficiency.
abstract_zh: 最近，我们在学习可解释的音乐表示方面取得了巨大进展，从基本因素（例如音高和音色）到高级概念（例如和弦和纹理）。然而，大多数方法严重依赖音乐领域知识。什么一般计算原理会产生可解释的表示，尤其是与人类感知一致的低暗因素，这仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项研究中，我们从现代物理学中汲取灵感，利用物理对称性作为时间序列数据潜在空间的自洽约束。具体来说，它要求表征潜在状态动态的先验模型相对于某些群变换是等变的。我们表明，物理对称性导致模型以自我监督的方式从未标记的单声道音乐音频中学习线性音高因子。此外，相同的方法可以应用于计算机视觉，从没有标签的简单移动物体的视频中学习 3D 笛卡尔空间。此外，物理对称性自然会导致反事实表示增强，这是一种提高样本效率的新技术。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过物理对称性约束学习可解释的低维表示，应用于音乐和计算机视觉领域。
AI.motivation: 尽管在学习可解释的音乐表示方面取得了进展，但大多数方法依赖于音乐领域知识，缺乏通用的计算原理。本文旨在探索通过物理对称性来实现可解释表示的通用方法。
AI.method: 本文采用物理对称性作为自一致性约束，要求描述潜在状态动态的先验模型相对于某些群变换具有等变性。
AI.result: 该方法在无标签单音音乐音频中学习到了线性音高因子，并在计算机视觉中从简单运动物体的视频中学习到了3D笛卡尔空间。
AI.conclusion: 物理对称性能够引导模型学习可解释的低维表示，并且该方法具有通用性，适用于不同领域。

We show that physical symmetry leads the model to learn a linear pitch factor from unlabelled monophonic music audio in a self-supervised fashion. In addition, the same methodology can be applied to computer vision, learning a 3D Cartesian space from videos of a simple moving object without labels. Furthermore, physical symmetry naturally leads to counterfactual representation augmentation, a new technique which improves sample efficiency. 最近，我们在学习可解释的音乐表示方面取得了巨大进展，从基本因素（例如音高和音色）到高级概念（例如和弦和纹理）。然而，大多数方法严重依赖音乐领域知识。什么一般计算原理会产生可解释的表示，尤其是与人类感知一致的低暗因素，这仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项研究中，我们从现代物理学中汲取灵感，利用物理对称性作为时间序列数据潜在空间的自洽约束。具体来说，它要求表征潜在状态动态的先验模型相对于某些群变换是等变的。我们表明，物理对称性导致模型以自我监督的方式从未标记的单声道音乐音频中学习线性音高因子。此外，相同的方法可以应用于计算机视觉，从没有标签的简单移动物体的视频中学习 3D 笛卡尔空间。此外，物理对称性自然会导致反事实表示增强，这是一种提高样本效率的新技术。 本文研究如何通过物理对称性约束学习可解释的低维表示，应用于音乐和计算机视觉领域。 Xuanjie Liu,Daniel Chin,Yichen Huang,Gus Xia cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jihan Ghanim,Maha Issa,Mariette Awad
title: An Asymmetric Loss with Anomaly Detection LSTM Framework for Power Consumption Prediction
title_zh: 用于功耗预测的具有异常检测 LSTM 框架的非对称损失
comment: This paper was published in 2022 IEEE 21st Mediterranean Electrotechnical Conference (MELECON)
comments: This paper was published in 2022 IEEE 21st Mediterranean Electrotechnical Conference (MELECON)
abstract: Building an accurate load forecasting model with minimal underpredictions is vital to prevent any undesired power outages due to underproduction of electricity. However, the power consumption patterns of the residential sector contain fluctuations and anomalies making them challenging to predict. In this paper, we propose multiple Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) frameworks with different asymmetric loss functions to impose a higher penalty on underpredictions. We also apply a density-based spatial clustering of applications with noise (DBSCAN) anomaly detection approach, prior to the load forecasting task, to remove any present oultiers. Considering the effect of weather and social factors, seasonality splitting is performed on the three considered datasets from France, Germany, and Hungary containing hourly power consumption, weather, and calendar features. Root-mean-square error (RMSE) results show that removing the anomalies efficiently reduces the underestimation and overestimation errors in all the seasonal datasets. Additionally, asymmetric loss functions and seasonality splitting effectively minimize underestimations despite increasing the overestimation error to some degree. Reducing underpredictions of electricity consumption is essential to prevent power outages that can be damaging to the community.
summary: Building an accurate load forecasting model with minimal underpredictions is vital to prevent any undesired power outages due to underproduction of electricity. However, the power consumption patterns of the residential sector contain fluctuations and anomalies making them challenging to predict. In this paper, we propose multiple Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) frameworks with different asymmetric loss functions to impose a higher penalty on underpredictions. We also apply a density-based spatial clustering of applications with noise (DBSCAN) anomaly detection approach, prior to the load forecasting task, to remove any present oultiers. Considering the effect of weather and social factors, seasonality splitting is performed on the three considered datasets from France, Germany, and Hungary containing hourly power consumption, weather, and calendar features. Root-mean-square error (RMSE) results show that removing the anomalies efficiently reduces the underestimation and overestimation errors in all the seasonal datasets. Additionally, asymmetric loss functions and seasonality splitting effectively minimize underestimations despite increasing the overestimation error to some degree. Reducing underpredictions of electricity consumption is essential to prevent power outages that can be damaging to the community.
abstract_zh: 建立准确的负荷预测模型并尽量减少预测不足对于防止因电力生产不足而导致的意外停电至关重要。然而，住宅领域的用电模式存在波动和异常现象，因此难以预测。在本文中，我们提出了多个具有不同不对称损失函数的长短期记忆（LSTM）框架，以对预测不足施加更高的惩罚。在负载预测任务之前，我们还应用基于密度的应用程序空间聚类和噪声（DBSCAN）异常检测方法，以消除任何现有的异常。考虑到天气和社会因素的影响，对来自法国、德国和匈牙利的三个考虑的数据集进行季节性分割，其中包含每小时的电力消耗、天气和日历特征。均方根误差 (RMSE) 结果表明，消除异常可以有效减少所有季节性数据集中的低估和高估误差。此外，尽管在一定程度上增加了高估误差，但不对称损失函数和季节性分裂有效地最大限度地减少了低估。减少电力消耗的低估对于防止停电对社区造成损害至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合异常检测和不对称损失函数的LSTM框架，用于提高电力消费预测的准确性，特别是减少低估。
AI.motivation: 住宅部门的电力消费模式存在波动和异常，使得预测困难。低估可能导致电力短缺和停电，因此需要提高预测模型的准确性。
AI.method: 作者提出了多种使用不同不对称损失函数的LSTM框架，并在负载预测任务前应用DBSCAN异常检测方法去除异常值。同时，考虑天气和社会因素，对来自法国、德国和匈牙利的三个数据集进行季节性划分。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，去除异常值有效减少了所有季节数据集的低估和高估误差。不对称损失函数和季节性划分在一定程度上有效减少了低估误差。
AI.conclusion: 减少电力消费的低估对防止社区损害至关重要，结合异常检测和不对称损失函数的方法能有效提升预测准确性。

authors_text: Yufei Huang,Lirong Wu,Haitao Lin,Jiangbin Zheng,Ge Wang,Stan Z. Li
title: Data-Efficient Protein 3D Geometric Pretraining via Refinement of Diffused Protein Structure Decoy
title_zh: 通过细化扩散蛋白质结构诱饵进行数据高效的蛋白质 3D 几何预训练
abstract: Learning meaningful protein representation is important for a variety of biological downstream tasks such as structure-based drug design. Having witnessed the success of protein sequence pretraining, pretraining for structural data which is more informative has become a promising research topic. However, there are three major challenges facing protein structure pretraining: insufficient sample diversity, physically unrealistic modeling, and the lack of protein-specific pretext tasks. To try to address these challenges, we present the 3D Geometric Pretraining. In this paper, we propose a unified framework for protein pretraining and a 3D geometric-based, data-efficient, and protein-specific pretext task: RefineDiff (Refine the Diffused Protein Structure Decoy). After pretraining our geometric-aware model with this task on limited data(less than 1% of SOTA models), we obtained informative protein representations that can achieve comparable performance for various downstream tasks.
summary: Learning meaningful protein representation is important for a variety of biological downstream tasks such as structure-based drug design. Having witnessed the success of protein sequence pretraining, pretraining for structural data which is more informative has become a promising research topic. However, there are three major challenges facing protein structure pretraining: insufficient sample diversity, physically unrealistic modeling, and the lack of protein-specific pretext tasks. To try to address these challenges, we present the 3D Geometric Pretraining. In this paper, we propose a unified framework for protein pretraining and a 3D geometric-based, data-efficient, and protein-specific pretext task: RefineDiff (Refine the Diffused Protein Structure Decoy). After pretraining our geometric-aware model with this task on limited data(less than 1% of SOTA models), we obtained informative protein representations that can achieve comparable performance for various downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 学习有意义的蛋白质表示对于各种生物下游任务（例如基于结构的药物设计）非常重要。见证了蛋白质序列预训练的成功后，信息更丰富的结构数据预训练已成为一个有前途的研究课题。然而，蛋白质结构预训练面临三大挑战：样本多样性不足、物理上不切实际的建模以及缺乏蛋白质特定的借口任务。为了尝试解决这些挑战，我们提出了 3D 几何预训练。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的蛋白质预训练框架和基于 3D 几何、数据高效且特定于蛋白质的借口任务：RefineDiff（细化扩散蛋白质结构诱饵）。在有限的数据（少于 1% 的 SOTA 模型）上使用此任务对我们的几何感知模型进行预训练后，我们获得了信息丰富的蛋白质表示，可以为各种下游任务实现可比的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D几何结构的高效蛋白质预训练方法RefineDiff，通过优化扩散的蛋白质结构假说来提升蛋白质表示学习。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质结构预训练面临样本多样性不足、物理建模不真实及缺乏特定预训练任务三大挑战，需开发数据高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计RefineDiff框架，以3D几何为基础，通过优化扩散的蛋白质结构假说作为预训练任务，在少量数据（少于SOTA模型1%）上训练几何感知模型。
AI.result: 预训练模型在多种下游任务中表现出与现有方法相当的性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: RefineDiff通过几何优化任务有效解决了蛋白质结构预训练的挑战，为数据高效学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Andrea Soltoggio,Eseoghene Ben-Iwhiwhu,Christos Peridis,Pawel Ladosz,Jeffery Dick,Praveen K. Pilly,Soheil Kolouri
title: The configurable tree graph (CT-graph): measurable problems in partially observable and distal reward environments for lifelong reinforcement learning
title_zh: 可配置树图（CT-graph）：终身强化学习的部分可观察和远端奖励环境中的可测量问题
abstract: This paper introduces a set of formally defined and transparent problems for reinforcement learning algorithms with the following characteristics: (1) variable degrees of observability (non-Markov observations), (2) distal and sparse rewards, (3) variable and hierarchical reward structure, (4) multiple-task generation, (5) variable problem complexity. The environment provides 1D or 2D categorical observations, and takes actions as input. The core structure of the CT-graph is a multi-branch tree graph with arbitrary branching factor, depth, and observation sets that can be varied to increase the dimensions of the problem in a controllable and measurable way. Two main categories of states, decision states and wait states, are devised to create a hierarchy of importance among observations, typical of real-world problems. A large observation set can produce a vast set of histories that impairs memory-augmented agents. Variable reward functions allow for the easy creation of multiple tasks and the ability of an agent to efficiently adapt in dynamic scenarios where tasks with controllable degrees of similarities are presented. Challenging complexity levels can be easily achieved due to the exponential growth of the graph. The problem formulation and accompanying code provide a fast, transparent, and mathematically defined set of configurable tests to compare the performance of reinforcement learning algorithms, in particular in lifelong learning settings.
summary: This paper introduces a set of formally defined and transparent problems for reinforcement learning algorithms with the following characteristics: (1) variable degrees of observability (non-Markov observations), (2) distal and sparse rewards, (3) variable and hierarchical reward structure, (4) multiple-task generation, (5) variable problem complexity. The environment provides 1D or 2D categorical observations, and takes actions as input. The core structure of the CT-graph is a multi-branch tree graph with arbitrary branching factor, depth, and observation sets that can be varied to increase the dimensions of the problem in a controllable and measurable way. Two main categories of states, decision states and wait states, are devised to create a hierarchy of importance among observations, typical of real-world problems. A large observation set can produce a vast set of histories that impairs memory-augmented agents. Variable reward functions allow for the easy creation of multiple tasks and the ability of an agent to efficiently adapt in dynamic scenarios where tasks with controllable degrees of similarities are presented. Challenging complexity levels can be easily achieved due to the exponential growth of the graph. The problem formulation and accompanying code provide a fast, transparent, and mathematically defined set of configurable tests to compare the performance of reinforcement learning algorithms, in particular in lifelong learning settings.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一组正式定义的、透明的强化学习算法问题，具有以下特征：（1）可变程度的可观测性（非马尔可夫观测），（2）远端和稀疏奖励，（3）可变和分层奖励结构，（4）多任务生成，（5）可变问题复杂性。环境提供一维或二维分类观察，并将操作作为输入。 CT图的核心结构是具有任意分支因子、深度和观察集的多分支树图，可以通过改变这些因子、深度和观察集以可控和可测量的方式增加问题的维度。设计了两个主要的状态类别，即决策状态和等待状态，以在观察结果之间创建重要性层次结构，这是典型的现实世界问题。大量的观察集可以产生大量的历史记录，从而损害记忆增强代理。可变奖励函数允许轻松创建多个任务，并且使代理能够有效地适应呈现具有可控相似度的任务的动态场景。由于图的指数增长，可以轻松实现具有挑战性的复杂性级别。问题表述和随附的代码提供了一组快速、透明且数学定义的可配置测试，用于比较强化学习算法的性能，特别是在终身学习环境中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可配置树图（CT-graph），用于强化学习算法在部分可观测和远距离奖励环境中的可衡量问题研究。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习测试环境缺乏对部分可观测性、稀疏奖励和动态任务复杂度的可控评估，需设计标准化问题以比较算法性能。
AI.method: 构建基于多分支树结构的CT-graph，通过调整分支因子、深度和观察集实现问题维度控制，引入决策状态与等待状态模拟现实问题的观察优先级，并设计可变奖励函数生成多任务。
AI.result: CT-graph提供了快速、透明且数学定义的测试集，可有效评估强化学习算法在终身学习场景下的表现，尤其针对高复杂度问题的适应性。
AI.conclusion: CT-graph为研究复杂环境下的强化学习算法提供了灵活框架，有助于推动鲁棒算法的设计与优化。

search_text: The configurable tree graph (CT-graph): measurable problems in partially observable and distal reward environments for lifelong reinforcement learning 可配置树图（CT-graph）：终身强化学习的部分可观察和远端奖励环境中的可测量问题 This paper introduces a set of formally defined and transparent problems for reinforcement learning algorithms with the following characteristics: (1) variable degrees of observability (non-Markov observations), (2) distal and sparse rewards, (3) variable and hierarchical reward structure, (4) multiple-task generation, (5) variable problem complexity. The environment provides 1D or 2D categorical observations, and takes actions as input. The core structure of the CT-graph is a multi-branch tree graph with arbitrary branching factor, depth, and observation sets that can be varied to increase the dimensions of the problem in a controllable and measurable way. Two main categories of states, decision states and wait states, are devised to create a hierarchy of importance among observations, typical of real-world problems. A large observation set can produce a vast set of histories that impairs memory-augmented agents. Variable reward functions allow for the easy creation of multiple tasks and the ability of an agent to efficiently adapt in dynamic scenarios where tasks with controllable degrees of similarities are presented. Challenging complexity levels can be easily achieved due to the exponential growth of the graph. The problem formulation and accompanying code provide a fast, transparent, and mathematically defined set of configurable tests to compare the performance of reinforcement learning algorithms, in particular in lifelong learning settings. 本文介绍了一组正式定义的、透明的强化学习算法问题，具有以下特征：（1）可变程度的可观测性（非马尔可夫观测），（2）远端和稀疏奖励，（3）可变和分层奖励结构，（4）多任务生成，（5）可变问题复杂性。环境提供一维或二维分类观察，并将操作作为输入。 CT图的核心结构是具有任意分支因子、深度和观察集的多分支树图，可以通过改变这些因子、深度和观察集以可控和可测量的方式增加问题的维度。设计了两个主要的状态类别，即决策状态和等待状态，以在观察结果之间创建重要性层次结构，这是典型的现实世界问题。大量的观察集可以产生大量的历史记录，从而损害记忆增强代理。可变奖励函数允许轻松创建多个任务，并且使代理能够有效地适应呈现具有可控相似度的任务的动态场景。由于图的指数增长，可以轻松实现具有挑战性的复杂性级别。问题表述和随附的代码提供了一组快速、透明且数学定义的可配置测试，用于比较强化学习算法的性能，特别是在终身学习环境中。 本文提出了一种可配置树图（CT-graph），用于强化学习算法在部分可观测和远距离奖励环境中的可衡量问题研究。 Andrea Soltoggio,Eseoghene Ben-Iwhiwhu,Christos Peridis,Pawel Ladosz,Jeffery Dick,Praveen K. authors_text: Melanie Bancilhon,R. Jordan Crouser,Alvitta Ottley
title: Communicating Intel to Decision-Makers: Toward the Integration Text and Charts in Reports
title_zh: 向决策者传达英特尔信息：报告中文本和图表的整合
abstract: Intelligence analysts' roles include analyzing reports, identifying important information relevant to the current state of affairs, and communicating their takeaways. These reports are then analyzed and reported to decision-makers or translated into a presidential brief. While these tasks seem consistent across analysts, each step differs in its content, level of detail, and format. The purpose of this research is to gain an understanding of how consumers of analytic products receive and interact with reports. This was accomplished via a series of online questions to 22 experts recruited to provide input. Our analysis provides insight into what makes analytic products effective for decision-makers, which could improve the quality of reports produced and alleviate common customer pain points, should recommendations be appropriately incorporated.
summary: Intelligence analysts' roles include analyzing reports, identifying important information relevant to the current state of affairs, and communicating their takeaways. These reports are then analyzed and reported to decision-makers or translated into a presidential brief. While these tasks seem consistent across analysts, each step differs in its content, level of detail, and format. The purpose of this research is to gain an understanding of how consumers of analytic products receive and interact with reports. This was accomplished via a series of online questions to 22 experts recruited to provide input. Our analysis provides insight into what makes analytic products effective for decision-makers, which could improve the quality of reports produced and alleviate common customer pain points, should recommendations be appropriately incorporated.
abstract_zh: 情报分析师的职责包括分析报告、识别与当前事态相关的重要信息以及传达他们的结论。然后对这些报告进行分析并向决策者报告或转化为总统简报。虽然这些任务在分析师看来是一致的，但每个步骤的内容、详细程度和格式都不同。本研究的目的是了解分析产品的消费者如何接收报告并与之互动。这是通过向 22 名受邀提供意见的专家提出一系列在线问题来完成的。我们的分析提供了深入了解分析产品对决策者有效的因素，如果适当纳入建议，可以提高生成的报告的质量并减轻常见的客户痛点。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在探索如何通过整合文本与图表提升情报报告对决策者的信息传递效果。
AI.motivation: 情报分析报告在内容、细节和格式上的差异导致决策者接收信息效率低下，需优化报告设计以解决实际痛点。
AI.method: 通过在线问卷调查22名情报领域专家，收集其对分析报告接收与交互方式的反馈。
AI.result: 明确影响报告有效性的关键因素，包括信息清晰度、结构逻辑性及可视化呈现方式。
AI.conclusion: 建议采用文本与图表整合的报告形式，并优化格式设计以提升决策者的信息理解效率。

authors_text: Mahdi Ghafourian,Bilgesu Sumer,Ruben Vera-Rodriguez,Julian Fierrez,Ruben Tolosana,Aythami Moralez,Els Kindt
title: Blockchain and Biometrics: Survey, GDPR Analysis, and Future Directions
title_zh: 区块链和生物识别技术：调查、GDPR 分析和未来方向
abstract: Biometric recognition as an efficient and hard-to-forge way of identification and verification has become an indispensable part of the current digital world. The fast evolution of this technology has been a strong incentive for integration into many applications. Meanwhile, blockchain, the decentralized ledger technology, has been widely received by both research and industry in the past few years, and it is being increasingly deployed today in many different applications, such as money transfer, IoT, healthcare, or logistics. Recently, researchers have started to speculate on the pros and cons and what the best applications would be when these two technologies cross paths. This paper provides a survey of the research literature on the combination of blockchain and biometrics and includes a first legal analysis of this integration based on GDPR to shed light on challenges and potentials. Although the integration of blockchain technology into the biometric sector is still in its infancy, with a growing body of literature discussing specific applications and advanced technological setups, this paper aims to provide a holistic understanding of blockchain applicability in biometrics. Based on published studies, this article discusses, among others, practical examples combining blockchain and biometrics for novel applications in PKI systems, distributed trusted services, and identity management. Challenges and limitations when combining blockchain and biometrics that motivate future work will also be discussed; e.g., blockchain networks at their current stage may not be efficient or economical for some real-time biometric applications. Finally, we also discuss key legal aspects of the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) related to this combination of technologies (blockchain and biometrics); for example, accountability, immutability, anonymity, and data protection elements.
summary: Biometric recognition as an efficient and hard-to-forge way of identification and verification has become an indispensable part of the current digital world. The fast evolution of this technology has been a strong incentive for integration into many applications. Meanwhile, blockchain, the decentralized ledger technology, has been widely received by both research and industry in the past few years, and it is being increasingly deployed today in many different applications, such as money transfer, IoT, healthcare, or logistics. Recently, researchers have started to speculate on the pros and cons and what the best applications would be when these two technologies cross paths. This paper provides a survey of the research literature on the combination of blockchain and biometrics and includes a first legal analysis of this integration based on GDPR to shed light on challenges and potentials. Although the integration of blockchain technology into the biometric sector is still in its infancy, with a growing body of literature discussing specific applications and advanced technological setups, this paper aims to provide a holistic understanding of blockchain applicability in biometrics. Based on published studies, this article discusses, among others, practical examples combining blockchain and biometrics for novel applications in PKI systems, distributed trusted services, and identity management. Challenges and limitations when combining blockchain and biometrics that motivate future work will also be discussed; e.g., blockchain networks at their current stage may not be efficient or economical for some real-time biometric applications. Finally, we also discuss key legal aspects of the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) related to this combination of technologies (blockchain and biometrics); for example, accountability, immutability, anonymity, and data protection elements.
abstract_zh: 生物特征识别作为一种高效且难以伪造的身份识别和验证方式，已成为当前数字世界不可或缺的一部分。这项技术的快速发展极大地激励了它集成到许多应用中。与此同时，区块链这种去中心化账本技术在过去几年中得到了研究和行业的广泛接受，如今它越来越多地部署在许多不同的应用中，例如汇款、物联网、医疗保健或物流。最近，研究人员开始推测这两种技术交叉时的优缺点以及最佳应用是什么。本文对有关区块链和生物识别技术结合的研究文献进行了调查，并对基于 GDPR 的这种结合进行了首次法律分析，以揭示挑战和潜力。尽管区块链技术与生物识别领域的整合仍处于起步阶段，随着越来越多的文献讨论具体应用和先进的技术设置，本文旨在提供对区块链在生物识别领域的适用性的整体理解。本文基于已发表的研究，讨论了结合区块链和生物识别技术在 PKI 系统、分布式可信服务和身份管理中的新颖应用的实际示例。还将讨论将区块链和生物识别技术结合起来激励未来工作的挑战和限制；例如，当前阶段的区块链网络对于某些实时生物识别应用可能并不高效或经济。最后，我们还讨论了与这种技术组合（区块链和生物识别技术）相关的欧盟通用数据保护条例（GDPR）的关键法律方面；例如，问责制、不变性、匿名和数据保护要素。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了区块链与生物识别技术结合的研究现状，分析了GDPR法律框架下的挑战与潜力，并探讨了未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 生物识别技术与区块链均具有重要应用价值，但二者结合的研究尚处于早期阶段，需系统梳理技术融合的可行性及法律合规性问题。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析区块链与生物识别技术结合的应用案例，结合GDPR法规要求进行法律合规性评估，并总结技术局限性。
AI.result: 发现区块链在生物识别中的应用潜力包括身份管理与分布式信任服务，但面临实时性不足等技术瓶颈；GDPR要求与区块链不可篡改特性存在冲突需解决。
AI.conclusion: 技术融合需平衡效率与合规性，未来研究应聚焦隐私保护技术改进及法律框架适配性设计。

search_text: Blockchain and Biometrics: Survey, GDPR Analysis, and Future Directions 区块链和生物识别技术：调查、GDPR 分析和未来方向 Biometric recognition as an efficient and hard-to-forge way of identification and verification has become an indispensable part of the current digital world. The fast evolution of this technology has been a strong incentive for integration into many applications. Meanwhile, blockchain, the decentralized ledger technology, has been widely received by both research and industry in the past few years, and it is being increasingly deployed today in many different applications, such as money transfer, IoT, healthcare, or logistics. Recently, researchers have started to speculate on the pros and cons and what the best applications would be when these two technologies cross paths. This paper provides a survey of the research literature on the combination of blockchain and biometrics and includes a first legal analysis of this integration based on GDPR to shed light on challenges and potentials. Although the integration of blockchain technology into the biometric sector is still in its infancy, with a growing body of literature discussing specific applications and advanced technological setups, this paper aims to provide a holistic understanding of blockchain applicability in biometrics. Based on published studies, this article discusses, among others, practical examples combining blockchain and biometrics for novel applications in PKI systems, distributed trusted services, and identity management. Challenges and limitations when combining blockchain and biometrics that motivate future work will also be discussed; e.g., blockchain networks at their current stage may not be efficient or economical for some real-time biometric applications. Finally, we also discuss key legal aspects of the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) related to this combination of technologies (blockchain and biometrics); for example, accountability, immutability, anonymity, and data protection elements. 生物特征识别作为一种高效且难以伪造的身份识别和验证方式，已成为当前数字世界不可或缺的一部分。这项技术的快速发展极大地激励了它集成到许多应用中。与此同时，区块链这种去中心化账本技术在过去几年中得到了研究和行业的广泛接受，如今它越来越多地部署在许多不同的应用中，例如汇款、物联网、医疗保健或物流。最近，研究人员开始推测这两种技术交叉时的优缺点以及最佳应用是什么。本文对有关区块链和生物识别技术结合的研究文献进行了调查，并对基于 GDPR 的这种结合进行了首次法律分析，以揭示挑战和潜力。尽管区块链技术与生物识别领域的整合仍处于起步阶段，随着越来越多的文献讨论具体应用和先进的技术设置，本文旨在提供对区块链在生物识别领域的适用性的整体理解。本文基于已发表的研究，讨论了结合区块链和生物识别技术在 PKI 系统、分布式可信服务和身份管理中的新颖应用的实际示例。还将讨论将区块链和生物识别技术结合起来激励未来工作的挑战和限制；例如，当前阶段的区块链网络对于某些实时生物识别应用可能并不高效或经济。最后，我们还讨论了与这种技术组合（区块链和生物识别技术）相关的欧盟通用数据保护条例（GDPR）的关键法律方面；例如，问责制、不变性、匿名和数据保护要素。 本文综述了区块链与生物识别技术结合的研究现状，分析了GDPR法律框架下的挑战与潜力，并探讨了未来发展方向。 Mahdi Ghafourian,Bilgesu Sumer,Ruben Vera-Rodriguez,Julian Fierrez,Ruben Tolosana,Aythami Moralez,Els Kindt cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.DC,cs.LG

authors_text: Pei Xu,Jean-Bernard Hayet,Ioannis Karamouzas
title: Context-Aware Timewise VAEs for Real-Time Vehicle Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: 用于实时车辆轨迹预测的上下文感知时间 VAE
abstract: Real-time, accurate prediction of human steering behaviors has wide applications, from developing intelligent traffic systems to deploying autonomous driving systems in both real and simulated worlds. In this paper, we present ContextVAE, a context-aware approach for multi-modal vehicle trajectory prediction. Built upon the backbone architecture of a timewise variational autoencoder, ContextVAE observation encoding employs a dual attention mechanism that accounts for the environmental context and the dynamic agents' states, in a unified way. By utilizing features extracted from semantic maps during agent state encoding, our approach takes into account both the social features exhibited by agents on the scene and the physical environment constraints to generate map-compliant and socially-aware trajectories. We perform extensive testing on the nuScenes prediction challenge, Lyft Level 5 dataset and Waymo Open Motion Dataset to show the effectiveness of our approach and its state-of-the-art performance. In all tested datasets, ContextVAE models are fast to train and provide high-quality multi-modal predictions in real-time. Our code is available at: https://github.com/xupei0610/ContextVAE.
summary: Real-time, accurate prediction of human steering behaviors has wide applications, from developing intelligent traffic systems to deploying autonomous driving systems in both real and simulated worlds. In this paper, we present ContextVAE, a context-aware approach for multi-modal vehicle trajectory prediction. Built upon the backbone architecture of a timewise variational autoencoder, ContextVAE observation encoding employs a dual attention mechanism that accounts for the environmental context and the dynamic agents' states, in a unified way. By utilizing features extracted from semantic maps during agent state encoding, our approach takes into account both the social features exhibited by agents on the scene and the physical environment constraints to generate map-compliant and socially-aware trajectories. We perform extensive testing on the nuScenes prediction challenge, Lyft Level 5 dataset and Waymo Open Motion Dataset to show the effectiveness of our approach and its state-of-the-art performance. In all tested datasets, ContextVAE models are fast to train and provide high-quality multi-modal predictions in real-time. Our code is available at: https://github.com/xupei0610/ContextVAE.
abstract_zh: 实时、准确地预测人类转向行为具有广泛的应用，从开发智能交通系统到在现实和模拟世界中部署自动驾驶系统。在本文中，我们提出了 ContextVAE，一种用于多模态车辆轨迹预测的上下文感知方法。 ContextVAE 观察编码建立在时间变分自动编码器的主干架构之上，采用双重注意机制，以统一的方式考虑环境上下文和动态代理的状态。通过在代理状态编码期间利用从语义地图中提取的特征，我们的方法考虑了代理在场景中表现出的社交特征和物理环境约束，以生成符合地图且具有社交意识的轨迹。我们对 nuScenes 预测挑战、Lyft Level 5 数据集和 Waymo Open Motion 数据集进行了广泛的测试，以展示我们方法的有效性及其最先进的性能。在所有测试的数据集中，ContextVAE 模型都可以快速训练并实时提供高质量的多模态预测。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/xupei0610/ContextVAE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于上下文感知的时间变分自编码器（ContextVAE），用于实时多模态车辆轨迹预测，以提升智能交通系统和自动驾驶的安全性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法在复杂交通场景中难以有效融合环境上下文与动态代理的社交特征，导致预测结果不够准确或符合实际交通规则。
AI.method: 基于时间变分自编码器（VAE）框架，结合双注意力机制，融合语义地图特征与动态代理状态，生成符合物理环境约束和社会交互的多模态轨迹预测。
AI.result: 在nuScenes、Lyft Level 5和Waymo Open Motion Dataset上实现最先进的预测性能，具备快速训练和实时高质量多模态预测能力。
AI.conclusion: ContextVAE通过有效融合环境上下文与社交特征，显著提升了复杂场景下的轨迹预测准确性，为实时自动驾驶系统提供了可靠的技术支持。

In this paper, we present ContextVAE, a context-aware approach for multi-modal vehicle trajectory prediction. Built upon the backbone architecture of a timewise variational autoencoder, ContextVAE observation encoding employs a dual attention mechanism that accounts for the environmental context and the dynamic agents' states, in a unified way. By utilizing features extracted from semantic maps during agent state encoding, our approach takes into account both the social features exhibited by agents on the scene and the physical environment constraints to generate map-compliant and socially-aware trajectories. authors_text: Biao Zhang,Barry Haddow,Rico Sennrich
title: Efficient CTC Regularization via Coarse Labels for End-to-End Speech Translation
title_zh: 通过粗标签进行高效的 CTC 正则化以实现端到端语音翻译
abstract: For end-to-end speech translation, regularizing the encoder with the Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) objective using the source transcript or target translation as labels can greatly improve quality metrics. However, CTC demands an extra prediction layer over the vocabulary space, bringing in nonnegligible model parameters and computational overheads, although this layer is typically not used for inference. In this paper, we re-examine the need for genuine vocabulary labels for CTC for regularization and explore strategies to reduce the CTC label space, targeting improved efficiency without quality degradation. We propose coarse labeling for CTC (CoLaCTC), which merges vocabulary labels via simple heuristic rules, such as using truncation, division or modulo (MOD) operations. Despite its simplicity, our experiments on 4 source and 8 target languages show that CoLaCTC with MOD particularly can compress the label space aggressively to 256 and even further, gaining training efficiency (1.18x ~ 1.77x speedup depending on the original vocabulary size) yet still delivering comparable or better performance than the CTC baseline. We also show that CoLaCTC successfully generalizes to CTC regularization regardless of using transcript or translation for labeling.
summary: For end-to-end speech translation, regularizing the encoder with the Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) objective using the source transcript or target translation as labels can greatly improve quality metrics. However, CTC demands an extra prediction layer over the vocabulary space, bringing in nonnegligible model parameters and computational overheads, although this layer is typically not used for inference. In this paper, we re-examine the need for genuine vocabulary labels for CTC for regularization and explore strategies to reduce the CTC label space, targeting improved efficiency without quality degradation. We propose coarse labeling for CTC (CoLaCTC), which merges vocabulary labels via simple heuristic rules, such as using truncation, division or modulo (MOD) operations. Despite its simplicity, our experiments on 4 source and 8 target languages show that CoLaCTC with MOD particularly can compress the label space aggressively to 256 and even further, gaining training efficiency (1.18x ~ 1.77x speedup depending on the original vocabulary size) yet still delivering comparable or better performance than the CTC baseline. We also show that CoLaCTC successfully generalizes to CTC regularization regardless of using transcript or translation for labeling.
abstract_zh: 对于端到端语音翻译，使用源转录本或目标翻译作为标签，通过连接主义时间分类 (CTC) 目标对编码器进行正则化可以极大地提高质量指标。然而，CTC 需要在词汇空间上有一个额外的预测层，带来不可忽略的模型参数和计算开销，尽管该层通常不用于推理。在本文中，我们重新审视了 CTC 正则化对真实词汇标签的需求，并探索了减少 CTC 标签空间的策略，目标是在不降低质量的情况下提高效率。我们提出了 CTC 的粗标记（CoLaCTC），它通过简单的启发式规则合并词汇标签，例如使用截断、除法或模（MOD）运算。尽管它很简单，但我们对 4 种源语言和 8 种目标语言的实验表明，带有 MOD 的 CoLaCTC 尤其可以将标签空间积极压缩到 256 甚至更多，从而获得训练效率（根据原始词汇量大小，加速 1.18 倍 ~ 1.77 倍），但仍然提供与 CTC 基线相当或更好的性能。我们还表明，无论使用转录本还是翻译进行标记，CoLaCTC 都能成功推广到 CTC 正则化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过粗标签实现高效CTC正则化的方法，用于端到端语音翻译任务。
AI.motivation: 传统CTC正则化需要完整的词汇标签，导致模型参数和计算开销增加，而实际推理中该层通常未被使用，因此需探索更高效的标签压缩策略。
AI.method: 提出CoLaCTC方法，通过截断、除法或取模等简单启发式规则合并词汇标签，显著压缩标签空间。
AI.result: 在4种源语言和8种目标语言的实验中，CoLaCTC（尤其取模策略）将标签空间压缩至256甚至更小，训练效率提升1.18x~1.77x，且性能优于或接近基线CTC。
AI.conclusion: CoLaCTC能有效减少CTC正则化的计算开销，在保持性能的同时适用于不同标签来源的场景。

ai_content.result: 在4种源语言和8种目标语言的实验中，CoLaCTC（尤其取模策略）将标签空间压缩至256甚至更小，训练效率提升1.18x~1.77x，且性能优于或接近基线CTC。
ai_content.conclusion: CoLaCTC能有效减少CTC正则化的计算开销，在保持性能的同时适用于不同标签来源的场景。

ai_content_json.method: 提出CoLaCTC方法，通过截断、除法或取模等简单启发式规则合并词汇标签，显著压缩标签空间。
ai_content_json.result: 在4种源语言和8种目标语言的实验中，CoLaCTC（尤其取模策略）将标签空间压缩至256甚至更小，训练效率提升1.18x~1.77x，且性能优于或接近基线CTC。
ai_content_json.conclusion: CoLaCTC能有效减少CTC正则化的计算开销，在保持性能的同时适用于不同标签来源的场景。

search_text: Efficient CTC Regularization via Coarse Labels for End-to-End Speech Translation 通过粗标签进行高效的 CTC 正则化以实现端到端语音翻译 For end-to-end speech translation, regularizing the encoder with the Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) objective using the source transcript or target translation as labels can greatly improve quality metrics. However, CTC demands an extra prediction layer over the vocabulary space, bringing in nonnegligible model parameters and computational overheads, although this layer is typically not used for inference. In this paper, we re-examine the need for genuine vocabulary labels for CTC for regularization and explore strategies to reduce the CTC label space, targeting improved efficiency without quality degradation. We propose coarse labeling for CTC (CoLaCTC), which merges vocabulary labels via simple heuristic rules, such as using truncation, division or modulo (MOD) operations. Despite its simplicity, our experiments on 4 source and 8 target languages show that CoLaCTC with MOD particularly can compress the label space aggressively to 256 and even further, gaining training efficiency (1.18x ~ 1.77x speedup depending on the original vocabulary size) yet still delivering comparable or better performance than the CTC baseline. We also show that CoLaCTC successfully generalizes to CTC regularization regardless of using transcript or translation for labeling. 对于端到端语音翻译，使用源转录本或目标翻译作为标签，通过连接主义时间分类 (CTC) 目标对编码器进行正则化可以极大地提高质量指标。然而，CTC 需要在词汇空间上有一个额外的预测层，带来不可忽略的模型参数和计算开销，尽管该层通常不用于推理。在本文中，我们重新审视了 CTC 正则化对真实词汇标签的需求，并探索了减少 CTC 标签空间的策略，目标是在不降低质量的情况下提高效率。我们提出了 CTC 的粗标记（CoLaCTC），它通过简单的启发式规则合并词汇标签，例如使用截断、除法或模（MOD）运算。尽管它很简单，但我们对 4 种源语言和 8 种目标语言的实验表明，带有 MOD 的 CoLaCTC 尤其可以将标签空间积极压缩到 256 甚至更多，从而获得训练效率（根据原始词汇量大小，加速 1.18 倍 ~ 1.77 倍），但仍然提供与 CTC 基线相当或更好的性能。我们还表明，无论使用转录本还是翻译进行标记，CoLaCTC 都能成功推广到 CTC 正则化。 本文提出了一种通过粗标签实现高效CTC正则化的方法，用于端到端语音翻译任务。 Biao Zhang,Barry Haddow,Rico Sennrich cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Rafsanjany Kushol,Collin C. Luk,Avyarthana Dey,Michael Benatar,Hannah Briemberg,Annie Dionne,Nicolas Dupré,Richard Frayne,Angela Genge,Summer Gibson,Simon J. Graham,Lawrence Korngut,Peter Seres,Robert C. Welsh,Alan Wilman,Lorne Zinman,Sanjay Kalra,Yee-Hong Yang
title: SF2Former: Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis Identification From Multi-center MRI Data Using Spatial and Frequency Fusion Transformer
title_zh: SF2Former：使用空间和频率融合变压器从多中心 MRI 数据中识别肌萎缩侧索硬化症
abstract: Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS) is a complex neurodegenerative disorder involving motor neuron degeneration. Significant research has begun to establish brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) as a potential biomarker to diagnose and monitor the state of the disease. Deep learning has turned into a prominent class of machine learning programs in computer vision and has been successfully employed to solve diverse medical image analysis tasks. However, deep learning-based methods applied to neuroimaging have not achieved superior performance in ALS patients classification from healthy controls due to having insignificant structural changes correlated with pathological features. Therefore, the critical challenge in deep models is to determine useful discriminative features with limited training data. By exploiting the long-range relationship of image features, this study introduces a framework named SF2Former that leverages vision transformer architecture's power to distinguish the ALS subjects from the control group. To further improve the network's performance, spatial and frequency domain information are combined because MRI scans are captured in the frequency domain before being converted to the spatial domain. The proposed framework is trained with a set of consecutive coronal 2D slices, which uses the pre-trained weights on ImageNet by leveraging transfer learning. Finally, a majority voting scheme has been employed to those coronal slices of a particular subject to produce the final classification decision. Our proposed architecture has been thoroughly assessed with multi-modal neuroimaging data using two well-organized versions of the Canadian ALS Neuroimaging Consortium (CALSNIC) multi-center datasets. The experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed strategy in terms of classification accuracy compared with several popular deep learning-based techniques.
summary: Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS) is a complex neurodegenerative disorder involving motor neuron degeneration. Significant research has begun to establish brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) as a potential biomarker to diagnose and monitor the state of the disease. Deep learning has turned into a prominent class of machine learning programs in computer vision and has been successfully employed to solve diverse medical image analysis tasks. However, deep learning-based methods applied to neuroimaging have not achieved superior performance in ALS patients classification from healthy controls due to having insignificant structural changes correlated with pathological features. Therefore, the critical challenge in deep models is to determine useful discriminative features with limited training data. By exploiting the long-range relationship of image features, this study introduces a framework named SF2Former that leverages vision transformer architecture's power to distinguish the ALS subjects from the control group. To further improve the network's performance, spatial and frequency domain information are combined because MRI scans are captured in the frequency domain before being converted to the spatial domain. The proposed framework is trained with a set of consecutive coronal 2D slices, which uses the pre-trained weights on ImageNet by leveraging transfer learning. Finally, a majority voting scheme has been employed to those coronal slices of a particular subject to produce the final classification decision. Our proposed architecture has been thoroughly assessed with multi-modal neuroimaging data using two well-organized versions of the Canadian ALS Neuroimaging Consortium (CALSNIC) multi-center datasets. The experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed strategy in terms of classification accuracy compared with several popular deep learning-based techniques.
abstract_zh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）是一种涉及运动神经元变性的复杂神经退行性疾病。重要的研究已经开始将脑磁共振成像（MRI）确定为诊断和监测疾病状态的潜在生物标志物。深度学习已成为计算机视觉领域一类重要的机器学习程序，并已成功用于解决各种医学图像分析任务。然而，由于与病理特征相关的结构变化不显着，应用于神经影像学的基于深度学习的方法在将 ALS 患者与健康对照进行分类方面尚未取得优异的性能。因此，深度模型的关键挑战是用有限的训练数据确定有用的判别特征。通过利用图像特征的远程关系，本研究引入了一个名为 SF2Former 的框架，该框架利用视觉转换器架构的能力来区分 ALS 受试者和对照组。为了进一步提高网络的性能，空间和频域信息被组合起来，因为 MRI 扫描是在频域中捕获的，然后再转换到空间域。所提出的框架使用一组连续的冠状 2D 切片进行训练，该切片通过利用迁移学习使用 ImageNet 上的预训练权重。最后，对特定主题的冠状切片采用多数投票方案以产生最终的分类决策。我们提出的架构已经使用加拿大 ALS 神经影像联盟 (CALSNIC) 多中心数据集的两个组织良好的版本，通过多模式神经影像数据进行了彻底评估。实验结果表明，与几种流行的基于深度学习的技术相比，我们提出的策略在分类准确性方面具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SF2Former框架，利用空间与频率融合的视觉Transformer模型，从多中心MRI数据中识别肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）患者。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法因ALS患者脑结构变化细微且训练数据有限，难以有效区分ALS与健康对照组，需挖掘更具判别性的特征。
AI.method: 设计SF2Former框架，结合视觉Transformer的长距离依赖建模能力，融合MRI的空间域与频率域信息，并通过迁移学习和多数投票机制提升分类性能。
AI.result: 在CALSNIC多中心数据集上，SF2Former的分类准确率优于多种主流深度学习方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: SF2Former通过多域信息融合与Transformer架构，在有限数据下实现了更精准的ALS分类，为神经影像分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dhawal Gupta,Yinlam Chow,Aza Tulepbergenov,Mohammad Ghavamzadeh,Craig Boutilier
title: Offline Reinforcement Learning for Mixture-of-Expert Dialogue Management
title_zh: 用于专家混合对话管理的离线强化学习
comment: Thirty-seventh Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2023)
comments: Thirty-seventh Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2023)
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has shown great promise for developing dialogue management (DM) agents that are non-myopic, conduct rich conversations, and maximize overall user satisfaction. Despite recent developments in RL and language models (LMs), using RL to power conversational chatbots remains challenging, in part because RL requires online exploration to learn effectively, whereas collecting novel human-bot interactions can be expensive and unsafe. This issue is exacerbated by the combinatorial action spaces facing these algorithms, as most LM agents generate responses at the word level. We develop a variety of RL algorithms, specialized to dialogue planning, that leverage recent Mixture-of-Expert Language Models (MoE-LMs) -- models that capture diverse semantics, generate utterances reflecting different intents, and are amenable for multi-turn DM. By exploiting MoE-LM structure, our methods significantly reduce the size of the action space and improve the efficacy of RL-based DM. We evaluate our methods in open-domain dialogue to demonstrate their effectiveness w.r.t.\ the diversity of intent in generated utterances and overall DM performance.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has shown great promise for developing dialogue management (DM) agents that are non-myopic, conduct rich conversations, and maximize overall user satisfaction. Despite recent developments in RL and language models (LMs), using RL to power conversational chatbots remains challenging, in part because RL requires online exploration to learn effectively, whereas collecting novel human-bot interactions can be expensive and unsafe. This issue is exacerbated by the combinatorial action spaces facing these algorithms, as most LM agents generate responses at the word level. We develop a variety of RL algorithms, specialized to dialogue planning, that leverage recent Mixture-of-Expert Language Models (MoE-LMs) -- models that capture diverse semantics, generate utterances reflecting different intents, and are amenable for multi-turn DM. By exploiting MoE-LM structure, our methods significantly reduce the size of the action space and improve the efficacy of RL-based DM. We evaluate our methods in open-domain dialogue to demonstrate their effectiveness w.r.t.\ the diversity of intent in generated utterances and overall DM performance.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 在开发对话管理 (DM) 代理方面展现出了巨大的前景，这些代理具有非近视性、可进行丰富的对话并最大限度地提高总体用户满意度。尽管强化学习和语言模型 (LM) 最近取得了进展，但使用强化学习为对话式聊天机器人提供动力仍然具有挑战性，部分原因是强化学习需要在线探索才能有效学习，而收集新颖的人机交互可能既昂贵又不安全。这些算法面临的组合动作空间加剧了这个问题，因为大多数 LM 代理在单词级别生成响应。我们开发了各种专门用于对话规划的 RL 算法，这些算法利用最新的专家混合语言模型 (MoE-LM)，这些模型可以捕获不同的语义、生成反映不同意图的话语，并且适合多轮 DM。通过利用 MoE-LM 结构，我们的方法显着减小了动作空间的大小并提高了基于 RL 的 DM 的效率。我们在开放域对话中评估我们的方法，以证明其在生成话语的意图多样性和整体 DM 性能方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于离线强化学习与专家混合语言模型（MoE-LM）的对话管理方法，以解决传统在线RL在对话系统中面临的探索成本高、动作空间大等问题。
AI.motivation: 传统对话管理依赖在线强化学习需大量人工交互数据，成本高且存在风险；而现有语言模型生成粒度细（如词级）导致动作空间爆炸，限制了RL效果。
AI.method: 设计针对对话规划的离线RL算法，结合MoE-LM的多意图生成能力，通过结构化动作空间压缩（如基于MoE专家选择）降低训练难度并提升策略效率。
AI.result: 在开放域对话实验中，方法在生成回复的意图多样性及整体对话管理性能指标上优于基线模型，验证了MoE结构与离线RL结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 利用MoE-LM的语义多样性与结构化动作空间压缩，可有效解决对话管理中RL的在线探索难题，为安全高效的对话系统优化提供新思路。

ai_content_json.method: 设计针对对话规划的离线RL算法，结合MoE-LM的多意图生成能力，通过结构化动作空间压缩（如基于MoE专家选择）降低训练难度并提升策略效率。
ai_content_json.result: 在开放域对话实验中，方法在生成回复的意图多样性及整体对话管理性能指标上优于基线模型，验证了MoE结构与离线RL结合的有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 利用MoE-LM的语义多样性与结构化动作空间压缩，可有效解决对话管理中RL的在线探索难题，为安全高效的对话系统优化提供新思路。

search_text: Offline Reinforcement Learning for Mixture-of-Expert Dialogue Management 用于专家混合对话管理的离线强化学习 Reinforcement learning (RL) has shown great promise for developing dialogue management (DM) agents that are non-myopic, conduct rich conversations, and maximize overall user satisfaction. Despite recent developments in RL and language models (LMs), using RL to power conversational chatbots remains challenging, in part because RL requires online exploration to learn effectively, whereas collecting novel human-bot interactions can be expensive and unsafe. This issue is exacerbated by the combinatorial action spaces facing these algorithms, as most LM agents generate responses at the word level. We develop a variety of RL algorithms, specialized to dialogue planning, that leverage recent Mixture-of-Expert Language Models (MoE-LMs) -- models that capture diverse semantics, generate utterances reflecting different intents, and are amenable for multi-turn DM. By exploiting MoE-LM structure, our methods significantly reduce the size of the action space and improve the efficacy of RL-based DM. We evaluate our methods in open-domain dialogue to demonstrate their effectiveness w.r.t.\ the diversity of intent in generated utterances and overall DM performance. 强化学习 (RL) 在开发对话管理 (DM) 代理方面展现出了巨大的前景，这些代理具有非近视性、可进行丰富的对话并最大限度地提高总体用户满意度。尽管强化学习和语言模型 (LM) 最近取得了进展，但使用强化学习为对话式聊天机器人提供动力仍然具有挑战性，部分原因是强化学习需要在线探索才能有效学习，而收集新颖的人机交互可能既昂贵又不安全。这些算法面临的组合动作空间加剧了这个问题，因为大多数 LM 代理在单词级别生成响应。我们开发了各种专门用于对话规划的 RL 算法，这些算法利用最新的专家混合语言模型 (MoE-LM)，这些模型可以捕获不同的语义、生成反映不同意图的话语，并且适合多轮 DM。通过利用 MoE-LM 结构，我们的方法显着减小了动作空间的大小并提高了基于 RL 的 DM 的效率。我们在开放域对话中评估我们的方法，以证明其在生成话语的意图多样性和整体 DM 性能方面的有效性。 本文提出基于离线强化学习与专家混合语言模型（MoE-LM）的对话管理方法，以解决传统在线RL在对话系统中面临的探索成本高、动作空间大等问题。 Dhawal Gupta,Yinlam Chow,Aza Tulepbergenov,Mohammad Ghavamzadeh,Craig Boutilier cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Stefan Boettcher
title: Deep reinforced learning heuristic tested on spin-glass ground states: The larger picture
title_zh: 在自旋玻璃基态上测试的深度强化学习启发式：更大的图景
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, comment on arXiv:2109.14411, related information can be found at https://physics.emory.edu/faculty/boettcher/
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, comment on arXiv:2109.14411, related information can be found at https://physics.emory.edu/faculty/boettcher/
abstract: In Changjun Fan et al. [Nature Communications https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-023-36363-w (2023)], the authors present a deep reinforced learning approach to augment combinatorial optimization heuristics. In particular, they present results for several spin glass ground state problems, for which instances on non-planar networks are generally NP-hard, in comparison with several Monte Carlo based methods, such as simulated annealing (SA) or parallel tempering (PT). Indeed, those results demonstrate that the reinforced learning improves the results over those obtained with SA or PT, or at least allows for reduced runtimes for the heuristics before results of comparable quality have been obtained relative to those other methods. To facilitate the conclusion that their method is ''superior'', the authors pursue two basic strategies: (1) A commercial GUROBI solver is called on to procure a sample of exact ground states as a testbed to compare with, and (2) a head-to-head comparison between the heuristics is given for a sample of larger instances where exact ground states are hard to ascertain. Here, we put these studies into a larger context, showing that the claimed superiority is at best marginal for smaller samples and becomes essentially irrelevant with respect to any sensible approximation of true ground states in the larger samples. For example, this method becomes irrelevant as a means to determine stiffness exponents $θ$ in $d>2$, as mentioned by the authors, where the problem is not only NP-hard but requires the subtraction of two almost equal ground-state energies and systemic errors in each of $\approx 1\%$ found here are unacceptable. This larger picture on the method arises from a straightforward finite-size corrections study over the spin glass ensembles the authors employ, using data that has been available for decades.
summary: In Changjun Fan et al. [Nature Communications https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-023-36363-w (2023)], the authors present a deep reinforced learning approach to augment combinatorial optimization heuristics. In particular, they present results for several spin glass ground state problems, for which instances on non-planar networks are generally NP-hard, in comparison with several Monte Carlo based methods, such as simulated annealing (SA) or parallel tempering (PT). Indeed, those results demonstrate that the reinforced learning improves the results over those obtained with SA or PT, or at least allows for reduced runtimes for the heuristics before results of comparable quality have been obtained relative to those other methods. To facilitate the conclusion that their method is ''superior'', the authors pursue two basic strategies: (1) A commercial GUROBI solver is called on to procure a sample of exact ground states as a testbed to compare with, and (2) a head-to-head comparison between the heuristics is given for a sample of larger instances where exact ground states are hard to ascertain. Here, we put these studies into a larger context, showing that the claimed superiority is at best marginal for smaller samples and becomes essentially irrelevant with respect to any sensible approximation of true ground states in the larger samples. For example, this method becomes irrelevant as a means to determine stiffness exponents $θ$ in $d>2$, as mentioned by the authors, where the problem is not only NP-hard but requires the subtraction of two almost equal ground-state energies and systemic errors in each of $\approx 1\%$ found here are unacceptable. This larger picture on the method arises from a straightforward finite-size corrections study over the spin glass ensembles the authors employ, using data that has been available for decades.
abstract_zh: 在范昌俊等人。 [Nature Communications https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-023-36363-w (2023)]，作者提出了一种深度强化学习方法来增强组合优化启发式。特别是，他们提出了几个自旋玻璃基态问题的结果，与几种基于蒙特卡罗的方法（例如模拟退火（SA）或平行回火（PT））相比，非平面网络上的实例通常是NP困难的。事实上，这些结果表明，与使用 SA 或 PT 获得的结果相比，强化学习改进了结果，或者至少在获得与其他方法相当的质量结果之前可以减少启发式的运行时间。为了得出他们的方法“优越”的结论，作者采用了两种基本策略：（1）使用商业 GUROBI 求解器来获取精确基态样本作为比较的测试平台，以及（2）对难以确定精确基态的较大实例样本进行启发式之间的头对头比较。在这里，我们将这些研究置于更大的背景下，表明所声称的优越性对于较小的样本来说至多是微乎其微的，并且与较大样本中真实基态的任何合理近似基本上无关。例如，正如作者提到的，这种方法作为确定 $d>2$ 中的刚度指数 $θ$ 的方法变得无关紧要，其中问题不仅是 NP 困难的，而且需要减去两个几乎相等的基态能量，并且这里发现的每个 $\approx 1\%$ 中的系统误差是不可接受的。该方法的更大图景来自于作者使用数十年来可用的数据对自旋玻璃系综进行的简单的有限尺寸校正研究。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了深度强化学习方法在求解自旋玻璃基态问题中的有效性，并与传统启发式方法进行对比。
AI.motivation: 针对Changjun Fan等人声称其深度强化学习方法优于传统蒙特卡洛方法（如模拟退火）的结论，本文旨在通过更广泛的分析验证其实际效果。
AI.method: 通过有限尺寸修正分析，结合数十年来已有的自旋玻璃系综数据，评估该方法在不同规模样本中的表现。
AI.result: 在小样本中该方法的优势仅为边际性，而在大样本中因系统误差（约1%）导致其结果对真实基态的近似无实际意义。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无法可靠用于确定高维自旋玻璃系统的刚性指数等关键参数，其优越性在大规模问题中不成立。

authors_text: Khaled A. Mustafa,Oscar de Groot,Xinwei Wang,Jens Kober,Javier Alonso-Mora
title: Probabilistic Risk Assessment for Chance-Constrained Collision Avoidance in Uncertain Dynamic Environments
title_zh: 不确定动态环境中机会约束碰撞避免的概率风险评估
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Balancing safety and efficiency when planning in crowded scenarios with uncertain dynamics is challenging where it is imperative to accomplish the robot's mission without incurring any safety violations. Typically, chance constraints are incorporated into the planning problem to provide probabilistic safety guarantees by imposing an upper bound on the collision probability of the planned trajectory. Yet, this results in overly conservative behavior on the grounds that the gap between the obtained risk and the specified upper limit is not explicitly restricted. To address this issue, we propose a real-time capable approach to quantify the risk associated with planned trajectories obtained from multiple probabilistic planners, running in parallel, with different upper bounds of the acceptable risk level. Based on the evaluated risk, the least conservative plan is selected provided that its associated risk is below a specified threshold. In such a way, the proposed approach provides probabilistic safety guarantees by attaining a closer bound to the specified risk, while being applicable to generic uncertainties of moving obstacles. We demonstrate the efficiency of our proposed approach, by improving the performance of a state-of-the-art probabilistic planner, in simulations and experiments using a mobile robot in an environment shared with humans.
summary: Balancing safety and efficiency when planning in crowded scenarios with uncertain dynamics is challenging where it is imperative to accomplish the robot's mission without incurring any safety violations. Typically, chance constraints are incorporated into the planning problem to provide probabilistic safety guarantees by imposing an upper bound on the collision probability of the planned trajectory. Yet, this results in overly conservative behavior on the grounds that the gap between the obtained risk and the specified upper limit is not explicitly restricted. To address this issue, we propose a real-time capable approach to quantify the risk associated with planned trajectories obtained from multiple probabilistic planners, running in parallel, with different upper bounds of the acceptable risk level. Based on the evaluated risk, the least conservative plan is selected provided that its associated risk is below a specified threshold. In such a way, the proposed approach provides probabilistic safety guarantees by attaining a closer bound to the specified risk, while being applicable to generic uncertainties of moving obstacles. We demonstrate the efficiency of our proposed approach, by improving the performance of a state-of-the-art probabilistic planner, in simulations and experiments using a mobile robot in an environment shared with humans.
abstract_zh: 在动态不确定的拥挤场景中进行规划时，平衡安全性和效率具有挑战性，因为必须在不发生任何安全违规的情况下完成机器人的任务。通常，机会约束被纳入规划问题中，通过对规划轨迹的碰撞概率施加上限来提供概率安全保证。然而，这会导致过于保守的行为，因为获得的风险与指定上限之间的差距没有明确限制。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种实时的方法来量化与从多个概率规划器获得的规划轨迹相关的风险，这些规划轨迹并行运行，具有不同的可接受风险水平上限。根据评估的风险，选择最不保守的计划，前提是其相关风险低于指定阈值。通过这种方式，所提出的方法通过获得更接近指定风险的界限来提供概率安全保证，同时适用于移动障碍物的一般不确定性。我们通过在与人类共享的环境中使用移动机器人进行模拟和实验来提高最先进的概率规划器的性能，从而证明了我们提出的方法的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时方法，在不确定动态环境中通过量化轨迹风险并选择最不保守的路径，实现概率安全保证的碰撞规避。
AI.motivation: 传统机会约束方法因未限制实际风险与设定上限的差距，导致行为过于保守，影响效率。需在保证安全的前提下提升路径规划的效率。
AI.method: 并行运行多个概率规划器生成不同风险上限的轨迹，评估其风险后选择风险低于阈值的最不保守方案，适用于通用动态障碍物不确定性。
AI.result: 通过仿真和移动机器人实验验证，该方法在保持安全的同时提升了状态-of-the-art概率规划器的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过收紧风险上限与实际值的差距，在动态不确定环境中实现了更高效的安全路径规划。

ai_content_json.result: 通过仿真和移动机器人实验验证，该方法在保持安全的同时提升了状态-of-the-art概率规划器的性能。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过收紧风险上限与实际值的差距，在动态不确定环境中实现了更高效的安全路径规划。

tldr: 本文提出一种实时方法，在不确定动态环境中通过量化轨迹风险并选择最不保守的路径，实现概率安全保证的碰撞规避。
motivation: 传统机会约束方法因未限制实际风险与设定上限的差距，导致行为过于保守，影响效率。需在保证安全的前提下提升路径规划的效率。
method: 并行运行多个概率规划器生成不同风险上限的轨迹，评估其风险后选择风险低于阈值的最不保守方案，适用于通用动态障碍物不确定性。
result: 通过仿真和移动机器人实验验证，该方法在保持安全的同时提升了状态-of-the-art概率规划器的性能。
conclusion: 该方法通过收紧风险上限与实际值的差距，在动态不确定环境中实现了更高效的安全路径规划。
search_text: Probabilistic Risk Assessment for Chance-Constrained Collision Avoidance in Uncertain Dynamic Environments 不确定动态环境中机会约束碰撞避免的概率风险评估 Balancing safety and efficiency when planning in crowded scenarios with uncertain dynamics is challenging where it is imperative to accomplish the robot's mission without incurring any safety violations. Typically, chance constraints are incorporated into the planning problem to provide probabilistic safety guarantees by imposing an upper bound on the collision probability of the planned trajectory. Yet, this results in overly conservative behavior on the grounds that the gap between the obtained risk and the specified upper limit is not explicitly restricted. To address this issue, we propose a real-time capable approach to quantify the risk associated with planned trajectories obtained from multiple probabilistic planners, running in parallel, with different upper bounds of the acceptable risk level. Based on the evaluated risk, the least conservative plan is selected provided that its associated risk is below a specified threshold. In such a way, the proposed approach provides probabilistic safety guarantees by attaining a closer bound to the specified risk, while being applicable to generic uncertainties of moving obstacles. We demonstrate the efficiency of our proposed approach, by improving the performance of a state-of-the-art probabilistic planner, in simulations and experiments using a mobile robot in an environment shared with humans. 在动态不确定的拥挤场景中进行规划时，平衡安全性和效率具有挑战性，因为必须在不发生任何安全违规的情况下完成机器人的任务。通常，机会约束被纳入规划问题中，通过对规划轨迹的碰撞概率施加上限来提供概率安全保证。然而，这会导致过于保守的行为，因为获得的风险与指定上限之间的差距没有明确限制。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种实时的方法来量化与从多个概率规划器获得的规划轨迹相关的风险，这些规划轨迹并行运行，具有不同的可接受风险水平上限。根据评估的风险，选择最不保守的计划，前提是其相关风险低于指定阈值。通过这种方式，所提出的方法通过获得更接近指定风险的界限来提供概率安全保证，同时适用于移动障碍物的一般不确定性。我们通过在与人类共享的环境中使用移动机器人进行模拟和实验来提高最先进的概率规划器的性能，从而证明了我们提出的方法的效率。 本文提出一种实时方法，在不确定动态环境中通过量化轨迹风险并选择最不保守的路径，实现概率安全保证的碰撞规避。 Khaled A. Mustafa,Oscar de Groot,Xinwei Wang,Jens Kober,Javier Alonso-Mora cs.RO

authors_text: Baihan Lin,Stefan Zecevic,Djallel Bouneffouf,Guillermo Cecchi
title: TherapyView: Visualizing Therapy Sessions with Temporal Topic Modeling and AI-Generated Arts
title_zh: TherapyView：通过时间主题建模和人工智能生成的艺术可视化治疗会话
comment: This work extends our prior empirical work on topic modeling (arxiv:2204.10189) to now provide an interpretable and interactive data visualization platform with AI-generated artworks as a concrete user scenario for therapists
comments: This work extends our prior empirical work on topic modeling (arxiv:2204.10189) to now provide an interpretable and interactive data visualization platform with AI-generated artworks as a concrete user scenario for therapists
abstract: We present the TherapyView, a demonstration system to help therapists visualize the dynamic contents of past treatment sessions, enabled by the state-of-the-art neural topic modeling techniques to analyze the topical tendencies of various psychiatric conditions and deep learning-based image generation engine to provide a visual summary. The system incorporates temporal modeling to provide a time-series representation of topic similarities at a turn-level resolution and AI-generated artworks given the dialogue segments to provide a concise representations of the contents covered in the session, offering interpretable insights for therapists to optimize their strategies and enhance the effectiveness of psychotherapy. This system provides a proof of concept of AI-augmented therapy tools with e in-depth understanding of the patient's mental state and enabling more effective treatment.
summary: We present the TherapyView, a demonstration system to help therapists visualize the dynamic contents of past treatment sessions, enabled by the state-of-the-art neural topic modeling techniques to analyze the topical tendencies of various psychiatric conditions and deep learning-based image generation engine to provide a visual summary. The system incorporates temporal modeling to provide a time-series representation of topic similarities at a turn-level resolution and AI-generated artworks given the dialogue segments to provide a concise representations of the contents covered in the session, offering interpretable insights for therapists to optimize their strategies and enhance the effectiveness of psychotherapy. This system provides a proof of concept of AI-augmented therapy tools with e in-depth understanding of the patient's mental state and enabling more effective treatment.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 TherapyView，这是一个演示系统，可帮助治疗师可视化过去治疗疗程的动态内容，通过最先进的神经主题建模技术来分析各种精神疾病的主题倾向，并通过基于深度学习的图像生成引擎来提供可视化摘要。该系统结合了时间建模，以回合级分辨率提供主题相似性的时间序列表示，并结合人工智能生成的艺术作品，为对话片段提供会话中所涵盖内容的简明表示，为治疗师提供可解释的见解，以优化他们的策略并提高心理治疗的有效性。该系统提供了人工智能增强治疗工具的概念证明，可以深入了解患者的精神状态并实现更有效的治疗。

AI.tldr: 开发TherapyView系统，利用时间主题建模和AI生成艺术帮助治疗师可视化治疗会话内容，优化治疗策略。
AI.motivation: 现有心理治疗缺乏对患者心理状态的动态理解，需通过AI工具提供可视化洞察以提升治疗效果。
AI.method: 采用神经主题模型分析专题倾向，结合深度学习图像生成和时间序列建模，生成AI艺术作品以可视化治疗内容。
AI.result: 系统验证了AI辅助工具在心理治疗中的可行性，通过可视化帮助治疗师更深入理解患者状态，提升治疗效果。
AI.conclusion: TherapyView展示了AI在心理治疗中的应用潜力，为开发更有效的治疗工具提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 开发TherapyView系统，利用时间主题建模和AI生成艺术帮助治疗师可视化治疗会话内容，优化治疗策略。

authors_text: Gleb Novikov,David Steurer,Stefan Tiegel
title: Robust Mean Estimation Without Moments for Symmetric Distributions
title_zh: 对称分布无矩的稳健均值估计
abstract: We study the problem of robustly estimating the mean or location parameter without moment assumptions. We show that for a large class of symmetric distributions, the same error as in the Gaussian setting can be achieved efficiently. The distributions we study include products of arbitrary symmetric one-dimensional distributions, such as product Cauchy distributions, as well as elliptical distributions. For product distributions and elliptical distributions with known scatter (covariance) matrix, we show that given an $\varepsilon$-corrupted sample, we can with probability at least $1-δ$ estimate its location up to error $O(\varepsilon \sqrt{\log(1/\varepsilon)})$ using $\tfrac{d\log(d) + \log(1/δ)}{\varepsilon^2 \log(1/\varepsilon)}$ samples. This result matches the best-known guarantees for the Gaussian distribution and known SQ lower bounds (up to the $\log(d)$ factor). For elliptical distributions with unknown scatter (covariance) matrix, we propose a sequence of efficient algorithms that approaches this optimal error. Specifically, for every $k \in \mathbb{N}$, we design an estimator using time and samples $\tilde{O}({d^k})$ achieving error $O(\varepsilon^{1-\frac{1}{2k}})$. This matches the error and running time guarantees when assuming certifiably bounded moments of order up to $k$. For unknown covariance, such error bounds of $o(\sqrt{\varepsilon})$ are not even known for (general) sub-Gaussian distributions. Our algorithms are based on a generalization of the well-known filtering technique. We show how this machinery can be combined with Huber-loss-based techniques to work with projections of the noise that behave more nicely than the initial noise. Moreover, we show how SoS proofs can be used to obtain algorithmic guarantees even for distributions without a first moment. We believe that this approach may find other applications in future works.
summary: We study the problem of robustly estimating the mean or location parameter without moment assumptions. We show that for a large class of symmetric distributions, the same error as in the Gaussian setting can be achieved efficiently. The distributions we study include products of arbitrary symmetric one-dimensional distributions, such as product Cauchy distributions, as well as elliptical distributions. For product distributions and elliptical distributions with known scatter (covariance) matrix, we show that given an $\varepsilon$-corrupted sample, we can with probability at least $1-δ$ estimate its location up to error $O(\varepsilon \sqrt{\log(1/\varepsilon)})$ using $\tfrac{d\log(d) + \log(1/δ)}{\varepsilon^2 \log(1/\varepsilon)}$ samples. This result matches the best-known guarantees for the Gaussian distribution and known SQ lower bounds (up to the $\log(d)$ factor). For elliptical distributions with unknown scatter (covariance) matrix, we propose a sequence of efficient algorithms that approaches this optimal error. Specifically, for every $k \in \mathbb{N}$, we design an estimator using time and samples $\tilde{O}({d^k})$ achieving error $O(\varepsilon^{1-\frac{1}{2k}})$. This matches the error and running time guarantees when assuming certifiably bounded moments of order up to $k$. For unknown covariance, such error bounds of $o(\sqrt{\varepsilon})$ are not even known for (general) sub-Gaussian distributions. Our algorithms are based on a generalization of the well-known filtering technique. We show how this machinery can be combined with Huber-loss-based techniques to work with projections of the noise that behave more nicely than the initial noise. Moreover, we show how SoS proofs can be used to obtain algorithmic guarantees even for distributions without a first moment. We believe that this approach may find other applications in future works.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在没有矩假设的情况下鲁棒地估计平均值或位置参数的问题。我们表明，对于一大类对称分布，可以有效地实现与高斯设置中相同的误差。我们研究的分布包括任意对称一维分布的乘积，例如乘积柯西分布，以及椭圆分布。对于具有已知散点（协方差）矩阵的乘积分布和椭圆分布，我们表明，给定 $\varepsilon$ 损坏的样本，我们可以使用 $\tfrac{d\log(d) + \log(1/δ)}{\varepsilon^2 以至少 $1-δ$ 的概率估计其位置，最大误差为 $O(\varepsilon \sqrt{\log(1/\varepsilon)})$ \log(1/\varepsilon)}$ 样本。此结果与高斯分布和已知 SQ 下界（最高 $\log(d)$ 因子）的最著名保证相匹配。对于具有未知散点（协方差）矩阵的椭圆分布，我们提出了一系列接近此最佳误差的有效算法。具体来说，对于 \mathbb{N}$ 中的每个 $k，我们使用时间和样本 $\tilde{O}({d^k})$ 设计一个估计器，实现误差 $O(\varepsilon^{1-\frac{1}{2k}})$。当假设阶数可证明有界矩高达 $k$ 时，这与误差和运行时间保证相匹配。对于未知的协方差，$o(\sqrt{\varepsilon})$ 的这种误差范围对于（一般）亚高斯分布来说甚至是未知的。我们的算法基于众所周知的过滤技术的推广。我们展示了如何将这种机制与基于 Huber 损失的技术相结合，以处理比初始噪声表现更好的噪声投影。此外，我们还展示了如何使用 SoS 证明来获得算法保证，即使对于没有初始时刻的分布也是如此。我们相信这种方法可能会在未来的工作中找到其他应用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在无需矩条件假设下，对对称分布进行鲁棒均值估计的问题，并提出了高效算法。
AI.motivation: 传统均值估计方法通常依赖矩条件（如高斯分布的有限方差），但对重尾分布或无矩分布不适用。本文旨在为更广泛的对称分布（如柯西分布）提供鲁棒估计方法。
AI.method: 基于过滤技术的推广，结合Huber损失函数和SoS证明方法，设计适用于对称分布的鲁棒估计算法，并处理未知协方差矩阵的情况。
AI.result: 对于已知协方差矩阵的分布，样本复杂度为$O(\arepsilon^2 \\log(1/\arepsilon))$，误差界为$O(\arepsilon \\sqrt{\\log(1/\arepsilon)})$；对于未知协方差矩阵，通过多项式时间算法逼近最优误差$O(\arepsilon^{1-\frac{1}{2k}})$。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无需矩假设下实现了与高斯分布相当的误差界，为对称分布的鲁棒估计提供了新思路，并可能拓展至其他统计问题。
