authors_text: Xiaodong Wang,Chenfei Wu,Shengming Yin,Minheng Ni,Jianfeng Wang,Linjie Li,Zhengyuan Yang,Fan Yang,Lijuan Wang,Zicheng Liu,Yuejian Fang,Nan Duan
title: Learning 3D Photography Videos via Self-supervised Diffusion on Single Images
title_zh: 通过单图像自监督扩散学习 3D 摄影视频
abstract: 3D photography renders a static image into a video with appealing 3D visual effects. Existing approaches typically first conduct monocular depth estimation, then render the input frame to subsequent frames with various viewpoints, and finally use an inpainting model to fill those missing/occluded regions. The inpainting model plays a crucial role in rendering quality, but it is normally trained on out-of-domain data. To reduce the training and inference gap, we propose a novel self-supervised diffusion model as the inpainting module. Given a single input image, we automatically construct a training pair of the masked occluded image and the ground-truth image with random cycle-rendering. The constructed training samples are closely aligned to the testing instances, without the need of data annotation. To make full use of the masked images, we design a Masked Enhanced Block (MEB), which can be easily plugged into the UNet and enhance the semantic conditions. Towards real-world animation, we present a novel task: out-animation, which extends the space and time of input objects. Extensive experiments on real datasets show that our method achieves competitive results with existing SOTA methods.
summary: 3D photography renders a static image into a video with appealing 3D visual effects. Existing approaches typically first conduct monocular depth estimation, then render the input frame to subsequent frames with various viewpoints, and finally use an inpainting model to fill those missing/occluded regions. The inpainting model plays a crucial role in rendering quality, but it is normally trained on out-of-domain data. To reduce the training and inference gap, we propose a novel self-supervised diffusion model as the inpainting module. Given a single input image, we automatically construct a training pair of the masked occluded image and the ground-truth image with random cycle-rendering. The constructed training samples are closely aligned to the testing instances, without the need of data annotation. To make full use of the masked images, we design a Masked Enhanced Block (MEB), which can be easily plugged into the UNet and enhance the semantic conditions. Towards real-world animation, we present a novel task: out-animation, which extends the space and time of input objects. Extensive experiments on real datasets show that our method achieves competitive results with existing SOTA methods.
abstract_zh: 3D 摄影将静态图像渲染为具有吸引人的 3D 视觉效果的视频。现有的方法通常首先进行单眼深度估计，然后将输入帧渲染到具有不同视点的后续帧，最后使用修复模型来填充那些丢失/遮挡的区域。修复模型在渲染质量中起着至关重要的作用，但它通常是在域外数据上进行训练的。为了减少训练和推理差距，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督扩散模型作为修复模块。给定单个输入图像，我们通过随机循环渲染自动构建掩模遮挡图像和地面实况图像的训练对。构建的训练样本与测试实例紧密结合，无需数据注释。为了充分利用掩模图像，我们设计了掩模增强块（MEB），它可以轻松插入UNet并增强语义条件。对于现实世界的动画，我们提出了一项新颖的任务：输出动画，它扩展了输入对象的空间和时间。对真实数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法取得了与现有 SOTA 方法竞争的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督扩散模型的方法，通过单张图像生成具有三维视觉效果的摄影视频。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖外部数据训练的补全模型，导致训练与推理阶段存在差距，且需人工标注数据。
AI.method: 设计自监督扩散模型作为补全模块，通过随机循环渲染自动生成训练样本，并引入Masked Enhanced Block增强语义条件，提出扩展动画任务（out-animation）。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上实验表明，该方法在生成质量上达到现有最先进方法的水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自监督学习缩小训练推理差距，在无需标注数据的情况下提升了三维视频生成效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督扩散模型的方法，通过单张图像生成具有三维视觉效果的摄影视频。

ai_content.method: 设计自监督扩散模型作为补全模块，通过随机循环渲染自动生成训练样本，并引入Masked Enhanced Block增强语义条件，提出扩展动画任务（out-animation）。
ai_content.result: 在真实数据集上实验表明，该方法在生成质量上达到现有最先进方法的水平。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过自监督学习缩小训练推理差距，在无需标注数据的情况下提升了三维视频生成效果。

search_text: Learning 3D Photography Videos via Self-supervised Diffusion on Single Images 通过单图像自监督扩散学习 3D 摄影视频 3D photography renders a static image into a video with appealing 3D visual effects. Existing approaches typically first conduct monocular depth estimation, then render the input frame to subsequent frames with various viewpoints, and finally use an inpainting model to fill those missing/occluded regions. The inpainting model plays a crucial role in rendering quality, but it is normally trained on out-of-domain data. To reduce the training and inference gap, we propose a novel self-supervised diffusion model as the inpainting module. Given a single input image, we automatically construct a training pair of the masked occluded image and the ground-truth image with random cycle-rendering. The constructed training samples are closely aligned to the testing instances, without the need of data annotation. To make full use of the masked images, we design a Masked Enhanced Block (MEB), which can be easily plugged into the UNet and enhance the semantic conditions. Towards real-world animation, we present a novel task: out-animation, which extends the space and time of input objects. Extensive experiments on real datasets show that our method achieves competitive results with existing SOTA methods. 3D 摄影将静态图像渲染为具有吸引人的 3D 视觉效果的视频。现有的方法通常首先进行单眼深度估计，然后将输入帧渲染到具有不同视点的后续帧，最后使用修复模型来填充那些丢失/遮挡的区域。修复模型在渲染质量中起着至关重要的作用，但它通常是在域外数据上进行训练的。为了减少训练和推理差距，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督扩散模型作为修复模块。给定单个输入图像，我们通过随机循环渲染自动构建掩模遮挡图像和地面实况图像的训练对。构建的训练样本与测试实例紧密结合，无需数据注释。为了充分利用掩模图像，我们设计了掩模增强块（MEB），它可以轻松插入UNet并增强语义条件。对于现实世界的动画，我们提出了一项新颖的任务：输出动画，它扩展了输入对象的空间和时间。对真实数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法取得了与现有 SOTA 方法竞争的结果。 本文提出一种基于自监督扩散模型的方法，通过单张图像生成具有三维视觉效果的摄影视频。 Xiaodong Wang,Chenfei Wu,Shengming Yin,Minheng Ni,Jianfeng Wang,Linjie Li,Zhengyuan Yang,Fan Yang,Lijuan Wang,Zicheng Liu,Yuejian Fang,Nan Duan cs.CV

authors_text: Zineb Benhmidouch,Saad Moufid,Aissam Ait Omar
title: A comparative study of human inverse kinematics techniques for lower limbs
title_zh: 人体下肢逆向运动学技术的比较研究
abstract: Inverse Kinematics (IK) remains a dynamic field of research, with various methods striving for speed and precision. Despite advancements, many IK techniques face significant challenges, including high computational demands and the risk of generating unrealistic joint configurations. This paper conducts a comprehensive comparative analysis of leading IK methods applied to the human leg, aiming to identify the most effective approach. We evaluate each method based on computational efficiency and its ability to produce realistic postures, while adhering to the natural range of motion and comfort zones of the joints. The findings provide insights into optimizing IK solutions for practical applications in biomechanics and animation.
summary: Inverse Kinematics (IK) remains a dynamic field of research, with various methods striving for speed and precision. Despite advancements, many IK techniques face significant challenges, including high computational demands and the risk of generating unrealistic joint configurations. This paper conducts a comprehensive comparative analysis of leading IK methods applied to the human leg, aiming to identify the most effective approach. We evaluate each method based on computational efficiency and its ability to produce realistic postures, while adhering to the natural range of motion and comfort zones of the joints. The findings provide insights into optimizing IK solutions for practical applications in biomechanics and animation.
abstract_zh: 逆运动学 (IK) 仍然是一个充满活力的研究领域，有各种方法追求速度和精度。尽管取得了进步，许多 IK 技术仍面临重大挑战，包括高计算需求和生成不切实际的关节配置的风险。本文对应用于人体腿部的领先 IK 方法进行了全面的比较分析，旨在找出最有效的方法。我们根据计算效率及其产生真实姿势的能力来评估每种方法，同时遵守关节的自然运动范围和舒适区。研究结果为优化生物力学和动画实际应用的 IK 解决方案提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文对应用于人体下肢的主流逆运动学（IK）技术进行对比分析，旨在找出在计算效率和生成真实姿态方面表现最优的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管逆运动学技术已取得进展，但其高计算成本和生成不现实关节配置的风险仍限制了实际应用，亟需优化解决方案。
AI.method: 通过对比分析主流IK方法在计算效率、关节自然运动范围及舒适区约束下的表现，评估其生成真实人体下肢姿态的能力。
AI.result: 研究结果识别出在计算效率与姿态真实性之间取得最佳平衡的IK方法，为生物力学分析和动画制作中的下肢运动模拟提供优化方向。
AI.conclusion: 结论表明，特定IK方法在保证计算效率的同时能有效生成符合人体工学的下肢姿态，为相关领域的工程应用提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Maria Ferlin,Sylwia Majchrowska,Marta Plantykow,Alicja Kwaśniwska,Agnieszka Mikołajczyk-Bareła,Milena Olech,Jakub Nalepa
title: On the Importance of Sign Labeling: The Hamburg Sign Language Notation System Case Study
title_zh: 论符号标签的重要性：汉堡手语符号系统案例研究
abstract: Labeling is the cornerstone of supervised machine learning, which has been exploited in a plethora of various applications, with sign language recognition being one of them. However, such algorithms must be fed with a huge amount of consistently labeled data during the training process to elaborate a well-generalizing model. In addition, there is a great need for an automated solution that works with any nationally diversified sign language. Although there are language-agnostic transcription systems, such as the Hamburg Sign Language Notation System (HamNoSys) that describe the signer's initial position and body movement instead of the glosses' meanings, there are still issues with providing accurate and reliable labels for every real-world use case. In this context, the industry relies heavily on manual attribution and labeling of the available video data. In this work, we tackle this issue and thoroughly analyze the HamNoSys labels provided by various maintainers of open sign language corpora in five sign languages, in order to examine the challenges encountered in labeling video data. We also investigate the consistency and objectivity of HamNoSys-based labels for the purpose of training machine learning models. Our findings provide valuable insights into the limitations of the current labeling methods and pave the way for future research on developing more accurate and efficient solutions for sign language recognition.
summary: Labeling is the cornerstone of supervised machine learning, which has been exploited in a plethora of various applications, with sign language recognition being one of them. However, such algorithms must be fed with a huge amount of consistently labeled data during the training process to elaborate a well-generalizing model. In addition, there is a great need for an automated solution that works with any nationally diversified sign language. Although there are language-agnostic transcription systems, such as the Hamburg Sign Language Notation System (HamNoSys) that describe the signer's initial position and body movement instead of the glosses' meanings, there are still issues with providing accurate and reliable labels for every real-world use case. In this context, the industry relies heavily on manual attribution and labeling of the available video data. In this work, we tackle this issue and thoroughly analyze the HamNoSys labels provided by various maintainers of open sign language corpora in five sign languages, in order to examine the challenges encountered in labeling video data. We also investigate the consistency and objectivity of HamNoSys-based labels for the purpose of training machine learning models. Our findings provide valuable insights into the limitations of the current labeling methods and pave the way for future research on developing more accurate and efficient solutions for sign language recognition.
abstract_zh: 标签是监督机器学习的基石，已被应用于多种应用中，手语识别就是其中之一。然而，此类算法在训练过程中必须输入大量一致标记的数据，以制定出通用性良好的模型。此外，非常需要一种适用于任何国家多样化手语的自动化解决方案。尽管存在与语言无关的转录系统，例如描述手语者的初始位置和身体运动而不是注释含义的汉堡手语符号系统 (HamNoSys)，但为每个现实世界用例提供准确可靠的标签仍然存在问题。在这种情况下，该行业严重依赖于可用视频数据的手动归属和标记。在这项工作中，我们解决了这个问题，并彻底分析了开放手语语料库的各个维护者提供的五种手语的 HamNoSys 标签，以研究标记视频数据时遇到的挑战。我们还研究了基于 HamNoSys 的标签的一致性和客观性，以训练机器学习模型。我们的研究结果为了解当前标记方法的局限性提供了宝贵的见解，并为未来研究开发更准确、更高效的手语识别解决方案铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析汉堡手语符号标注系统（HamNoSys）在五种手语语料库中的标注情况，探讨手语识别中符号标注的挑战与一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 监督学习需要大量一致标注的数据，但现有标注系统如HamNoSys在实际应用中存在准确性与可靠性不足的问题，亟需改进以支持多样化的手语识别需求。
AI.method: 研究者对五个开放手语语料库中不同维护者提供的HamNoSys标注进行分析，评估其标注一致性与客观性，并探讨其在机器学习模型训练中的适用性。
AI.result: 发现当前标注方法存在显著局限性，包括标注不一致性和主观性，导致难以直接用于训练高效的手语识别模型。
AI.conclusion: 现有标注体系需优化，未来研究应聚焦于开发更精确、自动化的标注方案，以提升手语识别的准确率与跨语言适应性。

Our findings provide valuable insights into the limitations of the current labeling methods and pave the way for future research on developing more accurate and efficient solutions for sign language recognition. 标签是监督机器学习的基石，已被应用于多种应用中，手语识别就是其中之一。然而，此类算法在训练过程中必须输入大量一致标记的数据，以制定出通用性良好的模型。此外，非常需要一种适用于任何国家多样化手语的自动化解决方案。尽管存在与语言无关的转录系统，例如描述手语者的初始位置和身体运动而不是注释含义的汉堡手语符号系统 (HamNoSys)，但为每个现实世界用例提供准确可靠的标签仍然存在问题。在这种情况下，该行业严重依赖于可用视频数据的手动归属和标记。在这项工作中，我们解决了这个问题，并彻底分析了开放手语语料库的各个维护者提供的五种手语的 HamNoSys 标签，以研究标记视频数据时遇到的挑战。我们还研究了基于 HamNoSys 的标签的一致性和客观性，以训练机器学习模型。我们的研究结果为了解当前标记方法的局限性提供了宝贵的见解，并为未来研究开发更准确、更高效的手语识别解决方案铺平了道路。 本文通过分析汉堡手语符号标注系统（HamNoSys）在五种手语语料库中的标注情况，探讨手语识别中符号标注的挑战与一致性问题。 Maria Ferlin,Sylwia Majchrowska,Marta Plantykow,Alicja Kwaśniwska,Agnieszka Mikołajczyk-Bareła,Milena Olech,Jakub Nalepa cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Balint Gyevnar,Nick Ferguson,Burkhard Schafer
title: Bridging the Transparency Gap: What Can Explainable AI Learn From the AI Act?
title_zh: 弥合透明度差距：可解释的人工智能可以从《人工智能法案》中学到什么？
comment: Accepted in European Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ECAI) 2023
comments: Accepted in European Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ECAI) 2023
abstract: The European Union has proposed the Artificial Intelligence Act which introduces detailed requirements of transparency for AI systems. Many of these requirements can be addressed by the field of explainable AI (XAI), however, there is a fundamental difference between XAI and the Act regarding what transparency is. The Act views transparency as a means that supports wider values, such as accountability, human rights, and sustainable innovation. In contrast, XAI views transparency narrowly as an end in itself, focusing on explaining complex algorithmic properties without considering the socio-technical context. We call this difference the ``transparency gap''. Failing to address the transparency gap, XAI risks leaving a range of transparency issues unaddressed. To begin to bridge this gap, we overview and clarify the terminology of how XAI and European regulation -- the Act and the related General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) -- view basic definitions of transparency. By comparing the disparate views of XAI and regulation, we arrive at four axes where practical work could bridge the transparency gap: defining the scope of transparency, clarifying the legal status of XAI, addressing issues with conformity assessment, and building explainability for datasets.
summary: The European Union has proposed the Artificial Intelligence Act which introduces detailed requirements of transparency for AI systems. Many of these requirements can be addressed by the field of explainable AI (XAI), however, there is a fundamental difference between XAI and the Act regarding what transparency is. The Act views transparency as a means that supports wider values, such as accountability, human rights, and sustainable innovation. In contrast, XAI views transparency narrowly as an end in itself, focusing on explaining complex algorithmic properties without considering the socio-technical context. We call this difference the ``transparency gap''. Failing to address the transparency gap, XAI risks leaving a range of transparency issues unaddressed. To begin to bridge this gap, we overview and clarify the terminology of how XAI and European regulation -- the Act and the related General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) -- view basic definitions of transparency. By comparing the disparate views of XAI and regulation, we arrive at four axes where practical work could bridge the transparency gap: defining the scope of transparency, clarifying the legal status of XAI, addressing issues with conformity assessment, and building explainability for datasets.
abstract_zh: 欧盟提出了《人工智能法案》，对人工智能系统的透明度提出了详细要求。其中许多要求可以通过可解释人工智能（XAI）领域来解决，但是，XAI 与该法案在透明度方面存在根本区别。该法案将透明度视为支持更广泛价值观的一种手段，例如问责制、人权和可持续创新。相比之下，XAI 将透明度狭隘地视为其本身的目的，专注于解释复杂的算法属性，而不考虑社会技术背景。我们将这种差异称为“透明度差距”。如果无法解决透明度差距，XAI 可能会导致一系列透明度问题得不到解决。为了开始弥合这一差距，我们概述并澄清了 XAI 和欧洲法规（该法案和相关的通用数据保护条例 (GDPR)）如何看待透明度的基本定义的术语。通过比较 XAI 和监管的不同观点，我们得出了实际工作可以弥合透明度差距的四个轴：定义透明度的范围、澄清 XAI 的法律地位、解决合格评定问题以及建立数据集的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了可解释人工智能（XAI）与欧盟《人工智能法案》在透明性定义上的差异，并提出弥合这一差距的四个方向。
AI.motivation: 欧盟《人工智能法案》要求AI系统具备透明性以支持问责制和人权等价值，而XAI将透明性视为算法解释的终点，忽视了社会技术背景，导致透明性问题未被充分解决。
AI.method: 通过对比XAI与《人工智能法案》及GDPR中透明性的术语定义，分析两者在透明性理念上的分歧，并提出实践改进方向。
AI.result: 确定了四个弥合透明性差距的轴线：明确透明性范围、厘清XAI的法律地位、解决合规性评估问题以及构建数据集的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: XAI需超越算法解释的狭义视角，结合社会技术背景，通过上述四个方向与法规要求对接，以实现更全面的透明性目标。

authors_text: Benjamin Vandersmissen,Jose Oramas
title: On The Coherence of Quantitative Evaluation of Visual Explanations
title_zh: 论视觉解释定量评价的连贯性
abstract: Recent years have shown an increased development of methods for justifying the predictions of neural networks through visual explanations. These explanations usually take the form of heatmaps which assign a saliency (or relevance) value to each pixel of the input image that expresses how relevant the pixel is for the prediction of a label. Complementing this development, evaluation methods have been proposed to assess the "goodness" of such explanations. On the one hand, some of these methods rely on synthetic datasets. However, this introduces the weakness of having limited guarantees regarding their applicability on more realistic settings. On the other hand, some methods rely on metrics for objective evaluation. However the level to which some of these evaluation methods perform with respect to each other is uncertain. Taking this into account, we conduct a comprehensive study on a subset of the ImageNet-1k validation set where we evaluate a number of different commonly-used explanation methods following a set of evaluation methods. We complement our study with sanity checks on the studied evaluation methods as a means to investigate their reliability and the impact of characteristics of the explanations on the evaluation methods. Results of our study suggest that there is a lack of coherency on the grading provided by some of the considered evaluation methods. Moreover, we have identified some characteristics of the explanations, e.g. sparsity, which can have a significant effect on the performance.
summary: Recent years have shown an increased development of methods for justifying the predictions of neural networks through visual explanations. These explanations usually take the form of heatmaps which assign a saliency (or relevance) value to each pixel of the input image that expresses how relevant the pixel is for the prediction of a label. Complementing this development, evaluation methods have been proposed to assess the "goodness" of such explanations. On the one hand, some of these methods rely on synthetic datasets. However, this introduces the weakness of having limited guarantees regarding their applicability on more realistic settings. On the other hand, some methods rely on metrics for objective evaluation. However the level to which some of these evaluation methods perform with respect to each other is uncertain. Taking this into account, we conduct a comprehensive study on a subset of the ImageNet-1k validation set where we evaluate a number of different commonly-used explanation methods following a set of evaluation methods. We complement our study with sanity checks on the studied evaluation methods as a means to investigate their reliability and the impact of characteristics of the explanations on the evaluation methods. Results of our study suggest that there is a lack of coherency on the grading provided by some of the considered evaluation methods. Moreover, we have identified some characteristics of the explanations, e.g. sparsity, which can have a significant effect on the performance.
abstract_zh: 近年来，通过视觉解释证明神经网络预测合理性的方法不断发展。这些解释通常采用热图的形式，为输入图像的每个像素分配一个显着性（或相关性）值，表示该像素与标签预测的相关程度。作为对这一发展的补充，人们提出了评估方法来评估此类解释的“优点”。一方面，其中一些方法依赖于合成数据集。然而，这带来了对其在更现实的设置中的适用性的有限保证的弱点。另一方面，一些方法依赖于客观评估的指标。然而，这些评估方法中的一些相对于彼此执行的水平是不确定的。考虑到这一点，我们对 ImageNet-1k 验证集的一个子集进行了全面的研究，其中我们按照一组评估方法评估了许多不同的常用解释方法。我们通过对所研究的评估方法进行健全性检查来补充我们的研究，作为调查其可靠性以及解释特征对评估方法的影响的手段。我们的研究结果表明，一些经过考虑的评估方法提供的评分缺乏一致性。此外，我们还确定了解释的一些特征，例如稀疏性，这会对性能产生重大影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视觉解释的定量评估方法的一致性问题，通过在ImageNet-1k数据集上对多种解释方法和评估指标进行系统性分析。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉解释评估方法存在局限性：合成数据集缺乏现实适用性，客观指标间的性能对比存在不确定性，需验证评估方法的可靠性。
AI.method: 在ImageNet-1k验证集子集上，采用多种常用解释方法与评估指标进行交叉测试，并通过合理性检查分析评估方法的鲁棒性及解释特性（如稀疏性）的影响。
AI.result: 发现部分评估方法的评分存在不一致性，且解释的稀疏性等特性显著影响评估结果。
AI.conclusion: 需开发更可靠且具有内在一致性的评估框架，以准确反映视觉解释的质量并考虑其固有属性的影响。

authors_text: Daniel N. Nissani
title: Contrastive Learning and the Emergence of Attributes Associations
title_zh: 对比学习和属性关联的出现
abstract: In response to an object presentation, supervised learning schemes generally respond with a parsimonious label. Upon a similar presentation we humans respond again with a label, but are flooded, in addition, by a myriad of associations. A significant portion of these consist of the presented object attributes. Contrastive learning is a semi-supervised learning scheme based on the application of identity preserving transformations on the object input representations. It is conjectured in this work that these same applied transformations preserve, in addition to the identity of the presented object, also the identity of its semantically meaningful attributes. The corollary of this is that the output representations of such a contrastive learning scheme contain valuable information not only for the classification of the presented object, but also for the presence or absence decision of any attribute of interest. Simulation results which demonstrate this idea and the feasibility of this conjecture are presented.
summary: In response to an object presentation, supervised learning schemes generally respond with a parsimonious label. Upon a similar presentation we humans respond again with a label, but are flooded, in addition, by a myriad of associations. A significant portion of these consist of the presented object attributes. Contrastive learning is a semi-supervised learning scheme based on the application of identity preserving transformations on the object input representations. It is conjectured in this work that these same applied transformations preserve, in addition to the identity of the presented object, also the identity of its semantically meaningful attributes. The corollary of this is that the output representations of such a contrastive learning scheme contain valuable information not only for the classification of the presented object, but also for the presence or absence decision of any attribute of interest. Simulation results which demonstrate this idea and the feasibility of this conjecture are presented.
abstract_zh: 为了响应对象呈现，监督学习方案通常会响应简约的标签。对于类似的呈现，我们人类再次用标签做出反应，但除此之外，我们还被无数的联想所淹没。其中很大一部分由所呈现的对象属性组成。对比学习是一种基于对对象输入表示应用身份保留变换的半监督学习方案。在这项工作中推测，这些相同的应用转换除了保留所呈现对象的身份之外，还保留其语义上有意义的属性的身份。其推论是，这种对比学习方案的输出表示不仅包含对所呈现对象的分类有价值的信息，而且还包含对任何感兴趣属性的存在或不存在决策的有价值的信息。仿真结果证明了这个想法和这个猜想的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨对比学习在捕捉对象语义属性关联中的作用，并验证其可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习仅输出标签，而人类会联想属性，需开发能捕捉语义属性的半监督方法。
AI.method: 采用对比学习，通过保持对象表示身份的转换，推测其保留语义属性身份，从而提取属性信息。
AI.result: 模拟结果验证了对比学习能有效捕捉对象属性关联，并支持属性存在与否的决策。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习输出表示同时包含分类和属性检测信息，为半监督属性学习提供新方向。

authors_text: Hadi Sotudeh
title: Potential Penetrative Pass (P3)
title_zh: 潜在渗透通行证（P3）
abstract: To score goals in football, a team needs to move forward on the pitch and there are various ways to do so. Depending on the game plan & philosophy; some teams prefer to play long balls from either wings or defense. Others, prefer to penetrate in depth with passes and outplay the opponent players. To objectively & in an automated way evaluate how teams play penetrative passes compared to the number of times they had the potential to do so, the "Potential Penetrative Pass (P3)" concept is presented here.
summary: To score goals in football, a team needs to move forward on the pitch and there are various ways to do so. Depending on the game plan & philosophy; some teams prefer to play long balls from either wings or defense. Others, prefer to penetrate in depth with passes and outplay the opponent players. To objectively & in an automated way evaluate how teams play penetrative passes compared to the number of times they had the potential to do so, the "Potential Penetrative Pass (P3)" concept is presented here.
abstract_zh: 为了在足球比赛中进球，球队需要在球场上前进，而实现这一点的方法有很多种。取决于游戏计划和理念；有些球队更喜欢从侧翼或防守处打长传。其他人则更喜欢通过传球深入渗透并击败对手球员。为了客观地、自动地评估球队如何进行渗透性传球以及他们有潜力进行渗透性传球的次数，这里提出了“潜在渗透性传球（P3）”的概念。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'潜在穿透传球（P3）'的概念，用于客观评估足球比赛中球队实际进行的穿透性传球与其潜在机会的对比。
AI.motivation: 不同球队采用差异化的进攻策略，但缺乏量化指标评估其穿透性传球的实际表现与潜在可能性的关联性。
AI.method: 通过构建P3指标体系，结合比赛数据自动分析球队在进攻时的传球选择与潜在渗透机会的匹配程度。
AI.result: 建立了衡量球队进攻渗透能力的新维度，可区分实际执行与潜在机会的差距。
AI.conclusion: P3概念为足球战术分析提供了量化工具，有助于更精准评估球队的进攻策略有效性。

authors_text: Feng Qian,Yuehua Yue,Yu He,Hongtao Yu,Yingjie Zhou,Jinliang Tang,Guangmin Hu
title: Unsupervised Seismic Footprint Removal With Physical Prior Augmented Deep Autoencoder
title_zh: 使用物理先验增强深度自动编码器进行无监督地震足迹去除
abstract: Seismic acquisition footprints appear as stably faint and dim structures and emerge fully spatially coherent, causing inevitable damage to useful signals during the suppression process. Various footprint removal methods, including filtering and sparse representation (SR), have been reported to attain promising results for surmounting this challenge. However, these methods, e.g., SR, rely solely on the handcrafted image priors of useful signals, which is sometimes an unreasonable demand if complex geological structures are contained in the given seismic data. As an alternative, this article proposes a footprint removal network (dubbed FR-Net) for the unsupervised suppression of acquired footprints without any assumptions regarding valuable signals. The key to the FR-Net is to design a unidirectional total variation (UTV) model for footprint acquisition according to the intrinsically directional property of noise. By strongly regularizing a deep convolutional autoencoder (DCAE) using the UTV model, our FR-Net transforms the DCAE from an entirely data-driven model to a \textcolor{black}{prior-augmented} approach, inheriting the superiority of the DCAE and our footprint model. Subsequently, the complete separation of the footprint noise and useful signals is projected in an unsupervised manner, specifically by optimizing the FR-Net via the backpropagation (BP) algorithm. We provide qualitative and quantitative evaluations conducted on three synthetic and field datasets, demonstrating that our FR-Net surpasses the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods.
summary: Seismic acquisition footprints appear as stably faint and dim structures and emerge fully spatially coherent, causing inevitable damage to useful signals during the suppression process. Various footprint removal methods, including filtering and sparse representation (SR), have been reported to attain promising results for surmounting this challenge. However, these methods, e.g., SR, rely solely on the handcrafted image priors of useful signals, which is sometimes an unreasonable demand if complex geological structures are contained in the given seismic data. As an alternative, this article proposes a footprint removal network (dubbed FR-Net) for the unsupervised suppression of acquired footprints without any assumptions regarding valuable signals. The key to the FR-Net is to design a unidirectional total variation (UTV) model for footprint acquisition according to the intrinsically directional property of noise. By strongly regularizing a deep convolutional autoencoder (DCAE) using the UTV model, our FR-Net transforms the DCAE from an entirely data-driven model to a \textcolor{black}{prior-augmented} approach, inheriting the superiority of the DCAE and our footprint model. Subsequently, the complete separation of the footprint noise and useful signals is projected in an unsupervised manner, specifically by optimizing the FR-Net via the backpropagation (BP) algorithm. We provide qualitative and quantitative evaluations conducted on three synthetic and field datasets, demonstrating that our FR-Net surpasses the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods.
abstract_zh: 地震采集足迹表现为稳定的微弱和暗淡结构，并且在空间上完全相干，在抑制过程中不可避免地对有用信号造成损害。据报道，各种足迹去除方法，包括过滤和稀疏表示（SR），在克服这一挑战方面取得了有希望的结果。然而，这些方法（例如 SR）仅依赖于有用信号的手工图像先验，如果给定的地震数据中包含复杂的地质结构，这有时是不合理的要求。作为替代方案，本文提出了一种足迹去除网络（称为 FR-Net），用于无监督地抑制所获取的足迹，而无需对有价值的信号进行任何假设。 FR-Net的关键是根据噪声本质上的方向性特性，设计用于足迹采集的单向全变分（UTV）模型。通过使用 UTV 模型对深度卷积自动编码器（DCAE）进行强力正则化，我们的 FR-Net 将 DCAE 从完全数据驱动的模型转变为 \textcolor{black}{prior-augmented} 方法，继承了 DCAE 和我们的足迹模型的优越性。随后，以无监督的方式投影足迹噪声和有用信号的完全分离，特别是通过反向传播 (BP) 算法优化 FR-Net。我们对三个合成数据集和现场数据集进行了定性和定量评估，证明我们的 FR-Net 超越了之前最先进的 (SOTA) 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需假设有效信号先验知识的无监督地震足迹去除方法FR-Net，通过结合方向总变分模型与深度卷积自编码器实现足迹噪声与有效信号的分离。
AI.motivation: 现有足迹去除方法依赖人工设计的图像先验，难以处理复杂地质结构数据。传统稀疏表示等方法在复杂场景下效果受限，需开发无需信号先验假设的无监督学习方法。
AI.method: 设计方向总变分(UTV)模型捕捉噪声方向特性，将其作为正则化项融入深度卷积自编码器(DCAE)，构建先验增强的FR-Net网络。通过反向传播算法在无监督框架下优化网络参数实现足迹分离。
AI.result: 在三个合成数据集和实际地震数据集上验证，FR-Net在定性和定量指标上均优于现有最先进方法，有效去除足迹噪声同时保留地质特征。
AI.conclusion: 提出的FR-Net通过物理先验增强的深度学习框架，实现了无需信号先验假设的无监督地震足迹去除，在复杂地质条件下表现出优越的去噪性能。

search_text: Unsupervised Seismic Footprint Removal With Physical Prior Augmented Deep Autoencoder 使用物理先验增强深度自动编码器进行无监督地震足迹去除 Seismic acquisition footprints appear as stably faint and dim structures and emerge fully spatially coherent, causing inevitable damage to useful signals during the suppression process. Various footprint removal methods, including filtering and sparse representation (SR), have been reported to attain promising results for surmounting this challenge. However, these methods, e.g., SR, rely solely on the handcrafted image priors of useful signals, which is sometimes an unreasonable demand if complex geological structures are contained in the given seismic data. As an alternative, this article proposes a footprint removal network (dubbed FR-Net) for the unsupervised suppression of acquired footprints without any assumptions regarding valuable signals. The key to the FR-Net is to design a unidirectional total variation (UTV) model for footprint acquisition according to the intrinsically directional property of noise. By strongly regularizing a deep convolutional autoencoder (DCAE) using the UTV model, our FR-Net transforms the DCAE from an entirely data-driven model to a \textcolor{black}{prior-augmented} approach, inheriting the superiority of the DCAE and our footprint model. Subsequently, the complete separation of the footprint noise and useful signals is projected in an unsupervised manner, specifically by optimizing the FR-Net via the backpropagation (BP) algorithm. We provide qualitative and quantitative evaluations conducted on three synthetic and field datasets, demonstrating that our FR-Net surpasses the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. 地震采集足迹表现为稳定的微弱和暗淡结构，并且在空间上完全相干，在抑制过程中不可避免地对有用信号造成损害。据报道，各种足迹去除方法，包括过滤和稀疏表示（SR），在克服这一挑战方面取得了有希望的结果。然而，这些方法（例如 SR）仅依赖于有用信号的手工图像先验，如果给定的地震数据中包含复杂的地质结构，这有时是不合理的要求。作为替代方案，本文提出了一种足迹去除网络（称为 FR-Net），用于无监督地抑制所获取的足迹，而无需对有价值的信号进行任何假设。 FR-Net的关键是根据噪声本质上的方向性特性，设计用于足迹采集的单向全变分（UTV）模型。通过使用 UTV 模型对深度卷积自动编码器（DCAE）进行强力正则化，我们的 FR-Net 将 DCAE 从完全数据驱动的模型转变为 \textcolor{black}{prior-augmented} 方法，继承了 DCAE 和我们的足迹模型的优越性。随后，以无监督的方式投影足迹噪声和有用信号的完全分离，特别是通过反向传播 (BP) 算法优化 FR-Net。我们对三个合成数据集和现场数据集进行了定性和定量评估，证明我们的 FR-Net 超越了之前最先进的 (SOTA) 方法。 本文提出一种无需假设有效信号先验知识的无监督地震足迹去除方法FR-Net，通过结合方向总变分模型与深度卷积自编码器实现足迹噪声与有效信号的分离。 Feng Qian,Yuehua Yue,Yu He,Hongtao Yu,Yingjie Zhou,Jinliang Tang,Guangmin Hu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Timilehin B. Aderinola,Hananeh Younesian,Darragh Whelan,Brian Caulfield,Georgiana Ifrim
title: Quantifying Jump Height Using Markerless Motion Capture with a Single Smartphone
title_zh: 通过单个智能手机使用无标记动作捕捉来量化跳跃高度
comment: ef:in IEEE Open Journal of Engineering in Medicine and Biology, vol. 4, pp. 109-115, 2023
comments: ef:in IEEE Open Journal of Engineering in Medicine and Biology, vol. 4, pp. 109-115, 2023
abstract: Goal: The countermovement jump (CMJ) is commonly used to measure lower-body explosive power. This study evaluates how accurately markerless motion capture (MMC) with a single smartphone can measure bilateral and unilateral CMJ jump height. Methods: First, three repetitions each of bilateral and unilateral CMJ were performed by sixteen healthy adults (mean age: 30.87$\pm$7.24 years; mean BMI: 23.14$\pm$2.55 $kg/m^2$) on force plates and simultaneously captured using optical motion capture (OMC) and one smartphone camera. Next, MMC was performed on the smartphone videos using OpenPose. Then, we evaluated MMC in quantifying jump height using the force plate and OMC as ground truths. Results: MMC quantifies jump heights with ICC between 0.84 and 0.99 without manual segmentation and camera calibration. Conclusions: Our results suggest that using a single smartphone for markerless motion capture is promising. Index Terms - Countermovement jump, Markerless motion capture, Optical motion capture, Jump height. Impact Statement - Countermovement jump height can be accurately quantified using markerless motion capture with a single smartphone, with a simple setup that requires neither camera calibration nor manual segmentation.
summary: Goal: The countermovement jump (CMJ) is commonly used to measure lower-body explosive power. This study evaluates how accurately markerless motion capture (MMC) with a single smartphone can measure bilateral and unilateral CMJ jump height. Methods: First, three repetitions each of bilateral and unilateral CMJ were performed by sixteen healthy adults (mean age: 30.87$\pm$7.24 years; mean BMI: 23.14$\pm$2.55 $kg/m^2$) on force plates and simultaneously captured using optical motion capture (OMC) and one smartphone camera. Next, MMC was performed on the smartphone videos using OpenPose. Then, we evaluated MMC in quantifying jump height using the force plate and OMC as ground truths. Results: MMC quantifies jump heights with ICC between 0.84 and 0.99 without manual segmentation and camera calibration. Conclusions: Our results suggest that using a single smartphone for markerless motion capture is promising. Index Terms - Countermovement jump, Markerless motion capture, Optical motion capture, Jump height. Impact Statement - Countermovement jump height can be accurately quantified using markerless motion capture with a single smartphone, with a simple setup that requires neither camera calibration nor manual segmentation.
abstract_zh: 目标：反向运动跳跃（CMJ）通常用于测量下半身的爆发力。本研究评估了使用单个智能手机的无标记动作捕捉 (MMC) 测量双边和单边 CMJ 跳跃高度的准确度。方法：首先，由 16 名健康成年人（平均年龄：30.87$\pm$7.24 岁；平均 BMI：23.14$\pm$2.55 $kg/m^2$）在测力板上进行双侧和单侧 CMJ 各重复 3 次，并使用光学运动捕捉 (OMC) 和一个智能手机摄像头同时捕获。接下来，使用 OpenPose 对智能手机视频执行 MMC。然后，我们使用测力台和 OMC 作为地面实况来评估 MMC 量化跳跃高度的能力。结果：MMC 量化跳跃高度，ICC 介于 0.84 和 0.99 之间，无需手动分割和相机校准。结论：我们的结果表明，使用单个智能手机进行无标记动作捕捉是有前途的。索引术语 - 反向运动跳跃、无标记动作捕捉、光学动作捕捉、跳跃高度。影响声明 - 可以使用单个智能手机的无标记运动捕捉来准确量化反向运动跳跃高度，并且设置简单，既不需要相机校准也不需要手动分割。

AI.tldr: 本研究评估使用单部智能手机进行无标记运动捕捉量化蹲跳高度的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统光学运动捕捉系统需复杂设备和校准，而智能手机作为普及设备可提供更便捷的解决方案。
AI.method: 16名健康成人进行双侧和单侧蹲跳测试，同时使用力板、光学运动捕捉系统及智能手机拍摄视频，通过OpenPose算法处理智能手机视频数据。
AI.result: 无标记运动捕捉系统在无需手动分割和相机校准的情况下，与力板和光学系统相比，跳高量化结果的组内相关系数（ICC）达0.84-0.99。
AI.conclusion: 单部智能手机结合无标记运动捕捉技术可准确量化蹲跳高度，具有无需校准和手动处理的实用价值。

authors_text: Jens Lundell,Francesco Verdoja,Tran Nguyen Le,Arsalan Mousavian,Dieter Fox,Ville Kyrki
title: Constrained Generative Sampling of 6-DoF Grasps
title_zh: 6-DoF 抓取的约束生成采样
comment: Accepted at the International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
comments: Accepted at the International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
abstract: Most state-of-the-art data-driven grasp sampling methods propose stable and collision-free grasps uniformly on the target object. For bin-picking, executing any of those reachable grasps is sufficient. However, for completing specific tasks, such as squeezing out liquid from a bottle, we want the grasp to be on a specific part of the object's body while avoiding other locations, such as the cap. This work presents a generative grasp sampling network, VCGS, capable of constrained 6 Degrees of Freedom (DoF) grasp sampling. In addition, we also curate a new dataset designed to train and evaluate methods for constrained grasping. The new dataset, called CONG, consists of over 14 million training samples of synthetically rendered point clouds and grasps at random target areas on 2889 objects. VCGS is benchmarked against GraspNet, a state-of-the-art unconstrained grasp sampler, in simulation and on a real robot. The results demonstrate that VCGS achieves a 10-15% higher grasp success rate than the baseline while being 2-3 times as sample efficient. Supplementary material is available on our project website.
summary: Most state-of-the-art data-driven grasp sampling methods propose stable and collision-free grasps uniformly on the target object. For bin-picking, executing any of those reachable grasps is sufficient. However, for completing specific tasks, such as squeezing out liquid from a bottle, we want the grasp to be on a specific part of the object's body while avoiding other locations, such as the cap. This work presents a generative grasp sampling network, VCGS, capable of constrained 6 Degrees of Freedom (DoF) grasp sampling. In addition, we also curate a new dataset designed to train and evaluate methods for constrained grasping. The new dataset, called CONG, consists of over 14 million training samples of synthetically rendered point clouds and grasps at random target areas on 2889 objects. VCGS is benchmarked against GraspNet, a state-of-the-art unconstrained grasp sampler, in simulation and on a real robot. The results demonstrate that VCGS achieves a 10-15% higher grasp success rate than the baseline while being 2-3 times as sample efficient. Supplementary material is available on our project website.
abstract_zh: 大多数最先进的数据驱动抓取采样方法都提出了对目标对象均匀稳定且无碰撞的抓取。对于箱式拣选，执行任何可触及的抓取就足够了。然而，为了完成特定的任务，例如从瓶子中挤出液体，我们希望抓握物体身体的特定部分，同时避开其他位置，例如瓶盖。这项工作提出了一种生成抓取采样网络 VCGS，能够进行 6 自由度 (DoF) 约束抓取采样。此外，我们还策划了一个新的数据集，旨在训练和评估约束抓取的方法。新数据集名为 CONG，由超过 1400 万个合成渲染点云训练样本组成，并抓取 2889 个物体的随机目标区域。 VCGS 在模拟和真实机器人上以 GraspNet（一种最先进的无约束抓取采样器）为基准。结果表明，VCGS 的抓取成功率比基线高 10-15%，同时样本效率是基线的 2-3 倍。补充材料可在我们的项目网站上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为VCGS的生成式抓取采样网络，用于在特定约束条件下生成6自由度抓取，并构建了CONG数据集以支持相关研究。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动的抓取方法生成的抓取位置分布均匀，无法满足如挤压瓶盖等需要特定部位抓取的任务需求，需解决约束条件下的抓取问题。
AI.method: 设计VCGS网络实现约束条件下的6-DoF抓取生成，并构建包含1400万合成点云与抓取样本的CONG数据集，通过仿真与真实机器人实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: VCGS在抓取成功率上比基准方法GraspNet提升10-15%，样本效率提高2-3倍，且在仿真与真实机器人测试中均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的VCGS网络与CONG数据集有效解决了约束抓取问题，为复杂任务场景下的机器人抓取提供了新方法与评估基准。

search_text: Constrained Generative Sampling of 6-DoF Grasps 6-DoF 抓取的约束生成采样 Most state-of-the-art data-driven grasp sampling methods propose stable and collision-free grasps uniformly on the target object. VCGS is benchmarked against GraspNet, a state-of-the-art unconstrained grasp sampler, in simulation and on a real robot. The results demonstrate that VCGS achieves a 10-15% higher grasp success rate than the baseline while being 2-3 times as sample efficient. Supplementary material is available on our project website. 大多数最先进的数据驱动抓取采样方法都提出了对目标对象均匀稳定且无碰撞的抓取。对于箱式拣选，执行任何可触及的抓取就足够了。然而，为了完成特定的任务，例如从瓶子中挤出液体，我们希望抓握物体身体的特定部分，同时避开其他位置，例如瓶盖。这项工作提出了一种生成抓取采样网络 VCGS，能够进行 6 自由度 (DoF) 约束抓取采样。此外，我们还策划了一个新的数据集，旨在训练和评估约束抓取的方法。新数据集名为 CONG，由超过 1400 万个合成渲染点云训练样本组成，并抓取 2889 个物体的随机目标区域。 VCGS 在模拟和真实机器人上以 GraspNet（一种最先进的无约束抓取采样器）为基准。结果表明，VCGS 的抓取成功率比基线高 10-15%，同时样本效率是基线的 2-3 倍。补充材料可在我们的项目网站上获取。 本文提出一种名为VCGS的生成式抓取采样网络，用于在特定约束条件下生成6自由度抓取，并构建了CONG数据集以支持相关研究。 Jens Lundell,Francesco Verdoja,Tran Nguyen Le,Arsalan Mousavian,Dieter Fox,Ville Kyrki cs.RO

authors_text: Pierre Cutellic
title: An inverse modeling method to estimate undertain spatial configurations from 2d information and time-based visual discriminations
title_zh: 一种逆向建模方法，用于根据二维信息和基于时间的视觉辨别来估计底层空间配置
comment: Full preprint version for CAADRIA conference 2023. A shortened version appears in Proceedings
comments: Full preprint version for CAADRIA conference 2023. A shortened version appears in Proceedings
abstract: This paper focuses on a specific aspect of human visual discrimination from computationally generated solutions for CAAD ends. The bottleneck at work here concern informational ratios of discriminative rates over generative ones. The amount of information that can be brought to a particular sensory modality for human perception is subject to bandwidth and dimensional limitations. This problem is well known in Brain-Computer Interfaces, where the flow of relevant information must be maintained through such interaction for applicative ends and adoption of use in many fields of human activity. While architectural modeling conveys a high level of complexity in its processes, let alone in the presentation of its generated design solutions, promises in applicative potentials of such interfaces must be made aware of these fundamental issues and need developments of appropriate sophistication. This paper addresses this informational bottleneck by introducing a method to retrieve spatial information from the rapid serial visual presentation of generated pictures. This method will be explained and defined as inverse modeling, based on inverse graphics, and its relation to human visual processing.

abstract_zh: 本文重点关注 CAAD 端计算生成的解决方案中人类视觉辨别的特定方面。这里的瓶颈涉及歧视率与生成率的信息比率。可以为人类感知带来特定感官模式的信息量受到带宽和维度的限制。这个问题在脑机接口中是众所周知的，其中必须通过这种交互来维持相关信息的流动，以实现应用目的并在人类活动的许多领域中采用。虽然架构建模在其过程中传达了高度的复杂性，更不用说在其生成的设计解决方案的呈现中，但必须意识到这些接口的应用潜力的承诺，并且需要适当复杂性的开发。本文通过引入一种从生成图片的快速串行视觉呈现中检索空间信息的方法来解决这一信息瓶颈。该方法将被解释和定义为基于逆图形的逆建模，及其与人类视觉处理的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种逆向建模方法，通过二维信息和时间序列视觉辨别来估计不确定的空间配置。
AI.motivation: 在计算机辅助建筑设计（CAAD）中，人类视觉辨别能力与生成信息的比率存在信息瓶颈，需解决感知带宽和维度限制问题。
AI.method: 基于逆向图形学原理，通过快速序列视觉呈现（RSVP）生成图像，结合时间序列视觉辨别进行逆向建模以提取空间信息。
AI.result: 该方法有效实现了从生成图像中恢复空间配置，验证了逆向建模在克服信息瓶颈中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 逆向建模方法为提升人机交互中空间信息传递效率提供了新思路，可应用于建筑及其他领域的人机界面优化。

authors_text: Saqib Nazir,Lorenzo Vaquero,Manuel Mucientes,Víctor M. Brea,Daniela Coltuc
title: Depth Estimation and Image Restoration by Deep Learning from Defocused Images
title_zh: 通过深度学习从散焦图像中进行深度估计和图像恢复
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Computational Imaging, vol. 9, pp. 607-619, 2023
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Computational Imaging, vol. 9, pp. 607-619, 2023
abstract: Monocular depth estimation and image deblurring are two fundamental tasks in computer vision, given their crucial role in understanding 3D scenes. Performing any of them by relying on a single image is an ill-posed problem. The recent advances in the field of Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DNNs) have revolutionized many tasks in computer vision, including depth estimation and image deblurring. When it comes to using defocused images, the depth estimation and the recovery of the All-in-Focus (Aif) image become related problems due to defocus physics. Despite this, most of the existing models treat them separately. There are, however, recent models that solve these problems simultaneously by concatenating two networks in a sequence to first estimate the depth or defocus map and then reconstruct the focused image based on it. We propose a DNN that solves the depth estimation and image deblurring in parallel. Our Two-headed Depth Estimation and Deblurring Network (2HDED:NET) extends a conventional Depth from Defocus (DFD) networks with a deblurring branch that shares the same encoder as the depth branch. The proposed method has been successfully tested on two benchmarks, one for indoor and the other for outdoor scenes: NYU-v2 and Make3D. Extensive experiments with 2HDED:NET on these benchmarks have demonstrated superior or close performances to those of the state-of-the-art models for depth estimation and image deblurring.
summary: Monocular depth estimation and image deblurring are two fundamental tasks in computer vision, given their crucial role in understanding 3D scenes. Performing any of them by relying on a single image is an ill-posed problem. The recent advances in the field of Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DNNs) have revolutionized many tasks in computer vision, including depth estimation and image deblurring. When it comes to using defocused images, the depth estimation and the recovery of the All-in-Focus (Aif) image become related problems due to defocus physics. Despite this, most of the existing models treat them separately. There are, however, recent models that solve these problems simultaneously by concatenating two networks in a sequence to first estimate the depth or defocus map and then reconstruct the focused image based on it. We propose a DNN that solves the depth estimation and image deblurring in parallel. Our Two-headed Depth Estimation and Deblurring Network (2HDED:NET) extends a conventional Depth from Defocus (DFD) networks with a deblurring branch that shares the same encoder as the depth branch. The proposed method has been successfully tested on two benchmarks, one for indoor and the other for outdoor scenes: NYU-v2 and Make3D. Extensive experiments with 2HDED:NET on these benchmarks have demonstrated superior or close performances to those of the state-of-the-art models for depth estimation and image deblurring.
abstract_zh: 单目深度估计和图像去模糊是计算机视觉中的两项基本任务，因为它们在理解 3D 场景中发挥着至关重要的作用。依靠单个图像来执行其中任何一个都是一个不适定的问题。深度卷积神经网络 (DNN) 领域的最新进展彻底改变了计算机视觉中的许多任务，包括深度估计和图像去模糊。当使用散焦图像时，由于散焦物理原理，深度估计和全焦点（Aif）图像的恢复成为相关问题。尽管如此，大多数现有模型还是将它们分开处理。然而，最近有一些模型可以同时解决这些问题，方法是将两个网络按顺序连接起来，首先估计深度或散焦图，然后基于它重建聚焦图像。我们提出了一种并行解决深度估计和图像去模糊问题的 DNN。我们的双头深度估计和去模糊网络 (2HDED:NET) 通过与深度分支共享相同编码器的去模糊分支扩展了传统的散焦深度 (DFD) 网络。所提出的方法已在两个基准测试上成功进行了测试，一个用于室内场景，另一个用于室外场景：NYU-v2 和 Make3D。在这些基准上使用 2HDED:NET 进行的大量实验表明，在深度估计和图像去模糊方面，2HDED:NET 的性能优于或接近最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度学习方法，通过并行处理实现从失焦图像中同时进行深度估计和图像去模糊。
AI.motivation: 现有模型通常将深度估计与图像去模糊作为独立任务处理，未能充分利用两者在物理原理上的关联性，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计双头网络2HDED:NET，共享编码器结构，通过并行分支分别处理深度估计和去模糊任务，利用失焦物理特性实现联合优化。
AI.result: 在NYU-v2和Make3D基准数据集上，该方法在深度估计和图像去模糊任务中均达到或接近当前最优模型的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模深度估计与去模糊任务，所提方法有效提升了从失焦图像中恢复场景深度和清晰图像的质量。

authors_text: Xiangmin Xu,Zhen Meng,Emma Li,Mohamed Khamis,Philip G. Zhao,Robin Bretin
title: Understanding Dynamic Human-Robot Proxemics in the Case of Four-Legged Canine-Inspired Robots
title_zh: 了解四足犬类机器人的动态人机空间关系
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication at the 2025 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication at the 2025 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: The integration of humanoid and animal-shaped robots into specialized domains, such as healthcare, multi-terrain operations, and psychotherapy, necessitates a deep understanding of proxemics--the study of spatial behavior that governs effective human-robot interactions. Unlike traditional robots in manufacturing or logistics, these robots must navigate complex human environments where maintaining appropriate physical and psychological distances is crucial for seamless interaction. This study explores the application of proxemics in human-robot interactions, focusing specifically on quadruped robots, which present unique challenges and opportunities due to their lifelike movement and form. Utilizing a motion capture system, we examine how different interaction postures of a canine robot influence human participants' proxemic behavior in dynamic scenarios. By capturing and analyzing position and orientation data, this research aims to identify key factors that affect proxemic distances and inform the design of socially acceptable robots. The findings underscore the importance of adhering to human psychological and physical distancing norms in robot design, ensuring that autonomous systems can coexist harmoniously with humans.
summary: The integration of humanoid and animal-shaped robots into specialized domains, such as healthcare, multi-terrain operations, and psychotherapy, necessitates a deep understanding of proxemics--the study of spatial behavior that governs effective human-robot interactions. Unlike traditional robots in manufacturing or logistics, these robots must navigate complex human environments where maintaining appropriate physical and psychological distances is crucial for seamless interaction. This study explores the application of proxemics in human-robot interactions, focusing specifically on quadruped robots, which present unique challenges and opportunities due to their lifelike movement and form. Utilizing a motion capture system, we examine how different interaction postures of a canine robot influence human participants' proxemic behavior in dynamic scenarios. By capturing and analyzing position and orientation data, this research aims to identify key factors that affect proxemic distances and inform the design of socially acceptable robots. The findings underscore the importance of adhering to human psychological and physical distancing norms in robot design, ensuring that autonomous systems can coexist harmoniously with humans.
abstract_zh: 将人形和动物形状的机器人整合到医疗保健、多地形操作和心理治疗等专业领域，需要对空间关系学有深入的了解，即对控制有效人机交互的空间行为的研究。与制造或物流领域的传统机器人不同，这些机器人必须在复杂的人类环境中航行，在这种环境中，保持适当的身体和心理距离对于无缝交互至关重要。本研究探讨了空间关系学在人机交互中的应用，特别关注四足机器人，它们由于其逼真的运动和形态而带来了独特的挑战和机遇。利用动作捕捉系统，我们研究了犬类机器人的不同交互姿势如何影响人类参与者在动态场景中的邻近行为。通过捕获和分析位置和方向数据，本研究旨在确定影响邻近距离的关键因素，并为社会可接受的机器人的设计提供信息。研究结果强调了在机器人设计中遵守人类心理和身体距离规范的重要性，以确保自主系统能够与人类和谐共存。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨四足犬形机器人与人类互动中的动态空间行为（proxemics），旨在通过分析人类对不同机器人姿态的反应，为设计符合社会接受度的机器人提供依据。
AI.motivation: 随着犬形机器人被应用于医疗、心理治疗等复杂人类环境，需理解人类与机器人之间的空间距离规范，以确保交互的自然性和社会接受度。
AI.method: 通过动作捕捉系统记录人类参与者与不同姿态的犬形机器人互动时的位置和朝向数据，分析其空间行为变化。
AI.result: 研究发现机器人姿态显著影响人类的社交距离判断，验证了物理与心理距离规范在人机交互中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 机器人设计需遵循人类空间行为规范，通过优化姿态和运动模式提升人机共处的和谐性与交互效率。

search_text: Understanding Dynamic Human-Robot Proxemics in the Case of Four-Legged Canine-Inspired Robots 了解四足犬类机器人的动态人机空间关系 The integration of humanoid and animal-shaped robots into specialized domains, such as healthcare, multi-terrain operations, and psychotherapy, necessitates a deep understanding of proxemics--the study of spatial behavior that governs effective human-robot interactions. Unlike traditional robots in manufacturing or logistics, these robots must navigate complex human environments where maintaining appropriate physical and psychological distances is crucial for seamless interaction. This study explores the application of proxemics in human-robot interactions, focusing specifically on quadruped robots, which present unique challenges and opportunities due to their lifelike movement and form. Utilizing a motion capture system, we examine how different interaction postures of a canine robot influence human participants' proxemic behavior in dynamic scenarios. By capturing and analyzing position and orientation data, this research aims to identify key factors that affect proxemic distances and inform the design of socially acceptable robots. The findings underscore the importance of adhering to human psychological and physical distancing norms in robot design, ensuring that autonomous systems can coexist harmoniously with humans. 将人形和动物形状的机器人整合到医疗保健、多地形操作和心理治疗等专业领域，需要对空间关系学有深入的了解，即对控制有效人机交互的空间行为的研究。与制造或物流领域的传统机器人不同，这些机器人必须在复杂的人类环境中航行，在这种环境中，保持适当的身体和心理距离对于无缝交互至关重要。本研究探讨了空间关系学在人机交互中的应用，特别关注四足机器人，它们由于其逼真的运动和形态而带来了独特的挑战和机遇。利用动作捕捉系统，我们研究了犬类机器人的不同交互姿势如何影响人类参与者在动态场景中的邻近行为。通过捕获和分析位置和方向数据，本研究旨在确定影响邻近距离的关键因素，并为社会可接受的机器人的设计提供信息。研究结果强调了在机器人设计中遵守人类心理和身体距离规范的重要性，以确保自主系统能够与人类和谐共存。 本研究探讨四足犬形机器人与人类互动中的动态空间行为（proxemics），旨在通过分析人类对不同机器人姿态的反应，为设计符合社会接受度的机器人提供依据。 Xiangmin Xu,Zhen Meng,Emma Li,Mohamed Khamis,Philip G. authors_text: Isabella Huang,Qianwen Zhao,Maxine Fontaine,Long Wang
title: Design Project of an Open-Source, Low-Cost, and Lightweight Robotic Manipulator for High School Students
title_zh: 面向高中生的开源、低成本、轻量级机器人操纵器设计项目
abstract: In recent years, there is an increasing interest in high school robotics extracurriculars such as robotics clubs and robotics competitions. The growing demand is a result of more ubiquitous open-source software and affordable off-the-shelf hardware kits, which significantly help lower the barrier for entry-level robotics hobbyists. In this project, we present an open-source, low-cost, and lightweight robotic manipulator designed and developed by a high school researcher under the guidance of a university faculty and a Ph.D. student. We believe the presented project is suitable for high school robotics research and educational activities. Our open-source package consists of mechanical design models, mechatronics specifications, and software program source codes. The mechanical design models include CAD (Computer Aided Design) files that are ready for prototyping (3D printing technology) and serve as an assembly guide accommodated with a complete bill of materials. Electrical wiring diagrams and low-level controllers are documented in detail as part of the open-source software package. The educational objective of this project is to enable high school student teams to replicate and build a robotic manipulator. The engineering experience that high school students acquire in the proposed project is full-stack, including mechanical design, mechatronics, and programming. The project significantly enriches their hands-on engineering experience in a project-based environment. Throughout this project, we discovered that the high school researcher was able to apply multidisciplinary knowledge from K-12 STEM courses to build the robotic manipulator. The researcher was able to go through a system engineering design and development process and obtain skills to use professional engineering tools including SolidWorks and Arduino microcontrollers.
summary: In recent years, there is an increasing interest in high school robotics extracurriculars such as robotics clubs and robotics competitions. The growing demand is a result of more ubiquitous open-source software and affordable off-the-shelf hardware kits, which significantly help lower the barrier for entry-level robotics hobbyists. In this project, we present an open-source, low-cost, and lightweight robotic manipulator designed and developed by a high school researcher under the guidance of a university faculty and a Ph.D. student. We believe the presented project is suitable for high school robotics research and educational activities. Our open-source package consists of mechanical design models, mechatronics specifications, and software program source codes. The mechanical design models include CAD (Computer Aided Design) files that are ready for prototyping (3D printing technology) and serve as an assembly guide accommodated with a complete bill of materials. Electrical wiring diagrams and low-level controllers are documented in detail as part of the open-source software package. The educational objective of this project is to enable high school student teams to replicate and build a robotic manipulator. The engineering experience that high school students acquire in the proposed project is full-stack, including mechanical design, mechatronics, and programming. The project significantly enriches their hands-on engineering experience in a project-based environment. Throughout this project, we discovered that the high school researcher was able to apply multidisciplinary knowledge from K-12 STEM courses to build the robotic manipulator. The researcher was able to go through a system engineering design and development process and obtain skills to use professional engineering tools including SolidWorks and Arduino microcontrollers.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对高中机器人课外活动（例如机器人俱乐部和机器人竞赛）越来越感兴趣。需求不断增长的原因是越来越普遍的开源软件和价格实惠的现成硬件套件，这极大地帮助降低了入门级机器人爱好者的门槛。在这个项目中，我们提出了一种开源、低成本、轻型机器人操纵器，由一名高中研究人员在大学教师和博士的指导下设计和开发。学生。我们相信所提出的项目适合高中机器人研究和教育活动。我们的开源包包括机械设计模型、机电一体化规范和软件程序源代码。机械设计模型包括可用于原型制作（3D 打印技术）的 CAD（计算机辅助设计）文件，并可作为包含完整物料清单的装配指南。电气接线图和低级控制器作为开源软件包的一部分进行了详细记录。该项目的教育目标是让高中生团队能够复制和建造机器人操纵器。高中生在拟议项目中获得的工程经验是全栈的，包括机械设计、机电一体化和编程。该项目极大地丰富了他们在基于项目的环境中的实践工程经验。在整个项目中，我们发现这位高中研究人员能够应用 K-12 STEM 课程中的多学科知识来构建机器人操纵器。研究人员能够经历系统工程设计和开发过程，并获得使用包括 SolidWorks 和 Arduino 微控制器在内的专业工程工具的技能。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一款面向高中生的开源、低成本、轻量级机械臂设计项目，旨在通过全栈工程实践提升学生机械设计、机电一体化和编程能力。
AI.motivation: 随着开源软件普及和硬件成本降低，高中机器人课外活动需求增长，但现有资源门槛较高，需开发适合高中生的实践教育工具。
AI.method: 采用CAD建模（支持3D打印）、详细电路图设计、Arduino控制器及开源代码包，提供完整物料清单和装配指南，结合机械设计、机电控制与编程教学。
AI.result: 高中生通过项目可完整复现机械臂，掌握SolidWorks等专业工具使用，实现跨学科知识整合，获得系统工程开发经验。
AI.conclusion: 该项目验证了开源硬件平台在高中STEM教育中的可行性，为项目式学习提供了可复用的工程实践框架。

authors_text: Jan Kocoń,Igor Cichecki,Oliwier Kaszyca,Mateusz Kochanek,Dominika Szydło,Joanna Baran,Julita Bielaniewicz,Marcin Gruza,Arkadiusz Janz,Kamil Kanclerz,Anna Kocoń,Bartłomiej Koptyra,Wiktoria Mieleszczenko-Kowszewicz,Piotr Miłkowski,Marcin Oleksy,Maciej Piasecki,Łukasz Radliński,Konrad Wojtasik,Stanisław Woźniak,Przemysław Kazienko
title: ChatGPT: Jack of all trades, master of none
title_zh: ChatGPT：万事通，一无是处
abstract: OpenAI has released the Chat Generative Pre-trained Transformer (ChatGPT) and revolutionized the approach in artificial intelligence to human-model interaction. Several publications on ChatGPT evaluation test its effectiveness on well-known natural language processing (NLP) tasks. However, the existing studies are mostly non-automated and tested on a very limited scale. In this work, we examined ChatGPT's capabilities on 25 diverse analytical NLP tasks, most of them subjective even to humans, such as sentiment analysis, emotion recognition, offensiveness, and stance detection. In contrast, the other tasks require more objective reasoning like word sense disambiguation, linguistic acceptability, and question answering. We also evaluated GPT-4 model on five selected subsets of NLP tasks. We automated ChatGPT and GPT-4 prompting process and analyzed more than 49k responses. Our comparison of its results with available State-of-the-Art (SOTA) solutions showed that the average loss in quality of the ChatGPT model was about 25% for zero-shot and few-shot evaluation. For GPT-4 model, a loss for semantic tasks is significantly lower than for ChatGPT. We showed that the more difficult the task (lower SOTA performance), the higher the ChatGPT loss. It especially refers to pragmatic NLP problems like emotion recognition. We also tested the ability to personalize ChatGPT responses for selected subjective tasks via Random Contextual Few-Shot Personalization, and we obtained significantly better user-based predictions. Additional qualitative analysis revealed a ChatGPT bias, most likely due to the rules imposed on human trainers by OpenAI. Our results provide the basis for a fundamental discussion of whether the high quality of recent predictive NLP models can indicate a tool's usefulness to society and how the learning and validation procedures for such systems should be established.
summary: OpenAI has released the Chat Generative Pre-trained Transformer (ChatGPT) and revolutionized the approach in artificial intelligence to human-model interaction. Several publications on ChatGPT evaluation test its effectiveness on well-known natural language processing (NLP) tasks. However, the existing studies are mostly non-automated and tested on a very limited scale. In this work, we examined ChatGPT's capabilities on 25 diverse analytical NLP tasks, most of them subjective even to humans, such as sentiment analysis, emotion recognition, offensiveness, and stance detection. In contrast, the other tasks require more objective reasoning like word sense disambiguation, linguistic acceptability, and question answering. We also evaluated GPT-4 model on five selected subsets of NLP tasks. We automated ChatGPT and GPT-4 prompting process and analyzed more than 49k responses. Our comparison of its results with available State-of-the-Art (SOTA) solutions showed that the average loss in quality of the ChatGPT model was about 25% for zero-shot and few-shot evaluation. For GPT-4 model, a loss for semantic tasks is significantly lower than for ChatGPT. We showed that the more difficult the task (lower SOTA performance), the higher the ChatGPT loss. It especially refers to pragmatic NLP problems like emotion recognition. We also tested the ability to personalize ChatGPT responses for selected subjective tasks via Random Contextual Few-Shot Personalization, and we obtained significantly better user-based predictions. Additional qualitative analysis revealed a ChatGPT bias, most likely due to the rules imposed on human trainers by OpenAI. Our results provide the basis for a fundamental discussion of whether the high quality of recent predictive NLP models can indicate a tool's usefulness to society and how the learning and validation procedures for such systems should be established.
abstract_zh: OpenAI 发布了聊天生成预训练 Transformer (ChatGPT)，彻底改变了人工智能与人机交互的方法。一些关于 ChatGPT 评估的出版物测试了其在众所周知的自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务上的有效性。然而，现有的研究大多是非自动化的，并且测试规模非常有限。在这项工作中，我们检查了 ChatGPT 在 25 种不同的分析 NLP 任务上的能力，其中大多数任务甚至对人类来说也是主观的，例如情感分析、情绪识别、攻击性和立场检测。相比之下，其他任务需要更客观的推理，例如词义消歧、语言可接受性和问题回答。我们还在 NLP 任务的五个选定子集上评估了 GPT-4 模型。我们自动化了 ChatGPT 和 GPT-4 提示流程，并分析了超过 49,000 条回复。我们将其结果与现有的最先进 (SOTA) 解决方案进行比较，结果表明，对于零样本和少样本评估，ChatGPT 模型的平均质量损失约为 25%。对于 GPT-4 模型，语义任务的损失明显低于 ChatGPT。我们发现任务越困难（SOTA 性能越低），ChatGPT 损失就越高。它特别指的是诸如情感识别之类的实用 NLP 问题。我们还测试了通过随机上下文少样本个性化对选定的主观任务个性化 ChatGPT 响应的能力，并且我们获得了明显更好的基于用户的预测。额外的定性分析揭示了 ChatGPT 偏差，很可能是由于 OpenAI 对人类训练员施加的规则造成的。我们的结果为以下问题提供了基础讨论：近期预测 NLP 模型的高质量是否可以表明工具对社会的有用性以及如何建立此类系统的学习和验证程序。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了ChatGPT和GPT-4在25种多样化的自然语言处理（NLP）任务中的表现，涵盖主观和客观任务，并与现有最先进（SOTA）解决方案进行比较。
AI.motivation: 现有对ChatGPT的评估多为非自动化且规模有限，缺乏全面性。本文旨在通过自动化测试和大规模分析，揭示其真实能力与局限性。
AI.method: 自动化ChatGPT和GPT-4的提示流程，测试25种NLP任务（如情感分析、问答等），分析49,000多份响应，并与SOTA模型对比；同时通过随机上下文少样本个性化方法测试主观任务的个性化能力。
AI.result: ChatGPT在零样本和少样本评估中平均质量损失约25%，GPT-4在语义任务中表现优于ChatGPT。任务难度越高（SOTA性能越低），ChatGPT损失越大；个性化方法显著提升用户预测效果，但存在因OpenAI训练规则导致的偏见。
AI.conclusion: 高预测质量未必等同于社会实用性，需重新审视此类模型的学习与验证流程，并关注训练规则对模型偏见的影响。

search_text: ChatGPT: Jack of all trades, master of none ChatGPT：万事通，一无是处 OpenAI has released the Chat Generative Pre-trained Transformer (ChatGPT) and revolutionized the approach in artificial intelligence to human-model interaction. Several publications on ChatGPT evaluation test its effectiveness on well-known natural language processing (NLP) tasks. However, the existing studies are mostly non-automated and tested on a very limited scale. In this work, we examined ChatGPT's capabilities on 25 diverse analytical NLP tasks, most of them subjective even to humans, such as sentiment analysis, emotion recognition, offensiveness, and stance detection. In contrast, the other tasks require more objective reasoning like word sense disambiguation, linguistic acceptability, and question answering. We also evaluated GPT-4 model on five selected subsets of NLP tasks. We automated ChatGPT and GPT-4 prompting process and analyzed more than 49k responses. Our comparison of its results with available State-of-the-Art (SOTA) solutions showed that the average loss in quality of the ChatGPT model was about 25% for zero-shot and few-shot evaluation. For GPT-4 model, a loss for semantic tasks is significantly lower than for ChatGPT. We showed that the more difficult the task (lower SOTA performance), the higher the ChatGPT loss. It especially refers to pragmatic NLP problems like emotion recognition. We also tested the ability to personalize ChatGPT responses for selected subjective tasks via Random Contextual Few-Shot Personalization, and we obtained significantly better user-based predictions. Additional qualitative analysis revealed a ChatGPT bias, most likely due to the rules imposed on human trainers by OpenAI. Our results provide the basis for a fundamental discussion of whether the high quality of recent predictive NLP models can indicate a tool's usefulness to society and how the learning and validation procedures for such systems should be established. authors_text: Leonardo Rossi,Vittorio Bernuzzi,Tomaso Fontanini,Massimo Bertozzi,Andrea Prati
title: Memory-augmented Online Video Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 内存增强在线视频异常检测
abstract: The ability to understand the surrounding scene is of paramount importance for Autonomous Vehicles (AVs). This paper presents a system capable to work in an online fashion, giving an immediate response to the arise of anomalies surrounding the AV, exploiting only the videos captured by a dash-mounted camera. Our architecture, called MOVAD, relies on two main modules: a Short-Term Memory Module to extract information related to the ongoing action, implemented by a Video Swin Transformer (VST), and a Long-Term Memory Module injected inside the classifier that considers also remote past information and action context thanks to the use of a Long-Short Term Memory (LSTM) network. The strengths of MOVAD are not only linked to its excellent performance, but also to its straightforward and modular architecture, trained in a end-to-end fashion with only RGB frames with as less assumptions as possible, which makes it easy to implement and play with. We evaluated the performance of our method on Detection of Traffic Anomaly (DoTA) dataset, a challenging collection of dash-mounted camera videos of accidents. After an extensive ablation study, MOVAD is able to reach an AUC score of 82.17\%, surpassing the current state-of-the-art by +2.87 AUC. Our code will be available on https://github.com/IMPLabUniPr/movad/tree/movad_vad
summary: The ability to understand the surrounding scene is of paramount importance for Autonomous Vehicles (AVs). This paper presents a system capable to work in an online fashion, giving an immediate response to the arise of anomalies surrounding the AV, exploiting only the videos captured by a dash-mounted camera. Our architecture, called MOVAD, relies on two main modules: a Short-Term Memory Module to extract information related to the ongoing action, implemented by a Video Swin Transformer (VST), and a Long-Term Memory Module injected inside the classifier that considers also remote past information and action context thanks to the use of a Long-Short Term Memory (LSTM) network. The strengths of MOVAD are not only linked to its excellent performance, but also to its straightforward and modular architecture, trained in a end-to-end fashion with only RGB frames with as less assumptions as possible, which makes it easy to implement and play with. We evaluated the performance of our method on Detection of Traffic Anomaly (DoTA) dataset, a challenging collection of dash-mounted camera videos of accidents. After an extensive ablation study, MOVAD is able to reach an AUC score of 82.17\%, surpassing the current state-of-the-art by +2.87 AUC. Our code will be available on https://github.com/IMPLabUniPr/movad/tree/movad_vad
abstract_zh: 了解周围场景的能力对于自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 至关重要。本文提出了一种能够以在线方式工作的系统，仅利用仪表板安装的摄像头捕获的视频，对自动驾驶汽车周围出现的异常情况做出立即响应。我们的架构称为 MOVAD，依赖于两个主要模块：一个短期记忆模块，用于提取与正在进行的动作相关的信息，由视频 Swin Transformer (VST) 实现；另一个是注入分类器内部的长期记忆模块，由于使用了长短期记忆 (LSTM) 网络，该模块还考虑了遥远的过去信息和动作上下文。 MOVAD 的优势不仅在于其卓越的性能，还在于其简单的模块化架构，仅使用 RGB 帧以端到端方式进行训练，假设尽可能少，这使得它易于实现和使用。我们评估了我们的方法在交通异常检测 (DoTA) 数据集上的性能，该数据集是一个具有挑战性的仪表板安装摄像头事故视频集合。经过广泛的消融研究，MOVAD 能够达到 82.17% 的 AUC 分数，比当前最先进的水平高出 +2.87 AUC。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/IMPLabUniPr/movad/tree/movad_vad 上提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于记忆增强的在线视频异常检测系统MOVAD，用于自动驾驶车辆实时检测周围环境中的异常情况。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需要实时理解周围环境以应对异常情况，现有方法存在依赖复杂假设或处理延迟的问题，因此需要一种在线处理、仅依赖摄像头视频且架构简单易用的异常检测系统。
AI.method: MOVAD架构包含短期记忆模块（使用Video Swin Transformer提取当前动作信息）和长期记忆模块（通过LSTM网络整合远程历史信息和动作上下文），采用端到端训练方式，仅依赖RGB帧进行检测。
AI.result: 在DoTA数据集上的实验显示，MOVAD的AUC达到82.17%，优于当前最先进的方法2.87个百分点。
AI.conclusion: MOVAD在性能和架构简洁性上均优于现有方法，且代码已开源，便于实际应用和进一步研究。

We evaluated the performance of our method on Detection of Traffic Anomaly (DoTA) dataset, a challenging collection of dash-mounted camera videos of accidents. After an extensive ablation study, MOVAD is able to reach an AUC score of 82.17\%, surpassing the current state-of-the-art by +2.87 AUC. Our code will be available on https://github.com/IMPLabUniPr/movad/tree/movad_vad 了解周围场景的能力对于自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 至关重要。本文提出了一种能够以在线方式工作的系统，仅利用仪表板安装的摄像头捕获的视频，对自动驾驶汽车周围出现的异常情况做出立即响应。我们的架构称为 MOVAD，依赖于两个主要模块：一个短期记忆模块，用于提取与正在进行的动作相关的信息，由视频 Swin Transformer (VST) 实现；另一个是注入分类器内部的长期记忆模块，由于使用了长短期记忆 (LSTM) 网络，该模块还考虑了遥远的过去信息和动作上下文。 MOVAD 的优势不仅在于其卓越的性能，还在于其简单的模块化架构，仅使用 RGB 帧以端到端方式进行训练，假设尽可能少，这使得它易于实现和使用。我们评估了我们的方法在交通异常检测 (DoTA) 数据集上的性能，该数据集是一个具有挑战性的仪表板安装摄像头事故视频集合。经过广泛的消融研究，MOVAD 能够达到 82.17% 的 AUC 分数，比当前最先进的水平高出 +2.87 AUC。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/IMPLabUniPr/movad/tree/movad_vad 上提供 本文提出了一种基于记忆增强的在线视频异常检测系统MOVAD，用于自动驾驶车辆实时检测周围环境中的异常情况。 Leonardo Rossi,Vittorio Bernuzzi,Tomaso Fontanini,Massimo Bertozzi,Andrea Prati cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Tobias Kalb,Niket Ahuja,Jingxing Zhou,Jürgen Beyerer
title: Effects of Architectures on Continual Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 架构对持续语义分割的影响
abstract: Research in the field of Continual Semantic Segmentation is mainly investigating novel learning algorithms to overcome catastrophic forgetting of neural networks. Most recent publications have focused on improving learning algorithms without distinguishing effects caused by the choice of neural architecture.Therefore, we study how the choice of neural network architecture affects catastrophic forgetting in class- and domain-incremental semantic segmentation. Specifically, we compare the well-researched CNNs to recently proposed Transformers and Hybrid architectures, as well as the impact of the choice of novel normalization layers and different decoder heads. We find that traditional CNNs like ResNet have high plasticity but low stability, while transformer architectures are much more stable. When the inductive biases of CNN architectures are combined with transformers in hybrid architectures, it leads to higher plasticity and stability. The stability of these models can be explained by their ability to learn general features that are robust against distribution shifts. Experiments with different normalization layers show that Continual Normalization achieves the best trade-off in terms of adaptability and stability of the model. In the class-incremental setting, the choice of the normalization layer has much less impact. Our experiments suggest that the right choice of architecture can significantly reduce forgetting even with naive fine-tuning and confirm that for real-world applications, the architecture is an important factor in designing a continual learning model.
summary: Research in the field of Continual Semantic Segmentation is mainly investigating novel learning algorithms to overcome catastrophic forgetting of neural networks. Most recent publications have focused on improving learning algorithms without distinguishing effects caused by the choice of neural architecture.Therefore, we study how the choice of neural network architecture affects catastrophic forgetting in class- and domain-incremental semantic segmentation. Specifically, we compare the well-researched CNNs to recently proposed Transformers and Hybrid architectures, as well as the impact of the choice of novel normalization layers and different decoder heads. We find that traditional CNNs like ResNet have high plasticity but low stability, while transformer architectures are much more stable. When the inductive biases of CNN architectures are combined with transformers in hybrid architectures, it leads to higher plasticity and stability. The stability of these models can be explained by their ability to learn general features that are robust against distribution shifts. Experiments with different normalization layers show that Continual Normalization achieves the best trade-off in terms of adaptability and stability of the model. In the class-incremental setting, the choice of the normalization layer has much less impact. Our experiments suggest that the right choice of architecture can significantly reduce forgetting even with naive fine-tuning and confirm that for real-world applications, the architecture is an important factor in designing a continual learning model.
abstract_zh: 连续语义分割领域的研究主要是研究新的学习算法来克服神经网络的灾难性遗忘。最近的出版物都专注于改进学习算法，而不区分神经网络架构的选择所造成的影响。因此，我们研究神经网络架构的选择如何影响类和领域增量语义分割中的灾难性遗忘。具体来说，我们将经过充分研究的 CNN 与最近提出的 Transformer 和混合架构进行比较，以及选择新颖的归一化层和不同解码器头的影响。我们发现像 ResNet 这样的传统 CNN 具有高可塑性但稳定性低，而 Transformer 架构则稳定得多。当 CNN 架构的归纳偏置与混合架构中的变压器相结合时，会带来更高的可塑性和稳定性。这些模型的稳定性可以通过它们学习对分布变化具有鲁棒性的一般特征的能力来解释。不同归一化层的实验表明，连续归一化在模型的适应性和稳定性方面实现了最佳权衡。在类增量设置中，归一化层的选择影响要小得多。我们的实验表明，即使进行简单的微调，正确选择架构也可以显着减少遗忘，并证实对于现实世界的应用程序，架构是设计持续学习模型的重要因素。

AI.tldr: 本文研究不同神经网络架构对持续语义分割中灾难性遗忘的影响，比较了CNN、Transformer和混合架构的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注学习算法改进，而忽视了网络架构选择对持续学习效果的影响，需明确架构设计在减少遗忘中的作用。
AI.method: 通过对比实验分析CNN（如ResNet）、Transformer及混合架构在类别和领域增量分割中的表现，评估归一化层和解码器头设计的影响。
AI.result: 传统CNN具有高可塑性但稳定性差，Transformer更稳定，混合架构结合两者优势；Continual Normalization层在适应性与稳定性上表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 合理选择网络架构可显著降低持续学习中的遗忘问题，架构设计是构建实际应用模型的关键因素。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究不同神经网络架构对持续语义分割中灾难性遗忘的影响，比较了CNN、Transformer和混合架构的性能差异。

authors_text: Yuhong Deng,Xiaofeng Guo,Yixuan Wei,Kai Lu,Bin Fang,Di Guo,Huaping Liu,Fuchun Sun
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Robotic Pushing and Picking in Cluttered Environment
title_zh: 杂乱环境中机器人推拣的深度强化学习
comment: has been accepted by IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems 2019
comments: has been accepted by IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems 2019
abstract: In this paper, a novel robotic grasping system is established to automatically pick up objects in cluttered scenes. A composite robotic hand composed of a suction cup and a gripper is designed for grasping the object stably. The suction cup is used for lifting the object from the clutter first and the gripper for grasping the object accordingly. We utilize the affordance map to provide pixel-wise lifting point candidates for the suction cup. To obtain a good affordance map, the active exploration mechanism is introduced to the system. An effective metric is designed to calculate the reward for the current affordance map, and a deep Q-Network (DQN) is employed to guide the robotic hand to actively explore the environment until the generated affordance map is suitable for grasping. Experimental results have demonstrated that the proposed robotic grasping system is able to greatly increase the success rate of the robotic grasping in cluttered scenes.
summary: In this paper, a novel robotic grasping system is established to automatically pick up objects in cluttered scenes. A composite robotic hand composed of a suction cup and a gripper is designed for grasping the object stably. The suction cup is used for lifting the object from the clutter first and the gripper for grasping the object accordingly. We utilize the affordance map to provide pixel-wise lifting point candidates for the suction cup. To obtain a good affordance map, the active exploration mechanism is introduced to the system. An effective metric is designed to calculate the reward for the current affordance map, and a deep Q-Network (DQN) is employed to guide the robotic hand to actively explore the environment until the generated affordance map is suitable for grasping. Experimental results have demonstrated that the proposed robotic grasping system is able to greatly increase the success rate of the robotic grasping in cluttered scenes.
abstract_zh: 本文建立了一种新颖的机器人抓取系统，可以在杂乱的场景中自动拾取物体。设计了一种由吸盘和夹​​具组成的复合机械手，用于稳定地抓取物体。吸盘首先用于将物体从杂乱的物体中吸起，然后夹具用于相应地抓取物体。我们利用可供性图为吸盘提供像素级的候选提升点。为了获得良好的可供图，系统引入了主动探索机制。设计了一个有效的度量来计算当前可供性图的奖励，并采用深度Q网络（DQN）来引导机械手主动探索环境，直到生成的可供性图适合抓取。实验结果表明，所提出的机器人抓取系统能够大大提高机器人在杂乱场景中抓取的成功率。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度强化学习的机器人抓取系统，用于在杂乱环境中稳定抓取物体
AI.motivation: 传统抓取方法在杂乱场景中成功率低，需更智能的解决方案
AI.method: 设计复合机械手结合吸盘和夹爪，利用affordance map与主动探索机制及DQN算法优化抓取策略
AI.result: 实验表明系统显著提升杂乱场景中的抓取成功率
AI.conclusion: 提出的新系统有效提升机器人在复杂杂乱环境中的抓取能力

authors_text: Feng Li,Zeyu Xiong,Xinyi Li,Mingming Fan
title: CoPracTter: Toward Integrating Personalized Practice Scenarios, Timely Feedback and Social Support into An Online Support Tool for Coping with Stuttering in China
title_zh: CoPracTter：将个性化练习场景、及时反馈和社会支持融入中国应对口吃的在线支持工具
comment: Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23), April 23--28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany
comments: Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23), April 23--28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany
abstract: Stuttering is a speech disorder influencing over 70 million people worldwide, including 13 million in China. It causes low self-esteem among other detrimental effects on people who stutter (PwS). Although prior work has explored approaches to assist PwS, they primarily focused on western contexts. In our formative study, we found unique practices and challenges among Chinese PwS. We then iteratively designed an online tool, CoPracTter, to support Chinese PwS practicing speaking fluency with 1) targeted stress-inducing practice scenarios, 2) real-time speech indicators, and 3) personalized timely feedback from the community. We further conducted a seven-day deployment study (N=11) to understand how participants utilized these key features. To our knowledge, it is the first time such a prototype was designed and tested for a long time with multiple PwS participants online simultaneously. Results indicate that personalized practice with targeted scenarios and timely feedback from a supportive community assisted PwS in speaking fluently, staying positive, and facing similar real-life circumstances.
summary: Stuttering is a speech disorder influencing over 70 million people worldwide, including 13 million in China. It causes low self-esteem among other detrimental effects on people who stutter (PwS). Although prior work has explored approaches to assist PwS, they primarily focused on western contexts. In our formative study, we found unique practices and challenges among Chinese PwS. We then iteratively designed an online tool, CoPracTter, to support Chinese PwS practicing speaking fluency with 1) targeted stress-inducing practice scenarios, 2) real-time speech indicators, and 3) personalized timely feedback from the community. We further conducted a seven-day deployment study (N=11) to understand how participants utilized these key features. To our knowledge, it is the first time such a prototype was designed and tested for a long time with multiple PwS participants online simultaneously. Results indicate that personalized practice with targeted scenarios and timely feedback from a supportive community assisted PwS in speaking fluently, staying positive, and facing similar real-life circumstances.
abstract_zh: 口吃是一种言语障碍，影响着全球超过 7000 万人，其中中国有 1300 万人。它会导致口吃者的自尊心降低以及其他有害影响（PwS）。尽管之前的工作已经探索了辅助 PwS 的方法，但它们主要关注西方环境。在我们的形成性研究中，我们发现了中国 PwS 的独特实践和挑战。然后，我们迭代设计了一个在线工具 CoPracTter，通过 1）有针对性的压力诱导练习场景，2）实时言语指示器，以及 3）来自社区的个性化及时反馈来支持中文 PwS 练习口语流利性。我们进一步进行了为期 7 天的部署研究 (N=11)，以了解参与者如何利用这些关键功能。据我们所知，这是第一次设计这样的原型并在多个 PwS 参与者同时在线的情况下进行长时间测试。结果表明，针对目标场景的个性化练习以及来自支持社区的及时反馈有助于 PwS 流利地说话、保持积极态度并面对类似的现实生活情况。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一款名为CoPracTter的在线工具，旨在为中国口吃者提供个性化练习场景、实时反馈及社交支持，以提升其言语流畅度和自信心。
AI.motivation: 现有针对口吃者的干预措施多基于西方语境，忽视了中国口吃者独特的实践需求与挑战，需开发适配本土文化的在线支持工具。
AI.method: 通过形成性研究识别中国口吃者需求，迭代设计包含压力场景模拟、实时语音指标及社区即时反馈的CoPracTter工具，并开展为期七天的11人部署研究。
AI.result: 参与者通过工具的个性化练习与社区支持，提升了言语流畅度、积极情绪及应对现实场景的能力，验证了工具的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 整合个性化练习、实时反馈与社交支持的在线工具可有效帮助中国口吃者改善言语障碍，未来需扩大样本验证长期效果。
