search_text: Predicting Privacy Preferences for Smart Devices as Norms 预测智能设备的隐私偏好作为规范 Smart devices, such as smart speakers, are becoming ubiquitous, and users expect these devices to act in accordance with their preferences. In particular, since these devices gather and manage personal data, users expect them to adhere to their privacy preferences. However, the current approach of gathering these preferences consists in asking the users directly, which usually triggers automatic responses failing to capture their true preferences. In response, in this paper we present a collaborative filtering approach to predict user preferences as norms. These preference predictions can be readily adopted or can serve to assist users in determining their own preferences. Using a dataset of privacy preferences of smart assistant users, we test the accuracy of our predictions. 智能设备（例如智能音箱）正变得无处不在，用户希望这些设备能够按照自己的喜好行事。特别是，由于这些设备收集和管理个人数据，用户希望它们遵守自己的隐私偏好。然而，当前收集这些偏好的方法是直接询问用户，这通常会触发自动响应，无法捕获他们的真实偏好。作为回应，在本文中，我们提出了一种协作过滤方法来预测用户偏好作为规范。这些偏好预测可以很容易地被采用或者可以用来帮助用户确定他们自己的偏好。使用智能助理用户的隐私偏好数据集，我们测试了预测的准确性。 提出一种协同过滤方法预测智能设备用户的隐私偏好，以替代直接询问用户的方式。 Marc Serramia,William Seymour,Natalia Criado,Michael Luck cs.AI

authors_text: Yuya Takada,Tsuyoshi Kato
title: Multi-Target Tobit Models for Completing Water Quality Data
title_zh: 用于完成水质数据的多目标 Tobit 模型
abstract: Monitoring microbiological behaviors in water is crucial to manage public health risk from waterborne pathogens, although quantifying the concentrations of microbiological organisms in water is still challenging because concentrations of many pathogens in water samples may often be below the quantification limit, producing censoring data. To enable statistical analysis based on quantitative values, the true values of non-detected measurements are required to be estimated with high precision. Tobit model is a well-known linear regression model for analyzing censored data. One drawback of the Tobit model is that only the target variable is allowed to be censored. In this study, we devised a novel extension of the classical Tobit model, called the \emph{multi-target Tobit model}, to handle multiple censored variables simultaneously by introducing multiple target variables. For fitting the new model, a numerical stable optimization algorithm was developed based on elaborate theories. Experiments conducted using several real-world water quality datasets provided an evidence that estimating multiple columns jointly gains a great advantage over estimating them separately.
summary: Monitoring microbiological behaviors in water is crucial to manage public health risk from waterborne pathogens, although quantifying the concentrations of microbiological organisms in water is still challenging because concentrations of many pathogens in water samples may often be below the quantification limit, producing censoring data. To enable statistical analysis based on quantitative values, the true values of non-detected measurements are required to be estimated with high precision. Tobit model is a well-known linear regression model for analyzing censored data. One drawback of the Tobit model is that only the target variable is allowed to be censored. In this study, we devised a novel extension of the classical Tobit model, called the \emph{multi-target Tobit model}, to handle multiple censored variables simultaneously by introducing multiple target variables. For fitting the new model, a numerical stable optimization algorithm was developed based on elaborate theories. Experiments conducted using several real-world water quality datasets provided an evidence that estimating multiple columns jointly gains a great advantage over estimating them separately.
abstract_zh: 监测水中的微生物行为对于管理水传播病原体的公共卫生风险至关重要，尽管量化水中微生物的浓度仍然具有挑战性，因为水样中许多病原体的浓度通常可能低于量化限度，从而产生审查数据。为了能够基于定量值进行统计分析，需要高精度地估计未检测到的测量值的真实值。 Tobit 模型是一种著名的用于分析删失数据的线性回归模型。 Tobit 模型的一个缺点是只允许对目标变量进行审查。在这项研究中，我们设计了经典 Tobit 模型的一种新颖扩展，称为 \emph{多目标 Tobit 模型}，通过引入多个目标变量来同时处理多个审查变量。为了拟合新模型，基于详尽的理论开发了数值稳定优化算法。使用多个真实世界水质数据集进行的实验提供了证据，表明联合估计多个列比单独估计它们具有更大的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多目标Tobit模型，用于同时处理水质量数据中的多重删失变量，提高微生物浓度估计的精度。
AI.motivation: 水样中病原体浓度常低于检测限导致删失数据，传统Tobit模型仅支持单变量删失，难以满足多变量联合估计需求。
AI.method: 扩展经典Tobit模型为多目标形式，引入多个删失变量并开发数值稳定的优化算法进行参数估计。
AI.result: 实验表明，联合估计多列删失数据优于单独估计，显著提升水质量数据补全的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 多目标Tobit模型能有效处理多重删失数据，为水borne病原体风险评估提供更可靠的统计分析工具。

authors_text: Hisaichi Shibata,Soichiro Miki,Yuta Nakamura
title: Playing the Werewolf game with artificial intelligence for language understanding
title_zh: 用人工智能玩狼人游戏以进行语言理解
abstract: The Werewolf game is a social deduction game based on free natural language communication, in which players try to deceive others in order to survive. An important feature of this game is that a large portion of the conversations are false information, and the behavior of artificial intelligence (AI) in such a situation has not been widely investigated. The purpose of this study is to develop an AI agent that can play Werewolf through natural language conversations. First, we collected game logs from 15 human players. Next, we fine-tuned a Transformer-based pretrained language model to construct a value network that can predict a posterior probability of winning a game at any given phase of the game and given a candidate for the next action. We then developed an AI agent that can interact with humans and choose the best voting target on the basis of its probability from the value network. Lastly, we evaluated the performance of the agent by having it actually play the game with human players. We found that our AI agent, Deep Wolf, could play Werewolf as competitively as average human players in a villager or a betrayer role, whereas Deep Wolf was inferior to human players in a werewolf or a seer role. These results suggest that current language models have the capability to suspect what others are saying, tell a lie, or detect lies in conversations.
summary: The Werewolf game is a social deduction game based on free natural language communication, in which players try to deceive others in order to survive. An important feature of this game is that a large portion of the conversations are false information, and the behavior of artificial intelligence (AI) in such a situation has not been widely investigated. The purpose of this study is to develop an AI agent that can play Werewolf through natural language conversations. First, we collected game logs from 15 human players. Next, we fine-tuned a Transformer-based pretrained language model to construct a value network that can predict a posterior probability of winning a game at any given phase of the game and given a candidate for the next action. We then developed an AI agent that can interact with humans and choose the best voting target on the basis of its probability from the value network. Lastly, we evaluated the performance of the agent by having it actually play the game with human players. We found that our AI agent, Deep Wolf, could play Werewolf as competitively as average human players in a villager or a betrayer role, whereas Deep Wolf was inferior to human players in a werewolf or a seer role. These results suggest that current language models have the capability to suspect what others are saying, tell a lie, or detect lies in conversations.
abstract_zh: 狼人杀游戏是一款基于自由自然语言交流的社交演绎游戏，玩家为了生存而试图欺骗他人。这款游戏的一个重要特点是，很大一部分对话都是虚假信息，而人工智能（AI）在这种情况下的行为尚未得到广泛研究。这项研究的目的是开发一种可以通过自然语言对话玩狼人杀的人工智能代理。首先，我们收集了 15 名人类玩家的游戏日志。接下来，我们对基于 Transformer 的预训练语言模型进行微调，以构建一个价值网络，该网络可以预测在游戏的任何给定阶段赢得游戏的后验概率，并给出下一步行动的候选者。然后，我们开发了一个人工智能代理，它可以与人类交互，并根据价值网络中的概率选择最佳投票目标。最后，我们通过让代理实际与人类玩家一起玩游戏来评估代理的性能。我们发现，我们的 AI 代理 Deep Wolf 在扮演狼人时可以与普通人类玩家一样有竞争力地扮演村民或背叛者角色，而 Deep Wolf 在扮演狼人或先知角色时则不如人类玩家。这些结果表明，当前的语言模型有能力怀疑别人在说什么、说谎或检测对话中的谎言。

AI.tldr: 开发一个能够通过自然语言对话进行狼人杀游戏的AI代理。
AI.motivation: 探索AI在处理虚假信息和自然语言理解方面的能力，开发能胜任该游戏的AI代理。
AI.method: 收集人类玩家游戏日志，微调Transformer模型构建价值网络预测获胜概率，并开发AI代理根据概率选择投票目标。
AI.result: AI代理Deep Wolf在村民和背叛者角色上表现与人类相当，但在狼人和预言家角色上表现较差。
AI.conclusion: 当前语言模型具备在对话中怀疑、说谎或检测谎言的能力，为AI在复杂社交场景中的应用提供了新方向。

ai_content.motivation: 探索AI在处理虚假信息和自然语言理解方面的能力，开发能胜任该游戏的AI代理。

Lastly, we evaluated the performance of the agent by having it actually play the game with human players. We found that our AI agent, Deep Wolf, could play Werewolf as competitively as average human players in a villager or a betrayer role, whereas Deep Wolf was inferior to human players in a werewolf or a seer role. These results suggest that current language models have the capability to suspect what others are saying, tell a lie, or detect lies in conversations. 狼人杀游戏是一款基于自由自然语言交流的社交演绎游戏，玩家为了生存而试图欺骗他人。这款游戏的一个重要特点是，很大一部分对话都是虚假信息，而人工智能（AI）在这种情况下的行为尚未得到广泛研究。这项研究的目的是开发一种可以通过自然语言对话玩狼人杀的人工智能代理。首先，我们收集了 15 名人类玩家的游戏日志。接下来，我们对基于 Transformer 的预训练语言模型进行微调，以构建一个价值网络，该网络可以预测在游戏的任何给定阶段赢得游戏的后验概率，并给出下一步行动的候选者。然后，我们开发了一个人工智能代理，它可以与人类交互，并根据价值网络中的概率选择最佳投票目标。最后，我们通过让代理实际与人类玩家一起玩游戏来评估代理的性能。我们发现，我们的 AI 代理 Deep Wolf 在扮演狼人时可以与普通人类玩家一样有竞争力地扮演村民或背叛者角色，而 Deep Wolf 在扮演狼人或先知角色时则不如人类玩家。这些结果表明，当前的语言模型有能力怀疑别人在说什么、说谎或检测对话中的谎言。 开发一个能够通过自然语言对话进行狼人杀游戏的AI代理。 Hisaichi Shibata,Soichiro Miki,Yuta Nakamura cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Malte Pedersen,Daniel Lehotský,Ivan Nikolov,Thomas B. Moeslund
title: BrackishMOT: The Brackish Multi-Object Tracking Dataset
title_zh: BrackishMOT：Brackish 多目标跟踪数据集
abstract: There exist no publicly available annotated underwater multi-object tracking (MOT) datasets captured in turbid environments. To remedy this we propose the BrackishMOT dataset with focus on tracking schools of small fish, which is a notoriously difficult MOT task. BrackishMOT consists of 98 sequences captured in the wild. Alongside the novel dataset, we present baseline results by training a state-of-the-art tracker. Additionally, we propose a framework for creating synthetic sequences in order to expand the dataset. The framework consists of animated fish models and realistic underwater environments. We analyse the effects of including synthetic data during training and show that a combination of real and synthetic underwater training data can enhance tracking performance. Links to code and data can be found at https://www.vap.aau.dk/brackishmot
summary: There exist no publicly available annotated underwater multi-object tracking (MOT) datasets captured in turbid environments. To remedy this we propose the BrackishMOT dataset with focus on tracking schools of small fish, which is a notoriously difficult MOT task. BrackishMOT consists of 98 sequences captured in the wild. Alongside the novel dataset, we present baseline results by training a state-of-the-art tracker. Additionally, we propose a framework for creating synthetic sequences in order to expand the dataset. The framework consists of animated fish models and realistic underwater environments. We analyse the effects of including synthetic data during training and show that a combination of real and synthetic underwater training data can enhance tracking performance. Links to code and data can be found at https://www.vap.aau.dk/brackishmot
abstract_zh: 不存在在浑浊环境中捕获的公开可用的带注释的水下多目标跟踪（MOT）数据集。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 BrackishMOT 数据集，重点关注跟踪小鱼群，这是一项非常困难的 MOT 任务。 BrackishMOT 由在野外捕获的 98 个序列组成。除了新颖的数据集之外，我们还通过训练最先进的跟踪器来提供基线结果。此外，我们提出了一个用于创建合成序列的框架，以扩展数据集。该框架由动画鱼模型和逼真的水下环境组成。我们分析了训练期间包含合成数据的效果，并表明真实和合成水下训练数据的结合可以提高跟踪性能。代码和数据的链接可以在 https://www.vap.aau.dk/brackishmot 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出BrackishMOT数据集，专注于解决浑浊水下环境中小型鱼群的多目标跟踪难题，并通过合成数据增强跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有公开的水下多目标跟踪数据集缺乏浑浊环境下的标注，而小型鱼群跟踪是极具挑战性的任务，亟需新数据集和方法支持。
AI.method: 采集98段野外真实水下视频，构建包含动态鱼模型和真实水下环境的合成数据生成框架，并训练先进跟踪器验证真实与合成数据联合训练的效果。
AI.result: 基线跟踪器在数据集上取得初步结果，合成数据与真实数据结合训练显著提升了复杂水下场景的跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: BrackishMOT数据集和合成框架为水下多目标跟踪研究提供了新资源，验证了混合数据训练在提升跟踪鲁棒性中的有效性。

authors_text: Woo-Jeong Baek,Torsten Kröger
title: Safety Evaluation of Robot Systems via Uncertainty Quantification
title_zh: 通过不确定性量化对机器人系统进行安全评估
comment: accepted for publication at IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: accepted for publication at IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: In this paper, we present an approach for quantifying the propagated uncertainty of robot systems in an online and data-driven manner. Especially in Human-Robot Collaboration, keeping track of the safety compliance during run time is essential: Misclassifying dangerous situations as safe might result in severe accidents. According to official regulations (eg, ISO standards), safety in industrial robot applications depends on critical parameters, such as the distance and relative velocity between humans and robots. However, safety can only be assured given a measure for the reliability of these parameters. While different risk detection and mitigation approaches exist in literature, a measure that can be used to evaluate safety limits online, and succinctly implies whether a situation is safe or dangerous, is missing to date. Motivated by this, we introduce a generalizable method for calculating the propagated measurement uncertainty of arbitrary parameters, that captures the accumulated uncertainty originating from sensory devices and environmental disturbances of the system. To show that our approach delivers correct results, we perform validation experiments in simulation. In addition, we employ our method in two real-world settings and demonstrate how quantifying the propagated uncertainty of critical parameters facilitates assessing safety online in Human-Robot Collaboration.
summary: In this paper, we present an approach for quantifying the propagated uncertainty of robot systems in an online and data-driven manner. Especially in Human-Robot Collaboration, keeping track of the safety compliance during run time is essential: Misclassifying dangerous situations as safe might result in severe accidents. According to official regulations (eg, ISO standards), safety in industrial robot applications depends on critical parameters, such as the distance and relative velocity between humans and robots. However, safety can only be assured given a measure for the reliability of these parameters. While different risk detection and mitigation approaches exist in literature, a measure that can be used to evaluate safety limits online, and succinctly implies whether a situation is safe or dangerous, is missing to date. Motivated by this, we introduce a generalizable method for calculating the propagated measurement uncertainty of arbitrary parameters, that captures the accumulated uncertainty originating from sensory devices and environmental disturbances of the system. To show that our approach delivers correct results, we perform validation experiments in simulation. In addition, we employ our method in two real-world settings and demonstrate how quantifying the propagated uncertainty of critical parameters facilitates assessing safety online in Human-Robot Collaboration.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种以在线和数据驱动的方式量化机器人系统传播不确定性的方法。特别是在人机协作中，跟踪运行时的安全合规性至关重要：将危险情况错误地分类为安全可能会导致严重事故。根据官方规定（例如ISO标准），工业机器人应用的安全性取决于关键参数，例如人与机器人之间的距离和相对速度。然而，只有对这些参数的可靠性采取措施才能保证安全。虽然文献中存在不同的风险检测和缓解方法，但迄今为止缺少一种可用于在线评估安全限制并简洁地暗示情况是安全还是危险的措施。受此启发，我们引入了一种通用方法来计算任意参数的传播测量不确定度，该方法捕获源自系统的传感设备和环境干扰的累积不确定度。为了证明我们的方法提供了正确的结果，我们在模拟中进行了验证实验。此外，我们在两个现实环境中采用我们的方法，并演示如何量化关键参数的传播不确定性有助于在线评估人机协作中的安全性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在线数据驱动方法量化机器人系统传播不确定性，用于实时安全评估
AI.motivation: 现有方法缺乏在线评估安全限制的指标，导致无法准确判断危险情况，需可靠的安全参数度量保障人机协作安全
AI.method: 开发通用不确定性计算框架，量化任意参数的传播不确定性，整合传感器误差与环境扰动影响
AI.result: 通过仿真验证与两个实际场景测试，证明方法能准确评估安全状态并实时检测危险情况
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升人机协作系统安全性，为实时安全评估提供可靠不确定性量化依据

authors_text: Benjamin Bergougnoux,Tuukka Korhonen,Igor Razgon
title: New Width Parameters for Independent Set: One-sided-mim-width and Neighbor-depth
title_zh: 独立集的新宽度参数：单侧最小宽度和邻居深度
comment: 26 pages, 1 figure. This is the full version of an extended abstract that will appear in WG2023
comments: 26 pages, 1 figure. This is the full version of an extended abstract that will appear in WG2023
abstract: We study the tractability of the maximum independent set problem from the viewpoint of graph width parameters, with the goal of defining a width parameter that is as general as possible and allows to solve independent set in polynomial-time on graphs where the parameter is bounded. We introduce two new graph width parameters: one-sided maximum induced matching-width (o-mim-width) and neighbor-depth. O-mim-width is a graph parameter that is more general than the known parameters mim-width and tree-independence number, and we show that independent set and feedback vertex set can be solved in polynomial-time given a decomposition with bounded o-mim-width. O-mim-width is the first width parameter that gives a common generalization of chordal graphs and graphs of bounded clique-width in terms of tractability of these problems. The parameter o-mim-width, as well as the related parameters mim-width and sim-width, have the limitation that no algorithms are known to compute bounded-width decompositions in polynomial-time. To partially resolve this limitation, we introduce the parameter neighbor-depth. We show that given a graph of neighbor-depth $k$, independent set can be solved in time $n^{O(k)}$ even without knowing a corresponding decomposition. We also show that neighbor-depth is bounded by a polylogarithmic function on the number of vertices on large classes of graphs, including graphs of bounded o-mim-width, and more generally graphs of bounded sim-width, giving a quasipolynomial-time algorithm for independent set on these graph classes. This resolves an open problem asked by Kang, Kwon, Strømme, and Telle [TCS 2017].

The parameter o-mim-width, as well as the related parameters mim-width and sim-width, have the limitation that no algorithms are known to compute bounded-width decompositions in polynomial-time. To partially resolve this limitation, we introduce the parameter neighbor-depth. We show that given a graph of neighbor-depth $k$, independent set can be solved in time $n^{O(k)}$ even without knowing a corresponding decomposition. We also show that neighbor-depth is bounded by a polylogarithmic function on the number of vertices on large classes of graphs, including graphs of bounded o-mim-width, and more generally graphs of bounded sim-width, giving a quasipolynomial-time algorithm for independent set on these graph classes. This resolves an open problem asked by Kang, Kwon, Strømme, and Telle [TCS 2017].
abstract_zh: 我们从图宽度参数的角度研究最大独立集问题的可处理性，目标是定义一个尽可能通用的宽度参数，并允许在参数有界的图上以多项式时间求解独立集。我们引入了两个新的图宽度参数：单侧最大诱导匹配宽度（o-mim-width）和邻居深度。 O-mim-width 是一个比已知参数 mim-width 和树独立数更通用的图参数，我们证明，在给定有界 o-mim-width 分解的情况下，独立集和反馈顶点集可以在多项式时间内求解。 O-mim-width 是第一个宽度参数，它在这些问题的可处理性方面给出了弦图和有界团宽度图的通用概括。参数 o-mim-width 以及相关参数 mim-width 和 sim-width 具有以下限制：尚无已知算法可以在多项式时间内计算有界宽度分解。为了部分解决这个限制，我们引入了参数邻居深度。我们证明，给定邻居深度 $k$ 的图，即使不知道相应的分解，独立集也可以在 $n^{O(k)}$ 时间内求解。我们还表明，邻居深度受到大类图上顶点数量的多对数函数的限制，包括有界 o-mim-width 的图，以及更一般的有界 sim-width 的图，给出了这些图类上独立集的拟多项式时间算法。这解决了 Kang、Kwon、Strømme 和 Telle [TCS 2017] 提出的一个悬而未决的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文引入两种新的图宽参数（one-sided-mim-width和neighbor-depth），以解决最大独立集问题的可解性，并展示其在多项式时间内的算法效率。
AI.motivation: 现有图宽参数（如mim-width）在解决独立集问题时存在局限性，需定义更通用的参数以覆盖更广的图类并实现高效算法。
AI.method: 提出one-sided-mim-width（o-mim-width）和neighbor-depth参数，证明其比现有参数更通用，并设计基于这些参数的多项式时间算法及分解方法。
AI.result: 独立集和反馈顶点集可在o-mim-width有界图中多项式时间内求解；neighbor-depth参数允许在无需分解的情况下以n^{O(k)}时间解决独立集问题，并在大规模图类中实现准多项式时间算法。
AI.conclusion: o-mim-width和neighbor-depth参数为独立集问题提供了更广泛的可解性框架，解决了之前未解决的开放性问题，推动了图宽参数理论的发展。

search_text: New Width Parameters for Independent Set: One-sided-mim-width and Neighbor-depth 独立集的新宽度参数：单侧最小宽度和邻居深度 We study the tractability of the maximum independent set problem from the viewpoint of graph width parameters, with the goal of defining a width parameter that is as general as possible and allows to solve independent set in polynomial-time on graphs where the parameter is bounded. We introduce two new graph width parameters: one-sided maximum induced matching-width (o-mim-width) and neighbor-depth. O-mim-width is a graph parameter that is more general than the known parameters mim-width and tree-independence number, and we show that independent set and feedback vertex set can be solved in polynomial-time given a decomposition with bounded o-mim-width. O-mim-width is the first width parameter that gives a common generalization of chordal graphs and graphs of bounded clique-width in terms of tractability of these problems. The parameter o-mim-width, as well as the related parameters mim-width and sim-width, have the limitation that no algorithms are known to compute bounded-width decompositions in polynomial-time. To partially resolve this limitation, we introduce the parameter neighbor-depth. We show that given a graph of neighbor-depth $k$, independent set can be solved in time $n^{O(k)}$ even without knowing a corresponding decomposition. We also show that neighbor-depth is bounded by a polylogarithmic function on the number of vertices on large classes of graphs, including graphs of bounded o-mim-width, and more generally graphs of bounded sim-width, giving a quasipolynomial-time algorithm for independent set on these graph classes. This resolves an open problem asked by Kang, Kwon, Strømme, and Telle [TCS 2017]. 我们从图宽度参数的角度研究最大独立集问题的可处理性，目标是定义一个尽可能通用的宽度参数，并允许在参数有界的图上以多项式时间求解独立集。我们引入了两个新的图宽度参数：单侧最大诱导匹配宽度（o-mim-width）和邻居深度。 O-mim-width 是一个比已知参数 mim-width 和树独立数更通用的图参数，我们证明，在给定有界 o-mim-width 分解的情况下，独立集和反馈顶点集可以在多项式时间内求解。 O-mim-width 是第一个宽度参数，它在这些问题的可处理性方面给出了弦图和有界团宽度图的通用概括。参数 o-mim-width 以及相关参数 mim-width 和 sim-width 具有以下限制：尚无已知算法可以在多项式时间内计算有界宽度分解。为了部分解决这个限制，我们引入了参数邻居深度。我们证明，给定邻居深度 $k$ 的图，即使不知道相应的分解，独立集也可以在 $n^{O(k)}$ 时间内求解。我们还表明，邻居深度受到大类图上顶点数量的多对数函数的限制，包括有界 o-mim-width 的图，以及更一般的有界 sim-width 的图，给出了这些图类上独立集的拟多项式时间算法。这解决了 Kang、Kwon、Strømme 和 Telle [TCS 2017] 提出的一个悬而未决的问题。 本文引入两种新的图宽参数（one-sided-mim-width和neighbor-depth），以解决最大独立集问题的可解性，并展示其在多项式时间内的算法效率。 Benjamin Bergougnoux,Tuukka Korhonen,Igor Razgon cs.DS

authors_text: Masato Fujitake
title: A3S: Adversarial learning of semantic representations for Scene-Text Spotting
title_zh: A3S：场景文本识别语义表示的对抗性学习
abstract: Scene-text spotting is a task that predicts a text area on natural scene images and recognizes its text characters simultaneously. It has attracted much attention in recent years due to its wide applications. Existing research has mainly focused on improving text region detection, not text recognition. Thus, while detection accuracy is improved, the end-to-end accuracy is insufficient. Texts in natural scene images tend to not be a random string of characters but a meaningful string of characters, a word. Therefore, we propose adversarial learning of semantic representations for scene text spotting (A3S) to improve end-to-end accuracy, including text recognition. A3S simultaneously predicts semantic features in the detected text area instead of only performing text recognition based on existing visual features. Experimental results on publicly available datasets show that the proposed method achieves better accuracy than other methods.
summary: Scene-text spotting is a task that predicts a text area on natural scene images and recognizes its text characters simultaneously. It has attracted much attention in recent years due to its wide applications. Existing research has mainly focused on improving text region detection, not text recognition. Thus, while detection accuracy is improved, the end-to-end accuracy is insufficient. Texts in natural scene images tend to not be a random string of characters but a meaningful string of characters, a word. Therefore, we propose adversarial learning of semantic representations for scene text spotting (A3S) to improve end-to-end accuracy, including text recognition. A3S simultaneously predicts semantic features in the detected text area instead of only performing text recognition based on existing visual features. Experimental results on publicly available datasets show that the proposed method achieves better accuracy than other methods.
abstract_zh: 场景文本识别是一项预测自然场景图像上的文本区域并同时识别其文本字符的任务。近年来因其广泛的应用而备受关注。现有的研究主要集中在改进文本区域检测，而不是文本识别。因此，虽然检测精度提高了，但端到端的精度还不够。自然场景图像中的文本往往不是随机的字符串，而是有意义的字符串，即单词。因此，我们提出了场景文本识别（A3S）语义表示的对抗性学习，以提高端到端的准确性，包括文本识别。 A3S 同时预测检测到的文本区域中的语义特征，而不是仅根据现有的视觉特征进行文本识别。在公开数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法比其他方法具有更好的准确性。

AI.tldr: 提出A3S方法，通过对抗学习语义表示，同时提升场景文本检测与识别的端到端准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法侧重于提升文本检测精度，但忽视文本识别，导致端到端准确率不足，需结合语义信息提升整体性能。
AI.method: 采用对抗学习框架，同时预测文本区域的语义特征，结合视觉与语义信息进行端到端文本识别。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实验验证，A3S方法在端到端准确率上优于现有其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入语义对抗学习，有效提升场景文本检测与识别的端到端准确率，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Yuxiao Lu,Arunesh Sinha,Pradeep Varakantham
title: Handling Long and Richly Constrained Tasks through Constrained Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过约束分层强化学习处理长且约束丰富的任务
abstract: Safety in goal directed Reinforcement Learning (RL) settings has typically been handled through constraints over trajectories and have demonstrated good performance in primarily short horizon tasks. In this paper, we are specifically interested in the problem of solving temporally extended decision making problems such as robots cleaning different areas in a house while avoiding slippery and unsafe areas (e.g., stairs) and retaining enough charge to move to a charging dock; in the presence of complex safety constraints. Our key contribution is a (safety) Constrained Search with Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning (CoSHRL) mechanism that combines an upper level constrained search agent (which computes a reward maximizing policy from a given start to a far away goal state while satisfying cost constraints) with a low-level goal conditioned RL agent (which estimates cost and reward values to move between nearby states). A major advantage of CoSHRL is that it can handle constraints on the cost value distribution (e.g., on Conditional Value at Risk, CVaR) and can adjust to flexible constraint thresholds without retraining. We perform extensive experiments with different types of safety constraints to demonstrate the utility of our approach over leading approaches in constrained and hierarchical RL.
summary: Safety in goal directed Reinforcement Learning (RL) settings has typically been handled through constraints over trajectories and have demonstrated good performance in primarily short horizon tasks. In this paper, we are specifically interested in the problem of solving temporally extended decision making problems such as robots cleaning different areas in a house while avoiding slippery and unsafe areas (e.g., stairs) and retaining enough charge to move to a charging dock; in the presence of complex safety constraints. Our key contribution is a (safety) Constrained Search with Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning (CoSHRL) mechanism that combines an upper level constrained search agent (which computes a reward maximizing policy from a given start to a far away goal state while satisfying cost constraints) with a low-level goal conditioned RL agent (which estimates cost and reward values to move between nearby states). A major advantage of CoSHRL is that it can handle constraints on the cost value distribution (e.g., on Conditional Value at Risk, CVaR) and can adjust to flexible constraint thresholds without retraining. We perform extensive experiments with different types of safety constraints to demonstrate the utility of our approach over leading approaches in constrained and hierarchical RL.
abstract_zh: 目标导向的强化学习 (RL) 设置中的安全性通常通过轨迹约束来处理，并且在主要的短期任务中表现出良好的性能。在本文中，我们特别感兴趣的是解决临时扩展的决策问题，例如机器人清洁房屋中的不同区域，同时避开湿滑和不安全的区域（例如楼梯）并保留足够的电量以移动到充电座；在存在复杂的安全约束的情况下。我们的关键贡献是一种（安全）约束搜索与分层强化学习（CoSHRL）机制，该机制将上层约束搜索代理（计算从给定开始到遥远目标状态的奖励最大化策略，同时满足成本约束）与低级目标条件强化学习代理（估计在附近状态之间移动的成本和奖励值）结合起来。 CoSHRL 的一个主要优点是它可以处理对成本值分布的约束（例如，条件风险价值，CVaR），并且可以调整到灵活的约束阈值而无需重新训练。我们对不同类型的安全约束进行了广泛的实验，以证明我们的方法相对于受约束和分层强化学习中的领先方法的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层强化学习方法CoSHRL，用于解决长期且具有复杂安全约束的任务，如机器人在避免危险区域的同时完成清洁任务。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在短期任务中处理安全约束效果良好，但难以应对需要长期决策且包含复杂约束的现实场景，例如机器人需兼顾路径安全、电量限制等多维度约束。
AI.method: 设计分层架构：高层约束搜索代理计算满足成本约束的全局最优策略，底层条件RL代理处理局部状态转移；支持CVaR等分布约束，并可通过调整阈值灵活适应新约束。
AI.result: 在多种安全约束场景下，CoSHRL相较现有方法在任务成功率、约束满足度及策略适应性指标上均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: CoSHRL通过分层架构有效解决了长期复杂约束任务的求解难题，其对分布约束的兼容性与阈值自适应能力显著提升了实际应用价值。

search_text: Handling Long and Richly Constrained Tasks through Constrained Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning 通过约束分层强化学习处理长且约束丰富的任务 Safety in goal directed Reinforcement Learning (RL) settings has typically been handled through constraints over trajectories and have demonstrated good performance in primarily short horizon tasks. In this paper, we are specifically interested in the problem of solving temporally extended decision making problems such as robots cleaning different areas in a house while avoiding slippery and unsafe areas (e.g., stairs) and retaining enough charge to move to a charging dock; in the presence of complex safety constraints. Our key contribution is a (safety) Constrained Search with Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning (CoSHRL) mechanism that combines an upper level constrained search agent (which computes a reward maximizing policy from a given start to a far away goal state while satisfying cost constraints) with a low-level goal conditioned RL agent (which estimates cost and reward values to move between nearby states). A major advantage of CoSHRL is that it can handle constraints on the cost value distribution (e.g., on Conditional Value at Risk, CVaR) and can adjust to flexible constraint thresholds without retraining. We perform extensive experiments with different types of safety constraints to demonstrate the utility of our approach over leading approaches in constrained and hierarchical RL. 目标导向的强化学习 (RL) 设置中的安全性通常通过轨迹约束来处理，并且在主要的短期任务中表现出良好的性能。在本文中，我们特别感兴趣的是解决临时扩展的决策问题，例如机器人清洁房屋中的不同区域，同时避开湿滑和不安全的区域（例如楼梯）并保留足够的电量以移动到充电座；在存在复杂的安全约束的情况下。我们的关键贡献是一种（安全）约束搜索与分层强化学习（CoSHRL）机制，该机制将上层约束搜索代理（计算从给定开始到遥远目标状态的奖励最大化策略，同时满足成本约束）与低级目标条件强化学习代理（估计在附近状态之间移动的成本和奖励值）结合起来。 CoSHRL 的一个主要优点是它可以处理对成本值分布的约束（例如，条件风险价值，CVaR），并且可以调整到灵活的约束阈值而无需重新训练。我们对不同类型的安全约束进行了广泛的实验，以证明我们的方法相对于受约束和分层强化学习中的领先方法的实用性。 本文提出一种分层强化学习方法CoSHRL，用于解决长期且具有复杂安全约束的任务，如机器人在避免危险区域的同时完成清洁任务。 Yuxiao Lu,Arunesh Sinha,Pradeep Varakantham cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Grégoire Grzeczkowicz,Bruno Vallet
title: Semantic Segmentation of Urban Textured Meshes Through Point Sampling
title_zh: 通过点采样对城市纹理网格进行语义分割
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, conference, presented at XXIV ISPRS Congress
comments: 9 pages, 6 figures, conference, presented at XXIV ISPRS Congress
abstract: Textured meshes are becoming an increasingly popular representation combining the 3D geometry and radiometry of real scenes. However, semantic segmentation algorithms for urban mesh have been little investigated and do not exploit all radiometric information. To address this problem, we adopt an approach consisting in sampling a point cloud from the textured mesh, then using a point cloud semantic segmentation algorithm on this cloud, and finally using the obtained semantic to segment the initial mesh. In this paper, we study the influence of different parameters such as the sampling method, the density of the extracted cloud, the features selected (color, normal, elevation) as well as the number of points used at each training period. Our result outperforms the state-of-the-art on the SUM dataset, earning about 4 points in OA and 18 points in mIoU.
summary: Textured meshes are becoming an increasingly popular representation combining the 3D geometry and radiometry of real scenes. However, semantic segmentation algorithms for urban mesh have been little investigated and do not exploit all radiometric information. To address this problem, we adopt an approach consisting in sampling a point cloud from the textured mesh, then using a point cloud semantic segmentation algorithm on this cloud, and finally using the obtained semantic to segment the initial mesh. In this paper, we study the influence of different parameters such as the sampling method, the density of the extracted cloud, the features selected (color, normal, elevation) as well as the number of points used at each training period. Our result outperforms the state-of-the-art on the SUM dataset, earning about 4 points in OA and 18 points in mIoU.
abstract_zh: 纹理网格正在成为一种越来越流行的表示形式，它结合了 3D 几何和真实场景的辐射测量。然而，城市网格的语义分割算法很少被研究，并且没有利用所有辐射信息。为了解决这个问题，我们采用的方法是从纹理网格中采样点云，然后对该云使用点云语义分割算法，最后使用获得的语义来分割初始网格。在本文中，我们研究了不同参数的影响，例如采样方法、提取的云的密度、选择的特征（颜色、法线、高程）以及每个训练周期使用的点数。我们的结果优于 SUM 数据集上的最新结果，在 OA 中获得约 4 分，在 mIoU 中获得 18 分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过点采样实现城市纹理网格语义分割的方法，通过优化参数提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有城市纹理网格语义分割算法未能充分利用纹理网格的辐射信息，导致分割效果受限。
AI.method: 从纹理网格采样点云，使用点云语义分割算法处理后，将结果映射回原始网格，并系统研究采样方法、密度、特征选择等参数的影响。
AI.result: 在SUM数据集上，相较现有方法，总体准确率（OA）提升约4点，平均交并比（mIoU）提升约18点。
AI.conclusion: 点采样方法能有效利用纹理网格的辐射信息，合理参数选择显著提升分割性能，验证了该方法的优越性。

authors_text: Riccardo Munafò,Simone Saitta,Giacomo Ingallina,Paolo Denti,Francesco Maisano,Eustachio Agricola,Alberto Redaelli,Emiliano Votta
title: A Deep Learning-Based Fully Automated Pipeline for Regurgitant Mitral Valve Anatomy Analysis From 3D Echocardiography
title_zh: 基于深度学习的全自动流程，用于通过 3D 超声心动图进行反流二尖瓣解剖分析
abstract: Three-dimensional transesophageal echocardiography (3DTEE) is the recommended imaging technique for the assessment of mitral valve (MV) morphology and lesions in case of mitral regurgitation (MR) requiring surgical or transcatheter repair. Such assessment is key to thorough intervention planning and to intraprocedural guidance. However, it requires segmentation from 3DTEE images, which is timeconsuming, operator-dependent, and often merely qualitative. In the present work, a novel workflow to quantify the patient-specific MV geometry from 3DTEE is proposed. The developed approach relies on a 3D multi-decoder residual convolutional neural network (CNN) with a U-Net architecture for multi-class segmentation of MV annulus and leaflets. The CNN was trained and tested on a dataset comprising 55 3DTEE examinations of MR-affected patients. After training, the CNN is embedded into a fully automatic, and hence fully repeatable, pipeline that refines the predicted segmentation, detects MV anatomical landmarks and quantifies MV morphology. The trained 3D CNN achieves an average Dice score of $0.82 \pm 0.06$, mean surface distance of $0.43 \pm 0.14$ mm and 95% Hausdorff Distance (HD) of $3.57 \pm 1.56$ mm before segmentation refinement, outperforming a state-of-the-art baseline residual U-Net architecture, and provides an unprecedented multi-class segmentation of the annulus, anterior and posterior leaflet. The automatic 3D linear morphological measurements of the annulus and leaflets, specifically diameters and lengths, exhibit differences of less than 1.45 mm when compared to ground truth values. These measurements also demonstrate strong overall agreement with analyses conducted by semi-automated commercial software. The whole process requires minimal user interaction and requires approximately 15 seconds
summary: Three-dimensional transesophageal echocardiography (3DTEE) is the recommended imaging technique for the assessment of mitral valve (MV) morphology and lesions in case of mitral regurgitation (MR) requiring surgical or transcatheter repair. Such assessment is key to thorough intervention planning and to intraprocedural guidance. However, it requires segmentation from 3DTEE images, which is timeconsuming, operator-dependent, and often merely qualitative. In the present work, a novel workflow to quantify the patient-specific MV geometry from 3DTEE is proposed. The developed approach relies on a 3D multi-decoder residual convolutional neural network (CNN) with a U-Net architecture for multi-class segmentation of MV annulus and leaflets. The CNN was trained and tested on a dataset comprising 55 3DTEE examinations of MR-affected patients. After training, the CNN is embedded into a fully automatic, and hence fully repeatable, pipeline that refines the predicted segmentation, detects MV anatomical landmarks and quantifies MV morphology. The trained 3D CNN achieves an average Dice score of $0.82 \pm 0.06$, mean surface distance of $0.43 \pm 0.14$ mm and 95% Hausdorff Distance (HD) of $3.57 \pm 1.56$ mm before segmentation refinement, outperforming a state-of-the-art baseline residual U-Net architecture, and provides an unprecedented multi-class segmentation of the annulus, anterior and posterior leaflet. The automatic 3D linear morphological measurements of the annulus and leaflets, specifically diameters and lengths, exhibit differences of less than 1.45 mm when compared to ground truth values. These measurements also demonstrate strong overall agreement with analyses conducted by semi-automated commercial software. The whole process requires minimal user interaction and requires approximately 15 seconds
abstract_zh: 三维经食管超声心动图 (3DTEE) 是推荐的成像技术，用于在需要手术或经导管修复的二尖瓣反流 (MR) 情况下评估二尖瓣 (MV) 形态和病变。这种评估是彻底的干预计划和程序内指导的关键。然而，它需要对 3DTEE 图像进行分割，这非常耗时、依赖于操作员，而且通常只是定性的。在目前的工作中，提出了一种从 3DTEE 量化患者特定 MV 几何形状的新颖工作流程。所开发的方法依赖于具有 U-Net 架构的 3D 多解码器残差卷积神经网络 (CNN)，用于 MV 环和小叶的多类分割。 CNN 在包含 MR 影响患者的 55 次 3DTEE 检查的数据集上进行了训练和测试。训练后，CNN 被嵌入到全自动且完全可重复的管道中，该管道可细化预测分割、检测 MV 解剖标志并量化 MV 形态。经过训练的 3D CNN 在分割细化之前实现了平均 Dice 分数 $0.82 \pm 0.06$、平均表面距离 $0.43 \pm 0.14$ mm 和 95% Hausdorff 距离 (HD) $3.57 \pm 1.56$ mm，优于最先进的基线残差 U-Net 架构，并提供了前所未有的环面、前部和后部多类分割传单。环面和小叶的自动 3D 线性形态测量（特别是直径和长度）与地面真实值相比，差异小于 1.45 毫米。这些测量结果还表明与半自动化商业软件进行的分析具有很强的总体一致性。整个过程需要最少的用户交互，大约需要 15 秒

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的全自动管道，用于从3D超声心动图中量化二尖瓣反流患者的瓣膜几何结构。
AI.motivation: 传统3D经食管超声心动图评估二尖瓣形态需手动分割，耗时且依赖操作者，缺乏定量分析。
AI.method: 开发了3D多解码器残差卷积神经网络（U-Net架构），用于分割二尖瓣环和瓣叶，并嵌入全自动管道进行分割优化、解剖标志检测和形态量化。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到Dice得分0.82、平均表面距离0.43mm，形态测量误差小于1.45mm，优于现有方法且与商业软件结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了二尖瓣解剖分析的自动化与高精度，显著提升临床干预规划效率。

The developed approach relies on a 3D multi-decoder residual convolutional neural network (CNN) with a U-Net architecture for multi-class segmentation of MV annulus and leaflets. The CNN was trained and tested on a dataset comprising 55 3DTEE examinations of MR-affected patients. After training, the CNN is embedded into a fully automatic, and hence fully repeatable, pipeline that refines the predicted segmentation, detects MV anatomical landmarks and quantifies MV morphology. The trained 3D CNN achieves an average Dice score of $0.82 \pm 0.06$, mean surface distance of $0.43 \pm 0.14$ mm and 95% Hausdorff Distance (HD) of $3.57 \pm 1.56$ mm before segmentation refinement, outperforming a state-of-the-art baseline residual U-Net architecture, and provides an unprecedented multi-class segmentation of the annulus, anterior and posterior leaflet. The automatic 3D linear morphological measurements of the annulus and leaflets, specifically diameters and lengths, exhibit differences of less than 1.45 mm when compared to ground truth values. These measurements also demonstrate strong overall agreement with analyses conducted by semi-automated commercial software. The whole process requires minimal user interaction and requires approximately 15 seconds 三维经食管超声心动图 (3DTEE) 是推荐的成像技术，用于在需要手术或经导管修复的二尖瓣反流 (MR) 情况下评估二尖瓣 (MV) 形态和病变。这种评估是彻底的干预计划和程序内指导的关键。然而，它需要对 3DTEE 图像进行分割，这非常耗时、依赖于操作员，而且通常只是定性的。在目前的工作中，提出了一种从 3DTEE 量化患者特定 MV 几何形状的新颖工作流程。所开发的方法依赖于具有 U-Net 架构的 3D 多解码器残差卷积神经网络 (CNN)，用于 MV 环和小叶的多类分割。 CNN 在包含 MR 影响患者的 55 次 3DTEE 检查的数据集上进行了训练和测试。训练后，CNN 被嵌入到全自动且完全可重复的管道中，该管道可细化预测分割、检测 MV 解剖标志并量化 MV 形态。经过训练的 3D CNN 在分割细化之前实现了平均 Dice 分数 $0.82 \pm 0.06$、平均表面距离 $0.43 \pm 0.14$ mm 和 95% Hausdorff 距离 (HD) $3.57 \pm 1.56$ mm，优于最先进的基线残差 U-Net 架构，并提供了前所未有的环面、前部和后部多类分割传单。环面和小叶的自动 3D 线性形态测量（特别是直径和长度）与地面真实值相比，差异小于 1.45 毫米。这些测量结果还表明与半自动化商业软件进行的分析具有很强的总体一致性。整个过程需要最少的用户交互，大约需要 15 秒 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的全自动管道，用于从3D超声心动图中量化二尖瓣反流患者的瓣膜几何结构。 Riccardo Munafò,Simone Saitta,Giacomo Ingallina,Paolo Denti,Francesco Maisano,Eustachio Agricola,Alberto Redaelli,Emiliano Votta cs.CV,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Zhihao Chen,Chuang Niu,Qi Gao,Ge Wang,Hongming Shan
title: LIT-Former: Linking In-plane and Through-plane Transformers for Simultaneous CT Image Denoising and Deblurring
title_zh: LIT-Former：连接平面内和平面间变压器以同时进行 CT 图像去噪和去模糊
abstract: This paper studies 3D low-dose computed tomography (CT) imaging. Although various deep learning methods were developed in this context, typically they focus on 2D images and perform denoising due to low-dose and deblurring for super-resolution separately. Up to date, little work was done for simultaneous in-plane denoising and through-plane deblurring, which is important to obtain high-quality 3D CT images with lower radiation and faster imaging speed. For this task, a straightforward method is to directly train an end-to-end 3D network. However, it demands much more training data and expensive computational costs. Here, we propose to link in-plane and through-plane transformers for simultaneous in-plane denoising and through-plane deblurring, termed as LIT-Former, which can efficiently synergize in-plane and through-plane sub-tasks for 3D CT imaging and enjoy the advantages of both convolution and transformer networks. LIT-Former has two novel designs: efficient multi-head self-attention modules (eMSM) and efficient convolutional feedforward networks (eCFN). First, eMSM integrates in-plane 2D self-attention and through-plane 1D self-attention to efficiently capture global interactions of 3D self-attention, the core unit of transformer networks. Second, eCFN integrates 2D convolution and 1D convolution to extract local information of 3D convolution in the same fashion. As a result, the proposed LIT-Former synergize these two subtasks, significantly reducing the computational complexity as compared to 3D counterparts and enabling rapid convergence. Extensive experimental results on simulated and clinical datasets demonstrate superior performance over state-of-the-art models. The source code is made available at https://github.com/hao1635/LIT-Former.
summary: This paper studies 3D low-dose computed tomography (CT) imaging. Although various deep learning methods were developed in this context, typically they focus on 2D images and perform denoising due to low-dose and deblurring for super-resolution separately. Up to date, little work was done for simultaneous in-plane denoising and through-plane deblurring, which is important to obtain high-quality 3D CT images with lower radiation and faster imaging speed. For this task, a straightforward method is to directly train an end-to-end 3D network. However, it demands much more training data and expensive computational costs. Here, we propose to link in-plane and through-plane transformers for simultaneous in-plane denoising and through-plane deblurring, termed as LIT-Former, which can efficiently synergize in-plane and through-plane sub-tasks for 3D CT imaging and enjoy the advantages of both convolution and transformer networks. LIT-Former has two novel designs: efficient multi-head self-attention modules (eMSM) and efficient convolutional feedforward networks (eCFN). First, eMSM integrates in-plane 2D self-attention and through-plane 1D self-attention to efficiently capture global interactions of 3D self-attention, the core unit of transformer networks. Second, eCFN integrates 2D convolution and 1D convolution to extract local information of 3D convolution in the same fashion. As a result, the proposed LIT-Former synergize these two subtasks, significantly reducing the computational complexity as compared to 3D counterparts and enabling rapid convergence. Extensive experimental results on simulated and clinical datasets demonstrate superior performance over state-of-the-art models. The source code is made available at https://github.com/hao1635/LIT-Former.
abstract_zh: 本文研究 3D 低剂量计算机断层扫描 (CT) 成像。尽管在此背景下开发了各种深度学习方法，但它们通常专注于 2D 图像，并分别执行低剂量去噪和超分辨率去模糊。迄今为止，同时进行面内去噪和穿面去模糊的工作还很少，这对于获得具有较低辐射和更快成像速度的高质量 3D CT 图像非常重要。对于此任务，一种简单的方法是直接训练端到端 3D 网络。然而，它需要更多的训练数据和昂贵的计算成本。在这里，我们建议连接平面内和穿过平面的变压器，以同时进行平面内去噪和穿过平面的去模糊，称为LIT-Former，它可以有效地协同3D CT成像的平面内和穿过平面的子任务，并享受卷积和变压器网络的优点。 LIT-Former 有两种新颖的设计：高效的多头自注意力模块（eMSM）和高效的卷积前馈网络（eCFN）。首先，eMSM 集成了平面内 2D 自注意力和跨平面 1D 自注意力，以有效捕获变压器网络核心单元 3D 自注意力的全局交互。其次，eCFN 集成了 2D 卷积和 1D 卷积，以相同的方式提取 3D 卷积的局部信息。因此，所提出的 LIT-Former 协同这两个子任务，与 3D 对应任务相比显着降低了计算复杂性，并实现快速收敛。模拟和临床数据集的大量实验结果表明，其性能优于最先进的模型。源代码位于 https://github.com/hao1635/LIT-Former。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LIT-Former模型，通过结合平面内与平面间Transformer网络，实现低剂量CT图像的同时去噪与去模糊。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法通常单独处理CT图像去噪或超分辨率去模糊，缺乏对3D CT图像同时进行平面内去噪与平面间去模糊的有效解决方案，且直接训练3D网络计算成本高。
AI.method: 设计LIT-Former架构，包含高效多头自注意力模块(eMSM)和高效卷积前馈网络(eCFN)，通过2D/1D自注意力与卷积的融合，实现3D全局交互与局部特征提取的协同。
AI.result: 在模拟与临床数据集上均优于现有模型，计算复杂度显著低于3D方法并实现快速收敛。
AI.conclusion: LIT-Former通过解耦平面内与平面间任务，以更低计算成本实现3D CT图像高质量重建，为低剂量快速CT成像提供新思路。

authors_text: Qiang Huang,Anthony K. H. Tung
title: Lightweight-Yet-Efficient: Revitalizing Ball-Tree for Point-to-Hyperplane Nearest Neighbor Search
title_zh: 轻量级且高效：为点到超平面最近邻搜索重振球树
abstract: Finding the nearest neighbor to a hyperplane (or Point-to-Hyperplane Nearest Neighbor Search, simply P2HNNS) is a new and challenging problem with applications in many research domains. While existing state-of-the-art hashing schemes (e.g., NH and FH) are able to achieve sublinear time complexity without the assumption of the data being in a unit hypersphere, they require an asymmetric transformation, which increases the data dimension from $d$ to $Ω(d^2)$. This leads to considerable overhead for indexing and incurs significant distortion errors. In this paper, we investigate a tree-based approach for solving P2HNNS using the classical Ball-Tree index. Compared to hashing-based methods, tree-based methods usually require roughly linear costs for construction, and they provide different kinds of approximations with excellent flexibility. A simple branch-and-bound algorithm with a novel lower bound is first developed on Ball-Tree for performing P2HNNS. Then, a new tree structure named BC-Tree, which maintains the Ball and Cone structures in the leaf nodes of Ball-Tree, is described together with two effective strategies, i.e., point-level pruning and collaborative inner product computing. BC-Tree inherits both the low construction cost and lightweight property of Ball-Tree while providing a similar or more efficient search. Experimental results over 16 real-world data sets show that Ball-Tree and BC-Tree are around 1.1$\sim$10$\times$ faster than NH and FH, and they can reduce the index size and indexing time by about 1$\sim$3 orders of magnitudes on average. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/HuangQiang/BC-Tree}.
summary: Finding the nearest neighbor to a hyperplane (or Point-to-Hyperplane Nearest Neighbor Search, simply P2HNNS) is a new and challenging problem with applications in many research domains. While existing state-of-the-art hashing schemes (e.g., NH and FH) are able to achieve sublinear time complexity without the assumption of the data being in a unit hypersphere, they require an asymmetric transformation, which increases the data dimension from $d$ to $Ω(d^2)$. This leads to considerable overhead for indexing and incurs significant distortion errors. In this paper, we investigate a tree-based approach for solving P2HNNS using the classical Ball-Tree index. Compared to hashing-based methods, tree-based methods usually require roughly linear costs for construction, and they provide different kinds of approximations with excellent flexibility. A simple branch-and-bound algorithm with a novel lower bound is first developed on Ball-Tree for performing P2HNNS. Then, a new tree structure named BC-Tree, which maintains the Ball and Cone structures in the leaf nodes of Ball-Tree, is described together with two effective strategies, i.e., point-level pruning and collaborative inner product computing. BC-Tree inherits both the low construction cost and lightweight property of Ball-Tree while providing a similar or more efficient search. Experimental results over 16 real-world data sets show that Ball-Tree and BC-Tree are around 1.1$\sim$10$\times$ faster than NH and FH, and they can reduce the index size and indexing time by about 1$\sim$3 orders of magnitudes on average. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/HuangQiang/BC-Tree}.
abstract_zh: 寻找超平面的最近邻（或点到超平面最近邻搜索，简称 P2HNNS）是许多研究领域中应用的一个新的且具有挑战性的问题。虽然现有最先进的哈希方案（例如 NH 和 FH）能够在不假设数据位于单位超球面的情况下实现亚线性时间复杂度，但它们需要非对称变换，从而将数据维度从 $d$ 增加到 $Ω(d^2)$。这会导致相当大的索引开销并导致严重的失真错误。在本文中，我们研究了一种基于树的方法，使用经典的 Ball-Tree 索引来求解 P2HNNS。与基于散列的方法相比，基于树的方法通常需要大致线性的构建成本，并且它们提供了具有出色灵活性的不同类型的近似值。首先在 Ball-Tree 上开发了一种具有新颖下界的简单分支定界算法，用于执行 P2HNNS。然后，描述了一种新的树结构BC-Tree，它在Ball-Tree的叶节点中维护了Ball和Cone结构，并结合了两种有效的策略，即点级剪枝和协作内积计算。 BC-Tree继承了Ball-Tree的低构建成本和轻量级特性，同时提供类似或更高效的搜索。超过 16 个真实世界数据集的实验结果表明，Ball-Tree 和 BC-Tree 比 NH 和 FH 快约 1.1$\sim$10$\times$，并且它们可以平均减少索引大小和索引时间约 1$\sim$3 个数量级。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/HuangQiang/BC-Tree} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Ball-Tree的轻量高效方法解决点到超平面最近邻搜索问题（P2HNNS），通过改进树结构和搜索策略提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有哈希方法虽具亚线性复杂度，但需高维数据转换导致索引开销大且失真严重，而树方法虽构造成本低但缺乏高效搜索策略。
AI.method: 开发基于Ball-Tree的分支定界算法并提出BC-Tree结构，融合球体与锥体叶节点，结合点级剪枝与协同内积计算策略。
AI.result: 在16个真实数据集上，Ball-Tree和BC-Tree较NH/FH快1.1~10倍，平均减少索引大小和构建时间1~3个数量级。
AI.conclusion: BC-Tree在保持Ball-Tree轻量性的同时显著提升P2HNNS效率，为高维数据超平面搜索提供有效解决方案。

motivation: 现有哈希方法虽具亚线性复杂度，但需高维数据转换导致索引开销大且失真严重，而树方法虽构造成本低但缺乏高效搜索策略。
method: 开发基于Ball-Tree的分支定界算法并提出BC-Tree结构，融合球体与锥体叶节点，结合点级剪枝与协同内积计算策略。
result: 在16个真实数据集上，Ball-Tree和BC-Tree较NH/FH快1.1~10倍，平均减少索引大小和构建时间1~3个数量级。
conclusion: BC-Tree在保持Ball-Tree轻量性的同时显著提升P2HNNS效率，为高维数据超平面搜索提供有效解决方案。
search_text: Lightweight-Yet-Efficient: Revitalizing Ball-Tree for Point-to-Hyperplane Nearest Neighbor Search 轻量级且高效：为点到超平面最近邻搜索重振球树 Finding the nearest neighbor to a hyperplane (or Point-to-Hyperplane Nearest Neighbor Search, simply P2HNNS) is a new and challenging problem with applications in many research domains. While existing state-of-the-art hashing schemes (e.g., NH and FH) are able to achieve sublinear time complexity without the assumption of the data being in a unit hypersphere, they require an asymmetric transformation, which increases the data dimension from $d$ to $Ω(d^2)$. This leads to considerable overhead for indexing and incurs significant distortion errors. In this paper, we investigate a tree-based approach for solving P2HNNS using the classical Ball-Tree index. Compared to hashing-based methods, tree-based methods usually require roughly linear costs for construction, and they provide different kinds of approximations with excellent flexibility. A simple branch-and-bound algorithm with a novel lower bound is first developed on Ball-Tree for performing P2HNNS. Then, a new tree structure named BC-Tree, which maintains the Ball and Cone structures in the leaf nodes of Ball-Tree, is described together with two effective strategies, i.e., point-level pruning and collaborative inner product computing. BC-Tree inherits both the low construction cost and lightweight property of Ball-Tree while providing a similar or more efficient search. Experimental results over 16 real-world data sets show that Ball-Tree and BC-Tree are around 1.1$\sim$10$\times$ faster than NH and FH, and they can reduce the index size and indexing time by about 1$\sim$3 orders of magnitudes on average. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/HuangQiang/BC-Tree}. 寻找超平面的最近邻（或点到超平面最近邻搜索，简称 P2HNNS）是许多研究领域中应用的一个新的且具有挑战性的问题。虽然现有最先进的哈希方案（例如 NH 和 FH）能够在不假设数据位于单位超球面的情况下实现亚线性时间复杂度，但它们需要非对称变换，从而将数据维度从 $d$ 增加到 $Ω(d^2)$。这会导致相当大的索引开销并导致严重的失真错误。在本文中，我们研究了一种基于树的方法，使用经典的 Ball-Tree 索引来求解 P2HNNS。与基于散列的方法相比，基于树的方法通常需要大致线性的构建成本，并且它们提供了具有出色灵活性的不同类型的近似值。首先在 Ball-Tree 上开发了一种具有新颖下界的简单分支定界算法，用于执行 P2HNNS。然后，描述了一种新的树结构BC-Tree，它在Ball-Tree的叶节点中维护了Ball和Cone结构，并结合了两种有效的策略，即点级剪枝和协作内积计算。 BC-Tree继承了Ball-Tree的低构建成本和轻量级特性，同时提供类似或更高效的搜索。超过 16 个真实世界数据集的实验结果表明，Ball-Tree 和 BC-Tree 比 NH 和 FH 快约 1.1$\sim$10$\times$，并且它们可以平均减少索引大小和索引时间约 1$\sim$3 个数量级。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/HuangQiang/BC-Tree} 获取。 本文提出一种基于Ball-Tree的轻量高效方法解决点到超平面最近邻搜索问题（P2HNNS），通过改进树结构和搜索策略提升效率。 Qiang Huang,Anthony K. H. Tung cs.DB,cs.CG,cs.DS,cs.IR

authors_text: Gianluca Scarpellini,Stefano Rosa,Pietro Morerio,Lorenzo Natale,Alessio Del Bue
title: Self-improving object detection via disagreement reconciliation
title_zh: 通过分歧调解自我改进对象检测
comment: This article is a conference paper related to arXiv:2302.03566 and is currently under review
comments: This article is a conference paper related to arXiv:2302.03566 and is currently under review
abstract: Object detectors often experience a drop in performance when new environmental conditions are insufficiently represented in the training data. This paper studies how to automatically fine-tune a pre-existing object detector while exploring and acquiring images in a new environment without relying on human intervention, i.e., in a self-supervised fashion. In our setting, an agent initially explores the environment using a pre-trained off-the-shelf detector to locate objects and associate pseudo-labels. By assuming that pseudo-labels for the same object must be consistent across different views, we devise a novel mechanism for producing refined predictions from the consensus among observations. Our approach improves the off-the-shelf object detector by 2.66% in terms of mAP and outperforms the current state of the art without relying on ground-truth annotations.
summary: Object detectors often experience a drop in performance when new environmental conditions are insufficiently represented in the training data. This paper studies how to automatically fine-tune a pre-existing object detector while exploring and acquiring images in a new environment without relying on human intervention, i.e., in a self-supervised fashion. In our setting, an agent initially explores the environment using a pre-trained off-the-shelf detector to locate objects and associate pseudo-labels. By assuming that pseudo-labels for the same object must be consistent across different views, we devise a novel mechanism for producing refined predictions from the consensus among observations. Our approach improves the off-the-shelf object detector by 2.66% in terms of mAP and outperforms the current state of the art without relying on ground-truth annotations.
abstract_zh: 当训练数据中没有充分体现新的环境条件时，物体检测器的性能通常会下降。本文研究了如何在不依赖人工干预的情况下（即以自我监督的方式）在新环境中探索和获取图像时自动微调预先存在的物体检测器。在我们的设置中，代理最初使用预先训练的现成检测器来探索环境，以定位对象并关联伪标签。通过假设同一对象的伪标签在不同视图中必须保持一致，我们设计了一种新颖的机制，可以根据观察之间的共识产生精确的预测。我们的方法将现成的目标检测器在 mAP 方面提高了 2.66%，并且在不依赖真实注释的情况下优于当前最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工干预的自监督方法，在新环境中自动提升现有物体检测器的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有物体检测器在面对训练数据未覆盖的新环境时性能下降，而人工标注新数据成本高昂，需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 使用预训练检测器探索环境生成伪标签，通过多视角伪标签一致性假设，协调观测分歧生成精炼预测。
AI.result: 在mAP指标上提升2.66%，且优于当前最先进的无监督方法，无需真实标注数据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过伪标签共识机制有效提升检测器适应新环境的能力，为自监督模型优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Ilan Doron-Arad,Hadas Shachnai
title: Approximating Bin Packing with Conflict Graphs via Maximization Techniques
title_zh: 通过最大化技术用冲突图近似装箱
abstract: We give a comprehensive study of bin packing with conflicts (BPC). The input is a set $I$ of items, sizes $s:I \rightarrow [0,1]$, and a conflict graph $G = (I,E)$. The goal is to find a partition of $I$ into a minimum number of independent sets, each of total size at most $1$. Being a generalization of the notoriously hard graph coloring problem, BPC has been studied mostly on polynomially colorable conflict graphs. An intriguing open question is whether BPC on such graphs admits the same best known approximation guarantees as classic bin packing. We answer this question negatively, by showing that (in contrast to bin packing) there is no asymptotic polynomial-time approximation scheme (APTAS) for BPC already on seemingly easy graph classes, such as bipartite and split graphs. We complement this result with improved approximation guarantees for BPC on several prominent graph classes. Most notably, we derive an asymptotic $1.391$-approximation for bipartite graphs, a $2.445$-approximation for perfect graphs, and a $\left(1+\frac{2}{e}\right)$-approximation for split graphs. To this end, we introduce a generic framework relying on a novel interpretation of BPC allowing us to solve the problem via maximization techniques. Our framework may find use in tackling BPC on other graph classes arising in applications.
summary: We give a comprehensive study of bin packing with conflicts (BPC). The input is a set $I$ of items, sizes $s:I \rightarrow [0,1]$, and a conflict graph $G = (I,E)$. The goal is to find a partition of $I$ into a minimum number of independent sets, each of total size at most $1$. Being a generalization of the notoriously hard graph coloring problem, BPC has been studied mostly on polynomially colorable conflict graphs. An intriguing open question is whether BPC on such graphs admits the same best known approximation guarantees as classic bin packing. We answer this question negatively, by showing that (in contrast to bin packing) there is no asymptotic polynomial-time approximation scheme (APTAS) for BPC already on seemingly easy graph classes, such as bipartite and split graphs. We complement this result with improved approximation guarantees for BPC on several prominent graph classes. Most notably, we derive an asymptotic $1.391$-approximation for bipartite graphs, a $2.445$-approximation for perfect graphs, and a $\left(1+\frac{2}{e}\right)$-approximation for split graphs. To this end, we introduce a generic framework relying on a novel interpretation of BPC allowing us to solve the problem via maximization techniques. Our framework may find use in tackling BPC on other graph classes arising in applications.
abstract_zh: 我们对带冲突的装箱（BPC）进行了全面的研究。输入是一组项目$I$，大小为$s:I \rightarrow [0,1]$，以及冲突图$G = (I,E)$。目标是找到将 $I$ 划分为最少数量的独立集合，每个集合的总大小最多为 $1$。作为众所周知的困难图着色问题的推广，BPC 主要在多项式可着色冲突图上进行研究。一个有趣的悬而未决的问题是，此类图上的 BPC 是否承认与经典装箱相同的最著名的近似保证。我们否定地回答这个问题，通过表明（与装箱相反）在看似简单的图类（例如二分图和分割图）上已经没有 BPC 的渐近多项式时间近似方案（APTAS）。我们通过在几个重要的图类上改进 BPC 的近似保证来补充这个结果。最值得注意的是，我们推导出二部图的渐近 $1.391$ 近似值、完美图的 $2.445$ 近似值以及分割图的 $\left(1+\frac{2}{e}\right)$ 近似值。为此，我们引入了一个依赖于 BPC 的新颖解释的通用框架，使我们能够通过最大化技术来解决问题。我们的框架可以用于解决应用程序中出现的其他图类上的 BPC。

AI.tldr: 本文研究带冲突图的装箱问题（BPC），探讨其在不同图类上的近似算法性能。
AI.motivation: BPC是图着色问题的推广，但其近似算法的性能界限尚未明确，尤其在多项式可着色图类中是否能达到经典装箱问题的近似比是关键问题。
AI.method: 提出一种基于最大化技术的通用框架，将BPC转化为最大化问题进行求解。
AI.result: 证明BPC在二分图、分割图等图类中不存在APTAS，但给出了改进的近似比（如二分图1.391，分割图1+2/e）。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为解决BPC提供了新思路，但BPC的近似性能劣于经典装箱问题，需针对不同图类设计特定算法。

authors_text: Yashas Annadani,Panagiotis Tigas,Desi R. Ivanova,Andrew Jesson,Yarin Gal,Adam Foster,Stefan Bauer
title: Differentiable Multi-Target Causal Bayesian Experimental Design
title_zh: 可微分多目标因果贝叶斯实验设计
abstract: We introduce a gradient-based approach for the problem of Bayesian optimal experimental design to learn causal models in a batch setting -- a critical component for causal discovery from finite data where interventions can be costly or risky. Existing methods rely on greedy approximations to construct a batch of experiments while using black-box methods to optimize over a single target-state pair to intervene with. In this work, we completely dispose of the black-box optimization techniques and greedy heuristics and instead propose a conceptually simple end-to-end gradient-based optimization procedure to acquire a set of optimal intervention target-state pairs. Such a procedure enables parameterization of the design space to efficiently optimize over a batch of multi-target-state interventions, a setting which has hitherto not been explored due to its complexity. We demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms baselines and existing acquisition strategies in both single-target and multi-target settings across a number of synthetic datasets.
summary: We introduce a gradient-based approach for the problem of Bayesian optimal experimental design to learn causal models in a batch setting -- a critical component for causal discovery from finite data where interventions can be costly or risky. Existing methods rely on greedy approximations to construct a batch of experiments while using black-box methods to optimize over a single target-state pair to intervene with. In this work, we completely dispose of the black-box optimization techniques and greedy heuristics and instead propose a conceptually simple end-to-end gradient-based optimization procedure to acquire a set of optimal intervention target-state pairs. Such a procedure enables parameterization of the design space to efficiently optimize over a batch of multi-target-state interventions, a setting which has hitherto not been explored due to its complexity. We demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms baselines and existing acquisition strategies in both single-target and multi-target settings across a number of synthetic datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种基于梯度的方法来解决贝叶斯最优实验设计问题，以在批量设置中学习因果模型——这是从有限数据中发现因果关系的关键组成部分，在有限数据中，干预措施可能成本高昂或存在风险。现有方法依靠贪婪近似来构建一批实验，同时使用黑盒方法来优化单个目标状态对以进行干预。在这项工作中，我们完全抛弃了黑盒优化技术和贪婪启发法，而是提出了一种概念上简单的端到端基于梯度的优化过程来获取一组最佳干预目标状态对。这样的过程使得设计空间的参数化能够有效地优化一批多目标状态干预，由于其复杂性，迄今为止尚未对这种设置进行探索。我们证明，我们提出的方法在多个合成数据集的单目标和多目标设置中都优于基线和现有的采集策略。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于梯度的贝叶斯最优实验设计方法，用于在批量设置中高效学习因果模型，解决干预成本高或风险大的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖黑盒优化和贪心近似，难以高效处理多目标干预的复杂性，需更优的批量实验设计方法。
AI.method: 提出端到端梯度优化方法，参数化设计空间，直接优化多目标干预批次，摒弃黑盒优化和贪心策略。
AI.result: 在多个合成数据集的单目标和多目标场景中，优于现有基线和获取策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多目标干预优化问题，为高成本或高风险场景下的因果发现提供了更高效的实验设计框架。

search_text: Differentiable Multi-Target Causal Bayesian Experimental Design 可微分多目标因果贝叶斯实验设计 We introduce a gradient-based approach for the problem of Bayesian optimal experimental design to learn causal models in a batch setting -- a critical component for causal discovery from finite data where interventions can be costly or risky. Existing methods rely on greedy approximations to construct a batch of experiments while using black-box methods to optimize over a single target-state pair to intervene with. In this work, we completely dispose of the black-box optimization techniques and greedy heuristics and instead propose a conceptually simple end-to-end gradient-based optimization procedure to acquire a set of optimal intervention target-state pairs. Such a procedure enables parameterization of the design space to efficiently optimize over a batch of multi-target-state interventions, a setting which has hitherto not been explored due to its complexity. We demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms baselines and existing acquisition strategies in both single-target and multi-target settings across a number of synthetic datasets. 我们引入了一种基于梯度的方法来解决贝叶斯最优实验设计问题，以在批量设置中学习因果模型——这是从有限数据中发现因果关系的关键组成部分，在有限数据中，干预措施可能成本高昂或存在风险。现有方法依靠贪婪近似来构建一批实验，同时使用黑盒方法来优化单个目标状态对以进行干预。在这项工作中，我们完全抛弃了黑盒优化技术和贪婪启发法，而是提出了一种概念上简单的端到端基于梯度的优化过程来获取一组最佳干预目标状态对。这样的过程使得设计空间的参数化能够有效地优化一批多目标状态干预，由于其复杂性，迄今为止尚未对这种设置进行探索。我们证明，我们提出的方法在多个合成数据集的单目标和多目标设置中都优于基线和现有的采集策略。 提出一种基于梯度的贝叶斯最优实验设计方法，用于在批量设置中高效学习因果模型，解决干预成本高或风险大的问题。 Yashas Annadani,Panagiotis Tigas,Desi R. Ivanova,Andrew Jesson,Yarin Gal,Adam Foster,Stefan Bauer cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ME

authors_text: Hu Gao,Zhihui Li,Depeng Dang,Ning Wang,Jingfan Yang
title: SU-Net: Pose estimation network for non-cooperative spacecraft on-orbit
title_zh: SU-Net：非合作在轨航天器位姿估计网络
comment: We need to overhaul the paper and innovate
comments: We need to overhaul the paper and innovate
abstract: Spacecraft pose estimation plays a vital role in many on-orbit space missions, such as rendezvous and docking, debris removal, and on-orbit maintenance. At present, space images contain widely varying lighting conditions, high contrast and low resolution, pose estimation of space objects is more challenging than that of objects on earth. In this paper, we analyzing the radar image characteristics of spacecraft on-orbit, then propose a new deep learning neural Network structure named Dense Residual U-shaped Network (DR-U-Net) to extract image features. We further introduce a novel neural network based on DR-U-Net, namely Spacecraft U-shaped Network (SU-Net) to achieve end-to-end pose estimation for non-cooperative spacecraft. Specifically, the SU-Net first preprocess the image of non-cooperative spacecraft, then transfer learning was used for pre-training. Subsequently, in order to solve the problem of radar image blur and low ability of spacecraft contour recognition, we add residual connection and dense connection to the backbone network U-Net, and we named it DR-U-Net. In this way, the feature loss and the complexity of the model is reduced, and the degradation of deep neural network during training is avoided. Finally, a layer of feedforward neural network is used for pose estimation of non-cooperative spacecraft on-orbit. Experiments prove that the proposed method does not rely on the hand-made object specific features, and the model has robust robustness, and the calculation accuracy outperforms the state-of-the-art pose estimation methods. The absolute error is 0.1557 to 0.4491 , the mean error is about 0.302 , and the standard deviation is about 0.065 .
summary: Spacecraft pose estimation plays a vital role in many on-orbit space missions, such as rendezvous and docking, debris removal, and on-orbit maintenance. At present, space images contain widely varying lighting conditions, high contrast and low resolution, pose estimation of space objects is more challenging than that of objects on earth. In this paper, we analyzing the radar image characteristics of spacecraft on-orbit, then propose a new deep learning neural Network structure named Dense Residual U-shaped Network (DR-U-Net) to extract image features. We further introduce a novel neural network based on DR-U-Net, namely Spacecraft U-shaped Network (SU-Net) to achieve end-to-end pose estimation for non-cooperative spacecraft. Specifically, the SU-Net first preprocess the image of non-cooperative spacecraft, then transfer learning was used for pre-training. Subsequently, in order to solve the problem of radar image blur and low ability of spacecraft contour recognition, we add residual connection and dense connection to the backbone network U-Net, and we named it DR-U-Net. In this way, the feature loss and the complexity of the model is reduced, and the degradation of deep neural network during training is avoided. Finally, a layer of feedforward neural network is used for pose estimation of non-cooperative spacecraft on-orbit. Experiments prove that the proposed method does not rely on the hand-made object specific features, and the model has robust robustness, and the calculation accuracy outperforms the state-of-the-art pose estimation methods. The absolute error is 0.1557 to 0.4491 , the mean error is about 0.302 , and the standard deviation is about 0.065 .
abstract_zh: 航天器位姿估计在许多在轨太空任务中发挥着至关重要的作用，例如交会对接、碎片清除和在轨维护。目前，空间图像包含的光照条件变化很大、对比度高、分辨率低，空间物体的位姿估计比地球上的物体更具挑战性。本文分析了在轨航天器的雷达图像特征，提出了一种新的深度学习神经网络结构——密集残差U型网络（DR-U-Net）来提取图像特征。我们进一步介绍了一种基于 DR-U-Net 的新型神经网络，即航天器 U 形网络（SU-Net），以实现非合作航天器的端到端位姿估计。具体来说，SU-Net首先对非合作航天器的图像进行预处理，然后使用迁移学习进行预训练。随后，为了解决雷达图像模糊和航天器轮廓识别能力低的问题，我们在骨干网络U-Net上添加残差连接和密集连接，并将其命名为DR-U-Net。这样就减少了特征损失和模型的复杂度，避免了深度神经网络在训练过程中的退化。最后，利用一层前馈神经网络对在轨非合作航天器进行位姿估计。实验证明，该方法不依赖于手工制作的物体特定特征，模型具有鲁棒性，计算精度优于最先进的姿态估计方法。绝对误差为0.1557～0.4491，平均误差约为0.302，标准差约为0.065。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SU-Net的深度学习网络，用于解决非合作航天器在轨姿态估计中的挑战性问题。
AI.motivation: 在轨航天器姿态估计面临光照变化大、图像分辨率低等挑战，传统方法难以满足高精度需求，需开发更鲁棒的模型。
AI.method: 设计DR-U-Net网络结构（融合残差与密集连接）提取特征，通过迁移学习预训练模型，并采用前馈神经网络实现端到端姿态估计。
AI.result: 实验表明模型绝对误差范围为0.1557-0.4491，均方误差0.302，标准差0.065，性能优于现有方法且无需手工设计特征。
AI.conclusion: SU-Net通过改进网络结构和迁移学习策略，有效提升了非合作航天器姿态估计的精度与鲁棒性，具有实际应用价值。

In this way, the feature loss and the complexity of the model is reduced, and the degradation of deep neural network during training is avoided. authors_text: Haili Sun,Yan Huang,Lansheng Han,Chunjie Zhou
title: Few-shot Detection of Anomalies in Industrial Cyber-Physical System via Prototypical Network and Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过原型网络和对比学习对工业信息物理系统中的异常进行少样本检测
abstract: The rapid development of Industry 4.0 has amplified the scope and destructiveness of industrial Cyber-Physical System (CPS) by network attacks. Anomaly detection techniques are employed to identify these attacks and guarantee the normal operation of industrial CPS. However, it is still a challenging problem to cope with scenarios with few labeled samples. In this paper, we propose a few-shot anomaly detection model (FSL-PN) based on prototypical network and contrastive learning for identifying anomalies with limited labeled data from industrial CPS. Specifically, we design a contrastive loss to assist the training process of the feature extractor and learn more fine-grained features to improve the discriminative performance. Subsequently, to tackle the overfitting issue during classifying, we construct a robust cost function with a specific regularizer to enhance the generalization capability. Experimental results based on two public imbalanced datasets with few-shot settings show that the FSL-PN model can significantly improve F1 score and reduce false alarm rate (FAR) for identifying anomalous signals to guarantee the security of industrial CPS.
summary: The rapid development of Industry 4.0 has amplified the scope and destructiveness of industrial Cyber-Physical System (CPS) by network attacks. Anomaly detection techniques are employed to identify these attacks and guarantee the normal operation of industrial CPS. However, it is still a challenging problem to cope with scenarios with few labeled samples. In this paper, we propose a few-shot anomaly detection model (FSL-PN) based on prototypical network and contrastive learning for identifying anomalies with limited labeled data from industrial CPS. Specifically, we design a contrastive loss to assist the training process of the feature extractor and learn more fine-grained features to improve the discriminative performance. Subsequently, to tackle the overfitting issue during classifying, we construct a robust cost function with a specific regularizer to enhance the generalization capability. Experimental results based on two public imbalanced datasets with few-shot settings show that the FSL-PN model can significantly improve F1 score and reduce false alarm rate (FAR) for identifying anomalous signals to guarantee the security of industrial CPS.
abstract_zh: 工业4.0的快速发展放大了网络攻击对工业信息物理系统（CPS）的影响范围和破坏性。采用异常检测技术来识别这些攻击并保证工业CPS的正常运行。然而，应对标记样本较少的场景仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于原型网络和对比学习的少样本异常检测模型（FSL-PN），用于利用工业 CPS 中有限的标记数据来识别异常。具体来说，我们设计了对比损失来辅助特征提取器的训练过程，并学习更多细粒度的特征以提高判别性能。随后，为了解决分类过程中的过度拟合问题，我们使用特定的正则化器构建了鲁棒的成本函数，以增强泛化能力。基于两个公共不平衡数据集的少样本设置的实验结果表明，FSL-PN模型可以显着提高F1分数并降低误报率（FAR），以识别异常信号，从而保证工业CPS的安全。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于原型网络和对比学习的少样本异常检测模型（FSL-PN），用于工业网络物理系统中有限标记数据下的异常检测。
AI.motivation: 工业4.0背景下，网络攻击对工业网络物理系统（CPS）的威胁加剧，但现有异常检测方法在少量标记样本场景下表现不足，需提升检测精度与泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计对比损失优化特征提取器以学习细粒度特征，并构建带正则化项的鲁棒代价函数，结合原型网络实现少样本分类。
AI.result: 在两个公开不平衡数据集上实验表明，FSL-PN显著提升F1分数并降低误报率（FAR），验证了模型在工业CPS异常检测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FSL-PN通过对比学习与正则化策略有效解决了工业场景下少样本异常检测的泛化难题，为保障CPS安全提供了新方法。

search_text: Few-shot Detection of Anomalies in Industrial Cyber-Physical System via Prototypical Network and Contrastive Learning 通过原型网络和对比学习对工业信息物理系统中的异常进行少样本检测 The rapid development of Industry 4.0 has amplified the scope and destructiveness of industrial Cyber-Physical System (CPS) by network attacks. Anomaly detection techniques are employed to identify these attacks and guarantee the normal operation of industrial CPS. However, it is still a challenging problem to cope with scenarios with few labeled samples. In this paper, we propose a few-shot anomaly detection model (FSL-PN) based on prototypical network and contrastive learning for identifying anomalies with limited labeled data from industrial CPS. Specifically, we design a contrastive loss to assist the training process of the feature extractor and learn more fine-grained features to improve the discriminative performance. Subsequently, to tackle the overfitting issue during classifying, we construct a robust cost function with a specific regularizer to enhance the generalization capability. Experimental results based on two public imbalanced datasets with few-shot settings show that the FSL-PN model can significantly improve F1 score and reduce false alarm rate (FAR) for identifying anomalous signals to guarantee the security of industrial CPS. 工业4.0的快速发展放大了网络攻击对工业信息物理系统（CPS）的影响范围和破坏性。采用异常检测技术来识别这些攻击并保证工业CPS的正常运行。然而，应对标记样本较少的场景仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于原型网络和对比学习的少样本异常检测模型（FSL-PN），用于利用工业 CPS 中有限的标记数据来识别异常。具体来说，我们设计了对比损失来辅助特征提取器的训练过程，并学习更多细粒度的特征以提高判别性能。随后，为了解决分类过程中的过度拟合问题，我们使用特定的正则化器构建了鲁棒的成本函数，以增强泛化能力。基于两个公共不平衡数据集的少样本设置的实验结果表明，FSL-PN模型可以显着提高F1分数并降低误报率（FAR），以识别异常信号，从而保证工业CPS的安全。 本文提出一种基于原型网络和对比学习的少样本异常检测模型（FSL-PN），用于工业网络物理系统中有限标记数据下的异常检测。 Haili Sun,Yan Huang,Lansheng Han,Chunjie Zhou cs.CR,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Pengda Xiang,Sitao Xiang,Yajie Zhao
title: Texturize a GAN Using a Single Image
title_zh: 使用单个图像对 GAN 进行纹理化
comment: This paper is still in the process of improving, a revised version may be released in the future
comments: This paper is still in the process of improving, a revised version may be released in the future
abstract: Can we customize a deep generative model which can generate images that can match the texture of some given image? When you see an image of a church, you may wonder if you can get similar pictures for that church. Here we present a method, for adapting GANs with one reference image, and then we can generate images that have similar textures to the given image. Specifically, we modify the weights of the pre-trained GAN model, guided by the reference image given by the user. We use a patch discriminator adversarial loss to encourage the output of the model to match the texture on the given image, also we use a laplacian adversarial loss to ensure diversity and realism, and alleviate the contradiction between the two losses. Experiments show that the proposed method can make the outputs of GANs match the texture of the given image as well as keep diversity and realism.
summary: Can we customize a deep generative model which can generate images that can match the texture of some given image? When you see an image of a church, you may wonder if you can get similar pictures for that church. Here we present a method, for adapting GANs with one reference image, and then we can generate images that have similar textures to the given image. Specifically, we modify the weights of the pre-trained GAN model, guided by the reference image given by the user. We use a patch discriminator adversarial loss to encourage the output of the model to match the texture on the given image, also we use a laplacian adversarial loss to ensure diversity and realism, and alleviate the contradiction between the two losses. Experiments show that the proposed method can make the outputs of GANs match the texture of the given image as well as keep diversity and realism.
abstract_zh: 我们可以定制一个深度生成模型来生成与某些给定图像的纹理相匹配的图像吗？当您看到教堂的图片时，您可能想知道是否可以获得该教堂的类似图片。在这里，我们提出了一种方法，用一个参考图像来调整 GAN，然后我们可以生成与给定图像具有相似纹理的图像。具体来说，我们在用户给出的参考图像的指导下修改预训练的 GAN 模型的权重。我们使用补丁鉴别器对抗性损失来鼓励模型的输出匹配给定图像上的纹理，同时我们使用拉普拉斯对抗性损失来确保多样性和真实性，并缓解两种损失之间的矛盾。实验表明，该方法可以使 GAN 的输出与给定图像的纹理相匹配，并保持多样性和真实性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种方法，通过单个参考图像调整预训练GAN模型，使其生成的图像能够匹配给定图像的纹理。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN模型难以直接生成与特定参考图像纹理匹配的结果，需解决如何利用单张图像指导生成模型以保持纹理一致性与多样性的问题。
AI.method: 修改预训练GAN权重，结合用户提供的参考图像，采用patch判别器对抗损失确保纹理匹配，并引入拉普拉斯对抗损失以维持生成图像的多样性和真实感，缓解两者间的冲突。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效生成与参考图像纹理一致且具有多样性和真实感的图像。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合两种对抗损失，该方法成功实现了单图像引导的GAN纹理定制，平衡了纹理匹配与生成质量之间的矛盾。

authors_text: Jeldrik Axmann,Yimin Zhang,Claus Brenner
title: Maximum Consensus Localization using an Objective Function based on Helmert's Point Error
title_zh: 使用基于赫尔默特点误差的目标函数进行最大一致性定位
abstract: Ego-localization is a crucial task for autonomous vehicles. On the one hand, it needs to be very accurate, and on the other hand, very robust to provide reliable pose (position and orientation) information, even in challenging environments. Finding the best ego-position is usually tied to optimizing an objective function based on the sensor measurements. The most common approach is to maximize the likelihood, which leads under the assumption of normally distributed random variables to the well-known least squares minimization, often used in conjunction with recursive estimation, e. g. using a Kalman filter. However, least squares minimization is inherently sensitive to outliers, and consequently, more robust loss functions, such as L1 norm or Huber loss have been proposed. Arguably the most robust loss function is the outlier count, also known as maximum consensus optimization, where the outcome is independent of the outlier magnitude. In this paper, we investigate in detail the performance of maximum consensus localization based on LiDAR data. We elaborate on its shortcomings and propose a novel objective function based on Helmert's point error. In an experiment using 3001 measurement epochs, we show that the maximum consensus localization based on the introduced objective function provides superior results with respect to robustness.
summary: Ego-localization is a crucial task for autonomous vehicles. On the one hand, it needs to be very accurate, and on the other hand, very robust to provide reliable pose (position and orientation) information, even in challenging environments. Finding the best ego-position is usually tied to optimizing an objective function based on the sensor measurements. The most common approach is to maximize the likelihood, which leads under the assumption of normally distributed random variables to the well-known least squares minimization, often used in conjunction with recursive estimation, e. g. using a Kalman filter. However, least squares minimization is inherently sensitive to outliers, and consequently, more robust loss functions, such as L1 norm or Huber loss have been proposed. Arguably the most robust loss function is the outlier count, also known as maximum consensus optimization, where the outcome is independent of the outlier magnitude. In this paper, we investigate in detail the performance of maximum consensus localization based on LiDAR data. We elaborate on its shortcomings and propose a novel objective function based on Helmert's point error. In an experiment using 3001 measurement epochs, we show that the maximum consensus localization based on the introduced objective function provides superior results with respect to robustness.
abstract_zh: 自我定位是自动驾驶汽车的一项关键任务。一方面，它需要非常准确，另一方面，即使在具有挑战性的环境中，它也需要非常强大，才能提供可靠的姿势（位置和方向）信息。找到最佳自我位置通常与基于传感器测量结果优化目标函数相关。最常见的方法是最大化似然，这在正态分布随机变量的假设下导致众所周知的最小二乘最小化，通常与递归估计结合使用，例如。 g。使用卡尔曼滤波器。然而，最小二乘最小化本质上对异常值很敏感，因此，人们提出了更鲁棒的损失函数，例如 L1 范数或 Huber 损失。可以说，最稳健的损失函数是离群值计数，也称为最大共识优化，其结果与离群值大小无关。在本文中，我们详细研究了基于 LiDAR 数据的最大共识定位的性能。我们详细阐述了其缺点，并提出了一种基于赫尔默特点误差的新目标函数。在使用 3001 个测量时期的实验中，我们表明基于引入的目标函数的最大共识定位在鲁棒性方面提供了优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于赫尔默特点误差的目标函数，用于改进自动驾驶车辆的鲁棒定位方法。
AI.motivation: 传统最小二乘法对异常值敏感，现有鲁棒损失函数（如L1或Huber）仍受异常值幅度影响，需更优的定位方法。
AI.method: 设计基于赫尔默特点误差的新目标函数，结合最大共识优化框架，利用LiDAR数据进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在3001次测量实验中，新方法在鲁棒性指标上优于传统方法，定位精度和稳定性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 赫尔默特点误差目标函数有效增强了定位鲁棒性，为复杂环境下的自动驾驶提供了更可靠的定位方案。
