search_text: Reusable Slotwise Mechanisms 可重复使用的槽式机构 Agents with the ability to comprehend and reason about the dynamics of objects would be expected to exhibit improved robustness and generalization in novel scenarios. However, achieving this capability necessitates not only an effective scene representation but also an understanding of the mechanisms governing interactions among object subsets. Recent studies have made significant progress in representing scenes using object slots. In this work, we introduce Reusable Slotwise Mechanisms, or RSM, a framework that models object dynamics by leveraging communication among slots along with a modular architecture capable of dynamically selecting reusable mechanisms for predicting the future states of each object slot. Crucially, RSM leverages the Central Contextual Information (CCI), enabling selected mechanisms to access the remaining slots through a bottleneck, effectively allowing for modeling of higher order and complex interactions that might require a sparse subset of objects. Experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of RSM compared to state-of-the-art methods across various future prediction and related downstream tasks, including Visual Question Answering and action planning. Furthermore, we showcase RSM's Out-of-Distribution generalization ability to handle scenes in intricate scenarios. 具有理解和推理对象动态能力的智能体有望在新场景中表现出更高的鲁棒性和泛化能力。然而，实现这种能力不仅需要有效的场景表示，还需要理解控制对象子集之间交互的机制。最近的研究在使用对象槽表示场景方面取得了重大进展。在这项工作中，我们引入了可重用槽位机制（RSM），这是一个通过利用槽之间的通信以及能够动态选择可重用机制来预测每个对象槽的未来状态的模块化架构来建模对象动态的框架。至关重要的是，RSM 利用中央上下文信息 (CCI)，使选定的机制能够通过瓶颈访问剩余的槽，从而有效地允许对可能需要稀疏对象子集的高阶和复杂交互进行建模。实验结果表明，在各种未来预测和相关下游任务（包括视觉问答和行动规划）中，RSM 与最先进的方法相比具有卓越的性能。此外，我们还展示了 RSM 处理复杂场景中的分布外泛化能力。 本文提出一种名为RSM的框架，通过建模物体动态交互来提升场景理解与预测能力。 Trang Nguyen,Amin Mansouri,Kanika Madan,Khuong Nguyen,Kartik Ahuja,Dianbo Liu,Yoshua Bengio cs.AI

authors_text: Erich Kobler,Thomas Pock
title: Learning Gradually Non-convex Image Priors Using Score Matching
title_zh: 使用分数匹配逐步学习非凸图像先验
abstract: In this paper, we propose a unified framework of denoising score-based models in the context of graduated non-convex energy minimization. We show that for sufficiently large noise variance, the associated negative log density -- the energy -- becomes convex. Consequently, denoising score-based models essentially follow a graduated non-convexity heuristic. We apply this framework to learning generalized Fields of Experts image priors that approximate the joint density of noisy images and their associated variances. These priors can be easily incorporated into existing optimization algorithms for solving inverse problems and naturally implement a fast and robust graduated non-convexity mechanism.
summary: In this paper, we propose a unified framework of denoising score-based models in the context of graduated non-convex energy minimization. We show that for sufficiently large noise variance, the associated negative log density -- the energy -- becomes convex. Consequently, denoising score-based models essentially follow a graduated non-convexity heuristic. We apply this framework to learning generalized Fields of Experts image priors that approximate the joint density of noisy images and their associated variances. These priors can be easily incorporated into existing optimization algorithms for solving inverse problems and naturally implement a fast and robust graduated non-convexity mechanism.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们在分级非凸能量最小化的背景下提出了基于去噪评分的模型的统一框架。我们表明，对于足够大的噪声方差，相关的负对数密度（能量）变得凸出。因此，基于评分的去噪模型本质上遵循分级非凸启发式。我们将该框架应用于学习广义专家领域图像先验，该先验近似噪声图像的联合密度及其相关方差。这些先验可以很容易地合并到现有的优化算法中来解决反问题，并自然地实现快速且鲁棒的分级非凸机制。

AI.tldr: 提出一种统一的去噪分数模型框架，结合逐渐非凸能量最小化，用于学习图像先验。
AI.motivation: 解决图像先验学习中的非凸优化难题，提升逆问题求解的鲁棒性和效率。
AI.method: 基于分数匹配的去噪模型，结合逐渐非凸能量最小化框架，学习近似噪声图像与方差联合密度的广义专家领域先验。
AI.result: 证明在高噪声方差下能量函数凸性，实现逐渐非凸优化机制，提升逆问题求解效率与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法统一了去噪分数模型与逐渐非凸优化，为图像先验学习提供了高效鲁棒的新框架。

authors_text: Jiahui Wang,Haiyue Zhu,Haoren Guo,Abdullah Al Mamun,Cheng Xiang,Tong Heng Lee
title: Few-Shot Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation via Contrastive Self-Supervision and Multi-Resolution Attention
title_zh: 通过对比自监督和多分辨率注意进行少镜头点云语义分割
abstract: This paper presents an effective few-shot point cloud semantic segmentation approach for real-world applications. Existing few-shot segmentation methods on point cloud heavily rely on the fully-supervised pretrain with large annotated datasets, which causes the learned feature extraction bias to those pretrained classes. However, as the purpose of few-shot learning is to handle unknown/unseen classes, such class-specific feature extraction in pretrain is not ideal to generalize into new classes for few-shot learning. Moreover, point cloud datasets hardly have a large number of classes due to the annotation difficulty. To address these issues, we propose a contrastive self-supervision framework for few-shot learning pretrain, which aims to eliminate the feature extraction bias through class-agnostic contrastive supervision. Specifically, we implement a novel contrastive learning approach with a learnable augmentor for a 3D point cloud to achieve point-wise differentiation, so that to enhance the pretrain with managed overfitting through the self-supervision. Furthermore, we develop a multi-resolution attention module using both the nearest and farthest points to extract the local and global point information more effectively, and a center-concentrated multi-prototype is adopted to mitigate the intra-class sparsity. Comprehensive experiments are conducted to evaluate the proposed approach, which shows our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance. Moreover, a case study on practical CAM/CAD segmentation is presented to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for real-world applications.
summary: This paper presents an effective few-shot point cloud semantic segmentation approach for real-world applications. Existing few-shot segmentation methods on point cloud heavily rely on the fully-supervised pretrain with large annotated datasets, which causes the learned feature extraction bias to those pretrained classes. However, as the purpose of few-shot learning is to handle unknown/unseen classes, such class-specific feature extraction in pretrain is not ideal to generalize into new classes for few-shot learning. Moreover, point cloud datasets hardly have a large number of classes due to the annotation difficulty. To address these issues, we propose a contrastive self-supervision framework for few-shot learning pretrain, which aims to eliminate the feature extraction bias through class-agnostic contrastive supervision. Specifically, we implement a novel contrastive learning approach with a learnable augmentor for a 3D point cloud to achieve point-wise differentiation, so that to enhance the pretrain with managed overfitting through the self-supervision. Furthermore, we develop a multi-resolution attention module using both the nearest and farthest points to extract the local and global point information more effectively, and a center-concentrated multi-prototype is adopted to mitigate the intra-class sparsity. Comprehensive experiments are conducted to evaluate the proposed approach, which shows our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance. Moreover, a case study on practical CAM/CAD segmentation is presented to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for real-world applications.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种适用于实际应用的有效的少样本点云语义分割方法。现有的点云上的少镜头分割方法严重依赖于具有大型注释数据集的完全监督预训练，这导致学习到的特征提取对那些预训练类的偏差。然而，由于少样本学习的目的是处理未知/未见的类，因此预训练中的此类特定于类的特征提取对于泛化到少样本学习的新类并不理想。此外，由于标注困难，点云数据集几乎没有大量的类。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于少样本学习预训练的对比自监督框架，其目的是通过与类别无关的对比监督来消除特征提取偏差。具体来说，我们实现了一种新颖的对比学习方法，带有可学习增强器，用于 3D 点云，以实现逐点区分，从而通过自我监督来增强预训练和管理过度拟合。此外，我们开发了一个多分辨率注意模块，使用最近和最远的点来更有效地提取局部和全局点信息，并采用中心集中的多原型来减轻类内稀疏性。进行了全面的实验来评估所提出的方法，这表明我们的方法实现了最先进的性能。此外，还提出了一个关于实际 CAM/CAD 分割的案例研究，以证明我们的方法在实际应用中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比自监督和多分辨率注意力的少样本点云语义分割方法，以解决现有方法依赖大规模标注数据导致的特征偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本点云分割方法依赖大规模标注数据预训练，导致特征提取偏向已知类别，难以泛化到新类别；同时点云数据类别数量有限，注释困难。
AI.method: 设计对比自监督预训练框架消除特征偏差，引入可学习增强器实现点级区分；开发多分辨率注意力模块融合局部与全局信息，并采用中心集中多原型结构缓解类内稀疏性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，并通过CAM/CAD实际案例验证了方法在真实场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自监督预训练和多尺度特征融合，有效解决了少样本点云分割中类别偏差和数据稀缺问题，具有实际应用价值。

Moreover, point cloud datasets hardly have a large number of classes due to the annotation difficulty. To address these issues, we propose a contrastive self-supervision framework for few-shot learning pretrain, which aims to eliminate the feature extraction bias through class-agnostic contrastive supervision. Specifically, we implement a novel contrastive learning approach with a learnable augmentor for a 3D point cloud to achieve point-wise differentiation, so that to enhance the pretrain with managed overfitting through the self-supervision. Furthermore, we develop a multi-resolution attention module using both the nearest and farthest points to extract the local and global point information more effectively, and a center-concentrated multi-prototype is adopted to mitigate the intra-class sparsity. Comprehensive experiments are conducted to evaluate the proposed approach, which shows our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance. Moreover, a case study on practical CAM/CAD segmentation is presented to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for real-world applications. 本文提出了一种适用于实际应用的有效的少样本点云语义分割方法。现有的点云上的少镜头分割方法严重依赖于具有大型注释数据集的完全监督预训练，这导致学习到的特征提取对那些预训练类的偏差。然而，由于少样本学习的目的是处理未知/未见的类，因此预训练中的此类特定于类的特征提取对于泛化到少样本学习的新类并不理想。此外，由于标注困难，点云数据集几乎没有大量的类。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于少样本学习预训练的对比自监督框架，其目的是通过与类别无关的对比监督来消除特征提取偏差。具体来说，我们实现了一种新颖的对比学习方法，带有可学习增强器，用于 3D 点云，以实现逐点区分，从而通过自我监督来增强预训练和管理过度拟合。此外，我们开发了一个多分辨率注意模块，使用最近和最远的点来更有效地提取局部和全局点信息，并采用中心集中的多原型来减轻类内稀疏性。进行了全面的实验来评估所提出的方法，这表明我们的方法实现了最先进的性能。此外，还提出了一个关于实际 CAM/CAD 分割的案例研究，以证明我们的方法在实际应用中的有效性。 本文提出一种基于对比自监督和多分辨率注意力的少样本点云语义分割方法，以解决现有方法依赖大规模标注数据导致的特征偏差问题。 Jiahui Wang,Haiyue Zhu,Haoren Guo,Abdullah Al Mamun,Cheng Xiang,Tong Heng Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Seungwoo Son,Jegwang Ryu,Namhoon Lee,Jaeho Lee
title: The Role of Masking for Efficient Supervised Knowledge Distillation of Vision Transformers
title_zh: 掩蔽在视觉变压器高效监督知识蒸馏中的作用
abstract: Knowledge distillation is an effective method for training lightweight vision models. However, acquiring teacher supervision for training samples is often costly, especially from large-scale models like vision transformers (ViTs). In this paper, we develop a simple framework to reduce the supervision cost of ViT distillation: masking out a fraction of input tokens given to the teacher. By masking input tokens, one can skip the computations associated with the masked tokens without requiring any change to teacher parameters or architecture. We find that masking patches with the lowest student attention scores is highly effective, saving up to 50% of teacher FLOPs without any drop in student accuracy, while other masking criterion leads to suboptimal efficiency gains. Through in-depth analyses, we reveal that the student-guided masking provides a good curriculum to the student, making teacher supervision easier to follow during the early stage and challenging in the later stage.
summary: Knowledge distillation is an effective method for training lightweight vision models. However, acquiring teacher supervision for training samples is often costly, especially from large-scale models like vision transformers (ViTs). In this paper, we develop a simple framework to reduce the supervision cost of ViT distillation: masking out a fraction of input tokens given to the teacher. By masking input tokens, one can skip the computations associated with the masked tokens without requiring any change to teacher parameters or architecture. We find that masking patches with the lowest student attention scores is highly effective, saving up to 50% of teacher FLOPs without any drop in student accuracy, while other masking criterion leads to suboptimal efficiency gains. Through in-depth analyses, we reveal that the student-guided masking provides a good curriculum to the student, making teacher supervision easier to follow during the early stage and challenging in the later stage.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏是训练轻量级视觉模型的有效方法。然而，获得教师对训练样本的监督通常成本高昂，尤其是视觉变换器（ViT）等大型模型。在本文中，我们开发了一个简单的框架来降低 ViT 蒸馏的监督成本：屏蔽掉给予教师的一小部分输入令牌。通过屏蔽输入标记，可以跳过与屏蔽标记相关的计算，而不需要对教师参数或体系结构进行任何更改。我们发现，学生注意力分数最低的屏蔽补丁非常有效，可以节省高达 50% 的教师失败次数，而学生的准确性没有任何下降，而其他屏蔽标准会导致效率提升不理想。通过深入分析，我们发现学生引导的掩蔽为学生提供了良好的课程，使教师的监督在早期阶段更容易遵循，在后期阶段更具挑战性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过遮蔽输入标记来降低视觉Transformer（ViT）知识蒸馏中教师模型监督成本的框架。
AI.motivation: 知识蒸馏虽能训练轻量模型，但大型ViT等教师模型的监督成本高昂，需寻找高效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过遮蔽学生模型注意力分数最低的输入标记，减少教师模型计算量，无需修改教师模型参数或结构。
AI.result: 遮蔽策略使教师模型计算量减少50%且学生模型精度无损失，其他遮蔽准则效率较低。
AI.conclusion: 学生引导的遮蔽机制为学生提供渐进式学习路径，早期简化监督难度，后期提升挑战性，实现高效蒸馏。

authors_text: Guoan Xu,Juncheng Li,Guangwei Gao,Huimin Lu,Jian Yang,Dong Yue
title: Lightweight Real-time Semantic Segmentation Network with Efficient Transformer and CNN
title_zh: 具有高效 Transformer 和 CNN 的轻量级实时语义分割网络
comment: IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems, 10 pages
comments: IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems, 10 pages
abstract: In the past decade, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have shown prominence for semantic segmentation. Although CNN models have very impressive performance, the ability to capture global representation is still insufficient, which results in suboptimal results. Recently, Transformer achieved huge success in NLP tasks, demonstrating its advantages in modeling long-range dependency. Recently, Transformer has also attracted tremendous attention from computer vision researchers who reformulate the image processing tasks as a sequence-to-sequence prediction but resulted in deteriorating local feature details. In this work, we propose a lightweight real-time semantic segmentation network called LETNet. LETNet combines a U-shaped CNN with Transformer effectively in a capsule embedding style to compensate for respective deficiencies. Meanwhile, the elaborately designed Lightweight Dilated Bottleneck (LDB) module and Feature Enhancement (FE) module cultivate a positive impact on training from scratch simultaneously. Extensive experiments performed on challenging datasets demonstrate that LETNet achieves superior performances in accuracy and efficiency balance. Specifically, It only contains 0.95M parameters and 13.6G FLOPs but yields 72.8\% mIoU at 120 FPS on the Cityscapes test set and 70.5\% mIoU at 250 FPS on the CamVid test dataset using a single RTX 3090 GPU. The source code will be available at https://github.com/IVIPLab/LETNet.
summary: In the past decade, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have shown prominence for semantic segmentation. Although CNN models have very impressive performance, the ability to capture global representation is still insufficient, which results in suboptimal results. Recently, Transformer achieved huge success in NLP tasks, demonstrating its advantages in modeling long-range dependency. Recently, Transformer has also attracted tremendous attention from computer vision researchers who reformulate the image processing tasks as a sequence-to-sequence prediction but resulted in deteriorating local feature details. In this work, we propose a lightweight real-time semantic segmentation network called LETNet. LETNet combines a U-shaped CNN with Transformer effectively in a capsule embedding style to compensate for respective deficiencies. Meanwhile, the elaborately designed Lightweight Dilated Bottleneck (LDB) module and Feature Enhancement (FE) module cultivate a positive impact on training from scratch simultaneously. Extensive experiments performed on challenging datasets demonstrate that LETNet achieves superior performances in accuracy and efficiency balance. Specifically, It only contains 0.95M parameters and 13.6G FLOPs but yields 72.8\% mIoU at 120 FPS on the Cityscapes test set and 70.5\% mIoU at 250 FPS on the CamVid test dataset using a single RTX 3090 GPU. The source code will be available at https://github.com/IVIPLab/LETNet.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，卷积神经网络（CNN）在语义分割方面表现出了突出的作用。尽管 CNN 模型具有非常令人印象深刻的性能，但捕获全局表示的能力仍然不足，这导致结果不理想。最近，Transformer 在 NLP 任务中取得了巨大成功，展示了其在建模远程依赖方面的优势。最近，Transformer 也引起了计算机视觉研究人员的极大关注，他们将图像处理任务重新表述为序列到序列的预测，但导致局部特征细节恶化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 LETNet 的轻量级实时语义分割网络。 LETNet 以胶囊嵌入方式有效地将 U 形 CNN 与 Transformer 结合起来，以弥补各自的缺陷。同时，精心设计的轻量级扩张瓶颈（LDB）模块和特征增强（FE）模块同时对从头开始的训练产生积极影响。在具有挑战性的数据集上进行的大量实验表明，LETNet 在准确性和效率平衡方面实现了卓越的性能。具体来说，它仅包含 0.95M 参数和 13.6G FLOP，但使用单个 RTX 3090 GPU 在 Cityscapes 测试集上以 120 FPS 的速度产生 72.8% mIoU，在 CamVid 测试数据集上以 250 FPS 的速度产生 70.5% mIoU。源代码可在 https://github.com/IVIPLab/LETNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级实时语义分割网络LETNet，结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与Transformer架构以提升分割精度与效率。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在全局表征能力不足，而Transformer虽擅长长距离依赖建模却损害局部细节，需融合两者优势以解决实时语义分割的精度与效率矛盾。
AI.method: 设计LETNet网络，采用胶囊嵌入风格融合U型CNN与Transformer，引入轻量空洞瓶颈模块（LDB）与特征增强模块（FE），优化参数量与计算量。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上以120 FPS实现72.8% mIoU，在CamVid数据集上以250 FPS实现70.5% mIoU，参数量仅0.95M，FLOPs为13.6G。
AI.conclusion: LETNet通过有效结合CNN与Transformer的优势，在保持实时性的同时显著提升语义分割性能，适用于资源受限场景。

authors_text: Chenxu Li,Rui Hu,Jianan Cui,Huafeng Liu
title: LMPDNet: TOF-PET list-mode image reconstruction using model-based deep learning method
title_zh: LMPDNet：使用基于模型的深度学习方法进行 TOF-PET 列表模式图像重建
abstract: The integration of Time-of-Flight (TOF) information in the reconstruction process of Positron Emission Tomography (PET) yields improved image properties. However, implementing the cutting-edge model-based deep learning methods for TOF-PET reconstruction is challenging due to the substantial memory requirements. In this study, we present a novel model-based deep learning approach, LMPDNet, for TOF-PET reconstruction from list-mode data. We address the issue of real-time parallel computation of the projection matrix for list-mode data, and propose an iterative model-based module that utilizes a dedicated network model for list-mode data. Our experimental results indicate that the proposed LMPDNet outperforms traditional iteration-based TOF-PET list-mode reconstruction algorithms. Additionally, we compare the spatial and temporal consumption of list-mode data and sinogram data in model-based deep learning methods, demonstrating the superiority of list-mode data in model-based TOF-PET reconstruction.
summary: The integration of Time-of-Flight (TOF) information in the reconstruction process of Positron Emission Tomography (PET) yields improved image properties. However, implementing the cutting-edge model-based deep learning methods for TOF-PET reconstruction is challenging due to the substantial memory requirements. In this study, we present a novel model-based deep learning approach, LMPDNet, for TOF-PET reconstruction from list-mode data. We address the issue of real-time parallel computation of the projection matrix for list-mode data, and propose an iterative model-based module that utilizes a dedicated network model for list-mode data. Our experimental results indicate that the proposed LMPDNet outperforms traditional iteration-based TOF-PET list-mode reconstruction algorithms. Additionally, we compare the spatial and temporal consumption of list-mode data and sinogram data in model-based deep learning methods, demonstrating the superiority of list-mode data in model-based TOF-PET reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 在正电子发射断层扫描 (PET) 重建过程中集成飞行时间 (TOF) 信息可改善图像特性。然而，由于大量的内存需求，实施基于模型的尖端深度学习方法进行 TOF-PET 重建具有挑战性。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种基于模型的新型深度学习方法 LMPDNet，用于从列表模式数据重建 TOF-PET。我们解决了列表模式数据的投影矩阵的实时并行计算问题，并提出了一种基于迭代模型的模块，该模块利用列表模式数据的专用网络模型。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的 LMPDNet 优于传统的基于迭代的 TOF-PET 列表模式重建算法。此外，我们还比较了基于模型的深度学习方法中列表模式数据和正弦图数据的空间和时间消耗，证明了列表模式数据在基于模型的 TOF-PET 重建中的优越性。

AI.method: 设计迭代模型模块，结合专用网络处理列表模式数据，并优化投影矩阵的实时并行计算。
AI.result: 实验表明LMPDNet优于传统迭代算法，且列表模式数据在空间和时间消耗上优于正弦图数据。
AI.conclusion: LMPDNet有效提升了TOF-PET重建性能，验证了列表模式数据在模型驱动方法中的优势。

authors_text: Alper Unal,Busra Asan,Ismail Sezen,Bugra Yesilkaynak,Yusuf Aydin,Mehmet Ilicak,Gozde Unal
title: Climate Model Driven Seasonal Forecasting Approach with Deep Learning
title_zh: 气候模型驱动的深度学习季节性预测方法
comment: This article is submitted to 12th International Conference on Climate Informatics 2023
comments: This article is submitted to 12th International Conference on Climate Informatics 2023
abstract: Understanding seasonal climatic conditions is critical for better management of resources such as water, energy and agriculture. Recently, there has been a great interest in utilizing the power of artificial intelligence methods in climate studies. This paper presents a cutting-edge deep learning model (UNet++) trained by state-of-the-art global CMIP6 models to forecast global temperatures a month ahead using the ERA5 reanalysis dataset. ERA5 dataset was also used for finetuning as well performance analysis in the validation dataset. Three different setups (CMIP6; CMIP6 + elevation; CMIP6 + elevation + ERA5 finetuning) were used with both UNet and UNet++ algorithms resulting in six different models. For each model 14 different sequential and non-sequential temporal settings were used. The Mean Absolute Error (MAE) analysis revealed that UNet++ with CMIP6 with elevation and ERA5 finetuning model with "Year 3 Month 2" temporal case provided the best outcome with an MAE of 0.7. Regression analysis over the validation dataset between the ERA5 data values and the corresponding AI model predictions revealed slope and $R^2$ values close to 1 suggesting a very good agreement. The AI model predicts significantly better than the mean CMIP6 ensemble between 2016 and 2021. Both models predict the summer months more accurately than the winter months.
summary: Understanding seasonal climatic conditions is critical for better management of resources such as water, energy and agriculture. Recently, there has been a great interest in utilizing the power of artificial intelligence methods in climate studies. Three different setups (CMIP6; CMIP6 + elevation; CMIP6 + elevation + ERA5 finetuning) were used with both UNet and UNet++ algorithms resulting in six different models. For each model 14 different sequential and non-sequential temporal settings were used. The Mean Absolute Error (MAE) analysis revealed that UNet++ with CMIP6 with elevation and ERA5 finetuning model with "Year 3 Month 2" temporal case provided the best outcome with an MAE of 0.7. The AI model predicts significantly better than the mean CMIP6 ensemble between 2016 and 2021. Both models predict the summer months more accurately than the winter months.
abstract_zh: 了解季节性气候条件对于更好地管理水、能源和农业等资源至关重要。最近，人们对在气候研究中利用人工智能方法的力量产生了浓厚的兴趣。本文提出了一种由最先进的全球 CMIP6 模型训练的尖端深度学习模型 (UNet++)，可使用 ERA5 再分析数据集预测未来一个月的全球气温。 ERA5 数据集还用于验证数据集中的微调和性能分析。 UNet 和 UNet++ 算法使用三种不同的设置（CMIP6；CMIP6 + 海拔；CMIP6 + 海拔 + ERA5 微调），产生六种不同的模型。对于每个模型，使用了 14 种不同的顺序和非顺序时间设置。平均绝对误差 (MAE) 分析显示，UNet++ 与带有海拔的 CMIP6 和具有“第 3 年第 2 个月”时间情况的 ERA5 微调模型提供了最佳结果，MAE 为 0.7。对 ERA5 数据值与相应 AI 模型预测之间的验证数据集进行回归分析，显示斜率和 $R^2$ 值接近 1，表明非常一致。 AI 模型的预测明显优于 2016 年至 2021 年期间的平均 CMIP6 集合。这两个模型对夏季的预测都比冬季更准确。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出一种结合深度学习模型UNet++与CMIP6气候模型及ERA5数据的季节性气温预测方法。
AI.motivation: 准确预测季节性气候对水资源、能源和农业管理至关重要，传统模型存在不足，需借助AI提升预测精度。
AI.method: 采用UNet和UNet++算法，结合CMIP6模型数据与ERA5再分析数据，设计三种数据融合方案并测试14种时间序列设置进行模型训练与验证。
AI.result: UNet++模型在融合高程数据及ERA5微调后表现最佳，MAE为0.7；回归分析显示预测值与ERA5数据高度吻合，且优于CMIP6集成预测，夏季预测精度高于冬季。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型结合多源气候数据能显著提升季节性气温预测精度，尤其在夏季表现优异，为资源管理提供有效工具。

authors_text: Licheng Pan,Hao Wang,Zhichao Chen,Yuxing Huang,Xinggao Liu
title: TMoE-P: Towards the Pareto Optimum for Multivariate Soft Sensors
title_zh: TMoE-P：迈向多元软传感器的帕累托最优
abstract: Multi-variate soft sensor seeks accurate estimation of multiple quality variables using measurable process variables, which have emerged as a key factor in improving the quality of industrial manufacturing. The current progress stays in some direct applications of multitask network architectures; however, there are two fundamental issues remain yet to be investigated with these approaches: (1) negative transfer, where sharing representations despite the difference of discriminate representations for different objectives degrades performance; (2) seesaw phenomenon, where the optimizer focuses on one dominant yet simple objective at the expense of others. In this study, we reformulate the multi-variate soft sensor to a multi-objective problem, to address both issues and advance state-of-the-art performance. To handle the negative transfer issue, we first propose an Objective-aware Mixture-of-Experts (OMoE) module, utilizing objective-specific and objective-shared experts for parameter sharing while maintaining the distinction between objectives. To address the seesaw phenomenon, we then propose a Pareto Objective Routing (POR) module, adjusting the weights of learning objectives dynamically to achieve the Pareto optimum, with solid theoretical supports. We further present a Task-aware Mixture-of-Experts framework for achieving the Pareto optimum (TMoE-P) in multi-variate soft sensor, which consists of a stacked OMoE module and a POR module. We illustrate the efficacy of TMoE-P with an open soft sensor benchmark, where TMoE-P effectively alleviates the negative transfer and seesaw issues and outperforms the baseline models.
summary: Multi-variate soft sensor seeks accurate estimation of multiple quality variables using measurable process variables, which have emerged as a key factor in improving the quality of industrial manufacturing. The current progress stays in some direct applications of multitask network architectures; however, there are two fundamental issues remain yet to be investigated with these approaches: (1) negative transfer, where sharing representations despite the difference of discriminate representations for different objectives degrades performance; (2) seesaw phenomenon, where the optimizer focuses on one dominant yet simple objective at the expense of others. In this study, we reformulate the multi-variate soft sensor to a multi-objective problem, to address both issues and advance state-of-the-art performance. To handle the negative transfer issue, we first propose an Objective-aware Mixture-of-Experts (OMoE) module, utilizing objective-specific and objective-shared experts for parameter sharing while maintaining the distinction between objectives. To address the seesaw phenomenon, we then propose a Pareto Objective Routing (POR) module, adjusting the weights of learning objectives dynamically to achieve the Pareto optimum, with solid theoretical supports. We further present a Task-aware Mixture-of-Experts framework for achieving the Pareto optimum (TMoE-P) in multi-variate soft sensor, which consists of a stacked OMoE module and a POR module. We illustrate the efficacy of TMoE-P with an open soft sensor benchmark, where TMoE-P effectively alleviates the negative transfer and seesaw issues and outperforms the baseline models.
abstract_zh: 多变量软传感器寻求使用可测量的过程变量来准确估计多个质量变量，这已成为提高工业制造质量的关键因素。目前的进展还停留在多任务网络架构的一些直接应用上；然而，这些方法还有两个基本问题有待研究：（1）负迁移，尽管不同目标的歧视性表征存在差异，但共享表征会降低绩效； (2) 跷跷板现象，优化器专注于一个主要但简单的目标，而牺牲其他目标。在这项研究中，我们将多变量软传感器重新表述为多目标问题，以解决这两个问题并提高最先进的性能。为了解决负迁移问题，我们首先提出了一个目标感知混合专家（OMoE）模块，利用特定目标和目标共享专家进行参数共享，同时保持目标之间的区别。为了解决跷跷板现象，我们提出了帕累托目标路由（POR）模块，动态调整学习目标的权重以实现帕累托最优，并具有坚实的理论支持。我们进一步提出了一个任务感知专家混合框架，用于在多变量软传感器中实现帕累托最优（TMoE-P），该框架由堆叠的 OMoE 模块和 POR 模块组成。我们通过开放的软传感器基准来说明 TMoE-P 的功效，其中 TMoE-P 有效地缓解了负迁移和跷跷板问题，并且优于基线模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TMoE-P框架，通过多目标优化解决多变量软传感器中的负迁移和跷跷板现象问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多任务网络在多变量软传感器中存在负迁移（不同目标间表示差异导致性能下降）和跷跷板现象（优化器偏向简单目标而忽视其他目标）两大核心问题，亟需改进方法实现帕累托最优。
AI.method: 设计OMoE模块（目标感知专家混合）实现参数共享与目标区分，结合POR模块（帕累托目标路由）动态调整目标权重，构建TMoE-P框架实现多目标优化。
AI.result: 在公开基准测试中，TMoE-P有效缓解负迁移和跷跷板问题，优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: TMoE-P通过多目标优化框架解决了多变量软传感器的关键挑战，为工业制造质量提升提供了新方法。

search_text: TMoE-P: Towards the Pareto Optimum for Multivariate Soft Sensors TMoE-P：迈向多元软传感器的帕累托最优 Multi-variate soft sensor seeks accurate estimation of multiple quality variables using measurable process variables, which have emerged as a key factor in improving the quality of industrial manufacturing. The current progress stays in some direct applications of multitask network architectures; however, there are two fundamental issues remain yet to be investigated with these approaches: (1) negative transfer, where sharing representations despite the difference of discriminate representations for different objectives degrades performance; (2) seesaw phenomenon, where the optimizer focuses on one dominant yet simple objective at the expense of others. In this study, we reformulate the multi-variate soft sensor to a multi-objective problem, to address both issues and advance state-of-the-art performance. To handle the negative transfer issue, we first propose an Objective-aware Mixture-of-Experts (OMoE) module, utilizing objective-specific and objective-shared experts for parameter sharing while maintaining the distinction between objectives. To address the seesaw phenomenon, we then propose a Pareto Objective Routing (POR) module, adjusting the weights of learning objectives dynamically to achieve the Pareto optimum, with solid theoretical supports. We further present a Task-aware Mixture-of-Experts framework for achieving the Pareto optimum (TMoE-P) in multi-variate soft sensor, which consists of a stacked OMoE module and a POR module. We illustrate the efficacy of TMoE-P with an open soft sensor benchmark, where TMoE-P effectively alleviates the negative transfer and seesaw issues and outperforms the baseline models. 多变量软传感器寻求使用可测量的过程变量来准确估计多个质量变量，这已成为提高工业制造质量的关键因素。目前的进展还停留在多任务网络架构的一些直接应用上；然而，这些方法还有两个基本问题有待研究：（1）负迁移，尽管不同目标的歧视性表征存在差异，但共享表征会降低绩效； (2) 跷跷板现象，优化器专注于一个主要但简单的目标，而牺牲其他目标。在这项研究中，我们将多变量软传感器重新表述为多目标问题，以解决这两个问题并提高最先进的性能。为了解决负迁移问题，我们首先提出了一个目标感知混合专家（OMoE）模块，利用特定目标和目标共享专家进行参数共享，同时保持目标之间的区别。为了解决跷跷板现象，我们提出了帕累托目标路由（POR）模块，动态调整学习目标的权重以实现帕累托最优，并具有坚实的理论支持。我们进一步提出了一个任务感知专家混合框架，用于在多变量软传感器中实现帕累托最优（TMoE-P），该框架由堆叠的 OMoE 模块和 POR 模块组成。我们通过开放的软传感器基准来说明 TMoE-P 的功效，其中 TMoE-P 有效地缓解了负迁移和跷跷板问题，并且优于基线模型。 本文提出TMoE-P框架，通过多目标优化解决多变量软传感器中的负迁移和跷跷板现象问题。 Licheng Pan,Hao Wang,Zhichao Chen,Yuxing Huang,Xinggao Liu cs.AI,stat.AP

authors_text: Kun Wang,Zi Wang,Zhang Li,Ang Su,Xichao Teng,Erting Pan,Minhao Liu,Qifeng Yu
title: Oriented object detection in optical remote sensing images using deep learning: a survey
title_zh: 使用深度学习进行光学遥感图像定向目标检测：一项调查
comment: Wang, K., Wang, Z., Li, Z. et al. Oriented object detection in optical remote sensing images using deep learning: a survey. Artif Intell Rev 58, 350 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1007/s10462-025-11256-0
comments: Wang, K., Wang, Z., Li, Z. et al. Oriented object detection in optical remote sensing images using deep learning: a survey. Artif Intell Rev 58, 350 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1007/s10462-025-11256-0
abstract: Oriented object detection is a fundamental yet challenging task in remote sensing (RS), aiming to locate and classify objects with arbitrary orientations. Recent advancements in deep learning have significantly enhanced the capabilities of oriented object detection methods. Given the rapid development of this field, a comprehensive survey of the recent advances in oriented object detection is presented in this paper. Specifically, we begin by tracing the technical evolution from horizontal object detection to oriented object detection and highlighting the specific related challenges, including feature misalignment, spatial misalignment, oriented bounding box (OBB) regression problems, and common issues encountered in RS. Subsequently, we further categorize the existing methods into detection frameworks, OBB regression techniques, feature representation approaches, and solutions to common issues and provide an in-depth discussion of how these methods address the above challenges. In addition, we cover several publicly available datasets and evaluation protocols. Furthermore, we provide a comprehensive comparison and analysis involving the state-of-the-art methods. Toward the end of this paper, we identify several future directions for oriented object detection research.
summary: Oriented object detection is a fundamental yet challenging task in remote sensing (RS), aiming to locate and classify objects with arbitrary orientations. Recent advancements in deep learning have significantly enhanced the capabilities of oriented object detection methods. Given the rapid development of this field, a comprehensive survey of the recent advances in oriented object detection is presented in this paper. Specifically, we begin by tracing the technical evolution from horizontal object detection to oriented object detection and highlighting the specific related challenges, including feature misalignment, spatial misalignment, oriented bounding box (OBB) regression problems, and common issues encountered in RS. Subsequently, we further categorize the existing methods into detection frameworks, OBB regression techniques, feature representation approaches, and solutions to common issues and provide an in-depth discussion of how these methods address the above challenges. In addition, we cover several publicly available datasets and evaluation protocols. Furthermore, we provide a comprehensive comparison and analysis involving the state-of-the-art methods. Toward the end of this paper, we identify several future directions for oriented object detection research.
abstract_zh: 定向物体检测是遥感（RS）中一项基本但具有挑战性的任务，旨在对任意方向的物体进行定位和分类。深度学习的最新进展显着增强了定向目标检测方法的能力。鉴于该领域的快速发展，本文对定向目标检测的最新进展进行了全面的综述。具体来说，我们首先追踪从水平目标检测到定向目标检测的技术演变，并强调具体的相关挑战，包括特征错位、空间错位、定向边界框（OBB）回归问题以及 RS 中遇到的常见问题。随后，我们将现有方法进一步分类为检测框架、OBB回归技术、特征表示方法和常见问题的解决方案，并深入讨论这些方法如何应对上述挑战。此外，我们还涵盖了几个公开可用的数据集和评估协议。此外，我们还提供了涉及最先进方法的全面比较和分析。在本文的最后，我们确定了面向对象检测研究的几个未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度学习在光学遥感图像定向目标检测领域的最新进展，分析了技术演变、方法分类及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 定向目标检测在遥感图像中面临特征对齐、空间对齐和定向边界框回归等挑战，亟需系统梳理现有方法与技术趋势。
AI.method: 通过技术演进分析、方法分类（检测框架/回归技术/特征表示/问题解决方案）、数据集与评估协议对比，结合实验比较最新方法。
AI.result: 总结了定向检测技术的发展脉络，对比了主流方法的优劣，指出现有技术在遥感场景中的局限性及改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著提升了定向检测性能，但需进一步解决尺度变化、复杂背景干扰等问题，未来研究应关注多模态融合与轻量化模型。

authors_text: Matheus Moraes Hammes,Antonio Robles-Kelly
title: On the Behaviour of Pulsed Qubits and their Application to Feed Forward Networks
title_zh: 关于脉冲量子位的行为及其在前馈网络中的应用
abstract: In the last two decades, the combination of machine learning and quantum computing has been an ever-growing topic of interest but, to this date, the limitations of quantum computing hardware have somewhat restricted the use of complex multi-qubit operations for machine learning. In this paper, we capitalize on the cyclical nature of quantum state probabilities observed on pulsed qubits to propose a single-qubit feed forward block whose architecture allows for classical parameters to be used in a way similar to classical neural networks. To do this, we modulate the pulses exciting qubits to induce superimposed rotations around the Bloch Sphere. The approach presented here has the advantage of employing a single qubit per block. Thus, it is linear with respect to the number of blocks, not polynomial with respect to the number of neurons as opposed to the majority of methods elsewhere. Further, since it employs classical parameters, a large number of iterations and updates at training can be effected without dwelling on coherence times and the gradients can be reused and stored if necessary. We also show how an analogy can be drawn to neural networks using sine-squared activation functions and illustrate how the feed-forward block presented here may be used and implemented on pulse-enabled quantum computers.
summary: In the last two decades, the combination of machine learning and quantum computing has been an ever-growing topic of interest but, to this date, the limitations of quantum computing hardware have somewhat restricted the use of complex multi-qubit operations for machine learning. In this paper, we capitalize on the cyclical nature of quantum state probabilities observed on pulsed qubits to propose a single-qubit feed forward block whose architecture allows for classical parameters to be used in a way similar to classical neural networks. To do this, we modulate the pulses exciting qubits to induce superimposed rotations around the Bloch Sphere. The approach presented here has the advantage of employing a single qubit per block. Thus, it is linear with respect to the number of blocks, not polynomial with respect to the number of neurons as opposed to the majority of methods elsewhere. Further, since it employs classical parameters, a large number of iterations and updates at training can be effected without dwelling on coherence times and the gradients can be reused and stored if necessary. We also show how an analogy can be drawn to neural networks using sine-squared activation functions and illustrate how the feed-forward block presented here may be used and implemented on pulse-enabled quantum computers.
abstract_zh: 在过去的二十年中，机器学习和量子计算的结合一直是一个越来越受关注的话题，但迄今为止，量子计算硬件的局限性在一定程度上限制了复杂的多量子位运算在机器学习中的使用。在本文中，我们利用在脉冲量子位上观察到的量子态概率的循环性质，提出了一种单量子位前馈块，其架构允许以类似于经典神经网络的方式使用经典参数。为此，我们调制激发量子位的脉冲以引起围绕布洛赫球的叠加旋转。这里提出的方法的优点是每个块使用一个量子位。因此，与其他地方的大多数方法相反，它与块的数量是线性的，而不是与神经元的数量相关的多项式。此外，由于它采用经典参数，因此可以在训练时进行大量迭代和更新，而无需关注相干时间，并且如果需要，可以重用和存储梯度。我们还展示了如何使用正弦平方激活函数对神经网络进行类比，并说明如何在支持脉冲的量子计算机上使用和实现此处介绍的前馈块。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于脉冲量子比特的单量子比特前馈网络结构，用于量子计算中的机器学习应用。
AI.motivation: 当前量子计算硬件限制了复杂多量子比特操作的使用，需寻找更高效的量子机器学习方法。
AI.method: 通过调制激发量子比特的脉冲，诱导其在布洛赫球上的叠加旋转，利用经典参数构建单量子比特前馈模块。
AI.result: 实现了与块数线性相关的可扩展性，支持大量训练迭代且无需关注相干时间，展示了与神经网络的类比关系。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为脉冲量子计算机提供了高效的量子神经网络实现方案，具有实际应用潜力。

search_text: On the Behaviour of Pulsed Qubits and their Application to Feed Forward Networks 关于脉冲量子位的行为及其在前馈网络中的应用 In the last two decades, the combination of machine learning and quantum computing has been an ever-growing topic of interest but, to this date, the limitations of quantum computing hardware have somewhat restricted the use of complex multi-qubit operations for machine learning. In this paper, we capitalize on the cyclical nature of quantum state probabilities observed on pulsed qubits to propose a single-qubit feed forward block whose architecture allows for classical parameters to be used in a way similar to classical neural networks. To do this, we modulate the pulses exciting qubits to induce superimposed rotations around the Bloch Sphere. The approach presented here has the advantage of employing a single qubit per block. Thus, it is linear with respect to the number of blocks, not polynomial with respect to the number of neurons as opposed to the majority of methods elsewhere. Further, since it employs classical parameters, a large number of iterations and updates at training can be effected without dwelling on coherence times and the gradients can be reused and stored if necessary. We also show how an analogy can be drawn to neural networks using sine-squared activation functions and illustrate how the feed-forward block presented here may be used and implemented on pulse-enabled quantum computers. 在过去的二十年中，机器学习和量子计算的结合一直是一个越来越受关注的话题，但迄今为止，量子计算硬件的局限性在一定程度上限制了复杂的多量子位运算在机器学习中的使用。在本文中，我们利用在脉冲量子位上观察到的量子态概率的循环性质，提出了一种单量子位前馈块，其架构允许以类似于经典神经网络的方式使用经典参数。为此，我们调制激发量子位的脉冲以引起围绕布洛赫球的叠加旋转。这里提出的方法的优点是每个块使用一个量子位。因此，与其他地方的大多数方法相反，它与块的数量是线性的，而不是与神经元的数量相关的多项式。此外，由于它采用经典参数，因此可以在训练时进行大量迭代和更新，而无需关注相干时间，并且如果需要，可以重用和存储梯度。我们还展示了如何使用正弦平方激活函数对神经网络进行类比，并说明如何在支持脉冲的量子计算机上使用和实现此处介绍的前馈块。 本文提出了一种基于脉冲量子比特的单量子比特前馈网络结构，用于量子计算中的机器学习应用。 Matheus Moraes Hammes,Antonio Robles-Kelly quant-ph,cs.ET,cs.LG

authors_text: Meng Zhang,Wenxuan Guo,Bohao Fan,Yifan Chen,Jianjiang Feng,Jie Zhou
title: A Flexible Multi-view Multi-modal Imaging System for Outdoor Scenes
title_zh: 一种灵活的户外场景多视角多模态成像系统
abstract: Multi-view imaging systems enable uniform coverage of 3D space and reduce the impact of occlusion, which is beneficial for 3D object detection and tracking accuracy. However, existing imaging systems built with multi-view cameras or depth sensors are limited by the small applicable scene and complicated composition. In this paper, we propose a wireless multi-view multi-modal 3D imaging system generally applicable to large outdoor scenes, which consists of a master node and several slave nodes. Multiple spatially distributed slave nodes equipped with cameras and LiDARs are connected to form a wireless sensor network. While providing flexibility and scalability, the system applies automatic spatio-temporal calibration techniques to obtain accurate 3D multi-view multi-modal data. This system is the first imaging system that integrates mutli-view RGB cameras and LiDARs in large outdoor scenes among existing 3D imaging systems. We perform point clouds based 3D object detection and long-term tracking using the 3D imaging dataset collected by this system. The experimental results show that multi-view point clouds greatly improve 3D object detection and tracking accuracy regardless of complex and various outdoor environments.
summary: Multi-view imaging systems enable uniform coverage of 3D space and reduce the impact of occlusion, which is beneficial for 3D object detection and tracking accuracy. However, existing imaging systems built with multi-view cameras or depth sensors are limited by the small applicable scene and complicated composition. In this paper, we propose a wireless multi-view multi-modal 3D imaging system generally applicable to large outdoor scenes, which consists of a master node and several slave nodes. Multiple spatially distributed slave nodes equipped with cameras and LiDARs are connected to form a wireless sensor network. While providing flexibility and scalability, the system applies automatic spatio-temporal calibration techniques to obtain accurate 3D multi-view multi-modal data. This system is the first imaging system that integrates mutli-view RGB cameras and LiDARs in large outdoor scenes among existing 3D imaging systems. We perform point clouds based 3D object detection and long-term tracking using the 3D imaging dataset collected by this system. The experimental results show that multi-view point clouds greatly improve 3D object detection and tracking accuracy regardless of complex and various outdoor environments.
abstract_zh: 多视点成像系统能够均匀覆盖3D空间，减少遮挡的影响，有利于3D物体检测和跟踪的准确性。然而，现有的由多视点相机或深度传感器构建的成像系统受到适用场景小和构图复杂的限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种普遍适用于大型户外场景的无线多视点多模态3D成像系统，该系统由一个主节点和多个从节点组成。多个空间分布的配备摄像头和激光雷达的从节点连接起来形成无线传感器网络。在提供灵活性和可扩展性的同时，系统应用自动时空校准技术来获得准确的3D多视图多模态数据。该系统是现有3D成像系统中首个将多视点RGB相机和激光雷达集成在户外大场景中的成像系统。我们使用该系统收集的 3D 成像数据集执行基于点云的 3D 对象检测和长期跟踪。实验结果表明，无论室外环境复杂多样，多视点云都极大地提高了3D物体检测和跟踪的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于大范围户外场景的无线多视角多模态3D成像系统，通过融合RGB相机和LiDAR数据提升3D目标检测与跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多视角成像系统受限于小场景覆盖和复杂结构，难以适应大规模户外环境下的3D感知需求。
AI.method: 构建由主节点和分布式从节点组成的无线传感器网络，集成自动时空标定技术，融合多视角RGB相机与LiDAR的多模态数据。
AI.result: 实验表明，多视角点云数据在复杂户外环境下显著提升了3D目标检测与长期跟踪的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统是首个在大规模户外场景中整合多视角RGB相机与LiDAR的3D成像系统，验证了多模态数据融合的有效性。

authors_text: Renhao Huang,Hao Xue,Maurice Pagnucco,Flora Salim,Yang Song
title: Vision-based Multi-future Trajectory Prediction: A Survey
title_zh: 基于视觉的多未来轨迹预测：调查
abstract: Vision-based trajectory prediction is an important task that supports safe and intelligent behaviours in autonomous systems. Many advanced approaches have been proposed over the years with improved spatial and temporal feature extraction. However, human behaviour is naturally diverse and uncertain. Given the past trajectory and surrounding environment information, an agent can have multiple plausible trajectories in the future. To tackle this problem, an essential task named multi-future trajectory prediction (MTP) has recently been studied. This task aims to generate a diverse, acceptable and explainable distribution of future predictions for each agent. In this paper, we present the first survey for MTP with our unique taxonomies and a comprehensive analysis of frameworks, datasets and evaluation metrics. We also compare models on existing MTP datasets and conduct experiments on the ForkingPath dataset. Finally, we discuss multiple future directions that can help researchers develop novel multi-future trajectory prediction systems and other diverse learning tasks similar to MTP.
summary: Vision-based trajectory prediction is an important task that supports safe and intelligent behaviours in autonomous systems. Many advanced approaches have been proposed over the years with improved spatial and temporal feature extraction. However, human behaviour is naturally diverse and uncertain. Given the past trajectory and surrounding environment information, an agent can have multiple plausible trajectories in the future. To tackle this problem, an essential task named multi-future trajectory prediction (MTP) has recently been studied. This task aims to generate a diverse, acceptable and explainable distribution of future predictions for each agent. In this paper, we present the first survey for MTP with our unique taxonomies and a comprehensive analysis of frameworks, datasets and evaluation metrics. We also compare models on existing MTP datasets and conduct experiments on the ForkingPath dataset. Finally, we discuss multiple future directions that can help researchers develop novel multi-future trajectory prediction systems and other diverse learning tasks similar to MTP.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的轨迹预测是支持自主系统中安全和智能行为的一项重要任务。多年来，人们提出了许多改进的空间和时间特征提取的先进方法。然而，人类的行为本质上是多样且不确定的。给定过去的轨迹和周围环境信息，智能体在未来可以有多个合理的轨迹。为了解决这个问题，最近研究了一项名为多未来轨迹预测（MTP）的基本任务。该任务旨在为每个智能体生成多样化、可接受且可解释的未来预测分布。在本文中，我们通过独特的分类法以及对框架、数据集和评估指标的全面分析，提出了首次 MTP 调查。我们还比较了现有 MTP 数据集上的模型，并在 ForkingPath 数据集上进行了实验。最后，我们讨论了多个未来方向，可以帮助研究人员开发新颖的多未来轨迹预测系统和其他类似于 MTP 的多样化学习任务。

AI.tldr: 本文对基于视觉的多未来轨迹预测（MTP）方法进行了首次系统性综述，分析了框架、数据集和评估指标，并在ForkingPath数据集上进行实验。
AI.motivation: 人类行为具有多样性和不确定性，单一未来轨迹预测难以满足实际需求，需生成多样且可解释的多未来轨迹分布以提升自动驾驶系统的安全性和智能化水平。
AI.method: 提出独特分类体系，全面分析现有MTP框架、数据集及评估指标，比较模型在现有数据集上的表现，并在ForkingPath数据集上开展实验验证。
AI.result: 总结了MTP领域技术发展现状，揭示了不同方法的优劣，实验结果验证了所提分析的有效性，并指出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 本综述为研究人员开发新型多未来轨迹预测系统及其他类似任务提供了理论指导和技术参考。

authors_text: Madhumitha Sakthi,Ahmed Tewfik,Marius Arvinte,Haris Vikalo
title: Automotive RADAR sub-sampling via object detection networks: Leveraging prior signal information
title_zh: 通过物体检测网络进行汽车雷达二次采样：利用先验信号信息
abstract: Automotive radar has increasingly attracted attention due to growing interest in autonomous driving technologies. Acquiring situational awareness using multimodal data collected at high sampling rates by various sensing devices including cameras, LiDAR, and radar requires considerable power, memory and compute resources which are often limited at an edge device. In this paper, we present a novel adaptive radar sub-sampling algorithm designed to identify regions that require more detailed/accurate reconstruction based on prior environmental conditions' knowledge, enabling near-optimal performance at considerably lower effective sampling rates. Designed to robustly perform under variable weather conditions, the algorithm was shown on the Oxford raw radar and RADIATE dataset to achieve accurate reconstruction utilizing only 10% of the original samples in good weather and 20% in extreme (snow, fog) weather conditions. A further modification of the algorithm incorporates object motion to enable reliable identification of important regions. This includes monitoring possible future occlusions caused by objects detected in the present frame. Finally, we train a YOLO network on the RADIATE dataset to perform object detection directly on RADAR data and obtain a 6.6% AP50 improvement over the baseline Faster R-CNN network.
summary: Automotive radar has increasingly attracted attention due to growing interest in autonomous driving technologies. Acquiring situational awareness using multimodal data collected at high sampling rates by various sensing devices including cameras, LiDAR, and radar requires considerable power, memory and compute resources which are often limited at an edge device. In this paper, we present a novel adaptive radar sub-sampling algorithm designed to identify regions that require more detailed/accurate reconstruction based on prior environmental conditions' knowledge, enabling near-optimal performance at considerably lower effective sampling rates. Designed to robustly perform under variable weather conditions, the algorithm was shown on the Oxford raw radar and RADIATE dataset to achieve accurate reconstruction utilizing only 10% of the original samples in good weather and 20% in extreme (snow, fog) weather conditions. A further modification of the algorithm incorporates object motion to enable reliable identification of important regions. This includes monitoring possible future occlusions caused by objects detected in the present frame. Finally, we train a YOLO network on the RADIATE dataset to perform object detection directly on RADAR data and obtain a 6.6% AP50 improvement over the baseline Faster R-CNN network.
abstract_zh: 由于人们对自动驾驶技术的兴趣日益浓厚，汽车雷达越来越受到人们的关注。使用摄像头、激光雷达和雷达等各种传感设备以高采样率收集的多模态数据来获取态势感知需要大量的功率、内存和计算资源，而这些资源通常在边缘设备上受到限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应雷达子采样算法，旨在根据先验环境条件知识来识别需要更详细/准确重建的区域，从而以相当低的有效采样率实现接近最佳的性能。该算法旨在在多变的天气条件下稳健地执行，在牛津原始雷达和 RADIATE 数据集上显示，在良好天气下仅利用 10% 的原始样本，在极端（雪、雾）天气条件下仅利用 20% 的原始样本来实现精确重建。该算法的进一步修改结合了物体运动，以实现重要区域的可靠识别。这包括监视由当前帧中检测到的对象引起的未来可能的遮挡。最后，我们在 RADIATE 数据集上训练 YOLO 网络，直接在 RADAR 数据上执行目标检测，并比基线 Faster R-CNN 网络获得 6.6% 的 AP50 改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于目标检测网络的汽车雷达自适应欠采样算法，利用先验信号信息实现低采样率下的高精度重建。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶技术对多模态传感器数据的高采样率需求导致边缘设备计算资源消耗过大，需在保证性能的前提下降低采样率。
AI.method: 设计结合环境先验知识与目标运动预测的自适应欠采样算法，并训练YOLO网络直接处理雷达数据进行目标检测。
AI.result: 在良好天气下仅需10%原始样本、极端天气下20%样本即可实现准确重建，YOLO网络在RADIATE数据集上较Faster R-CNN提升6.6% AP50指标。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合环境先验信息与目标检测模型，可在显著降低采样率的同时保持雷达感知性能，为边缘设备资源优化提供有效方案。

search_text: Automotive RADAR sub-sampling via object detection networks: Leveraging prior signal information 通过物体检测网络进行汽车雷达二次采样：利用先验信号信息 Automotive radar has increasingly attracted attention due to growing interest in autonomous driving technologies. Acquiring situational awareness using multimodal data collected at high sampling rates by various sensing devices including cameras, LiDAR, and radar requires considerable power, memory and compute resources which are often limited at an edge device. In this paper, we present a novel adaptive radar sub-sampling algorithm designed to identify regions that require more detailed/accurate reconstruction based on prior environmental conditions' knowledge, enabling near-optimal performance at considerably lower effective sampling rates. Designed to robustly perform under variable weather conditions, the algorithm was shown on the Oxford raw radar and RADIATE dataset to achieve accurate reconstruction utilizing only 10% of the original samples in good weather and 20% in extreme (snow, fog) weather conditions. A further modification of the algorithm incorporates object motion to enable reliable identification of important regions. This includes monitoring possible future occlusions caused by objects detected in the present frame. Finally, we train a YOLO network on the RADIATE dataset to perform object detection directly on RADAR data and obtain a 6.6% AP50 improvement over the baseline Faster R-CNN network. 由于人们对自动驾驶技术的兴趣日益浓厚，汽车雷达越来越受到人们的关注。使用摄像头、激光雷达和雷达等各种传感设备以高采样率收集的多模态数据来获取态势感知需要大量的功率、内存和计算资源，而这些资源通常在边缘设备上受到限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应雷达子采样算法，旨在根据先验环境条件知识来识别需要更详细/准确重建的区域，从而以相当低的有效采样率实现接近最佳的性能。该算法旨在在多变的天气条件下稳健地执行，在牛津原始雷达和 RADIATE 数据集上显示，在良好天气下仅利用 10% 的原始样本，在极端（雪、雾）天气条件下仅利用 20% 的原始样本来实现精确重建。该算法的进一步修改结合了物体运动，以实现重要区域的可靠识别。这包括监视由当前帧中检测到的对象引起的未来可能的遮挡。最后，我们在 RADIATE 数据集上训练 YOLO 网络，直接在 RADAR 数据上执行目标检测，并比基线 Faster R-CNN 网络获得 6.6% 的 AP50 改进。 本文提出一种基于目标检测网络的汽车雷达自适应欠采样算法，利用先验信号信息实现低采样率下的高精度重建。 Madhumitha Sakthi,Ahmed Tewfik,Marius Arvinte,Haris Vikalo cs.CV,eess.SP

authors_text: Wenxiong Liao,Zhengliang Liu,Haixing Dai,Zihao Wu,Yiyang Zhang,Xiaoke Huang,Yuzhong Chen,Xi Jiang,Wei Liu,Dajiang Zhu,Tianming Liu,Sheng Li,Xiang Li,Hongmin Cai
title: Mask-guided BERT for Few Shot Text Classification
title_zh: 用于少镜头文本分类的掩模引导 BERT
abstract: Transformer-based language models have achieved significant success in various domains. However, the data-intensive nature of the transformer architecture requires much labeled data, which is challenging in low-resource scenarios (i.e., few-shot learning (FSL)). The main challenge of FSL is the difficulty of training robust models on small amounts of samples, which frequently leads to overfitting. Here we present Mask-BERT, a simple and modular framework to help BERT-based architectures tackle FSL. The proposed approach fundamentally differs from existing FSL strategies such as prompt tuning and meta-learning. The core idea is to selectively apply masks on text inputs and filter out irrelevant information, which guides the model to focus on discriminative tokens that influence prediction results. In addition, to make the text representations from different categories more separable and the text representations from the same category more compact, we introduce a contrastive learning loss function. Experimental results on public-domain benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of Mask-BERT.
summary: Transformer-based language models have achieved significant success in various domains. However, the data-intensive nature of the transformer architecture requires much labeled data, which is challenging in low-resource scenarios (i.e., few-shot learning (FSL)). The main challenge of FSL is the difficulty of training robust models on small amounts of samples, which frequently leads to overfitting. Here we present Mask-BERT, a simple and modular framework to help BERT-based architectures tackle FSL. The proposed approach fundamentally differs from existing FSL strategies such as prompt tuning and meta-learning. The core idea is to selectively apply masks on text inputs and filter out irrelevant information, which guides the model to focus on discriminative tokens that influence prediction results. In addition, to make the text representations from different categories more separable and the text representations from the same category more compact, we introduce a contrastive learning loss function. Experimental results on public-domain benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of Mask-BERT.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的语言模型在各个领域都取得了巨大的成功。然而，Transformer 架构的数据密集性质需要大量标记数据，这在资源匮乏的场景（即少样本学习（FSL））中具有挑战性。 FSL 的主要挑战是难以在少量样本上训练鲁棒模型，这经常导致过度拟合。在这里，我们介绍 Mask-BERT，这是一个简单的模块化框架，可帮助基于 BERT 的架构解决 FSL 问题。所提出的方法与现有的 FSL 策略（例如即时调整和元学习）有根本的不同。其核心思想是有选择地对文本输入应用掩码并过滤掉不相关的信息，从而引导模型专注于影响预测结果的判别性标记。此外，为了使不同类别的文本表示更加可分离，并使同一类别的文本表示更加紧凑，我们引入了对比学习损失函数。公共领域基准数据集上的实验结果证明了 Mask-BERT 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mask-BERT框架，通过掩码机制和对比学习解决少样本文本分类问题。
AI.motivation: 传统BERT模型在少样本场景下易过拟合，现有方法如提示调优和元学习存在局限性，需新策略提升低资源条件下的分类性能。
AI.method: 在文本输入中选择性应用掩码过滤无关信息，并引入对比学习损失函数增强类别可分离性与类内紧凑性。
AI.result: 在公共基准数据集上的实验验证了Mask-BERT的有效性，优于现有少样本学习方法。
AI.conclusion: Mask-BERT通过掩码引导与对比学习机制，为少样本文本分类提供了简单且高效的解决方案。

However, the data-intensive nature of the transformer architecture requires much labeled data, which is challenging in low-resource scenarios (i.e., few-shot learning (FSL)). The main challenge of FSL is the difficulty of training robust models on small amounts of samples, which frequently leads to overfitting. authors_text: Yuhong Deng,Chongkun Xia,Xueqian Wang,Lipeng Chen
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning Based on Local GNN for Goal-conditioned Deformable Object Rearranging
title_zh: 基于局部 GNN 的深度强化学习用于目标条件可变形对象重排
comment: has been accepted by IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems 2022
comments: has been accepted by IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems 2022
abstract: Object rearranging is one of the most common deformable manipulation tasks, where the robot needs to rearrange a deformable object into a goal configuration. Previous studies focus on designing an expert system for each specific task by model-based or data-driven approaches and the application scenarios are therefore limited. Some research has been attempting to design a general framework to obtain more advanced manipulation capabilities for deformable rearranging tasks, with lots of progress achieved in simulation. However, transferring from simulation to reality is difficult due to the limitation of the end-to-end CNN architecture. To address these challenges, we design a local GNN (Graph Neural Network) based learning method, which utilizes two representation graphs to encode keypoints detected from images. Self-attention is applied for graph updating and cross-attention is applied for generating manipulation actions. Extensive experiments have been conducted to demonstrate that our framework is effective in multiple 1-D (rope, rope ring) and 2-D (cloth) rearranging tasks in simulation and can be easily transferred to a real robot by fine-tuning a keypoint detector.
summary: Object rearranging is one of the most common deformable manipulation tasks, where the robot needs to rearrange a deformable object into a goal configuration. Previous studies focus on designing an expert system for each specific task by model-based or data-driven approaches and the application scenarios are therefore limited. Some research has been attempting to design a general framework to obtain more advanced manipulation capabilities for deformable rearranging tasks, with lots of progress achieved in simulation. However, transferring from simulation to reality is difficult due to the limitation of the end-to-end CNN architecture. To address these challenges, we design a local GNN (Graph Neural Network) based learning method, which utilizes two representation graphs to encode keypoints detected from images. Self-attention is applied for graph updating and cross-attention is applied for generating manipulation actions. Extensive experiments have been conducted to demonstrate that our framework is effective in multiple 1-D (rope, rope ring) and 2-D (cloth) rearranging tasks in simulation and can be easily transferred to a real robot by fine-tuning a keypoint detector.
abstract_zh: 物体重新排列是最常见的可变形操纵任务之一，机器人需要将可变形物体重新排列成目标配置。以往的研究主要集中在通过基于模型或数据驱动的方法为每个特定任务设计专家系统，因此应用场景受到限制。一些研究一直在尝试设计一个通用框架，以获得更先进的可变形重排任务的操作能力，并在模拟方面取得了很多进展。然而，由于端到端 CNN 架构的限制，从模拟到现实的转移很困难。为了解决这些挑战，我们设计了一种基于局部 GNN（图神经网络）的学习方法，该方法利用两个表示图来编码从图像中检测到的关键点。自注意力用于图更新，交叉注意力用于生成操作动作。大量的实验表明，我们的框架在模拟中的多个一维（绳索、绳环）和二维（布料）重新排列任务中是有效的，并且可以通过微调关键点检测器轻松地转移到真实的机器人上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部图神经网络（GNN）的深度强化学习方法，用于解决目标条件下的可变形物体重排问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖特定任务的专家系统或端到端CNN架构，难以实现通用化且难以从模拟环境迁移到现实场景。
AI.method: 设计局部GNN框架，通过两个图结构编码图像关键点，结合自注意力更新图表示，利用交叉注意力生成操作动作。
AI.result: 框架在模拟环境中的绳索、绳环和布料等任务中表现有效，并可通过微调关键点检测器迁移到真实机器人。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为可变形物体重排提供了通用且可迁移的解决方案，验证了图神经网络在复杂操作任务中的潜力。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法为可变形物体重排提供了通用且可迁移的解决方案，验证了图神经网络在复杂操作任务中的潜力。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部图神经网络（GNN）的深度强化学习方法，用于解决目标条件下的可变形物体重排问题。
motivation: 传统方法依赖特定任务的专家系统或端到端CNN架构，难以实现通用化且难以从模拟环境迁移到现实场景。
method: 设计局部GNN框架，通过两个图结构编码图像关键点，结合自注意力更新图表示，利用交叉注意力生成操作动作。
result: 框架在模拟环境中的绳索、绳环和布料等任务中表现有效，并可通过微调关键点检测器迁移到真实机器人。
conclusion: 该方法为可变形物体重排提供了通用且可迁移的解决方案，验证了图神经网络在复杂操作任务中的潜力。
search_text: Deep Reinforcement Learning Based on Local GNN for Goal-conditioned Deformable Object Rearranging 基于局部 GNN 的深度强化学习用于目标条件可变形对象重排 Object rearranging is one of the most common deformable manipulation tasks, where the robot needs to rearrange a deformable object into a goal configuration. Previous studies focus on designing an expert system for each specific task by model-based or data-driven approaches and the application scenarios are therefore limited. Some research has been attempting to design a general framework to obtain more advanced manipulation capabilities for deformable rearranging tasks, with lots of progress achieved in simulation. However, transferring from simulation to reality is difficult due to the limitation of the end-to-end CNN architecture. To address these challenges, we design a local GNN (Graph Neural Network) based learning method, which utilizes two representation graphs to encode keypoints detected from images. Self-attention is applied for graph updating and cross-attention is applied for generating manipulation actions. Extensive experiments have been conducted to demonstrate that our framework is effective in multiple 1-D (rope, rope ring) and 2-D (cloth) rearranging tasks in simulation and can be easily transferred to a real robot by fine-tuning a keypoint detector. 物体重新排列是最常见的可变形操纵任务之一，机器人需要将可变形物体重新排列成目标配置。以往的研究主要集中在通过基于模型或数据驱动的方法为每个特定任务设计专家系统，因此应用场景受到限制。一些研究一直在尝试设计一个通用框架，以获得更先进的可变形重排任务的操作能力，并在模拟方面取得了很多进展。然而，由于端到端 CNN 架构的限制，从模拟到现实的转移很困难。为了解决这些挑战，我们设计了一种基于局部 GNN（图神经网络）的学习方法，该方法利用两个表示图来编码从图像中检测到的关键点。自注意力用于图更新，交叉注意力用于生成操作动作。大量的实验表明，我们的框架在模拟中的多个一维（绳索、绳环）和二维（布料）重新排列任务中是有效的，并且可以通过微调关键点检测器轻松地转移到真实的机器人上。 本文提出一种基于局部图神经网络（GNN）的深度强化学习方法，用于解决目标条件下的可变形物体重排问题。 Yuhong Deng,Chongkun Xia,Xueqian Wang,Lipeng Chen cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuhong Deng,Chongkun Xia,Xueqian Wang,Lipeng Chen
title: Graph-Transporter: A Graph-based Learning Method for Goal-Conditioned Deformable Object Rearranging Task
title_zh: Graph-Transporter：一种基于图的目标条件可变形物体重新排列任务的学习方法
comment: has been accepted by IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man and Cybernetics 2022
comments: has been accepted by IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man and Cybernetics 2022
abstract: Rearranging deformable objects is a long-standing challenge in robotic manipulation for the high dimensionality of configuration space and the complex dynamics of deformable objects. We present a novel framework, Graph-Transporter, for goal-conditioned deformable object rearranging tasks. To tackle the challenge of complex configuration space and dynamics, we represent the configuration space of a deformable object with a graph structure and the graph features are encoded by a graph convolution network. Our framework adopts an architecture based on Fully Convolutional Network (FCN) to output pixel-wise pick-and-place actions from only visual input. Extensive experiments have been conducted to validate the effectiveness of the graph representation of deformable object configuration. The experimental results also demonstrate that our framework is effective and general in handling goal-conditioned deformable object rearranging tasks.
summary: Rearranging deformable objects is a long-standing challenge in robotic manipulation for the high dimensionality of configuration space and the complex dynamics of deformable objects. We present a novel framework, Graph-Transporter, for goal-conditioned deformable object rearranging tasks. To tackle the challenge of complex configuration space and dynamics, we represent the configuration space of a deformable object with a graph structure and the graph features are encoded by a graph convolution network. Our framework adopts an architecture based on Fully Convolutional Network (FCN) to output pixel-wise pick-and-place actions from only visual input. Extensive experiments have been conducted to validate the effectiveness of the graph representation of deformable object configuration. The experimental results also demonstrate that our framework is effective and general in handling goal-conditioned deformable object rearranging tasks.
abstract_zh: 由于配置空间的高维性和可变形物体的复杂动力学，重新排列可变形物体是机器人操纵中长期存在的挑战。我们提出了一个新颖的框架，Graph-Transporter，用于目标条件可变形对象重新排列任务。为了解决复杂配置空间和动力学的挑战，我们用图结构表示可变形物体的配置空间，并且图特征由图卷积网络编码。我们的框架采用基于全卷积网络（FCN）的架构，仅从视觉输入输出像素级的拾取和放置动作。已经进行了大量的实验来验证可变形物体配置的图形表示的有效性。实验结果还表明，我们的框架在处理目标条件可变形对象重新排列任务方面是有效且通用的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图结构的深度学习框架Graph-Transporter，用于解决目标条件下的可变形物体重排任务。
AI.motivation: 可变形物体的重排任务因配置空间高维性和动力学复杂性而长期存在挑战，传统方法难以有效建模和处理。
AI.method: 通过图结构表示可变形物体的配置空间，利用图卷积网络编码图特征，并采用全卷积网络（FCN）从视觉输入直接输出像素级抓取与放置动作。
AI.result: 实验验证了图表示方法在可变形物体配置建模中的有效性，且框架在目标条件下表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Graph-Transporter框架通过图结构与视觉感知的结合，为可变形物体的重排任务提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Wei Liu,Kaiqi Fu,Xiaohai Tian,Shuju Shi,Wei Li,Zejun Ma,Tan Lee
title: Leveraging phone-level linguistic-acoustic similarity for utterance-level pronunciation scoring
title_zh: 利用音素级语言声学相似性进行话语级发音评分
abstract: Recent studies on pronunciation scoring have explored the effect of introducing phone embeddings as reference pronunciation, but mostly in an implicit manner, i.e., addition or concatenation of reference phone embedding and actual pronunciation of the target phone as the phone-level pronunciation quality representation. In this paper, we propose to use linguistic-acoustic similarity to explicitly measure the deviation of non-native production from its native reference for pronunciation assessment. Specifically, the deviation is first estimated by the cosine similarity between reference phone embedding and corresponding acoustic embedding. Next, a phone-level Goodness of pronunciation (GOP) pre-training stage is introduced to guide this similarity-based learning for better initialization of the aforementioned two embeddings. Finally, a transformer-based hierarchical pronunciation scorer is used to map a sequence of phone embeddings, acoustic embeddings along with their similarity measures to predict the final utterance-level score. Experimental results on the non-native databases suggest that the proposed system significantly outperforms the baselines, where the acoustic and phone embeddings are simply added or concatenated. A further examination shows that the phone embeddings learned in the proposed approach are able to capture linguistic-acoustic attributes of native pronunciation as reference.
summary: Recent studies on pronunciation scoring have explored the effect of introducing phone embeddings as reference pronunciation, but mostly in an implicit manner, i.e., addition or concatenation of reference phone embedding and actual pronunciation of the target phone as the phone-level pronunciation quality representation. In this paper, we propose to use linguistic-acoustic similarity to explicitly measure the deviation of non-native production from its native reference for pronunciation assessment. Specifically, the deviation is first estimated by the cosine similarity between reference phone embedding and corresponding acoustic embedding. Next, a phone-level Goodness of pronunciation (GOP) pre-training stage is introduced to guide this similarity-based learning for better initialization of the aforementioned two embeddings. Finally, a transformer-based hierarchical pronunciation scorer is used to map a sequence of phone embeddings, acoustic embeddings along with their similarity measures to predict the final utterance-level score. Experimental results on the non-native databases suggest that the proposed system significantly outperforms the baselines, where the acoustic and phone embeddings are simply added or concatenated. A further examination shows that the phone embeddings learned in the proposed approach are able to capture linguistic-acoustic attributes of native pronunciation as reference.
abstract_zh: 最近的发音评分研究探索了引入音素嵌入作为参考发音的效果，但大多是以隐式的方式，即参考音素嵌入和目标音素的实际发音相加或串联作为音素级发音质量表示。在本文中，我们建议使用语言声学相似性来明确衡量非母语产品与其母语参考的偏差，以进行发音评估。具体来说，首先通过参考音素嵌入和相应声学嵌入之间的余弦相似度来估计偏差。接下来，引入音素级发音优度（GOP）预训练阶段来指导这种基于相似性的学习，以更好地初始化上述两个嵌入。最后，使用基于变压器的分层发音评分器来映射一系列音素嵌入、声学嵌入及其相似性度量，以预测最终的话语级别得分。非本地数据库的实验结果表明，所提出的系统显着优于基线，其中声学和电话嵌入只是简单地添加或连接。进一步的检查表明，在所提出的方法中学习的电话嵌入能够捕获母语发音的语言声学属性作为参考。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于音素级语义-声学相似性的发音评分方法，通过显式测量非母语发音与母语参考的偏差来提升发音评估效果。
AI.motivation: 现有发音评分方法多采用隐式融合参考音素嵌入与实际发音嵌入的方式，难以有效捕捉发音偏差的语义-声学特征。
AI.method: 1. 通过参考音素嵌入与声学嵌入的余弦相似度估计发音偏差；2. 引入音素级发音质量预训练阶段优化嵌入初始化；3. 使用Transformer分层模型融合音素/声学嵌入及相似度信息生成话语级评分。
AI.result: 在非母语数据库实验中，该方法显著优于简单拼接/相加的基线模型，且学习到的音素嵌入能有效表征母语发音的语义-声学属性。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模语义-声学相似性的方法能更准确捕捉发音偏差，为非母语发音评估提供了有效解决方案。
